authors_text: Xin Wu,Danfeng Hong,Jocelyn Chanussot
title: UIU-Net: U-Net in U-Net for Infrared Small Object Detection
title_zh: UIU-Net：用于红外小物体检测的U-Net中的U-Net
abstract: Learning-based infrared small object detection methods currently rely heavily on the classification backbone network. This tends to result in tiny object loss and feature distinguishability limitations as the network depth increases. Furthermore, small objects in infrared images are frequently emerged bright and dark, posing severe demands for obtaining precise object contrast information. For this reason, we in this paper propose a simple and effective ``U-Net in U-Net'' framework, UIU-Net for short, and detect small objects in infrared images. As the name suggests, UIU-Net embeds a tiny U-Net into a larger U-Net backbone, enabling the multi-level and multi-scale representation learning of objects. Moreover, UIU-Net can be trained from scratch, and the learned features can enhance global and local contrast information effectively. More specifically, the UIU-Net model is divided into two modules: the resolution-maintenance deep supervision (RM-DS) module and the interactive-cross attention (IC-A) module. RM-DS integrates Residual U-blocks into a deep supervision network to generate deep multi-scale resolution-maintenance features while learning global context information. Further, IC-A encodes the local context information between the low-level details and high-level semantic features. Extensive experiments conducted on two infrared single-frame image datasets, i.e., SIRST and Synthetic datasets, show the effectiveness and superiority of the proposed UIU-Net in comparison with several state-of-the-art infrared small object detection methods. The proposed UIU-Net also produces powerful generalization performance for video sequence infrared small object datasets, e.g., ATR ground/air video sequence dataset. The codes of this work are available openly at \url{https://github.com/danfenghong/IEEE_TIP_UIU-Net}.

This tends to result in tiny object loss and feature distinguishability limitations as the network depth increases. Furthermore, small objects in infrared images are frequently emerged bright and dark, posing severe demands for obtaining precise object contrast information. For this reason, we in this paper propose a simple and effective ``U-Net in U-Net'' framework, UIU-Net for short, and detect small objects in infrared images. As the name suggests, UIU-Net embeds a tiny U-Net into a larger U-Net backbone, enabling the multi-level and multi-scale representation learning of objects. Moreover, UIU-Net can be trained from scratch, and the learned features can enhance global and local contrast information effectively. More specifically, the UIU-Net model is divided into two modules: the resolution-maintenance deep supervision (RM-DS) module and the interactive-cross attention (IC-A) module. RM-DS integrates Residual U-blocks into a deep supervision network to generate deep multi-scale resolution-maintenance features while learning global context information. Further, IC-A encodes the local context information between the low-level details and high-level semantic features. Extensive experiments conducted on two infrared single-frame image datasets, i.e., SIRST and Synthetic datasets, show the effectiveness and superiority of the proposed UIU-Net in comparison with several state-of-the-art infrared small object detection methods. The proposed UIU-Net also produces powerful generalization performance for video sequence infrared small object datasets, e.g., ATR ground/air video sequence dataset. The codes of this work are available openly at \url{https://github.com/danfenghong/IEEE_TIP_UIU-Net}.
abstract_zh: 基于学习的红外小物体检测方法目前严重依赖分类骨干网络。随着网络深度的增加，这往往会导致微小的对象丢失和特征可区分性限制。此外，红外图像中的小物体经常出现明亮和黑暗的情况，对获得精确的物体对比度信息提出了严格的要求。为此，我们在本文中提出了一种简单有效的“U-Net in U-Net”框架，简称UIU-Net，并检测红外图像中的小物体。顾名思义，UIU-Net 将一个微小的 U-Net 嵌入到一个更大的 U-Net 主干中，从而实现对象的多层次、多尺度表示学习。而且，UIU-Net可以从头开始训练，学习到的特征可以有效增强全局和局部对比度信息。更具体地说，UIU-Net模型分为两个模块：分辨率维护深度监督（RM-DS）模块和交互交叉注意（IC-A）模块。 RM-DS 将 Residual U-blocks 集成到深度监督网络中，以生成深度多尺度分辨率维护特征，同时学习全局上下文信息。此外，IC-A 对低级细节和高级语义特征之间的局部上下文信息进行编码。在两个红外单帧图像数据集（即 SIRST 和合成数据集）上进行的大量实验表明，与几种最先进的红外小目标检测方法相比，所提出的 UIU-Net 的有效性和优越性。所提出的 UIU-Net 还为视频序列红外小物体数据集（例如 ATR 地面/空中视频序列数据集）提供了强大的泛化性能。这项工作的代码可以在 \url{https://github.com/danfenghong/IEEE_TIP_UIU-Net} 上公开获得。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为UIU-Net的框架，通过嵌套U-Net结构提升红外小目标检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于分类主干网络的红外小目标检测方法存在目标丢失和特征区分度不足的问题，且红外图像中小目标明暗变化大，需增强对比信息。
AI.method: 设计双模块框架：分辨率保持深度监督（RM-DS）模块通过残差U-block生成多尺度特征，交互交叉注意力（IC-A）模块融合高低层次特征，嵌套U-Net结构实现多级多尺度表征学习。
AI.result: 在SIRST、Synthetic等数据集上优于现有方法，且在ATR视频数据集上表现出强泛化能力，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: UIU-Net通过结构创新有效解决了红外小目标检测中的特征表达与对比增强问题，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Rahul Kale,Zhi Lu,Kar Wai Fok,Vrizlynn L. L. Thing
title: A Hybrid Deep Learning Anomaly Detection Framework for Intrusion Detection
title_zh: 用于入侵检测的混合深度学习异常检测框架
comment: Keywords: Cybersecurity, Anomaly Detection, Intrusion Detection, Deep Learning, Unsupervised Learning, Neural Networks; https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/9799486
comments: Keywords: Cybersecurity, Anomaly Detection, Intrusion Detection, Deep Learning, Unsupervised Learning, Neural Networks; https://ieeexplore.ieee.org/document/9799486
abstract: Cyber intrusion attacks that compromise the users' critical and sensitive data are escalating in volume and intensity, especially with the growing connections between our daily life and the Internet. The large volume and high complexity of such intrusion attacks have impeded the effectiveness of most traditional defence techniques. While at the same time, the remarkable performance of the machine learning methods, especially deep learning, in computer vision, had garnered research interests from the cyber security community to further enhance and automate intrusion detections. However, the expensive data labeling and limitation of anomalous data make it challenging to train an intrusion detector in a fully supervised manner. Therefore, intrusion detection based on unsupervised anomaly detection is an important feature too. In this paper, we propose a three-stage deep learning anomaly detection based network intrusion attack detection framework. The framework comprises an integration of unsupervised (K-means clustering), semi-supervised (GANomaly) and supervised learning (CNN) algorithms. We then evaluated and showed the performance of our implemented framework on three benchmark datasets: NSL-KDD, CIC-IDS2018, and TON_IoT.
summary: Cyber intrusion attacks that compromise the users' critical and sensitive data are escalating in volume and intensity, especially with the growing connections between our daily life and the Internet. The large volume and high complexity of such intrusion attacks have impeded the effectiveness of most traditional defence techniques. While at the same time, the remarkable performance of the machine learning methods, especially deep learning, in computer vision, had garnered research interests from the cyber security community to further enhance and automate intrusion detections. However, the expensive data labeling and limitation of anomalous data make it challenging to train an intrusion detector in a fully supervised manner. Therefore, intrusion detection based on unsupervised anomaly detection is an important feature too. In this paper, we propose a three-stage deep learning anomaly detection based network intrusion attack detection framework. The framework comprises an integration of unsupervised (K-means clustering), semi-supervised (GANomaly) and supervised learning (CNN) algorithms. We then evaluated and showed the performance of our implemented framework on three benchmark datasets: NSL-KDD, CIC-IDS2018, and TON_IoT.
abstract_zh: 危害用户关键和敏感数据的网络入侵攻击的数量和强度正在不断升级，特别是随着我们的日常生活与互联网之间的联系日益紧密。此类入侵攻击的数量大、复杂性高，阻碍了大多数传统防御技术的有效性。与此同时，机器学习方法，尤其是深度学习在计算机视觉方面的卓越表现，引起了网络安全界的研究兴趣，以进一步增强和自动化入侵检测。然而，昂贵的数据标记和异常数据的限制使得以完全监督的方式训练入侵检测器变得具有挑战性。因此，基于无监督异常检测的入侵检测也是一个重要特征。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于三阶段深度学习异常检测的网络入侵攻击检测框架。该框架集成了无监督（K-means 聚类）、半监督（GANomaly）和监督学习（CNN）算法。然后，我们在三个基准数据集：NSL-KDD、CIC-IDS2018 和 TON_IoT 上评估并展示了我们实现的框架的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合无监督、半监督和监督学习的三阶段深度学习异常检测框架，用于网络入侵检测。
AI.motivation: 传统防御技术难以应对日益增长的网络攻击，且监督学习因标注数据成本高和异常数据有限而受限，需探索更有效的检测方法。
AI.method: 整合K-means聚类（无监督）、GANomaly（半监督）和CNN（监督）算法，构建三阶段检测框架，并在NSL-KDD、CIC-IDS2018和TON_IoT三个数据集上验证性能。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，该框架在三个基准数据集上表现出良好的入侵检测性能，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: 混合深度学习框架通过结合多种学习方法，提升了入侵检测的准确性与适应性，为应对复杂网络攻击提供了新思路。

authors_text: Zheng Wu,Wenzhao Lian,Changhao Wang,Mengxi Li,Stefan Schaal,Masayoshi Tomizuka
title: Prim-LAfD: A Framework to Learn and Adapt Primitive-Based Skills from Demonstrations for Insertion Tasks
title_zh: Prim-LAfD：从插入任务演示中学习和适应基于原始技能的框架
abstract: Learning generalizable insertion skills in a data-efficient manner has long been a challenge in the robot learning community. While the current state-of-the-art methods with reinforcement learning (RL) show promising performance in acquiring manipulation skills, the algorithms are data-hungry and hard to generalize. To overcome the issues, in this paper we present Prim-LAfD, a simple yet effective framework to learn and adapt primitive-based insertion skills from demonstrations. Prim-LAfD utilizes black-box function optimization to learn and adapt the primitive parameters leveraging prior experiences. Human demonstrations are modeled as dense rewards guiding parameter learning. We validate the effectiveness of the proposed method on eight peg-hole and connector-socket insertion tasks. The experimental results show that our proposed framework takes less than one hour to acquire the insertion skills and as few as fifteen minutes to adapt to an unseen insertion task on a physical robot.
summary: Learning generalizable insertion skills in a data-efficient manner has long been a challenge in the robot learning community. While the current state-of-the-art methods with reinforcement learning (RL) show promising performance in acquiring manipulation skills, the algorithms are data-hungry and hard to generalize. To overcome the issues, in this paper we present Prim-LAfD, a simple yet effective framework to learn and adapt primitive-based insertion skills from demonstrations. Prim-LAfD utilizes black-box function optimization to learn and adapt the primitive parameters leveraging prior experiences. Human demonstrations are modeled as dense rewards guiding parameter learning. We validate the effectiveness of the proposed method on eight peg-hole and connector-socket insertion tasks. The experimental results show that our proposed framework takes less than one hour to acquire the insertion skills and as few as fifteen minutes to adapt to an unseen insertion task on a physical robot.
abstract_zh: 以数据有效的方式学习可推广的插入技能长期以来一直是机器人学习社区的一个挑战。虽然当前最先进的强化学习（RL）方法在获取操作技能方面表现出良好的性能，但这些算法需要大量数据且难以泛化。为了克服这些问题，在本文中，我们提出了 Prim-LAfD，这是一个简单而有效的框架，用于从演示中学习和适应基于原语的插入技能。 Prim-LAfD 利用黑盒函数优化来学习和调整利用先前经验的原始参数。人类演示被建模为指导参数学习的密集奖励。我们验证了所提出的方法在八个钉孔和连接器插座插入任务上的有效性。实验结果表明，我们提出的框架只需不到一小时即可获得插入技能，只需十五分钟即可适应物理机器人上看不见的插入任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Prim-LAfD框架，通过演示学习和适应基于原始技能的插入任务，解决机器人学习中数据效率和泛化能力不足的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习方法虽能学习操作技能，但数据需求高且泛化能力差，难以高效适应新任务。
AI.method: 利用黑盒函数优化学习并调整原始参数，结合人类演示作为密集奖励引导参数学习。
AI.result: 在八种插孔与连接器任务中验证，框架可在一小时内掌握技能，十五分钟适应新任务。
AI.conclusion: Prim-LAfD通过演示高效学习插入技能，为机器人数据高效学习与快速适应提供新方法。

authors_text: Hong Ming,Jiaoyun Yang,Lili Jiang,Yan Pan,Ning An
title: Few-Shot Nested Named Entity Recognition
title_zh: 少样本嵌套命名实体识别
abstract: While Named Entity Recognition (NER) is a widely studied task, making inferences of entities with only a few labeled data has been challenging, especially for entities with nested structures. Unlike flat entities, entities and their nested entities are more likely to have similar semantic feature representations, drastically increasing difficulties in classifying different entity categories in the few-shot setting. Although prior work has briefly discussed nested structures in the context of few-shot learning, to our best knowledge, this paper is the first one specifically dedicated to studying the few-shot nested NER task. Leveraging contextual dependency to distinguish nested entities, we propose a Biaffine-based Contrastive Learning (BCL) framework. We first design a Biaffine span representation module for learning the contextual span dependency representation for each entity span rather than only learning its semantic representation. We then merge these two representations by the residual connection to distinguish nested entities. Finally, we build a contrastive learning framework to adjust the representation distribution for larger margin boundaries and more generalized domain transfer learning ability. We conducted experimental studies on three English, German, and Russian nested NER datasets. The results show that the BCL outperformed three baseline models on the 1-shot and 5-shot tasks in terms of F1 score.
summary: While Named Entity Recognition (NER) is a widely studied task, making inferences of entities with only a few labeled data has been challenging, especially for entities with nested structures. Unlike flat entities, entities and their nested entities are more likely to have similar semantic feature representations, drastically increasing difficulties in classifying different entity categories in the few-shot setting. Although prior work has briefly discussed nested structures in the context of few-shot learning, to our best knowledge, this paper is the first one specifically dedicated to studying the few-shot nested NER task. Leveraging contextual dependency to distinguish nested entities, we propose a Biaffine-based Contrastive Learning (BCL) framework. We first design a Biaffine span representation module for learning the contextual span dependency representation for each entity span rather than only learning its semantic representation. We then merge these two representations by the residual connection to distinguish nested entities. Finally, we build a contrastive learning framework to adjust the representation distribution for larger margin boundaries and more generalized domain transfer learning ability. We conducted experimental studies on three English, German, and Russian nested NER datasets. The results show that the BCL outperformed three baseline models on the 1-shot and 5-shot tasks in terms of F1 score.
abstract_zh: 虽然命名实体识别 (NER) 是一项广泛研究的任务，但仅使用少量标记数据对实体进行推断一直具有挑战性，特别是对于具有嵌套结构的实体。与平面实体不同，实体及其嵌套实体更有可能具有相似的语义特征表示，这大大增加了在少样本设置中对不同实体类别进行分类的难度。尽管之前的工作已经简要讨论了少样本学习背景下的嵌套结构，但据我们所知，本文是第一篇专门致力于研究少样本嵌套 NER 任务的论文。利用上下文依赖来区分嵌套实体，我们提出了一种基于 Biaffine 的对比学习（BCL）框架。我们首先设计一个 Biaffine 跨度表示模块，用于学习每个实体跨度的上下文跨度依赖表示，而不仅仅是学习其语义表示。然后，我们通过残差连接合并这两种表示以区分嵌套实体。最后，我们构建了一个对比学习框架来调整表示分布，以获得更大的边缘边界和更广义的域迁移学习能力。我们对三个英语、德语和俄语嵌套 NER 数据集进行了实验研究。结果表明，BCL 在 1-shot 和 5-shot 任务上的 F1 分数优于三个基线模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对少样本嵌套命名实体识别（Few-Shot Nested NER）的框架，旨在解决在仅有少量标注数据时识别嵌套实体的挑战。
AI.motivation: 嵌套实体的语义特征相似性导致分类困难，而现有研究未专门针对少样本场景下的嵌套NER任务进行深入探索。
AI.method: 设计基于双仿射（Biaffine）的对比学习框架（BCL），通过学习实体跨度的上下文依赖表示并结合残差连接区分嵌套实体，最后利用对比学习优化表示分布。
AI.result: 在三个英文、德文和俄文嵌套NER数据集上，BCL在1-shot和5-shot任务中均优于三个基线模型，F1分数显著提升。
AI.conclusion: BCL框架有效解决了少样本嵌套NER的挑战，为该领域提供了新的方法和基准。

authors_text: Youngwon Choi,M. Wasil Wahi-Anwar,Matthew S. Brown
title: SimpleMind adds thinking to deep neural networks
title_zh: SimpleMind 为深度神经网络添加思考
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNNs) detect patterns in data and have shown versatility and strong performance in many computer vision applications. However, DNNs alone are susceptible to obvious mistakes that violate simple, common sense concepts and are limited in their ability to use explicit knowledge to guide their search and decision making. While overall DNN performance metrics may be good, these obvious errors, coupled with a lack of explainability, have prevented widespread adoption for crucial tasks such as medical image analysis. The purpose of this paper is to introduce SimpleMind, an open-source software framework for Cognitive AI focused on medical image understanding. It allows creation of a knowledge base that describes expected characteristics and relationships between image objects in an intuitive human-readable form. The SimpleMind framework brings thinking to DNNs by: (1) providing methods for reasoning with the knowledge base about image content, such as spatial inferencing and conditional reasoning to check DNN outputs; (2) applying process knowledge, in the form of general-purpose software agents, that are chained together to accomplish image preprocessing, DNN prediction, and result post-processing, and (3) performing automatic co-optimization of all knowledge base parameters to adapt agents to specific problems. SimpleMind enables reasoning on multiple detected objects to ensure consistency, providing cross checking between DNN outputs. This machine reasoning improves the reliability and trustworthiness of DNNs through an interpretable model and explainable decisions. Example applications are provided that demonstrate how SimpleMind supports and improves deep neural networks by embedding them within a Cognitive AI framework.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNNs) detect patterns in data and have shown versatility and strong performance in many computer vision applications. However, DNNs alone are susceptible to obvious mistakes that violate simple, common sense concepts and are limited in their ability to use explicit knowledge to guide their search and decision making. While overall DNN performance metrics may be good, these obvious errors, coupled with a lack of explainability, have prevented widespread adoption for crucial tasks such as medical image analysis. The purpose of this paper is to introduce SimpleMind, an open-source software framework for Cognitive AI focused on medical image understanding. It allows creation of a knowledge base that describes expected characteristics and relationships between image objects in an intuitive human-readable form. The SimpleMind framework brings thinking to DNNs by: (1) providing methods for reasoning with the knowledge base about image content, such as spatial inferencing and conditional reasoning to check DNN outputs; (2) applying process knowledge, in the form of general-purpose software agents, that are chained together to accomplish image preprocessing, DNN prediction, and result post-processing, and (3) performing automatic co-optimization of all knowledge base parameters to adapt agents to specific problems. SimpleMind enables reasoning on multiple detected objects to ensure consistency, providing cross checking between DNN outputs. This machine reasoning improves the reliability and trustworthiness of DNNs through an interpretable model and explainable decisions. Example applications are provided that demonstrate how SimpleMind supports and improves deep neural networks by embedding them within a Cognitive AI framework.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络 (DNN) 可检测数据模式，并在许多计算机视觉应用中显示出多功能性和强大的性能。然而，DNN 本身很容易出现违反简单常识概念的明显错误，并且使用显性知识来指导搜索和决策的能力受到限制。虽然总体 DNN 性能指标可能不错，但这些明显的错误，加上缺乏可解释性，阻碍了医学图像分析等关键任务的广泛采用。本文的目的是介绍 SimpleMind，这是一个专注于医学图像理解的认知 AI 开源软件框架。它允许创建一个知识库，以直观的人类可读形式描述图像对象之间的预期特征和关系。 SimpleMind 框架通过以下方式为 DNN 带来思考：（1）提供利用图像内容知识库进行推理的方法，例如空间推理和条件推理来检查 DNN 输出； (2) 以通用软件代理的形式应用过程知识，这些知识链接在一起以完成图像预处理、DNN 预测和结果后处理，以及 (3) 对所有知识库参数执行自动协同优化，以使代理适应特定问题。 SimpleMind 能够对多个检测到的对象进行推理以确保一致性，并在 DNN 输出之间提供交叉检查。这种机器推理通过可解释的模型和可解释的决策提高了 DNN 的可靠性和可信度。提供的示例应用程序演示了 SimpleMind 如何通过将深度神经网络嵌入到认知 AI 框架中来支持和改进深度神经网络。

AI.tldr: 本文提出SimpleMind框架，将认知AI引入深度神经网络，以提升其在医学图像理解中的可靠性和可解释性。
AI.motivation: 深度神经网络虽然在许多计算机视觉任务中表现出色，但容易犯违反常识的明显错误，且缺乏可解释性，这限制了其在如医学图像分析等关键任务中的应用。
AI.method: SimpleMind框架通过构建知识库、引入推理方法和软件代理链，结合自动优化参数，使深度神经网络具备推理能力，从而提升其决策的可靠性与可解释性。
AI.result: SimpleMind展示了其在医学图像分析中的应用效果，表明通过嵌入认知AI框架，深度神经网络的性能和可靠性得到了显著提升。
AI.conclusion: SimpleMind通过引入可解释性和推理机制，有效提升了深度神经网络在关键任务中的可靠性和可信任度，为未来AI在医疗等领域的应用提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出SimpleMind框架，将认知AI引入深度神经网络，以提升其在医学图像理解中的可靠性和可解释性。
ai_content.motivation: 深度神经网络虽然在许多计算机视觉任务中表现出色，但容易犯违反常识的明显错误，且缺乏可解释性，这限制了其在如医学图像分析等关键任务中的应用。
ai_content.method: SimpleMind框架通过构建知识库、引入推理方法和软件代理链，结合自动优化参数，使深度神经网络具备推理能力，从而提升其决策的可靠性与可解释性。
ai_content.result: SimpleMind展示了其在医学图像分析中的应用效果，表明通过嵌入认知AI框架，深度神经网络的性能和可靠性得到了显著提升。
ai_content.conclusion: SimpleMind通过引入可解释性和推理机制，有效提升了深度神经网络在关键任务中的可靠性和可信任度，为未来AI在医疗等领域的应用提供了新思路。

search_text: SimpleMind adds thinking to deep neural networks SimpleMind 为深度神经网络添加思考 Deep neural networks (DNNs) detect patterns in data and have shown versatility and strong performance in many computer vision applications. However, DNNs alone are susceptible to obvious mistakes that violate simple, common sense concepts and are limited in their ability to use explicit knowledge to guide their search and decision making. While overall DNN performance metrics may be good, these obvious errors, coupled with a lack of explainability, have prevented widespread adoption for crucial tasks such as medical image analysis. The purpose of this paper is to introduce SimpleMind, an open-source software framework for Cognitive AI focused on medical image understanding. It allows creation of a knowledge base that describes expected characteristics and relationships between image objects in an intuitive human-readable form. The SimpleMind framework brings thinking to DNNs by: (1) providing methods for reasoning with the knowledge base about image content, such as spatial inferencing and conditional reasoning to check DNN outputs; (2) applying process knowledge, in the form of general-purpose software agents, that are chained together to accomplish image preprocessing, DNN prediction, and result post-processing, and (3) performing automatic co-optimization of all knowledge base parameters to adapt agents to specific problems. SimpleMind enables reasoning on multiple detected objects to ensure consistency, providing cross checking between DNN outputs. This machine reasoning improves the reliability and trustworthiness of DNNs through an interpretable model and explainable decisions. Example applications are provided that demonstrate how SimpleMind supports and improves deep neural networks by embedding them within a Cognitive AI framework. 深度神经网络 (DNN) 可检测数据模式，并在许多计算机视觉应用中显示出多功能性和强大的性能。然而，DNN 本身很容易出现违反简单常识概念的明显错误，并且使用显性知识来指导搜索和决策的能力受到限制。虽然总体 DNN 性能指标可能不错，但这些明显的错误，加上缺乏可解释性，阻碍了医学图像分析等关键任务的广泛采用。本文的目的是介绍 SimpleMind，这是一个专注于医学图像理解的认知 AI 开源软件框架。它允许创建一个知识库，以直观的人类可读形式描述图像对象之间的预期特征和关系。 SimpleMind 框架通过以下方式为 DNN 带来思考：（1）提供利用图像内容知识库进行推理的方法，例如空间推理和条件推理来检查 DNN 输出； (2) 以通用软件代理的形式应用过程知识，这些知识链接在一起以完成图像预处理、DNN 预测和结果后处理，以及 (3) 对所有知识库参数执行自动协同优化，以使代理适应特定问题。 SimpleMind 能够对多个检测到的对象进行推理以确保一致性，并在 DNN 输出之间提供交叉检查。这种机器推理通过可解释的模型和可解释的决策提高了 DNN 的可靠性和可信度。提供的示例应用程序演示了 SimpleMind 如何通过将深度神经网络嵌入到认知 AI 框架中来支持和改进深度神经网络。 本文提出SimpleMind框架，将认知AI引入深度神经网络，以提升其在医学图像理解中的可靠性和可解释性。 Youngwon Choi,M. Wasil Wahi-Anwar,Matthew S. Brown cs.AI

authors_text: Diego Arroyuelo,Juan Pablo Castillo
title: Trie-Compressed Intersectable Sets
title_zh: 特里压缩可交集
abstract: We introduce space- and time-efficient algorithms and data structures for the offline set intersection problem. We show that a sorted integer set $S \subseteq [0{..}u)$ of $n$ elements can be represented using compressed space while supporting $k$-way intersections in adaptive $O(kδ\lg{\!(u/δ)})$ time, $δ$ being the alternation measure introduced by Barbay and Kenyon. Our experimental results suggest that our approaches are competitive in practice, outperforming the most efficient alternatives (Partitioned Elias-Fano indexes, Roaring Bitmaps, and Recursive Universe Partitioning (RUP)) in several scenarios, offering in general relevant space-time trade-offs.
summary: We introduce space- and time-efficient algorithms and data structures for the offline set intersection problem. We show that a sorted integer set $S \subseteq [0{..}u)$ of $n$ elements can be represented using compressed space while supporting $k$-way intersections in adaptive $O(kδ\lg{\!(u/δ)})$ time, $δ$ being the alternation measure introduced by Barbay and Kenyon. Our experimental results suggest that our approaches are competitive in practice, outperforming the most efficient alternatives (Partitioned Elias-Fano indexes, Roaring Bitmaps, and Recursive Universe Partitioning (RUP)) in several scenarios, offering in general relevant space-time trade-offs.
abstract_zh: 我们为离线集合交集问题引入了空间和时间高效的算法和数据结构。我们证明，$n$ 个元素的排序整数集 $S \subseteq [0{..}u)$ 可以使用压缩空间表示，同时支持自适应 $O(kδ\lg{\!(u/δ)})$ 时间内的 $k$ 路交集，$δ$ 是 Barbay 和 Kenyon 引入的交替度量。我们的实验结果表明，我们的方法在实践中具有竞争力，在多种情况下优于最有效的替代方案（分区 Elias-Fano 索引、Roaring 位图和递归宇宙分区 (RUP)），提供一般相关的时空权衡。

AI.tldr: 提出高效算法和数据结构解决离线集合交集问题，实现压缩存储与快速多路交集运算
AI.motivation: 现有方法在空间和时间效率上存在不足，需优化以实现更好的平衡
AI.method: 基于Trie压缩结构，结合交替度量δ，设计支持高效k路交集的算法，时间复杂度为O(kδ log(u/δ))
AI.result: 实验显示在多种场景下优于现有方法（如Partitioned Elias-Fano、Roaring Bitmaps、RUP），实现更优的空间时间权衡
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法在实际应用中具有竞争力，提供有效的时间空间权衡

authors_text: Hairong Luo,Ge Gao,Han Huang,Ziyi Ke,Cheng Peng,Ming Gu
title: A Geometric-Relational Deep Learning Framework for BIM Object Classification
title_zh: 用于 BIM 对象分类的几何关系深度学习框架
comment: Computer Vision for Civil and Infrastructure Engineering Workshop (CVCIE @ ECCV2022)
comments: Computer Vision for Civil and Infrastructure Engineering Workshop (CVCIE @ ECCV2022)
abstract: Interoperability issue is a significant problem in Building Information Modeling (BIM). Object type, as a kind of critical semantic information needed in multiple BIM applications like scan-to-BIM and code compliance checking, also suffers when exchanging BIM data or creating models using software of other domains. It can be supplemented using deep learning. Current deep learning methods mainly learn from the shape information of BIM objects for classification, leaving relational information inherent in the BIM context unused. To address this issue, we introduce a two-branch geometric-relational deep learning framework. It boosts previous geometric classification methods with relational information. We also present a BIM object dataset IFCNet++, which contains both geometric and relational information about the objects. Experiments show that our framework can be flexibly adapted to different geometric methods. And relational features do act as a bonus to general geometric learning methods, obviously improving their classification performance, thus reducing the manual labor of checking models and improving the practical value of enriched BIM models.
summary: Interoperability issue is a significant problem in Building Information Modeling (BIM). Object type, as a kind of critical semantic information needed in multiple BIM applications like scan-to-BIM and code compliance checking, also suffers when exchanging BIM data or creating models using software of other domains. It can be supplemented using deep learning. Current deep learning methods mainly learn from the shape information of BIM objects for classification, leaving relational information inherent in the BIM context unused. To address this issue, we introduce a two-branch geometric-relational deep learning framework. It boosts previous geometric classification methods with relational information. We also present a BIM object dataset IFCNet++, which contains both geometric and relational information about the objects. Experiments show that our framework can be flexibly adapted to different geometric methods. And relational features do act as a bonus to general geometric learning methods, obviously improving their classification performance, thus reducing the manual labor of checking models and improving the practical value of enriched BIM models.
abstract_zh: 互操作性问题是建筑信息模型（BIM）中的一个重要问题。对象类型作为多种 BIM 应用程序（例如扫描到 BIM 和代码合规性检查）所需的一种关键语义信息，在交换 BIM 数据或使用其他领域的软件创建模型时也会受到影响。可以使用深度学习对其进行补充。当前的深度学习方法主要根据 BIM 对象的形状信息进行分类，而未使用 BIM 上下文中固有的关系信息。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了一个两分支几何关系深度学习框架。它利用关系信息增强了以前的几何分类方法。我们还提供了 BIM 对象数据集 IFCNet++，其中包含有关对象的几何信息和关系信息。实验表明我们的框架可以灵活地适应不同的几何方法。而关系特征确实是通用几何学习方法的一个加分项，明显提高了其分类性能，从而减少了检查模型的人工劳动，提高了丰富的 BIM 模型的实用价值。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合几何与关系信息的深度学习框架，用于提升BIM对象分类的准确性与实用性。
AI.motivation: 现有BIM对象分类方法仅依赖几何形状信息，忽视了BIM中固有的对象关系信息，导致分类效果受限且需大量人工校验。
AI.method: 设计双分支几何-关系深度学习框架，整合几何特征与关系特征，并构建包含两类信息的BIM数据集IFCNet++。
AI.result: 实验表明框架可适配多种几何方法，关系特征显著提升分类性能，有效降低人工校验工作量。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合关系信息，该框架增强了BIM模型的语义表达能力，提升了分类效率与实际应用价值。

authors_text: Yanqing Shen,Sanping Zhou,Jingwen Fu,Ruotong Wang,Shitao Chen,Nanning Zheng
title: StructVPR: Distill Structural Knowledge with Weighting Samples for Visual Place Recognition
title_zh: StructVPR：通过加权样本提取结构知识以进行视觉位置识别
abstract: Visual place recognition (VPR) is usually considered as a specific image retrieval problem. Limited by existing training frameworks, most deep learning-based works cannot extract sufficiently stable global features from RGB images and rely on a time-consuming re-ranking step to exploit spatial structural information for better performance. In this paper, we propose StructVPR, a novel training architecture for VPR, to enhance structural knowledge in RGB global features and thus improve feature stability in a constantly changing environment. Specifically, StructVPR uses segmentation images as a more definitive source of structural knowledge input into a CNN network and applies knowledge distillation to avoid online segmentation and inference of seg-branch in testing. Considering that not all samples contain high-quality and helpful knowledge, and some even hurt the performance of distillation, we partition samples and weigh each sample's distillation loss to enhance the expected knowledge precisely. Finally, StructVPR achieves impressive performance on several benchmarks using only global retrieval and even outperforms many two-stage approaches by a large margin. After adding additional re-ranking, ours achieves state-of-the-art performance while maintaining a low computational cost.
summary: Visual place recognition (VPR) is usually considered as a specific image retrieval problem. Limited by existing training frameworks, most deep learning-based works cannot extract sufficiently stable global features from RGB images and rely on a time-consuming re-ranking step to exploit spatial structural information for better performance. In this paper, we propose StructVPR, a novel training architecture for VPR, to enhance structural knowledge in RGB global features and thus improve feature stability in a constantly changing environment. Specifically, StructVPR uses segmentation images as a more definitive source of structural knowledge input into a CNN network and applies knowledge distillation to avoid online segmentation and inference of seg-branch in testing. Considering that not all samples contain high-quality and helpful knowledge, and some even hurt the performance of distillation, we partition samples and weigh each sample's distillation loss to enhance the expected knowledge precisely. Finally, StructVPR achieves impressive performance on several benchmarks using only global retrieval and even outperforms many two-stage approaches by a large margin. After adding additional re-ranking, ours achieves state-of-the-art performance while maintaining a low computational cost.
abstract_zh: 视觉地点识别（VPR）通常被认为是一个特定的图像检索问题。受现有训练框架的限制，大多数基于深度学习的工作无法从 RGB 图像中提取足够稳定的全局特征，并且依赖于耗时的重新排序步骤来利用空间结构信息以获得更好的性能。在本文中，我们提出了 StructVPR，一种新颖的 VPR 训练架构，以增强 RGB 全局特征的结构知识，从而提高不断变化的环境中的特征稳定性。具体来说，StructVPR 使用分割图像作为输入 CNN 网络的结构知识的更明确来源，并应用知识蒸馏来避免测试中的在线分割和分段分支推理。考虑到并非所有样本都包含高质量且有用的知识，有些甚至会损害蒸馏性能，因此我们对样本进行分区并权衡每个样本的蒸馏损失，以精确增强预期知识。最后，StructVPR 仅使用全局检索就在多个基准测试中取得了令人印象深刻的性能，甚至大大优于许多两阶段方法。添加额外的重新排名后，我们的系统实现了最先进的性能，同时保持了较低的计算成本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为StructVPR的新训练架构，用于提升视觉地点识别（VPR）中的结构知识提取和特征稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有的基于深度学习的视觉地点识别方法在从RGB图像中提取稳定全局特征时存在局限，通常需要耗时的重排序步骤来利用空间结构信息，从而影响了性能。
AI.method: StructVPR利用分割图像作为结构知识的输入源，并通过知识蒸馏避免测试时的在线分割和推理。同时，通过样本加权处理，提升知识蒸馏的准确性。
AI.result: StructVPR在多个基准测试中仅使用全局检索就取得了令人印象深刻的结果，并在添加额外重排序后达到了最先进的性能，同时保持了较低的计算成本。
AI.conclusion: StructVPR通过引入结构知识和样本加权蒸馏，有效提升了视觉地点识别的性能，为VPR任务提供了一种高效且先进的解决方案。

search_text: StructVPR: Distill Structural Knowledge with Weighting Samples for Visual Place Recognition StructVPR：通过加权样本提取结构知识以进行视觉位置识别 Visual place recognition (VPR) is usually considered as a specific image retrieval problem. Limited by existing training frameworks, most deep learning-based works cannot extract sufficiently stable global features from RGB images and rely on a time-consuming re-ranking step to exploit spatial structural information for better performance. In this paper, we propose StructVPR, a novel training architecture for VPR, to enhance structural knowledge in RGB global features and thus improve feature stability in a constantly changing environment. Specifically, StructVPR uses segmentation images as a more definitive source of structural knowledge input into a CNN network and applies knowledge distillation to avoid online segmentation and inference of seg-branch in testing. Considering that not all samples contain high-quality and helpful knowledge, and some even hurt the performance of distillation, we partition samples and weigh each sample's distillation loss to enhance the expected knowledge precisely. Finally, StructVPR achieves impressive performance on several benchmarks using only global retrieval and even outperforms many two-stage approaches by a large margin. After adding additional re-ranking, ours achieves state-of-the-art performance while maintaining a low computational cost. 视觉地点识别（VPR）通常被认为是一个特定的图像检索问题。受现有训练框架的限制，大多数基于深度学习的工作无法从 RGB 图像中提取足够稳定的全局特征，并且依赖于耗时的重新排序步骤来利用空间结构信息以获得更好的性能。在本文中，我们提出了 StructVPR，一种新颖的 VPR 训练架构，以增强 RGB 全局特征的结构知识，从而提高不断变化的环境中的特征稳定性。具体来说，StructVPR 使用分割图像作为输入 CNN 网络的结构知识的更明确来源，并应用知识蒸馏来避免测试中的在线分割和分段分支推理。考虑到并非所有样本都包含高质量且有用的知识，有些甚至会损害蒸馏性能，因此我们对样本进行分区并权衡每个样本的蒸馏损失，以精确增强预期知识。最后，StructVPR 仅使用全局检索就在多个基准测试中取得了令人印象深刻的性能，甚至大大优于许多两阶段方法。添加额外的重新排名后，我们的系统实现了最先进的性能，同时保持了较低的计算成本。 本文提出了一种名为StructVPR的新训练架构，用于提升视觉地点识别（VPR）中的结构知识提取和特征稳定性。 Yanqing Shen,Sanping Zhou,Jingwen Fu,Ruotong Wang,Shitao Chen,Nanning Zheng cs.CV

authors_text: Baokai Liu,Fengjie He,Shiqiang Du,Kaiwu Zhang,Jianhua Wang
title: Dunhuang murals contour generation network based on convolution and self-attention fusion
title_zh: 基于卷积和自注意力融合的敦煌壁画轮廓生成网络
abstract: Dunhuang murals are a collection of Chinese style and national style, forming a self-contained Chinese-style Buddhist art. It has very high historical and cultural value and research significance. Among them, the lines of Dunhuang murals are highly general and expressive. It reflects the character's distinctive character and complex inner emotions. Therefore, the outline drawing of murals is of great significance to the research of Dunhuang Culture. The contour generation of Dunhuang murals belongs to image edge detection, which is an important branch of computer vision, aims to extract salient contour information in images. Although convolution-based deep learning networks have achieved good results in image edge extraction by exploring the contextual and semantic features of images. However, with the enlargement of the receptive field, some local detail information is lost. This makes it impossible for them to generate reasonable outline drawings of murals. In this paper, we propose a novel edge detector based on self-attention combined with convolution to generate line drawings of Dunhuang murals. Compared with existing edge detection methods, firstly, a new residual self-attention and convolution mixed module (Ramix) is proposed to fuse local and global features in feature maps. Secondly, a novel densely connected backbone extraction network is designed to efficiently propagate rich edge feature information from shallow layers into deep layers. Compared with existing methods, it is shown on different public datasets that our method is able to generate sharper and richer edge maps. In addition, testing on the Dunhuang mural dataset shows that our method can achieve very competitive performance.
summary: Dunhuang murals are a collection of Chinese style and national style, forming a self-contained Chinese-style Buddhist art. It has very high historical and cultural value and research significance. Among them, the lines of Dunhuang murals are highly general and expressive. It reflects the character's distinctive character and complex inner emotions. Therefore, the outline drawing of murals is of great significance to the research of Dunhuang Culture. The contour generation of Dunhuang murals belongs to image edge detection, which is an important branch of computer vision, aims to extract salient contour information in images. Although convolution-based deep learning networks have achieved good results in image edge extraction by exploring the contextual and semantic features of images. However, with the enlargement of the receptive field, some local detail information is lost. This makes it impossible for them to generate reasonable outline drawings of murals. In this paper, we propose a novel edge detector based on self-attention combined with convolution to generate line drawings of Dunhuang murals. Compared with existing edge detection methods, firstly, a new residual self-attention and convolution mixed module (Ramix) is proposed to fuse local and global features in feature maps. Secondly, a novel densely connected backbone extraction network is designed to efficiently propagate rich edge feature information from shallow layers into deep layers. Compared with existing methods, it is shown on different public datasets that our method is able to generate sharper and richer edge maps. In addition, testing on the Dunhuang mural dataset shows that our method can achieve very competitive performance.
abstract_zh: 敦煌壁画集中国风格和民族风格于一身，形成了自成一体的中国风格佛教艺术。具有极高的历史文化价值和研究意义。其中，敦煌壁画的线条具有很强的概括性和表现力。体现了人物鲜明的性格和复杂的内心情感。因此，壁画的轮廓绘制对于敦煌文化的研究具有重要意义。敦煌壁画的轮廓生成属于图像边缘检测，是计算机视觉的一个重要分支，旨在提取图像中显着的轮廓信息。尽管基于卷积的深度学习网络通过探索图像的上下文和语义特征，在图像边缘提取方面取得了良好的效果。然而，随着感受野的扩大，一些局部细节信息会丢失。这使得他们无法生成合理的壁画轮廓图。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于自注意力结合卷积的新型边缘检测器来生成敦煌壁画的线条图。与现有的边缘检测方法相比，首先，提出了一种新的残差自注意力和卷积混合模块（Ramix）来融合特征图中的局部和全局特征。其次，设计了一种新颖的密集连接的主干提取网络，以有效地将丰富的边缘特征信息从浅层传播到深层。与现有方法相比，在不同的公共数据集上表明我们的方法能够生成更清晰、更丰富的边缘图。此外，在敦煌壁画数据集上的测试表明，我们的方法可以获得非常有竞争力的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合卷积与自注意力机制的网络，用于生成敦煌壁画的轮廓线条。
AI.motivation: 传统卷积网络在扩大感受野时易丢失局部细节，难以生成敦煌壁画的精细轮廓，需融合全局与局部特征以提升效果。
AI.method: 设计残差自注意力与卷积混合模块（Ramix）融合多尺度特征，并构建密集连接的主干网络增强边缘信息传递。
AI.result: 在公开数据集与敦煌壁画数据集上均表现出色，生成的边缘图更清晰且细节更丰富。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效解决了壁画轮廓生成中的细节丢失问题，为敦煌文化研究提供新工具。

authors_text: Yizhi Song,Zhifei Zhang,Zhe Lin,Scott Cohen,Brian Price,Jianming Zhang,Soo Ye Kim,Daniel Aliaga
title: ObjectStitch: Generative Object Compositing
title_zh: ObjectStitch：生成对象合成
abstract: Object compositing based on 2D images is a challenging problem since it typically involves multiple processing stages such as color harmonization, geometry correction and shadow generation to generate realistic results. Furthermore, annotating training data pairs for compositing requires substantial manual effort from professionals, and is hardly scalable. Thus, with the recent advances in generative models, in this work, we propose a self-supervised framework for object compositing by leveraging the power of conditional diffusion models. Our framework can hollistically address the object compositing task in a unified model, transforming the viewpoint, geometry, color and shadow of the generated object while requiring no manual labeling. To preserve the input object's characteristics, we introduce a content adaptor that helps to maintain categorical semantics and object appearance. A data augmentation method is further adopted to improve the fidelity of the generator. Our method outperforms relevant baselines in both realism and faithfulness of the synthesized result images in a user study on various real-world images.
summary: Object compositing based on 2D images is a challenging problem since it typically involves multiple processing stages such as color harmonization, geometry correction and shadow generation to generate realistic results. Furthermore, annotating training data pairs for compositing requires substantial manual effort from professionals, and is hardly scalable. Thus, with the recent advances in generative models, in this work, we propose a self-supervised framework for object compositing by leveraging the power of conditional diffusion models. Our framework can hollistically address the object compositing task in a unified model, transforming the viewpoint, geometry, color and shadow of the generated object while requiring no manual labeling. To preserve the input object's characteristics, we introduce a content adaptor that helps to maintain categorical semantics and object appearance. A data augmentation method is further adopted to improve the fidelity of the generator. Our method outperforms relevant baselines in both realism and faithfulness of the synthesized result images in a user study on various real-world images.
abstract_zh: 基于 2D 图像的对象合成是一个具有挑战性的问题，因为它通常涉及多个处理阶段，例如颜色协调、几何校正和阴影生成，以生成逼真的结果。此外，注释用于合成的训练数据对需要专业人员大量的手动工作，并且很难扩展。因此，随着生成模型的最新进展，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种利用条件扩散模型的力量来进行对象合成的自监督框架。我们的框架可以在统一模型中全面解决对象合成任务，转换生成对象的视点、几何形状、颜色和阴影，同时不需要手动标记。为了保留输入对象的特征，我们引入了一个内容适配器，它有助于维护分类语义和对象外观。进一步采用数据增强方法来提高生成器的保真度。在对各种真实世界图像的用户研究中，我们的方法在合成结果图像的真实性和忠实度方面均优于相关基线。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于条件扩散模型的自监督框架ObjectStitch，用于无需人工标注的生成式对象合成任务。
AI.motivation: 传统对象合成需多阶段处理且依赖大量人工标注数据，存在效率低、可扩展性差的问题。
AI.method: 构建统一模型处理视角/几何/颜色/阴影变换，引入内容适配器保持对象语义特征，并采用数据增强提升生成质量。
AI.result: 用户研究显示该方法在真实感和保真度指标上优于现有基线方法。

search_text: ObjectStitch: Generative Object Compositing ObjectStitch：生成对象合成 Object compositing based on 2D images is a challenging problem since it typically involves multiple processing stages such as color harmonization, geometry correction and shadow generation to generate realistic results. Furthermore, annotating training data pairs for compositing requires substantial manual effort from professionals, and is hardly scalable. Thus, with the recent advances in generative models, in this work, we propose a self-supervised framework for object compositing by leveraging the power of conditional diffusion models. Our framework can hollistically address the object compositing task in a unified model, transforming the viewpoint, geometry, color and shadow of the generated object while requiring no manual labeling. To preserve the input object's characteristics, we introduce a content adaptor that helps to maintain categorical semantics and object appearance. A data augmentation method is further adopted to improve the fidelity of the generator. Our method outperforms relevant baselines in both realism and faithfulness of the synthesized result images in a user study on various real-world images. 基于 2D 图像的对象合成是一个具有挑战性的问题，因为它通常涉及多个处理阶段，例如颜色协调、几何校正和阴影生成，以生成逼真的结果。此外，注释用于合成的训练数据对需要专业人员大量的手动工作，并且很难扩展。因此，随着生成模型的最新进展，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种利用条件扩散模型的力量来进行对象合成的自监督框架。我们的框架可以在统一模型中全面解决对象合成任务，转换生成对象的视点、几何形状、颜色和阴影，同时不需要手动标记。为了保留输入对象的特征，我们引入了一个内容适配器，它有助于维护分类语义和对象外观。进一步采用数据增强方法来提高生成器的保真度。在对各种真实世界图像的用户研究中，我们的方法在合成结果图像的真实性和忠实度方面均优于相关基线。 本文提出一种基于条件扩散模型的自监督框架ObjectStitch，用于无需人工标注的生成式对象合成任务。 Yizhi Song,Zhifei Zhang,Zhe Lin,Scott Cohen,Brian Price,Jianming Zhang,Soo Ye Kim,Daniel Aliaga cs.CV

authors_text: Manuel Ballester,Heming Wang,Jiren Li,Oliver Cossairt,Florian Willomitzer
title: Single-shot ToF sensing with sub-mm precision using conventional CMOS sensors
title_zh: 使用传统 CMOS 传感器实现亚毫米精度的单次 ToF 传感
abstract: We present a novel single-shot interferometric ToF camera targeted for precise 3D measurements of dynamic objects. The camera concept is based on Synthetic Wavelength Interferometry, a technique that allows retrieval of depth maps of objects with optically rough surfaces at submillimeter depth precision. In contrast to conventional ToF cameras, our device uses only off-the-shelf CCD/CMOS detectors and works at their native chip resolution (as of today, theoretically up to 20 Mp and beyond). Moreover, we can obtain a full 3D model of the object in single-shot, meaning that no temporal sequence of exposures or temporal illumination modulation (such as amplitude or frequency modulation) is necessary, which makes our camera robust against object motion. In this paper, we introduce the novel camera concept and show first measurements that demonstrate the capabilities of our system. We present 3D measurements of small (cm-sized) objects with > 2 Mp point cloud resolution (the resolution of our used detector) and up to sub-mm depth precision. We also report a "single-shot 3D video" acquisition and a first single-shot "Non-Line-of-Sight" measurement. Our technique has great potential for high-precision applications with dynamic object movement, e.g., in AR/VR, industrial inspection, medical imaging, and imaging through scattering media like fog or human tissue.
summary: We present a novel single-shot interferometric ToF camera targeted for precise 3D measurements of dynamic objects. The camera concept is based on Synthetic Wavelength Interferometry, a technique that allows retrieval of depth maps of objects with optically rough surfaces at submillimeter depth precision. In contrast to conventional ToF cameras, our device uses only off-the-shelf CCD/CMOS detectors and works at their native chip resolution (as of today, theoretically up to 20 Mp and beyond). Moreover, we can obtain a full 3D model of the object in single-shot, meaning that no temporal sequence of exposures or temporal illumination modulation (such as amplitude or frequency modulation) is necessary, which makes our camera robust against object motion. In this paper, we introduce the novel camera concept and show first measurements that demonstrate the capabilities of our system. We present 3D measurements of small (cm-sized) objects with > 2 Mp point cloud resolution (the resolution of our used detector) and up to sub-mm depth precision. We also report a "single-shot 3D video" acquisition and a first single-shot "Non-Line-of-Sight" measurement. Our technique has great potential for high-precision applications with dynamic object movement, e.g., in AR/VR, industrial inspection, medical imaging, and imaging through scattering media like fog or human tissue.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新型单次干涉式 ToF 相机，旨在对动态物体进行精确 3D 测量。该相机概念基于合成波长干涉测量法，该技术允许以亚毫米深度精度检索具有光学粗糙表面的物体的深度图。与传统 ToF 相机相比，我们的设备仅使用现成的 CCD/CMOS 探测器，并以其原生芯片分辨率工作（截至目前，理论上高达 20 Mp 及以上）。此外，我们可以通过单次拍摄获得物体的完整 3D 模型，这意味着不需要时间曝光序列或时间照明调制（例如幅度或频率调制），这使得我们的相机对物体运动具有鲁棒性。在本文中，我们介绍了新颖的相机概念，并展示了首次测量结果，以证明我们系统的功能。我们提供小型（厘米大小）物体的 3D 测量，其点云分辨率 > 2 Mp（我们使用的探测器的分辨率）和高达亚毫米的深度精度。我们还报告了“单次 3D 视频”采集和首次单次“非视距”测量。我们的技术在动态物体运动的高精度应用中具有巨大的潜力，例如在 AR/VR、工业检查、医学成像以及通过雾或人体组织等散射介质进行成像。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于合成波长干涉的单次拍摄飞行时间（ToF）相机，利用常规CMOS传感器实现动态物体的亚毫米级高精度3D测量。
AI.motivation: 传统ToF相机在测量粗糙表面或动态物体时存在精度和鲁棒性不足的问题，且依赖复杂的时间序列曝光或调制技术。本文旨在开发一种无需时间序列曝光、能抗运动干扰的高精度3D成像系统。
AI.method: 采用合成波长干涉技术，通过常规CMOS/CCD传感器直接获取单次拍摄的深度信息，无需时间调制或序列曝光。利用芯片原生分辨率（最高20Mp）实现高精度3D建模。
AI.result: 实现了厘米级物体的3D测量，点云分辨率超过2Mp，深度精度达亚毫米级，并首次展示了单次拍摄3D视频及非视距成像，适用于AR/VR、工业检测等场景。
AI.conclusion: 该技术为动态场景下的高精度3D成像提供了新方案，其无需时间调制的特性显著提升了运动鲁棒性，且兼容现有CMOS传感器，具有广泛的应用潜力。

authors_text: Theophile Gervet,Soumith Chintala,Dhruv Batra,Jitendra Malik,Devendra Singh Chaplot
title: Navigating to Objects in the Real World
title_zh: 导航到现实世界中的对象
comment: 39 pages, 19 figures and tables, submitted to Science Robotics
comments: 39 pages, 19 figures and tables, submitted to Science Robotics
abstract: Semantic navigation is necessary to deploy mobile robots in uncontrolled environments like our homes, schools, and hospitals. Many learning-based approaches have been proposed in response to the lack of semantic understanding of the classical pipeline for spatial navigation, which builds a geometric map using depth sensors and plans to reach point goals. Broadly, end-to-end learning approaches reactively map sensor inputs to actions with deep neural networks, while modular learning approaches enrich the classical pipeline with learning-based semantic sensing and exploration. But learned visual navigation policies have predominantly been evaluated in simulation. How well do different classes of methods work on a robot? We present a large-scale empirical study of semantic visual navigation methods comparing representative methods from classical, modular, and end-to-end learning approaches across six homes with no prior experience, maps, or instrumentation. We find that modular learning works well in the real world, attaining a 90% success rate. In contrast, end-to-end learning does not, dropping from 77% simulation to 23% real-world success rate due to a large image domain gap between simulation and reality. For practitioners, we show that modular learning is a reliable approach to navigate to objects: modularity and abstraction in policy design enable Sim-to-Real transfer. For researchers, we identify two key issues that prevent today's simulators from being reliable evaluation benchmarks - (A) a large Sim-to-Real gap in images and (B) a disconnect between simulation and real-world error modes - and propose concrete steps forward.
summary: Semantic navigation is necessary to deploy mobile robots in uncontrolled environments like our homes, schools, and hospitals. Many learning-based approaches have been proposed in response to the lack of semantic understanding of the classical pipeline for spatial navigation, which builds a geometric map using depth sensors and plans to reach point goals. Broadly, end-to-end learning approaches reactively map sensor inputs to actions with deep neural networks, while modular learning approaches enrich the classical pipeline with learning-based semantic sensing and exploration. But learned visual navigation policies have predominantly been evaluated in simulation. How well do different classes of methods work on a robot? We present a large-scale empirical study of semantic visual navigation methods comparing representative methods from classical, modular, and end-to-end learning approaches across six homes with no prior experience, maps, or instrumentation. We find that modular learning works well in the real world, attaining a 90% success rate. In contrast, end-to-end learning does not, dropping from 77% simulation to 23% real-world success rate due to a large image domain gap between simulation and reality. For practitioners, we show that modular learning is a reliable approach to navigate to objects: modularity and abstraction in policy design enable Sim-to-Real transfer. For researchers, we identify two key issues that prevent today's simulators from being reliable evaluation benchmarks - (A) a large Sim-to-Real gap in images and (B) a disconnect between simulation and real-world error modes - and propose concrete steps forward.
abstract_zh: 在家庭、学校和医院等不受控制的环境中部署移动机器人需要语义导航。为了解决对空间导航经典管道缺乏语义理解的问题，人们提出了许多基于学习的方法，该管道使用深度传感器构建几何地图并计划达到点目标。从广义上讲，端到端学习方法通​​过深度神经网络将传感器输入反应性地映射到动作，而模块化学习方法通​​过基于学习的语义感知和探索丰富了经典管道。但学习的视觉导航策略主要是在模拟中进行评估的。不同类别的方法在机器人上的效果如何？我们提出了一项关于语义视觉导航方法的大规模实证研究，比较了六个没有经验、地图或仪器的家庭的经典、模块化和端到端学习方法的代表性方法。我们发现模块化学习在现实世界中效果很好，成功率高达 90%。相比之下，端到端学习则不然，由于模拟与现实之间存在较大的图像域差距，模拟成功率从 77% 下降到现实世界的 23%。对于从业者来说，我们表明模块化学习是导航到对象的可靠方法：策略设计中的模块化和抽象性使得模拟到真实的迁移成为可能。对于研究人员来说，我们确定了阻碍当今模拟器成为可靠评估基准的两个关键问题 - (A) 图像中模拟与真实的巨大差距以及 (B) 模拟与现实世界错误模式之间的脱节 - 并提出了具体的前进步骤。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了经典、模块化和端到端学习方法在真实世界物体导航中的表现，发现模块化方法在真实环境中更有效。
AI.motivation: 传统导航方法缺乏语义理解，而现有学习方法多在模拟环境中评估，需验证其在真实场景中的有效性。
AI.method: 通过大规模实证研究，在六个未预设地图的家庭环境中测试不同方法，比较其成功率及Sim-to-Real差距。
AI.result: 模块化方法在真实世界中达到90%成功率，端到端方法因图像域差距从模拟的77%降至23%。
AI.conclusion: 模块化学习更适合真实导航，因抽象设计促进Sim-to-Real迁移；需改进模拟器以缩小图像差距和错误模式差异。

search_text: Navigating to Objects in the Real World 导航到现实世界中的对象 Semantic navigation is necessary to deploy mobile robots in uncontrolled environments like our homes, schools, and hospitals. Many learning-based approaches have been proposed in response to the lack of semantic understanding of the classical pipeline for spatial navigation, which builds a geometric map using depth sensors and plans to reach point goals. Broadly, end-to-end learning approaches reactively map sensor inputs to actions with deep neural networks, while modular learning approaches enrich the classical pipeline with learning-based semantic sensing and exploration. But learned visual navigation policies have predominantly been evaluated in simulation. How well do different classes of methods work on a robot? We present a large-scale empirical study of semantic visual navigation methods comparing representative methods from classical, modular, and end-to-end learning approaches across six homes with no prior experience, maps, or instrumentation. We find that modular learning works well in the real world, attaining a 90% success rate. In contrast, end-to-end learning does not, dropping from 77% simulation to 23% real-world success rate due to a large image domain gap between simulation and reality. For practitioners, we show that modular learning is a reliable approach to navigate to objects: modularity and abstraction in policy design enable Sim-to-Real transfer. For researchers, we identify two key issues that prevent today's simulators from being reliable evaluation benchmarks - (A) a large Sim-to-Real gap in images and (B) a disconnect between simulation and real-world error modes - and propose concrete steps forward. 在家庭、学校和医院等不受控制的环境中部署移动机器人需要语义导航。为了解决对空间导航经典管道缺乏语义理解的问题，人们提出了许多基于学习的方法，该管道使用深度传感器构建几何地图并计划达到点目标。从广义上讲，端到端学习方法通​​过深度神经网络将传感器输入反应性地映射到动作，而模块化学习方法通​​过基于学习的语义感知和探索丰富了经典管道。但学习的视觉导航策略主要是在模拟中进行评估的。不同类别的方法在机器人上的效果如何？我们提出了一项关于语义视觉导航方法的大规模实证研究，比较了六个没有经验、地图或仪器的家庭的经典、模块化和端到端学习方法的代表性方法。我们发现模块化学习在现实世界中效果很好，成功率高达 90%。相比之下，端到端学习则不然，由于模拟与现实之间存在较大的图像域差距，模拟成功率从 77% 下降到现实世界的 23%。对于从业者来说，我们表明模块化学习是导航到对象的可靠方法：策略设计中的模块化和抽象性使得模拟到真实的迁移成为可能。对于研究人员来说，我们确定了阻碍当今模拟器成为可靠评估基准的两个关键问题 - (A) 图像中模拟与真实的巨大差距以及 (B) 模拟与现实世界错误模式之间的脱节 - 并提出了具体的前进步骤。 本文比较了经典、模块化和端到端学习方法在真实世界物体导航中的表现，发现模块化方法在真实环境中更有效。 Theophile Gervet,Soumith Chintala,Dhruv Batra,Jitendra Malik,Devendra Singh Chaplot cs.RO,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Zhaoxin Fan,Yuqing Pan,Hao Xu,Zhenbo Song,Zhicheng Wang,Kejian Wu,Hongyan Liu,Jun He
title: FuRPE: Learning Full-body Reconstruction from Part Experts
title_zh: FuRPE：向零件专家学习全身重建
abstract: In the field of full-body reconstruction, the scarcity of annotated data often impedes the efficacy of prevailing methods. To address this issue, we introduce FuRPE, a novel framework that employs part-experts and an ingenious pseudo ground-truth selection scheme to derive high-quality pseudo labels. These labels, central to our approach, equip our network with the capability to efficiently learn from the available data. Integral to FuRPE is a unique exponential moving average training strategy and expert-derived feature distillation strategy. These novel elements of FuRPE not only serve to further refine the model but also to reduce potential biases that may arise from inaccuracies in pseudo labels, thereby optimizing the network's training process and enhancing the robustness of the model. We apply FuRPE to train both two-stage and fully convolutional single-stage full-body reconstruction networks. Our exhaustive experiments on numerous benchmark datasets illustrate a substantial performance boost over existing methods, underscoring FuRPE's potential to reshape the state-of-the-art in full-body reconstruction.
summary: In the field of full-body reconstruction, the scarcity of annotated data often impedes the efficacy of prevailing methods. To address this issue, we introduce FuRPE, a novel framework that employs part-experts and an ingenious pseudo ground-truth selection scheme to derive high-quality pseudo labels. These labels, central to our approach, equip our network with the capability to efficiently learn from the available data. Integral to FuRPE is a unique exponential moving average training strategy and expert-derived feature distillation strategy. These novel elements of FuRPE not only serve to further refine the model but also to reduce potential biases that may arise from inaccuracies in pseudo labels, thereby optimizing the network's training process and enhancing the robustness of the model. We apply FuRPE to train both two-stage and fully convolutional single-stage full-body reconstruction networks. Our exhaustive experiments on numerous benchmark datasets illustrate a substantial performance boost over existing methods, underscoring FuRPE's potential to reshape the state-of-the-art in full-body reconstruction.
abstract_zh: 在全身重建领域，注释数据的缺乏常常阻碍了主流方法的有效性。为了解决这个问题，我们引入了 FuRPE，这是一种新颖的框架，它采用部分专家和巧妙的伪地面实况选择方案来派生高质量的伪标签。这些标签是我们方法的核心，使我们的网络能够有效地从可用数据中学习。 FuRPE 的组成部分是独特的指数移动平均训练策略和专家衍生的特征蒸馏策略。 FuRPE 的这些新颖元素不仅可以进一步细化模型，还可以减少因伪标签不准确而可能产生的潜在偏差，从而优化网络的训练过程并增强模型的鲁棒性。我们应用 FuRPE 来训练两阶段和全卷积单阶段全身重建网络。我们对大量基准数据集进行的详尽实验表明，与现有方法相比，性能有了显着提升，强调了 FuRPE 重塑全身重建最先进技术的潜力。

AI.tldr: 提出FuRPE框架，通过部分专家和伪标签生成方法解决全身重建中的数据标注不足问题。
AI.motivation: 现有方法因标注数据稀缺而效果受限，需新方法提升性能。
AI.method: 采用部分专家生成伪标签，结合指数移动平均训练和特征蒸馏策略，优化模型训练。
AI.result: 实验显示在多个数据集上性能显著优于现有方法，验证了FuRPE的有效性。
AI.conclusion: FuRPE通过伪标签和优化策略有效提升模型性能，有望成为全身重建的新标准。

authors_text: Xiaoqing Chen,Dongrui Wu
title: Adversarial Artifact Detection in EEG-Based Brain-Computer Interfaces
title_zh: 基于脑电图的脑机接口中的对抗性伪影检测
abstract: Machine learning has achieved great success in electroencephalogram (EEG) based brain-computer interfaces (BCIs). Most existing BCI research focused on improving its accuracy, but few had considered its security. Recent studies, however, have shown that EEG-based BCIs are vulnerable to adversarial attacks, where small perturbations added to the input can cause misclassification. Detection of adversarial examples is crucial to both the understanding of this phenomenon and the defense. This paper, for the first time, explores adversarial detection in EEG-based BCIs. Experiments on two EEG datasets using three convolutional neural networks were performed to verify the performances of multiple detection approaches. We showed that both white-box and black-box attacks can be detected, and the former are easier to detect.
summary: Machine learning has achieved great success in electroencephalogram (EEG) based brain-computer interfaces (BCIs). Most existing BCI research focused on improving its accuracy, but few had considered its security. Recent studies, however, have shown that EEG-based BCIs are vulnerable to adversarial attacks, where small perturbations added to the input can cause misclassification. Detection of adversarial examples is crucial to both the understanding of this phenomenon and the defense. This paper, for the first time, explores adversarial detection in EEG-based BCIs. Experiments on two EEG datasets using three convolutional neural networks were performed to verify the performances of multiple detection approaches. We showed that both white-box and black-box attacks can be detected, and the former are easier to detect.
abstract_zh: 机器学习在基于脑机接口（BCI）的脑电图（EEG）方面取得了巨大成功。大多数现有的脑机接口研究都集中在提高其准确性，但很少有人考虑其安全性。然而，最近的研究表明，基于脑电图的脑机接口很容易受到对抗性攻击，输入中添加的小扰动可能会导致错误分类。检测对抗性例子对于理解这种现象和防御都至关重要。本文首次探讨了基于脑电图的脑机接口中的对抗性检测。使用三个卷积神经网络对两个脑电图数据集进行实验，以验证多种检测方法的性能。我们表明白盒和黑盒攻击都可以被检测到，并且前者更容易检测到。

AI.tldr: 本文首次研究基于脑电图（EEG）的脑机接口（BCI）中的对抗性攻击检测方法。
AI.motivation: 现有BCI研究侧重于提升准确率，但忽视安全性。对抗攻击可通过微小扰动导致误分类，检测对抗样本对理解现象和防御至关重要。
AI.method: 在两个EEG数据集上使用三种卷积神经网络，验证多种检测方法对白盒和黑盒攻击的识别能力。
AI.result: 实验表明白盒和黑盒攻击均可被检测，且白盒攻击更易识别。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次证实EEG-based BCI可检测对抗攻击，尤其白盒攻击，为后续防御机制奠定基础。

authors_text: Rong Hu,Ling Chen,Shenghuan Miao,Xing Tang
title: SWL-Adapt: An Unsupervised Domain Adaptation Model with Sample Weight Learning for Cross-User Wearable Human Activity Recognition
title_zh: SWL-Adapt：具有样本权重学习的无监督域适应模型，用于跨用户可穿戴人体活动识别
comment: Accepted by AAAI 2023. 9 pages and 4 figures in main text. 3 pages and 5 figures in appendix
comments: Accepted by AAAI 2023. 9 pages and 4 figures in main text. 3 pages and 5 figures in appendix
abstract: In practice, Wearable Human Activity Recognition (WHAR) models usually face performance degradation on the new user due to user variance. Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) becomes the natural solution to cross-user WHAR under annotation scarcity. Existing UDA models usually align samples across domains without differentiation, which ignores the difference among samples. In this paper, we propose an unsupervised domain adaptation model with sample weight learning (SWL-Adapt) for cross-user WHAR. SWL-Adapt calculates sample weights according to the classification loss and domain discrimination loss of each sample with a parameterized network. We introduce the meta-optimization based update rule to learn this network end-to-end, which is guided by meta-classification loss on the selected pseudo-labeled target samples. Therefore, this network can fit a weighting function according to the cross-user WHAR task at hand, which is superior to existing sample differentiation rules fixed for special scenarios. Extensive experiments on three public WHAR datasets demonstrate that SWL-Adapt achieves the state-of-the-art performance on the cross-user WHAR task, outperforming the best baseline by an average of 3.1% and 5.3% in accuracy and macro F1 score, respectively.
summary: In practice, Wearable Human Activity Recognition (WHAR) models usually face performance degradation on the new user due to user variance. Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) becomes the natural solution to cross-user WHAR under annotation scarcity. Existing UDA models usually align samples across domains without differentiation, which ignores the difference among samples. In this paper, we propose an unsupervised domain adaptation model with sample weight learning (SWL-Adapt) for cross-user WHAR. SWL-Adapt calculates sample weights according to the classification loss and domain discrimination loss of each sample with a parameterized network. We introduce the meta-optimization based update rule to learn this network end-to-end, which is guided by meta-classification loss on the selected pseudo-labeled target samples. Therefore, this network can fit a weighting function according to the cross-user WHAR task at hand, which is superior to existing sample differentiation rules fixed for special scenarios. Extensive experiments on three public WHAR datasets demonstrate that SWL-Adapt achieves the state-of-the-art performance on the cross-user WHAR task, outperforming the best baseline by an average of 3.1% and 5.3% in accuracy and macro F1 score, respectively.
abstract_zh: 在实践中，可穿戴人体活动识别（WHAR）模型通常会因用户差异而面临新用户性能下降的问题。无监督域适应（UDA）成为注释稀缺情况下跨用户 WHAR 的自然解决方案。现有的UDA模型通常会跨领域对齐样本，而不进行区分，从而忽略了样本之间的差异。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于跨用户 WHAR 的带有样本权重学习的无监督域适应模型（SWL-Adapt）。 SWL-Adapt通过参数化网络根据每个样本的分类损失和域辨别损失计算样本权重。我们引入基于元优化的更新规则来端到端地学习该网络，该规则由所选伪标记目标样本的元分类损失引导。因此，该网络可以根据手头的跨用户WHAR任务拟合权重函数，这优于现有针对特殊场景固定的样本区分规则。对三个公共 WHAR 数据集的大量实验表明，SWL-Adapt 在跨用户 WHAR 任务上实现了最先进的性能，在准确度和宏观 F1 分数上分别比最佳基线平均高出 3.1% 和 5.3%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于样本权重学习的无监督领域自适应模型SWL-Adapt，用于解决跨用户可穿戴设备人体活动识别中的性能退化问题。
AI.motivation: 现有跨用户WHAR模型因用户差异导致性能下降，而传统无监督领域自适应方法未区分样本差异，难以适应实际场景需求。
AI.method: 通过参数化网络计算样本权重，结合分类损失与领域判别损失，并引入元优化策略端到端学习权重函数，动态适配具体任务。
AI.result: 在三个公开数据集上实现跨用户WHAR任务的最先进性能，准确率和宏F1分数分别优于最佳基线3.1%和5.3%。
AI.conclusion: SWL-Adapt通过动态样本权重学习有效解决了跨用户差异问题，验证了其在无监督领域自适应任务中的优越性。

search_text: SWL-Adapt: An Unsupervised Domain Adaptation Model with Sample Weight Learning for Cross-User Wearable Human Activity Recognition SWL-Adapt：具有样本权重学习的无监督域适应模型，用于跨用户可穿戴人体活动识别 In practice, Wearable Human Activity Recognition (WHAR) models usually face performance degradation on the new user due to user variance. Unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA) becomes the natural solution to cross-user WHAR under annotation scarcity. Existing UDA models usually align samples across domains without differentiation, which ignores the difference among samples. In this paper, we propose an unsupervised domain adaptation model with sample weight learning (SWL-Adapt) for cross-user WHAR. SWL-Adapt calculates sample weights according to the classification loss and domain discrimination loss of each sample with a parameterized network. We introduce the meta-optimization based update rule to learn this network end-to-end, which is guided by meta-classification loss on the selected pseudo-labeled target samples. Therefore, this network can fit a weighting function according to the cross-user WHAR task at hand, which is superior to existing sample differentiation rules fixed for special scenarios. Extensive experiments on three public WHAR datasets demonstrate that SWL-Adapt achieves the state-of-the-art performance on the cross-user WHAR task, outperforming the best baseline by an average of 3.1% and 5.3% in accuracy and macro F1 score, respectively. 在实践中，可穿戴人体活动识别（WHAR）模型通常会因用户差异而面临新用户性能下降的问题。无监督域适应（UDA）成为注释稀缺情况下跨用户 WHAR 的自然解决方案。现有的UDA模型通常会跨领域对齐样本，而不进行区分，从而忽略了样本之间的差异。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于跨用户 WHAR 的带有样本权重学习的无监督域适应模型（SWL-Adapt）。 SWL-Adapt通过参数化网络根据每个样本的分类损失和域辨别损失计算样本权重。我们引入基于元优化的更新规则来端到端地学习该网络，该规则由所选伪标记目标样本的元分类损失引导。因此，该网络可以根据手头的跨用户WHAR任务拟合权重函数，这优于现有针对特殊场景固定的样本区分规则。对三个公共 WHAR 数据集的大量实验表明，SWL-Adapt 在跨用户 WHAR 任务上实现了最先进的性能，在准确度和宏观 F1 分数上分别比最佳基线平均高出 3.1% 和 5.3%。 本文提出了一种基于样本权重学习的无监督领域自适应模型SWL-Adapt，用于解决跨用户可穿戴设备人体活动识别中的性能退化问题。 Rong Hu,Ling Chen,Shenghuan Miao,Xing Tang eess.SP,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Tommaso Salvatori,Yuhang Song,Yordan Yordanov,Beren Millidge,Zhenghua Xu,Lei Sha,Cornelius Emde,Rafal Bogacz,Thomas Lukasiewicz
title: A Stable, Fast, and Fully Automatic Learning Algorithm for Predictive Coding Networks
title_zh: 一种稳定、快速、全自动的预测编码网络学习算法
comment: Change of title and abstract, that now reflect the version accepted for publication. One co-author also added, that performed the additional experiments
comments: Change of title and abstract, that now reflect the version accepted for publication. One co-author also added, that performed the additional experiments
abstract: Predictive coding networks are neuroscience-inspired models with roots in both Bayesian statistics and neuroscience. Training such models, however, is quite inefficient and unstable. In this work, we show how by simply changing the temporal scheduling of the update rule for the synaptic weights leads to an algorithm that is much more efficient and stable than the original one, and has theoretical guarantees in terms of convergence. The proposed algorithm, that we call incremental predictive coding (iPC) is also more biologically plausible than the original one, as it it fully automatic. In an extensive set of experiments, we show that iPC constantly performs better than the original formulation on a large number of benchmarks for image classification, as well as for the training of both conditional and masked language models, in terms of test accuracy, efficiency, and convergence with respect to a large set of hyperparameters.
summary: Predictive coding networks are neuroscience-inspired models with roots in both Bayesian statistics and neuroscience. Training such models, however, is quite inefficient and unstable. In this work, we show how by simply changing the temporal scheduling of the update rule for the synaptic weights leads to an algorithm that is much more efficient and stable than the original one, and has theoretical guarantees in terms of convergence. The proposed algorithm, that we call incremental predictive coding (iPC) is also more biologically plausible than the original one, as it it fully automatic. In an extensive set of experiments, we show that iPC constantly performs better than the original formulation on a large number of benchmarks for image classification, as well as for the training of both conditional and masked language models, in terms of test accuracy, efficiency, and convergence with respect to a large set of hyperparameters.
abstract_zh: 预测编码网络是受神经科学启发的模型，根源于贝叶斯统计和神经科学。然而，训练这样的模型效率很低且不稳定。在这项工作中，我们展示了如何通过简单地改变突触权重更新规则的时间调度来产生一种比原始算法更加高效和稳定的算法，并且在收敛方面具有理论保证。所提出的算法，我们称之为增量预测编码（iPC），在生物学上也比原来的算法更合理，因为它是全自动的。在大量的实验中，我们表明 iPC 在大量图像分类基准以及条件和掩码语言模型的训练中，在测试准确性、效率和针对大量超参数的收敛性方面，始终比原始公式表现得更好。

AI.tldr: 提出一种稳定、快速且全自动的预测编码网络训练算法iPC，解决传统方法效率低、不稳定的问题。
AI.motivation: 传统预测编码网络训练效率低、不稳定，且缺乏理论保证，需改进算法以提高性能和生物合理性。
AI.method: 通过调整突触权重更新规则的时间安排，设计增量预测编码（iPC）算法，实现全自动训练过程。
AI.result: iPC在多个基准测试中优于原方法，测试准确率、效率及收敛性均提升，且对超参数不敏感。
AI.conclusion: iPC算法有效提升预测编码网络训练的稳定性与效率，具有理论保证和生物合理性，适用于多种机器学习任务。

authors_text: Akanksha Agrawal,Tanmay Inamdar,Saket Saurabh,Jie Xue
title: Clustering What Matters: Optimal Approximation for Clustering with Outliers
title_zh: 重要的聚类：异常值聚类的最佳近似
comment: An extended abstract of the paper is to appear in AAAI 2023
comments: An extended abstract of the paper is to appear in AAAI 2023
abstract: Clustering with outliers is one of the most fundamental problems in Computer Science. Given a set $X$ of $n$ points and two integers $k$ and $m$, the clustering with outliers aims to exclude $m$ points from $X$ and partition the remaining points into $k$ clusters that minimizes a certain cost function. In this paper, we give a general approach for solving clustering with outliers, which results in a fixed-parameter tractable (FPT) algorithm in $k$ and $m$, that almost matches the approximation ratio for its outlier-free counterpart. As a corollary, we obtain FPT approximation algorithms with optimal approximation ratios for $k$-Median and $k$-Means with outliers in general metrics. We also exhibit more applications of our approach to other variants of the problem that impose additional constraints on the clustering, such as fairness or matroid constraints.
summary: Clustering with outliers is one of the most fundamental problems in Computer Science. Given a set $X$ of $n$ points and two integers $k$ and $m$, the clustering with outliers aims to exclude $m$ points from $X$ and partition the remaining points into $k$ clusters that minimizes a certain cost function. In this paper, we give a general approach for solving clustering with outliers, which results in a fixed-parameter tractable (FPT) algorithm in $k$ and $m$, that almost matches the approximation ratio for its outlier-free counterpart. As a corollary, we obtain FPT approximation algorithms with optimal approximation ratios for $k$-Median and $k$-Means with outliers in general metrics. We also exhibit more applications of our approach to other variants of the problem that impose additional constraints on the clustering, such as fairness or matroid constraints.
abstract_zh: 异常值聚类是计算机科学中最基本的问题之一。给定一组 $X$ 的 $n$ 点和两个整数 $k$ 和 $m$，异常值聚类旨在从 $X$ 中排除 $m$ 点，并将剩余点划分为 $k$ 簇，从而最小化特定成本函数。在本文中，我们给出了一种解决异常值聚类的通用方法，这导致了 $k$ 和 $m$ 中的固定参数易处理（FPT）算法，几乎与无异常值的近似率相匹配。作为推论，我们获得了 FPT 近似算法，其对于 $k$-Median 和 $k$-Means 具有最佳近似率，并且在一般指标中存在异常值。我们还展示了我们的方法在其他问题变体上的更多应用，这些变体对聚类施加了额外的约束，例如公平性或拟阵约束。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种解决带离群点聚类问题的通用方法，实现了几乎与无离群点情况相当的近似比，并设计了固定参数可解算法。
AI.motivation: 现实数据中常存在离群点，传统聚类方法难以有效处理，需在排除离群点的同时保持聚类质量。
AI.method: 通过构建固定参数可解算法框架，结合近似比优化技术，适用于多种约束条件下的聚类变体问题。
AI.result: 获得带离群点的k-Median和k-Means问题的最优近似比FPT算法，并拓展至公平性或拟阵约束等场景。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为带离群点聚类提供了高效解决方案，理论分析与应用扩展均取得重要进展。

conclusion: 该方法为带离群点聚类提供了高效解决方案，理论分析与应用扩展均取得重要进展。
search_text: Clustering What Matters: Optimal Approximation for Clustering with Outliers 重要的聚类：异常值聚类的最佳近似 Clustering with outliers is one of the most fundamental problems in Computer Science. Given a set $X$ of $n$ points and two integers $k$ and $m$, the clustering with outliers aims to exclude $m$ points from $X$ and partition the remaining points into $k$ clusters that minimizes a certain cost function. In this paper, we give a general approach for solving clustering with outliers, which results in a fixed-parameter tractable (FPT) algorithm in $k$ and $m$, that almost matches the approximation ratio for its outlier-free counterpart. As a corollary, we obtain FPT approximation algorithms with optimal approximation ratios for $k$-Median and $k$-Means with outliers in general metrics. We also exhibit more applications of our approach to other variants of the problem that impose additional constraints on the clustering, such as fairness or matroid constraints. 异常值聚类是计算机科学中最基本的问题之一。给定一组 $X$ 的 $n$ 点和两个整数 $k$ 和 $m$，异常值聚类旨在从 $X$ 中排除 $m$ 点，并将剩余点划分为 $k$ 簇，从而最小化特定成本函数。在本文中，我们给出了一种解决异常值聚类的通用方法，这导致了 $k$ 和 $m$ 中的固定参数易处理（FPT）算法，几乎与无异常值的近似率相匹配。作为推论，我们获得了 FPT 近似算法，其对于 $k$-Median 和 $k$-Means 具有最佳近似率，并且在一般指标中存在异常值。我们还展示了我们的方法在其他问题变体上的更多应用，这些变体对聚类施加了额外的约束，例如公平性或拟阵约束。 本文提出了一种解决带离群点聚类问题的通用方法，实现了几乎与无离群点情况相当的近似比，并设计了固定参数可解算法。 Akanksha Agrawal,Tanmay Inamdar,Saket Saurabh,Jie Xue cs.DS

authors_text: Riza Velioglu,Jan Philip Göpfert,André Artelt,Barbara Hammer
title: Explainable Artificial Intelligence for Improved Modeling of Processes
title_zh: 用于改进流程建模的可解释人工智能
comment: 12 pages, 3 tables, 3 figures. Published in IDEAL 2022: https://link.springer.com/chapter/10.1007/978-3-031-21753-1_31
comments: 12 pages, 3 tables, 3 figures. Published in IDEAL 2022: https://link.springer.com/chapter/10.1007/978-3-031-21753-1_31
abstract: In modern business processes, the amount of data collected has increased substantially in recent years. Because this data can potentially yield valuable insights, automated knowledge extraction based on process mining has been proposed, among other techniques, to provide users with intuitive access to the information contained therein. At present, the majority of technologies aim to reconstruct explicit business process models. These are directly interpretable but limited concerning the integration of diverse and real-valued information sources. On the other hand, Machine Learning (ML) benefits from the vast amount of data available and can deal with high-dimensional sources, yet it has rarely been applied to being used in processes. In this contribution, we evaluate the capability of modern Transformer architectures as well as more classical ML technologies of modeling process regularities, as can be quantitatively evaluated by their prediction capability. In addition, we demonstrate the capability of attentional properties and feature relevance determination by highlighting features that are crucial to the processes' predictive abilities. We demonstrate the efficacy of our approach using five benchmark datasets and show that the ML models are capable of predicting critical outcomes and that the attention mechanisms or XAI components offer new insights into the underlying processes.
summary: In modern business processes, the amount of data collected has increased substantially in recent years. Because this data can potentially yield valuable insights, automated knowledge extraction based on process mining has been proposed, among other techniques, to provide users with intuitive access to the information contained therein. At present, the majority of technologies aim to reconstruct explicit business process models. These are directly interpretable but limited concerning the integration of diverse and real-valued information sources. On the other hand, Machine Learning (ML) benefits from the vast amount of data available and can deal with high-dimensional sources, yet it has rarely been applied to being used in processes. In this contribution, we evaluate the capability of modern Transformer architectures as well as more classical ML technologies of modeling process regularities, as can be quantitatively evaluated by their prediction capability. In addition, we demonstrate the capability of attentional properties and feature relevance determination by highlighting features that are crucial to the processes' predictive abilities. We demonstrate the efficacy of our approach using five benchmark datasets and show that the ML models are capable of predicting critical outcomes and that the attention mechanisms or XAI components offer new insights into the underlying processes.
abstract_zh: 在现代业务流程中，近年来收集的数据量大幅增加。由于这些数据可能会产生有价值的见解，因此除了其他技术外，还提出了基于流程挖掘的自动知识提取，以便为用户提供对其中包含的信息的直观访问。目前，大多数技术的目标是重建显式的业务流程模型。这些是可以直接解释的，但在整合多样化和真实价值的信息源方面是有限的。另一方面，机器学习（ML）受益于大量可用数据，并且可以处理高维源，但它很少被应用于流程中。在这篇文章中，我们评估了现代 Transformer 架构的能力以及更经典的建模过程规律的 ML 技术，这可以通过它们的预测能力进行定量评估。此外，我们通过突出显示对过程预测能力至关重要的特征来展示注意力属性和特征相关性确定的能力。我们使用五个基准数据集证明了我们方法的有效性，并表明 ML 模型能够预测关键结果，并且注意力机制或 XAI 组件提供了对底层过程的新见解。

AI.tldr: 本文将可解释人工智能（XAI）应用于流程建模，结合Transformer架构和传统机器学习方法，提升流程预测能力与可解释性。
AI.motivation: 现有流程模型虽直观但难以整合多源数据，而机器学习虽擅长处理高维数据却缺乏可解释性，需探索兼顾预测精度与可解释性的新方法。
AI.method: 采用Transformer架构及经典机器学习技术建模流程规律，通过注意力机制和特征相关性分析揭示关键预测因素，并在五个基准数据集上验证效果。
AI.result: 实验表明ML模型能有效预测关键流程结果，注意力机制与XAI组件提供了对流程内在规律的可解释洞察，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 融合XAI与机器学习可显著提升流程建模的可解释性与预测能力，为复杂业务流程分析提供了新思路与工具支持。

authors_text: D. Belter,J. Bednarek,H. -C. Lin,G. Xin,M. Mistry
title: Single-shot Foothold Selection and Constraint Evaluation for Quadruped Locomotion
title_zh: 四足运动的单次立足点选择和约束评估
comment: ef:IEEE, Proceedings of the 2019 International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), 2019, pp. 7441-7447
comments: ef:IEEE, Proceedings of the 2019 International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), 2019, pp. 7441-7447
abstract: In this paper, we propose a method for selecting the optimal footholds for legged systems. The goal of the proposed method is to find the best foothold for the swing leg on a local elevation map. We apply the Convolutional Neural Network to learn the relationship between the local elevation map and the quality of potential footholds. The proposed network evaluates the geometrical characteristics of each cell on the elevation map, checks kinematic constraints and collisions. During execution time, the controller obtains the qualitative measurement of each potential foothold from the neural model. This method allows to evaluate hundreds of potential footholds and check multiple constraints in a single step which takes 10~ms on a standard computer without GPGPU. The experiments were carried out on a quadruped robot walking over rough terrain in both simulation and real robotic platforms.
summary: In this paper, we propose a method for selecting the optimal footholds for legged systems. The goal of the proposed method is to find the best foothold for the swing leg on a local elevation map. We apply the Convolutional Neural Network to learn the relationship between the local elevation map and the quality of potential footholds. The proposed network evaluates the geometrical characteristics of each cell on the elevation map, checks kinematic constraints and collisions. During execution time, the controller obtains the qualitative measurement of each potential foothold from the neural model. This method allows to evaluate hundreds of potential footholds and check multiple constraints in a single step which takes 10~ms on a standard computer without GPGPU. The experiments were carried out on a quadruped robot walking over rough terrain in both simulation and real robotic platforms.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种为腿式系统选择最佳立足点的方法。该方法的目标是在局部高程地图上找到摆动腿的最佳立足点。我们应用卷积神经网络来学习当地高程图与潜在立足点质量之间的关系。所提出的网络评估高程图上每个单元的几何特征，检查运动学约束和碰撞。在执行期间，控制器从神经模型中获得每个潜在立足点的定性测量。该方法允许在一个步骤中评估数百个潜在的立足点并检查多个约束，这在没有 GPGPU 的标准计算机上需要 10~ms。实验是在模拟和真实机器人平台上在崎岖地形上行走的四足机器人上进行的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于卷积神经网络的四足机器人足点选择与约束评估方法，可在单步内快速评估地形适应性。
AI.motivation: 传统足点选择方法在复杂地形中难以兼顾实时性与计算效率，需开发轻量级解决方案以满足四足机器人动态运动需求。
AI.method: 利用卷积神经网络学习局部高程图与足点质量关系，通过几何特征分析、运动学约束检测和碰撞检查，实现单次计算评估数百个候选足点。
AI.result: 在模拟与真实机器人实验中，该方法能在标准电脑上以10~ms时延完成足点评估，有效提升崎岖地形适应能力。
AI.conclusion: 提出的单步评估框架在保证计算效率的同时实现了高精度足点选择，为四足机器人实时运动控制提供了可行方案。
