search_text: Single-shot Foothold Selection and Constraint Evaluation for Quadruped Locomotion 四足运动的单次立足点选择和约束评估 In this paper, we propose a method for selecting the optimal footholds for legged systems. The goal of the proposed method is to find the best foothold for the swing leg on a local elevation map. We apply the Convolutional Neural Network to learn the relationship between the local elevation map and the quality of potential footholds. The proposed network evaluates the geometrical characteristics of each cell on the elevation map, checks kinematic constraints and collisions. During execution time, the controller obtains the qualitative measurement of each potential foothold from the neural model. This method allows to evaluate hundreds of potential footholds and check multiple constraints in a single step which takes 10~ms on a standard computer without GPGPU. The experiments were carried out on a quadruped robot walking over rough terrain in both simulation and real robotic platforms. 在本文中，我们提出了一种为腿式系统选择最佳立足点的方法。该方法的目标是在局部高程地图上找到摆动腿的最佳立足点。我们应用卷积神经网络来学习当地高程图与潜在立足点质量之间的关系。所提出的网络评估高程图上每个单元的几何特征，检查运动学约束和碰撞。在执行期间，控制器从神经模型中获得每个潜在立足点的定性测量。该方法允许在一个步骤中评估数百个潜在的立足点并检查多个约束，这在没有 GPGPU 的标准计算机上需要 10~ms。实验是在模拟和真实机器人平台上在崎岖地形上行走的四足机器人上进行的。 本文提出一种基于卷积神经网络的四足机器人足点选择与约束评估方法，可在单步内快速评估地形适应性。 D. authors_text: Shamel Fahmi
title: On Terrain-Aware Locomotion for Legged Robots
title_zh: 腿式机器人的地形感知运动
comment: 174 pages, PhD Dissertation. Istituto Italiano di Tecnologia, 2021
comments: 174 pages, PhD Dissertation. Istituto Italiano di Tecnologia, 2021
abstract: (Simplified Abstract) To accomplish breakthroughs in dynamic whole-body locomotion, legged robots have to be terrain aware. Terrain-Aware Locomotion (TAL) implies that the robot can perceive the terrain with its sensors, and can take decisions based on this information. This thesis presents TAL strategies both from a proprioceptive and an exteroceptive perspective. The strategies are implemented at the level of locomotion planning, control, and state estimation, and using optimization and learning techniques. The first part is on TAL strategies at the Whole-Body Control (WBC) level. We introduce a passive WBC (pWBC) framework that allows the robot to stabilize and walk over challenging terrain while taking into account the terrain geometry (inclination) and friction properties. The pWBC relies on rigid contact assumptions which makes it suitable only for stiff terrain. As a consequence, we introduce Soft Terrain Adaptation aNd Compliance Estimation (STANCE) which is a soft terrain adaptation algorithm that generalizes beyond rigid terrain. The second part of the thesis focuses on vision-based TAL strategies. We present Vision-Based Terrain-Aware Locomotion (ViTAL) which is an online planning strategy that selects the footholds based on the robot capabilities, and the robot pose that maximizes the chances of the robot succeeding in reaching these footholds. ViTAL relies on a set of robot skills that characterizes the capabilities of the robot and its legs. The skills include the robot's ability to assess the terrain's geometry, avoid leg collisions, and avoid reaching kinematic limits. Our strategies are based on optimization and learning methods and are validated on HyQ and HyQReal in simulation and experiment. We show that with the help of these strategies, we can push dynamic legged robots one step closer to being fully autonomous and terrain aware.
summary: (Simplified Abstract) To accomplish breakthroughs in dynamic whole-body locomotion, legged robots have to be terrain aware. Terrain-Aware Locomotion (TAL) implies that the robot can perceive the terrain with its sensors, and can take decisions based on this information. This thesis presents TAL strategies both from a proprioceptive and an exteroceptive perspective. The strategies are implemented at the level of locomotion planning, control, and state estimation, and using optimization and learning techniques. The first part is on TAL strategies at the Whole-Body Control (WBC) level. We introduce a passive WBC (pWBC) framework that allows the robot to stabilize and walk over challenging terrain while taking into account the terrain geometry (inclination) and friction properties. The pWBC relies on rigid contact assumptions which makes it suitable only for stiff terrain. As a consequence, we introduce Soft Terrain Adaptation aNd Compliance Estimation (STANCE) which is a soft terrain adaptation algorithm that generalizes beyond rigid terrain. The second part of the thesis focuses on vision-based TAL strategies. We present Vision-Based Terrain-Aware Locomotion (ViTAL) which is an online planning strategy that selects the footholds based on the robot capabilities, and the robot pose that maximizes the chances of the robot succeeding in reaching these footholds. ViTAL relies on a set of robot skills that characterizes the capabilities of the robot and its legs. The skills include the robot's ability to assess the terrain's geometry, avoid leg collisions, and avoid reaching kinematic limits. Our strategies are based on optimization and learning methods and are validated on HyQ and HyQReal in simulation and experiment. We show that with the help of these strategies, we can push dynamic legged robots one step closer to being fully autonomous and terrain aware.
abstract_zh: （简化摘要）为了实现动态全身运动的突破，腿式机器人必须具有地形感知能力。地形感知运动（TAL）意味着机器人可以通过传感器感知地形，并可以根据这些信息做出决策。本论文从本体感受和外感受的角度提出了 TAL 策略。这些策略是在运动规划、控制和状态估计层面上实施的，并使用优化和学习技术。第一部分是全身控制 (WBC) 层面的 TAL 策略。我们引入了被动 WBC (pWBC) 框架，允许机器人在具有挑战性的地形上稳定并行走，同时考虑地形几何形状（倾斜度）和摩擦特性。 pWBC 依赖于刚性接触假设，这使得它仅适用于坚硬的地形。因此，我们引入了软地形适应和合规性估计（STANCE），这是一种软地形适应算法，可以推广到刚性地形之外。论文的第二部分重点讨论基于愿景的 TAL 策略。我们提出了基于视觉的地形感知运动（ViTAL），这是一种在线规划策略，可以根据机器人的能力选择立足点，以及最大限度地提高机器人成功到达这些立足点的机会的机器人姿势。 ViTAL 依赖于一组机器人技能，这些技能表征了机器人及其腿部的功能。这些技能包括机器人评估地形几何形状、避免腿部碰撞以及避免达到运动学极限的能力。我们的策略基于优化和学习方法，并在 HyQ 和 HyQReal 上进行了仿真和实验验证。我们表明，在这些策略的帮助下，我们可以推动动态腿机器人更接近完全自主和地形感知。

AI.tldr: 本文提出地形感知足式机器人运动策略，从本体感觉和外感受视角出发，结合优化与学习方法实现复杂地形下的自主运动。
AI.motivation: 足式机器人需具备地形感知能力以实现动态全身运动突破，传统方法在非刚性地形和视觉规划方面存在局限性。
AI.method: 提出被动全身控制框架(pWBC)与软地形自适应算法STANCE处理非刚性地形，开发基于视觉的ViTAL策略进行在线足端规划，结合机器人技能集与优化学习方法。
AI.result: 策略在HyQ和HyQReal仿真与实验中验证有效，显著提升机器人在复杂地形中的稳定性和自主性。
AI.conclusion: 通过多层级地形感知策略融合，推动足式机器人向完全自主的地形适应能力迈进。

search_text: On Terrain-Aware Locomotion for Legged Robots 腿式机器人的地形感知运动 (Simplified Abstract) To accomplish breakthroughs in dynamic whole-body locomotion, legged robots have to be terrain aware. Terrain-Aware Locomotion (TAL) implies that the robot can perceive the terrain with its sensors, and can take decisions based on this information. This thesis presents TAL strategies both from a proprioceptive and an exteroceptive perspective. The strategies are implemented at the level of locomotion planning, control, and state estimation, and using optimization and learning techniques. The first part is on TAL strategies at the Whole-Body Control (WBC) level. We introduce a passive WBC (pWBC) framework that allows the robot to stabilize and walk over challenging terrain while taking into account the terrain geometry (inclination) and friction properties. The pWBC relies on rigid contact assumptions which makes it suitable only for stiff terrain. As a consequence, we introduce Soft Terrain Adaptation aNd Compliance Estimation (STANCE) which is a soft terrain adaptation algorithm that generalizes beyond rigid terrain. The second part of the thesis focuses on vision-based TAL strategies. We present Vision-Based Terrain-Aware Locomotion (ViTAL) which is an online planning strategy that selects the footholds based on the robot capabilities, and the robot pose that maximizes the chances of the robot succeeding in reaching these footholds. ViTAL relies on a set of robot skills that characterizes the capabilities of the robot and its legs. The skills include the robot's ability to assess the terrain's geometry, avoid leg collisions, and avoid reaching kinematic limits. Our strategies are based on optimization and learning methods and are validated on HyQ and HyQReal in simulation and experiment. We show that with the help of these strategies, we can push dynamic legged robots one step closer to being fully autonomous and terrain aware. （简化摘要）为了实现动态全身运动的突破，腿式机器人必须具有地形感知能力。地形感知运动（TAL）意味着机器人可以通过传感器感知地形，并可以根据这些信息做出决策。本论文从本体感受和外感受的角度提出了 TAL 策略。这些策略是在运动规划、控制和状态估计层面上实施的，并使用优化和学习技术。第一部分是全身控制 (WBC) 层面的 TAL 策略。我们引入了被动 WBC (pWBC) 框架，允许机器人在具有挑战性的地形上稳定并行走，同时考虑地形几何形状（倾斜度）和摩擦特性。 pWBC 依赖于刚性接触假设，这使得它仅适用于坚硬的地形。因此，我们引入了软地形适应和合规性估计（STANCE），这是一种软地形适应算法，可以推广到刚性地形之外。论文的第二部分重点讨论基于愿景的 TAL 策略。我们提出了基于视觉的地形感知运动（ViTAL），这是一种在线规划策略，可以根据机器人的能力选择立足点，以及最大限度地提高机器人成功到达这些立足点的机会的机器人姿势。 ViTAL 依赖于一组机器人技能，这些技能表征了机器人及其腿部的功能。这些技能包括机器人评估地形几何形状、避免腿部碰撞以及避免达到运动学极限的能力。我们的策略基于优化和学习方法，并在 HyQ 和 HyQReal 上进行了仿真和实验验证。我们表明，在这些策略的帮助下，我们可以推动动态腿机器人更接近完全自主和地形感知。 本文提出地形感知足式机器人运动策略，从本体感觉和外感受视角出发，结合优化与学习方法实现复杂地形下的自主运动。 Shamel Fahmi cs.RO

authors_text: Luke Rickard,Thom Badings,Licio Romao,Alessandro Abate
title: Formal Controller Synthesis for Markov Jump Linear Systems with Uncertain Dynamics
title_zh: 具有不确定动力学的马尔可夫跳跃线性系统的形式控制器综合
abstract: Automated synthesis of provably correct controllers for cyber-physical systems is crucial for deployment in safety-critical scenarios. However, hybrid features and stochastic or unknown behaviours make this problem challenging. We propose a method for synthesising controllers for Markov jump linear systems (MJLSs), a class of discrete-time models for cyber-physical systems, so that they certifiably satisfy probabilistic computation tree logic (PCTL) formulae. An MJLS consists of a finite set of stochastic linear dynamics and discrete jumps between these dynamics that are governed by a Markov decision process (MDP). We consider the cases where the transition probabilities of this MDP are either known up to an interval or completely unknown. Our approach is based on a finite-state abstraction that captures both the discrete (mode-jumping) and continuous (stochastic linear) behaviour of the MJLS. We formalise this abstraction as an interval MDP (iMDP) for which we compute intervals of transition probabilities using sampling techniques from the so-called 'scenario approach', resulting in a probabilistically sound approximation. We apply our method to multiple realistic benchmark problems, in particular, a temperature control and an aerial vehicle delivery problem.
summary: Automated synthesis of provably correct controllers for cyber-physical systems is crucial for deployment in safety-critical scenarios. However, hybrid features and stochastic or unknown behaviours make this problem challenging. We propose a method for synthesising controllers for Markov jump linear systems (MJLSs), a class of discrete-time models for cyber-physical systems, so that they certifiably satisfy probabilistic computation tree logic (PCTL) formulae. An MJLS consists of a finite set of stochastic linear dynamics and discrete jumps between these dynamics that are governed by a Markov decision process (MDP). We consider the cases where the transition probabilities of this MDP are either known up to an interval or completely unknown. Our approach is based on a finite-state abstraction that captures both the discrete (mode-jumping) and continuous (stochastic linear) behaviour of the MJLS. We formalise this abstraction as an interval MDP (iMDP) for which we compute intervals of transition probabilities using sampling techniques from the so-called 'scenario approach', resulting in a probabilistically sound approximation. We apply our method to multiple realistic benchmark problems, in particular, a temperature control and an aerial vehicle delivery problem.
abstract_zh: 自动合成可证明正确的网络物理系统控制器对于安全关键场景中的部署至关重要。然而，混合特征和随机或未知行为使这个问题变得具有挑战性。我们提出了一种合成马尔可夫跳跃线性系统（MJLS）控制器的方法，这是一类网络物理系统的离散时间模型，以便它们可以证明满足概率计算树逻辑（PCTL）公式。 MJLS 由一组有限的随机线性动态以及这些动态之间的离散跳跃组成，这些动态由马尔可夫决策过程 (MDP) 控制。我们考虑这种 MDP 的转移概率在某个区间内已知或完全未知的情况。我们的方法基于有限状态抽象，可捕获 MJLS 的离散（模式跳跃）和连续（随机线性）行为。我们将这种抽象形式化为区间 MDP (iMDP)，我们使用所谓的“场景方法”中的采样技术来计算转移概率的区间，从而得到概率上合理的近似值。我们将我们的方法应用于多个现实的基准问题，特别是温度控制和飞行器交付问题。

AI.tldr: 提出一种针对具有不确定动态的马尔可夫跳跃线性系统（MJLS）的控制器合成方法，确保其满足概率计算树逻辑（PCTL）公式。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以处理MJLS中的不确定性和混合特征，导致安全关键系统控制器合成困难，需更可靠的方法。
AI.method: 通过有限状态抽象建模MJLS的离散和连续行为，转化为区间MDP（iMDP），并采用场景方法采样计算转移概率区间，实现概率安全近似。
AI.result: 方法在温度控制和空中车辆配送等实际案例中验证有效，能够处理已知和未知转移概率的情况。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为处理MJLS中的不确定性提供了有效框架，确保控制器满足PCTL规范，适用于实际安全关键系统。

authors_text: Odysseas S. Chlapanis,Georgios Paraskevopoulos,Alexandros Potamianos
title: Adapted Multimodal BERT with Layer-wise Fusion for Sentiment Analysis
title_zh: 采用分层融合的多模态 BERT 进行情感分析
abstract: Multimodal learning pipelines have benefited from the success of pretrained language models. However, this comes at the cost of increased model parameters. In this work, we propose Adapted Multimodal BERT (AMB), a BERT-based architecture for multimodal tasks that uses a combination of adapter modules and intermediate fusion layers. The adapter adjusts the pretrained language model for the task at hand, while the fusion layers perform task-specific, layer-wise fusion of audio-visual information with textual BERT representations. During the adaptation process the pre-trained language model parameters remain frozen, allowing for fast, parameter-efficient training. In our ablations we see that this approach leads to efficient models, that can outperform their fine-tuned counterparts and are robust to input noise. Our experiments on sentiment analysis with CMU-MOSEI show that AMB outperforms the current state-of-the-art across metrics, with 3.4% relative reduction in the resulting error and 2.1% relative improvement in 7-class classification accuracy.
summary: Multimodal learning pipelines have benefited from the success of pretrained language models. However, this comes at the cost of increased model parameters. In this work, we propose Adapted Multimodal BERT (AMB), a BERT-based architecture for multimodal tasks that uses a combination of adapter modules and intermediate fusion layers. The adapter adjusts the pretrained language model for the task at hand, while the fusion layers perform task-specific, layer-wise fusion of audio-visual information with textual BERT representations. During the adaptation process the pre-trained language model parameters remain frozen, allowing for fast, parameter-efficient training. In our ablations we see that this approach leads to efficient models, that can outperform their fine-tuned counterparts and are robust to input noise. Our experiments on sentiment analysis with CMU-MOSEI show that AMB outperforms the current state-of-the-art across metrics, with 3.4% relative reduction in the resulting error and 2.1% relative improvement in 7-class classification accuracy.
abstract_zh: 多模态学习管道受益于预训练语言模型的成功。然而，这是以增加模型参数为代价的。在这项工作中，我们提出了自适应多模态 BERT（AMB），这是一种基于 BERT 的多模态任务架构，它使用适配器模块和中间融合层的组合。适配器针对手头的任务调整预训练的语言模型，而融合层则执行特定于任务的视听信息与文本 BERT 表示的逐层融合。在适应过程中，预训练的语言模型参数保持冻结，从而可以进行快速、参数高效的训练。在我们的消融中，我们看到这种方法可以产生高效的模型，其性能优于经过微调的模型，并且对输入噪声具有鲁棒性。我们使用 CMU-MOSEI 进行的情感分析实验表明，AMB 的各项指标均优于当前最先进的技术，所得误差相对减少了 3.4%，7 类分类准确度相对提高了 2.1%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的多模态BERT模型（AMB），通过层间融合技术提升情感分析任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统多模态模型参数冗余且训练效率低，而预训练语言模型的参数冻结机制可提升效率，但需解决多模态信息融合问题。
AI.method: 设计包含适配器模块和中间融合层的AMB架构，冻结预训练BERT参数，通过层间融合实现音频-视觉信息与文本表示的动态结合。
AI.result: 在CMU-MOSEI数据集上，AMB相较现有最优方法实现3.4%的相对误差降低和7类分类准确率2.1%的提升，且对输入噪声具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: AMB通过参数高效的设计和层间融合机制，在多模态情感分析任务中实现了性能与效率的平衡，为相关研究提供新思路。

search_text: Adapted Multimodal BERT with Layer-wise Fusion for Sentiment Analysis 采用分层融合的多模态 BERT 进行情感分析 Multimodal learning pipelines have benefited from the success of pretrained language models. However, this comes at the cost of increased model parameters. In this work, we propose Adapted Multimodal BERT (AMB), a BERT-based architecture for multimodal tasks that uses a combination of adapter modules and intermediate fusion layers. The adapter adjusts the pretrained language model for the task at hand, while the fusion layers perform task-specific, layer-wise fusion of audio-visual information with textual BERT representations. During the adaptation process the pre-trained language model parameters remain frozen, allowing for fast, parameter-efficient training. In our ablations we see that this approach leads to efficient models, that can outperform their fine-tuned counterparts and are robust to input noise. Our experiments on sentiment analysis with CMU-MOSEI show that AMB outperforms the current state-of-the-art across metrics, with 3.4% relative reduction in the resulting error and 2.1% relative improvement in 7-class classification accuracy. 多模态学习管道受益于预训练语言模型的成功。然而，这是以增加模型参数为代价的。在这项工作中，我们提出了自适应多模态 BERT（AMB），这是一种基于 BERT 的多模态任务架构，它使用适配器模块和中间融合层的组合。适配器针对手头的任务调整预训练的语言模型，而融合层则执行特定于任务的视听信息与文本 BERT 表示的逐层融合。在适应过程中，预训练的语言模型参数保持冻结，从而可以进行快速、参数高效的训练。在我们的消融中，我们看到这种方法可以产生高效的模型，其性能优于经过微调的模型，并且对输入噪声具有鲁棒性。我们使用 CMU-MOSEI 进行的情感分析实验表明，AMB 的各项指标均优于当前最先进的技术，所得误差相对减少了 3.4%，7 类分类准确度相对提高了 2.1%。 本文提出一种改进的多模态BERT模型（AMB），通过层间融合技术提升情感分析任务的性能。 Odysseas S. Chlapanis,Georgios Paraskevopoulos,Alexandros Potamianos cs.CL,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Anupam Biswas
title: Prasatul Matrix: A Direct Comparison Approach for Analyzing Evolutionary Optimization Algorithms
title_zh: Prasatul 矩阵：分析进化优化算法的直接比较方法
abstract: The performance of individual evolutionary optimization algorithms is mostly measured in terms of statistics such as mean, median and standard deviation etc., computed over the best solutions obtained with few trails of the algorithm. To compare the performance of two algorithms, the values of these statistics are compared instead of comparing the solutions directly. This kind of comparison lacks direct comparison of solutions obtained with different algorithms. For instance, the comparison of best solutions (or worst solution) of two algorithms simply not possible. Moreover, ranking of algorithms is mostly done in terms of solution quality only, despite the fact that the convergence of algorithm is also an important factor. In this paper, a direct comparison approach is proposed to analyze the performance of evolutionary optimization algorithms. A direct comparison matrix called \emph{Prasatul Matrix} is prepared, which accounts direct comparison outcome of best solutions obtained with two algorithms for a specific number of trials. Five different performance measures are designed based on the prasatul matrix to evaluate the performance of algorithms in terms of Optimality and Comparability of solutions. These scores are utilized to develop a score-driven approach for comparing performance of multiple algorithms as well as for ranking both in the grounds of solution quality and convergence analysis. Proposed approach is analyzed with six evolutionary optimization algorithms on 25 benchmark functions. A non-parametric statistical analysis, namely Wilcoxon paired sum-rank test is also performed to verify the outcomes of proposed direct comparison approach.
summary: The performance of individual evolutionary optimization algorithms is mostly measured in terms of statistics such as mean, median and standard deviation etc., computed over the best solutions obtained with few trails of the algorithm. To compare the performance of two algorithms, the values of these statistics are compared instead of comparing the solutions directly. This kind of comparison lacks direct comparison of solutions obtained with different algorithms. For instance, the comparison of best solutions (or worst solution) of two algorithms simply not possible. Moreover, ranking of algorithms is mostly done in terms of solution quality only, despite the fact that the convergence of algorithm is also an important factor. In this paper, a direct comparison approach is proposed to analyze the performance of evolutionary optimization algorithms. A direct comparison matrix called \emph{Prasatul Matrix} is prepared, which accounts direct comparison outcome of best solutions obtained with two algorithms for a specific number of trials. Five different performance measures are designed based on the prasatul matrix to evaluate the performance of algorithms in terms of Optimality and Comparability of solutions. These scores are utilized to develop a score-driven approach for comparing performance of multiple algorithms as well as for ranking both in the grounds of solution quality and convergence analysis. Proposed approach is analyzed with six evolutionary optimization algorithms on 25 benchmark functions. A non-parametric statistical analysis, namely Wilcoxon paired sum-rank test is also performed to verify the outcomes of proposed direct comparison approach.
abstract_zh: 单个进化优化算法的性能主要通过平均值、中位数和标准差等统计数据来衡量，并通过算法的少量尝试获得的最佳解决方案进行计算。为了比较两种算法的性能，需要比较这些统计量的值，而不是直接比较解决方案。这种比较缺乏对不同算法获得的解决方案的直接比较。例如，比较两种算法的最佳解决方案（或最差解决方案）根本不可能。此外，算法的排名大多仅根据解的质量来完成，尽管算法的收敛性也是一个重要因素。本文提出了一种直接比较方法来分析进化优化算法的性能。准备了一个称为 \emph{Prasatul Matrix} 的直接比较矩阵，它说明了通过特定次数的试验使用两种算法获得的最佳解决方案的直接比较结果。基于 prasatul 矩阵设计了五种不同的性能指标，以评估算法在解决方案的最优性和可比性方面的性能。这些分数用于开发分数驱动的方法，用于比较多种算法的性能以及根据解决方案质量和收敛分析进行排名。使用 25 个基准函数的 6 种进化优化算法对所提出的方法进行了分析。还进行了非参数统计分析，即 Wilcoxon 配对和秩检验，以验证所提出的直接比较方法的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Prasatul Matrix的直接比较方法，用于分析进化优化算法的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法通过统计指标（如均值、标准差）间接比较算法性能，无法直接对比不同算法的解，且忽视了收敛性因素。
AI.method: 构建Prasatul Matrix直接比较两种算法在多次试验中的最优解，设计五个性能指标评估解的最优性与可比性，并结合收敛分析进行算法排名。
AI.result: 在25个基准函数上测试六种进化算法，通过Wilcoxon检验验证了该方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: Prasatul Matrix方法能更全面地评估算法性能，同时考虑解质量与收敛性，优于传统统计指标比较方式。

authors_text: Anthony Corso,Yizheng Wang,Markus Zechner,Jef Caers,Mykel J. Kochenderfer
title: A POMDP Model for Safe Geological Carbon Sequestration
title_zh: 安全地质碳封存的 POMDP 模型
comment: Accepted at NeurIPS 2022 Workshop on Tackling Climate Change with Machine Learning
comments: Accepted at NeurIPS 2022 Workshop on Tackling Climate Change with Machine Learning
abstract: Geological carbon capture and sequestration (CCS), where CO$_2$ is stored in subsurface formations, is a promising and scalable approach for reducing global emissions. However, if done incorrectly, it may lead to earthquakes and leakage of CO$_2$ back to the surface, harming both humans and the environment. These risks are exacerbated by the large amount of uncertainty in the structure of the storage formation. For these reasons, we propose that CCS operations be modeled as a partially observable Markov decision process (POMDP) and decisions be informed using automated planning algorithms. To this end, we develop a simplified model of CCS operations based on a 2D spillpoint analysis that retains many of the challenges and safety considerations of the real-world problem. We show how off-the-shelf POMDP solvers outperform expert baselines for safe CCS planning. This POMDP model can be used as a test bed to drive the development of novel decision-making algorithms for CCS operations.
summary: Geological carbon capture and sequestration (CCS), where CO$_2$ is stored in subsurface formations, is a promising and scalable approach for reducing global emissions. However, if done incorrectly, it may lead to earthquakes and leakage of CO$_2$ back to the surface, harming both humans and the environment. These risks are exacerbated by the large amount of uncertainty in the structure of the storage formation. For these reasons, we propose that CCS operations be modeled as a partially observable Markov decision process (POMDP) and decisions be informed using automated planning algorithms. To this end, we develop a simplified model of CCS operations based on a 2D spillpoint analysis that retains many of the challenges and safety considerations of the real-world problem. We show how off-the-shelf POMDP solvers outperform expert baselines for safe CCS planning. This POMDP model can be used as a test bed to drive the development of novel decision-making algorithms for CCS operations.
abstract_zh: 地质碳捕获和封存 (CCS) 将 CO$_2$ 储存在地下地层中，是一种有前途且可扩展的减少全球排放的方法。然而，如果处理不当，可能会导致地震和 CO$_2$ 泄漏回地表，从而危害人类和环境。储存地层结构的大量不确定性加剧了这些风险。出于这些原因，我们建议将 CCS 操作建模为部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程 (POMDP)，并使用自动规划算法来通知决策。为此，我们开发了一个基于二维溢出点分析的 CCS 操作简化模型，该模型保留了现实世界问题的许多挑战和安全考虑因素。我们展示了现成的 POMDP 求解器如何优于安全 CCS 规划的专家基线。该 POMDP 模型可用作测试平台，以推动 CCS 运营新型决策算法的开发。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）的模型，用于安全地进行地质碳封存操作。
AI.motivation: 地质碳捕获与封存（CCS）存在因地下结构不确定性导致地震和CO₂泄漏的风险，需通过自动化决策方法提升安全性。
AI.method: 构建基于二维溢出点分析的简化CCS模型，并利用现成的POMDP求解器进行决策规划。
AI.result: 实验表明，POMDP求解器在安全CCS规划中优于专家基准方案。
AI.conclusion: 该POMDP模型可作为开发新型CCS决策算法的测试平台，有助于提升碳封存操作的安全性。

motivation: 地质碳捕获与封存（CCS）存在因地下结构不确定性导致地震和CO₂泄漏的风险，需通过自动化决策方法提升安全性。
method: 构建基于二维溢出点分析的简化CCS模型，并利用现成的POMDP求解器进行决策规划。
result: 实验表明，POMDP求解器在安全CCS规划中优于专家基准方案。
conclusion: 该POMDP模型可作为开发新型CCS决策算法的测试平台，有助于提升碳封存操作的安全性。
search_text: A POMDP Model for Safe Geological Carbon Sequestration 安全地质碳封存的 POMDP 模型 Geological carbon capture and sequestration (CCS), where CO$_2$ is stored in subsurface formations, is a promising and scalable approach for reducing global emissions. However, if done incorrectly, it may lead to earthquakes and leakage of CO$_2$ back to the surface, harming both humans and the environment. These risks are exacerbated by the large amount of uncertainty in the structure of the storage formation. For these reasons, we propose that CCS operations be modeled as a partially observable Markov decision process (POMDP) and decisions be informed using automated planning algorithms. To this end, we develop a simplified model of CCS operations based on a 2D spillpoint analysis that retains many of the challenges and safety considerations of the real-world problem. We show how off-the-shelf POMDP solvers outperform expert baselines for safe CCS planning. This POMDP model can be used as a test bed to drive the development of novel decision-making algorithms for CCS operations. 地质碳捕获和封存 (CCS) 将 CO$_2$ 储存在地下地层中，是一种有前途且可扩展的减少全球排放的方法。然而，如果处理不当，可能会导致地震和 CO$_2$ 泄漏回地表，从而危害人类和环境。储存地层结构的大量不确定性加剧了这些风险。出于这些原因，我们建议将 CCS 操作建模为部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程 (POMDP)，并使用自动规划算法来通知决策。为此，我们开发了一个基于二维溢出点分析的 CCS 操作简化模型，该模型保留了现实世界问题的许多挑战和安全考虑因素。我们展示了现成的 POMDP 求解器如何优于安全 CCS 规划的专家基线。该 POMDP 模型可用作测试平台，以推动 CCS 运营新型决策算法的开发。 本文提出了一种基于部分可观察马尔可夫决策过程（POMDP）的模型，用于安全地进行地质碳封存操作。 Anthony Corso,Yizheng Wang,Markus Zechner,Jef Caers,Mykel J. Kochenderfer physics.geo-ph,cs.AI

authors_text: Ioannis Sarridis,Christos Koutlis,Olga Papadopoulou,Symeon Papadopoulos
title: Leveraging Large-scale Multimedia Datasets to Refine Content Moderation Models
title_zh: 利用大规模多媒体数据集来完善内容审核模型
abstract: The sheer volume of online user-generated content has rendered content moderation technologies essential in order to protect digital platform audiences from content that may cause anxiety, worry, or concern. Despite the efforts towards developing automated solutions to tackle this problem, creating accurate models remains challenging due to the lack of adequate task-specific training data. The fact that manually annotating such data is a highly demanding procedure that could severely affect the annotators' emotional well-being is directly related to the latter limitation. In this paper, we propose the CM-Refinery framework that leverages large-scale multimedia datasets to automatically extend initial training datasets with hard examples that can refine content moderation models, while significantly reducing the involvement of human annotators. We apply our method on two model adaptation strategies designed with respect to the different challenges observed while collecting data, i.e. lack of (i) task-specific negative data or (ii) both positive and negative data. Additionally, we introduce a diversity criterion applied to the data collection process that further enhances the generalization performance of the refined models. The proposed method is evaluated on the Not Safe for Work (NSFW) and disturbing content detection tasks on benchmark datasets achieving 1.32% and 1.94% accuracy improvements compared to the state of the art, respectively. Finally, it significantly reduces human involvement, as 92.54% of data are automatically annotated in case of disturbing content while no human intervention is required for the NSFW task.
summary: The sheer volume of online user-generated content has rendered content moderation technologies essential in order to protect digital platform audiences from content that may cause anxiety, worry, or concern. Despite the efforts towards developing automated solutions to tackle this problem, creating accurate models remains challenging due to the lack of adequate task-specific training data. The fact that manually annotating such data is a highly demanding procedure that could severely affect the annotators' emotional well-being is directly related to the latter limitation. In this paper, we propose the CM-Refinery framework that leverages large-scale multimedia datasets to automatically extend initial training datasets with hard examples that can refine content moderation models, while significantly reducing the involvement of human annotators. We apply our method on two model adaptation strategies designed with respect to the different challenges observed while collecting data, i.e. lack of (i) task-specific negative data or (ii) both positive and negative data. Additionally, we introduce a diversity criterion applied to the data collection process that further enhances the generalization performance of the refined models. The proposed method is evaluated on the Not Safe for Work (NSFW) and disturbing content detection tasks on benchmark datasets achieving 1.32% and 1.94% accuracy improvements compared to the state of the art, respectively. Finally, it significantly reduces human involvement, as 92.54% of data are automatically annotated in case of disturbing content while no human intervention is required for the NSFW task.
abstract_zh: 大量的在线用户生成内容使得内容审核技术变得至关重要，以保护数字平台受众免受可能引起焦虑、担忧或担忧的内容的影响。尽管努力开发自动化解决方案来解决这个问题，但由于缺乏足够的特定任务训练数据，创建准确的模型仍然具有挑战性。事实上，手动注释此类数据是一个要求很高的过程，可能会严重影响注释者的情绪健康，这与后一个限制直接相关。在本文中，我们提出了 CM-Refinery 框架，该框架利用大规模多媒体数据集自动扩展初始训练数据集，并提供可以细化内容审核模型的硬示例，同时显着减少人类注释者的参与。我们将我们的方法应用于针对收集数据时观察到的不同挑战而设计的两种模型适应策略，即缺乏（i）特定于任务的负面数据或（ii）正面和负面数据。此外，我们引入了应用于数据收集过程的多样性标准，进一步增强了细化模型的泛化性能。所提出的方法在基准数据集上的不安全工作 (NSFW) 和干扰内容检测任务上进行了评估，与现有技术相比，分别实现了 1.32% 和 1.94% 的准确率提高。最后，它显着减少了人类的参与，因为 92.54% 的数据会在出现令人不安的内容时自动注释，而 NSFW 任务不需要人类干预。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CM-Refinery框架，利用大规模多媒体数据集自动扩展训练数据，以提升内容审核模型的准确性并减少人工标注依赖。
AI.motivation: 在线用户生成内容激增导致内容审核需求迫切，但现有模型因缺乏特定任务的训练数据及人工标注成本高而难以有效改进。
AI.method: 通过CM-Refinery框架自动生成困难样本扩展数据集，结合两种模型适配策略应对数据不足问题，并引入多样性准则提升模型泛化能力。
AI.result: 在NSFW和令人不安内容检测任务中分别提升1.32%和1.94%准确率，且92.54%数据可自动标注，显著降低人工干预需求。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效平衡了模型性能与人工成本，为大规模内容审核提供了高效且可持续的解决方案。

authors_text: Andrei Cramariuc,Lukas Bernreiter,Florian Tschopp,Marius Fehr,Victor Reijgwart,Juan Nieto,Roland Siegwart,Cesar Cadena
title: maplab 2.0 -- A Modular and Multi-Modal Mapping Framework
title_zh: maplab 2.0——模块化和多模式映射框架
abstract: Integration of multiple sensor modalities and deep learning into Simultaneous Localization And Mapping (SLAM) systems are areas of significant interest in current research. Multi-modality is a stepping stone towards achieving robustness in challenging environments and interoperability of heterogeneous multi-robot systems with varying sensor setups. With maplab 2.0, we provide a versatile open-source platform that facilitates developing, testing, and integrating new modules and features into a fully-fledged SLAM system. Through extensive experiments, we show that maplab 2.0's accuracy is comparable to the state-of-the-art on the HILTI 2021 benchmark. Additionally, we showcase the flexibility of our system with three use cases: i) large-scale (approx. 10 km) multi-robot multi-session (23 missions) mapping, ii) integration of non-visual landmarks, and iii) incorporating a semantic object-based loop closure module into the mapping framework. The code is available open-source at https://github.com/ethz-asl/maplab.
summary: Integration of multiple sensor modalities and deep learning into Simultaneous Localization And Mapping (SLAM) systems are areas of significant interest in current research. Multi-modality is a stepping stone towards achieving robustness in challenging environments and interoperability of heterogeneous multi-robot systems with varying sensor setups. With maplab 2.0, we provide a versatile open-source platform that facilitates developing, testing, and integrating new modules and features into a fully-fledged SLAM system. Through extensive experiments, we show that maplab 2.0's accuracy is comparable to the state-of-the-art on the HILTI 2021 benchmark. Additionally, we showcase the flexibility of our system with three use cases: i) large-scale (approx. 10 km) multi-robot multi-session (23 missions) mapping, ii) integration of non-visual landmarks, and iii) incorporating a semantic object-based loop closure module into the mapping framework. The code is available open-source at https://github.com/ethz-asl/maplab.
abstract_zh: Integration of multiple sensor modalities and deep learning into Simultaneous Localization And Mapping (SLAM) systems are areas of significant interest in current research. Multi-modality is a stepping stone towards achieving robustness in challenging environments and interoperability of heterogeneous multi-robot systems with varying sensor setups. With maplab 2.0, we provide a versatile open-source platform that facilitates developing, testing, and integrating new modules and features into a fully-fledged SLAM system.通过大量实验，我们表明 Maplab 2.0 的准确度可与 HILTI 2021 基准测试的最新水平相媲美。 Additionally, we showcase the flexibility of our system with three use cases: i) large-scale (approx. 10 km) multi-robot multi-session (23 missions) mapping, ii) integration of non-visual landmarks, and iii) incorporating a semantic object-based loop closure module into the mapping framework.该代码可在 https://github.com/ethz-asl/maplab 上开源。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个名为maplab 2.0的模块化多模态映射框架，旨在提升SLAM系统的鲁棒性和多机器人系统互操作性。
AI.motivation: 现有SLAM系统在复杂环境和异构多机器人系统中存在鲁棒性不足、模块化程度低的问题，需开发灵活的开源平台支持多传感器与深度学习集成。
AI.method: 提出maplab 2.0开源框架，支持多模态传感器数据融合与深度学习模块集成，并通过大规模多机器人实验及三种典型应用场景验证系统性能。
AI.result: 实验表明maplab 2.0在HILTI 2021基准测试中精度与现有技术相当，成功实现10公里级多机器人映射、非视觉地标整合及语义化闭环检测。
AI.conclusion: maplab 2.0为SLAM研究提供了高度模块化的开发平台，其开源特性促进了多模态感知与智能映射技术的进一步发展。

authors_text: Songwei Ge,Shlok Mishra,Simon Kornblith,Chun-Liang Li,David Jacobs
title: Hyperbolic Contrastive Learning for Visual Representations beyond Objects
title_zh: 用于超越对象的视觉表示的双曲对比学习
abstract: Although self-/un-supervised methods have led to rapid progress in visual representation learning, these methods generally treat objects and scenes using the same lens. In this paper, we focus on learning representations for objects and scenes that preserve the structure among them. Motivated by the observation that visually similar objects are close in the representation space, we argue that the scenes and objects should instead follow a hierarchical structure based on their compositionality. To exploit such a structure, we propose a contrastive learning framework where a Euclidean loss is used to learn object representations and a hyperbolic loss is used to encourage representations of scenes to lie close to representations of their constituent objects in a hyperbolic space. This novel hyperbolic objective encourages the scene-object hypernymy among the representations by optimizing the magnitude of their norms. We show that when pretraining on the COCO and OpenImages datasets, the hyperbolic loss improves downstream performance of several baselines across multiple datasets and tasks, including image classification, object detection, and semantic segmentation. We also show that the properties of the learned representations allow us to solve various vision tasks that involve the interaction between scenes and objects in a zero-shot fashion. Our code can be found at \url{https://github.com/shlokk/HCL/tree/main/HCL}.

In this paper, we focus on learning representations for objects and scenes that preserve the structure among them. Motivated by the observation that visually similar objects are close in the representation space, we argue that the scenes and objects should instead follow a hierarchical structure based on their compositionality. To exploit such a structure, we propose a contrastive learning framework where a Euclidean loss is used to learn object representations and a hyperbolic loss is used to encourage representations of scenes to lie close to representations of their constituent objects in a hyperbolic space. This novel hyperbolic objective encourages the scene-object hypernymy among the representations by optimizing the magnitude of their norms. We show that when pretraining on the COCO and OpenImages datasets, the hyperbolic loss improves downstream performance of several baselines across multiple datasets and tasks, including image classification, object detection, and semantic segmentation. We also show that the properties of the learned representations allow us to solve various vision tasks that involve the interaction between scenes and objects in a zero-shot fashion. Our code can be found at \url{https://github.com/shlokk/HCL/tree/main/HCL}.
abstract_zh: 尽管自监督/无监督方法在视觉表示学习方面取得了快速进展，但这些方法通常使用相同的镜头来处理对象和场景。在本文中，我们专注于学习保留其中结构的对象和场景的表示。由于观察到视觉上相似的对象在表示空间中很接近，我们认为场景和对象应该遵循基于其组合性的分层结构。为了利用这种结构，我们提出了一个对比学习框架，其中欧几里得损失用于学习对象表示，双曲损失用于鼓励场景表示靠近双曲空间中其组成对象的表示。这种新颖的双曲目标通过优化其范数的大小来鼓励表示之间的场景-对象上位关系。我们表明，在 COCO 和 OpenImages 数据集上进行预训练时，双曲线损失提高了跨多个数据集和任务的多个基线的下游性能，包括图像分类、对象检测和语义分割。我们还表明，学习到的表示的属性使我们能够以零镜头方式解决涉及场景和对象之间交互的各种视觉任务。我们的代码可以在 \url{https://github.com/shlokk/HCL/tree/main/HCL} 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合欧几里得和双曲对比学习的框架，用于学习超越物体的视觉表示，以捕捉场景与物体间的层次结构。
AI.motivation: 现有自监督/无监督方法对物体和场景使用相同的学习视角，而场景与物体应遵循基于组合性的层次结构，需通过双曲空间建模其关系。
AI.method: 设计对比学习框架：用欧几里得损失学习物体表示，用双曲损失使场景表示在双曲空间中靠近其组成物体，并通过优化范数大小增强场景-物体的超义词关系。
AI.result: 在COCO和OpenImages数据集预训练后，双曲损失提升了多个下游任务（分类、检测、分割）的基线性能，并支持零样本场景-物体交互任务。
AI.conclusion: 双曲对比学习有效捕捉场景与物体的层次关系，提升视觉表示的泛化能力，代码已开源。

authors_text: Manuel S. Drehwald,Sagi Eppel,Jolina Li,Han Hao,Alan Aspuru-Guzik
title: One-shot recognition of any material anywhere using contrastive learning with physics-based rendering
title_zh: 使用对比学习和基于物理的渲染，一次性识别任何地方的任何材料
comment: for associated code and dataset, see https://zenodo.org/record/7390166#.Y5ku6mHMJH4 or https://e1.pcloud.link/publink/show?code=kZIiSQZCYU5M4HOvnQykql9jxF4h0KiC5MX and https://icedrive.net/s/A13FWzZ8V2aP9T4ufGQ1N3fBZxDF
comments: for associated code and dataset, see https://zenodo.org/record/7390166#.Y5ku6mHMJH4 or https://e1.pcloud.link/publink/show?code=kZIiSQZCYU5M4HOvnQykql9jxF4h0KiC5MX and https://icedrive.net/s/A13FWzZ8V2aP9T4ufGQ1N3fBZxDF
abstract: Visual recognition of materials and their states is essential for understanding most aspects of the world, from determining whether food is cooked, metal is rusted, or a chemical reaction has occurred. However, current image recognition methods are limited to specific classes and properties and can't handle the vast number of material states in the world. To address this, we present MatSim: the first dataset and benchmark for computer vision-based recognition of similarities and transitions between materials and textures, focusing on identifying any material under any conditions using one or a few examples. The dataset contains synthetic and natural images. The synthetic images were rendered using giant collections of textures, objects, and environments generated by computer graphics artists. We use mixtures and gradual transitions between materials to allow the system to learn cases with smooth transitions between states (like gradually cooked food). We also render images with materials inside transparent containers to support beverage and chemistry lab use cases. We use this dataset to train a siamese net that identifies the same material in different objects, mixtures, and environments. The descriptor generated by this net can be used to identify the states of materials and their subclasses using a single image. We also present the first few-shot material recognition benchmark with images from a wide range of fields, including the state of foods and drinks, types of grounds, and many other use cases. We show that a net trained on the MatSim synthetic dataset outperforms state-of-the-art models like Clip on the benchmark and also achieves good results on other unsupervised material classification tasks.
summary: Visual recognition of materials and their states is essential for understanding most aspects of the world, from determining whether food is cooked, metal is rusted, or a chemical reaction has occurred. However, current image recognition methods are limited to specific classes and properties and can't handle the vast number of material states in the world. To address this, we present MatSim: the first dataset and benchmark for computer vision-based recognition of similarities and transitions between materials and textures, focusing on identifying any material under any conditions using one or a few examples. The dataset contains synthetic and natural images. The synthetic images were rendered using giant collections of textures, objects, and environments generated by computer graphics artists. We use mixtures and gradual transitions between materials to allow the system to learn cases with smooth transitions between states (like gradually cooked food). We also render images with materials inside transparent containers to support beverage and chemistry lab use cases. We use this dataset to train a siamese net that identifies the same material in different objects, mixtures, and environments. The descriptor generated by this net can be used to identify the states of materials and their subclasses using a single image. We also present the first few-shot material recognition benchmark with images from a wide range of fields, including the state of foods and drinks, types of grounds, and many other use cases. We show that a net trained on the MatSim synthetic dataset outperforms state-of-the-art models like Clip on the benchmark and also achieves good results on other unsupervised material classification tasks.
abstract_zh: 对材料及其状态的视觉识别对于了解世界的大多数方面至关重要，例如确定食物是否煮熟、金属是否生锈或是否发生化学反应。然而，当前的图像识别方法仅限于特定的类别和属性，无法处理世界上大量的物质状态。为了解决这个问题，我们推出了 MatSim：第一个基于计算机视觉识别材料和纹理之间的相似性和过渡的数据集和基准，重点是使用一个或几个示例来识别任何条件下的任何材料。该数据集包含合成图像和自然图像。合成图像是使用计算机图形艺术家生成的大量纹理、对象和环境来渲染的。我们使用材料之间的混合物和逐渐过渡，以使系统能够学习状态之间平滑过渡的案例（例如逐渐煮熟的食物）。我们还使用透明容器内的材料渲染图像，以支持饮料和化学实验室用例。我们使用这个数据集来训练一个暹罗网络，该网络可以识别不同物体、混合物和环境中的相同材料。该网络生成的描述符可用于使用单个图像来识别材料及其子类的状态。我们还推出了第一个少镜头材料识别基准，其中包含来自广泛领域的图像，包括食品和饮料的状态、地面类型以及许多其他用例。我们表明，在 MatSim 合成数据集上训练的网络在基准测试中优于 Clip 等最先进的模型，并且在其他无监督材料分类任务上也取得了良好的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MatSim数据集和基准，利用对比学习和物理渲染技术实现材料在任意条件下的单次或少量样本识别。
AI.motivation: 现有图像识别方法受限于特定类别和属性，无法处理现实世界中复杂的材料状态变化，需建立通用材料识别框架。
AI.method: 构建包含合成与自然图像的MatSim数据集，采用物理渲染生成材料混合与渐变状态，并训练孪生网络学习材料跨对象、跨环境的特征描述子。
AI.result: 基于MatSim训练的模型在基准测试中优于CLIP等先进模型，并在其他无监督材料分类任务中表现良好。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过合成数据与对比学习有效解决了材料状态的少样本识别问题，为跨领域材料分析提供了新思路。

authors_text: Ainesh Bakshi,Piotr Indyk,Praneeth Kacham,Sandeep Silwal,Samson Zhou
title: Sub-quadratic Algorithms for Kernel Matrices via Kernel Density Estimation
title_zh: 通过核密度估计的核矩阵次二次算法
abstract: Kernel matrices, as well as weighted graphs represented by them, are ubiquitous objects in machine learning, statistics and other related fields. The main drawback of using kernel methods (learning and inference using kernel matrices) is efficiency -- given $n$ input points, most kernel-based algorithms need to materialize the full $n \times n$ kernel matrix before performing any subsequent computation, thus incurring $Ω(n^2)$ runtime. Breaking this quadratic barrier for various problems has therefore, been a subject of extensive research efforts. We break the quadratic barrier and obtain $\textit{subquadratic}$ time algorithms for several fundamental linear-algebraic and graph processing primitives, including approximating the top eigenvalue and eigenvector, spectral sparsification, solving linear systems, local clustering, low-rank approximation, arboricity estimation and counting weighted triangles. We build on the recent Kernel Density Estimation framework, which (after preprocessing in time subquadratic in $n$) can return estimates of row/column sums of the kernel matrix. In particular, we develop efficient reductions from $\textit{weighted vertex}$ and $\textit{weighted edge sampling}$ on kernel graphs, $\textit{simulating random walks}$ on kernel graphs, and $\textit{importance sampling}$ on matrices to Kernel Density Estimation and show that we can generate samples from these distributions in $\textit{sublinear}$ (in the support of the distribution) time. Our reductions are the central ingredient in each of our applications and we believe they may be of independent interest. We empirically demonstrate the efficacy of our algorithms on low-rank approximation (LRA) and spectral sparsification, where we observe a $\textbf{9x}$ decrease in the number of kernel evaluations over baselines for LRA and a $\textbf{41x}$ reduction in the graph size for spectral sparsification.
summary: Kernel matrices, as well as weighted graphs represented by them, are ubiquitous objects in machine learning, statistics and other related fields. The main drawback of using kernel methods (learning and inference using kernel matrices) is efficiency -- given $n$ input points, most kernel-based algorithms need to materialize the full $n \times n$ kernel matrix before performing any subsequent computation, thus incurring $Ω(n^2)$ runtime. Breaking this quadratic barrier for various problems has therefore, been a subject of extensive research efforts. We break the quadratic barrier and obtain $\textit{subquadratic}$ time algorithms for several fundamental linear-algebraic and graph processing primitives, including approximating the top eigenvalue and eigenvector, spectral sparsification, solving linear systems, local clustering, low-rank approximation, arboricity estimation and counting weighted triangles. We build on the recent Kernel Density Estimation framework, which (after preprocessing in time subquadratic in $n$) can return estimates of row/column sums of the kernel matrix. In particular, we develop efficient reductions from $\textit{weighted vertex}$ and $\textit{weighted edge sampling}$ on kernel graphs, $\textit{simulating random walks}$ on kernel graphs, and $\textit{importance sampling}$ on matrices to Kernel Density Estimation and show that we can generate samples from these distributions in $\textit{sublinear}$ (in the support of the distribution) time. Our reductions are the central ingredient in each of our applications and we believe they may be of independent interest. We empirically demonstrate the efficacy of our algorithms on low-rank approximation (LRA) and spectral sparsification, where we observe a $\textbf{9x}$ decrease in the number of kernel evaluations over baselines for LRA and a $\textbf{41x}$ reduction in the graph size for spectral sparsification.
abstract_zh: 核矩阵以及由它们表示的加权图是机器学习、统计学和其他相关领域中普遍存在的对象。使用核方法（使用核矩阵进行学习和推理）的主要缺点是效率 - 给定 $n$ 个输入点，大多数基于核的算法需要在执行任何后续计算之前具体化完整的 $n \times n$ 核矩阵，从而导致 $Ω(n^2)$ 运行时间。因此，打破各种问题的二次障碍已成为广泛研究工作的主题。我们打破了二次障碍，获得了几个基本线性代数和图形处理原语的 $\textit{subquadratic}$ 时间算法，包括近似顶部特征值和特征向量、谱稀疏化、求解线性系统、局部聚类、低秩近似、树木性估计和计数加权三角形。我们建立在最近的核密度估计框架的基础上，该框架（在 $n$ 中的时间次二次预处理之后）可以返回核矩阵的行/列总和的估计。特别是，我们开发了从核图上的$\textit{加权顶点}$和$\textit{加权边缘采样}$、核图上的$\textit{模拟随机游走}$和矩阵上的$\textit{重要性采样}$到核密度估计的有效缩减，并表明我们可以在$\textit{sublinear}$（在分布的支持下）时间内从这些分布生成样本。我们的减少是我们每个应用程序的核心成分，我们相信它们可能具有独立的利益。我们凭经验证明了我们的算法在低秩近似（LRA）和光谱稀疏化方面的功效，我们观察到 LRA 基线上的核评估数量 $\textbf{9x}$ 减少，并且光谱稀疏化的图形大小 $\textbf{41x}$ 减少。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过核密度估计框架实现子二次时间复杂度的核矩阵算法，用于解决多个基础线性代数和图处理问题。
AI.motivation: 传统核方法需显式构造n×n核矩阵导致Ω(n²)时间复杂度，突破二次时间壁垒是研究重点。
AI.method: 基于核密度估计框架，通过预处理后估计核矩阵行列和，并开发从加权采样、随机游走模拟到重要性采样的高效归约方法。
AI.result: 在低秩近似和谱稀疏化实验中，核评估次数减少9倍，图规模缩减41倍。
AI.conclusion: 提出的方法为核矩阵计算提供高效解决方案，归约技术具有独立研究价值。

authors_text: Sachin Goyal,Ananya Kumar,Sankalp Garg,Zico Kolter,Aditi Raghunathan
title: Finetune like you pretrain: Improved finetuning of zero-shot vision models
title_zh: 像预训练一样进行微调：改进零样本视觉模型的微调
abstract: Finetuning image-text models such as CLIP achieves state-of-the-art accuracies on a variety of benchmarks. However, recent works like WiseFT (Wortsman et al., 2021) and LP-FT (Kumar et al., 2022) have shown that even subtle differences in the finetuning process can lead to surprisingly large differences in the final performance, both for in-distribution (ID) and out-of-distribution (OOD) data. In this work, we show that a natural and simple approach of mimicking contrastive pretraining consistently outperforms alternative finetuning approaches. Specifically, we cast downstream class labels as text prompts and continue optimizing the contrastive loss between image embeddings and class-descriptive prompt embeddings (contrastive finetuning). Our method consistently outperforms baselines across 7 distribution shifts, 6 transfer learning, and 3 few-shot learning benchmarks. On WILDS-iWILDCam, our proposed approach FLYP outperforms the top of the leaderboard by $2.3\%$ ID and $2.7\%$ OOD, giving the highest reported accuracy. Averaged across 7 OOD datasets (2 WILDS and 5 ImageNet associated shifts), FLYP gives gains of $4.2\%$ OOD over standard finetuning and outperforms the current state of the art (LP-FT) by more than $1\%$ both ID and OOD. Similarly, on 3 few-shot learning benchmarks, our approach gives gains up to $4.6\%$ over standard finetuning and $4.4\%$ over the state of the art. In total, these benchmarks establish contrastive finetuning as a simple, intuitive, and state-of-the-art approach for supervised finetuning of image-text models like CLIP. Code is available at https://github.com/locuslab/FLYP.
summary: Finetuning image-text models such as CLIP achieves state-of-the-art accuracies on a variety of benchmarks. However, recent works like WiseFT (Wortsman et al., 2021) and LP-FT (Kumar et al., 2022) have shown that even subtle differences in the finetuning process can lead to surprisingly large differences in the final performance, both for in-distribution (ID) and out-of-distribution (OOD) data. In this work, we show that a natural and simple approach of mimicking contrastive pretraining consistently outperforms alternative finetuning approaches. Specifically, we cast downstream class labels as text prompts and continue optimizing the contrastive loss between image embeddings and class-descriptive prompt embeddings (contrastive finetuning). Our method consistently outperforms baselines across 7 distribution shifts, 6 transfer learning, and 3 few-shot learning benchmarks. On WILDS-iWILDCam, our proposed approach FLYP outperforms the top of the leaderboard by $2.3\%$ ID and $2.7\%$ OOD, giving the highest reported accuracy. Averaged across 7 OOD datasets (2 WILDS and 5 ImageNet associated shifts), FLYP gives gains of $4.2\%$ OOD over standard finetuning and outperforms the current state of the art (LP-FT) by more than $1\%$ both ID and OOD. Similarly, on 3 few-shot learning benchmarks, our approach gives gains up to $4.6\%$ over standard finetuning and $4.4\%$ over the state of the art. In total, these benchmarks establish contrastive finetuning as a simple, intuitive, and state-of-the-art approach for supervised finetuning of image-text models like CLIP. Code is available at https://github.com/locuslab/FLYP.
abstract_zh: 微调图像文本模型（例如 CLIP）可在各种基准上实现最先进的精度。然而，WiseFT（Wortsman 等人，2021）和 LP-FT（Kumar 等人，2022）等最近的工作表明，即使微调过程中的细微差异也可能导致最终性能出现惊人的巨大差异，无论是分布内（ID）还是分布外（OOD）数据。在这项工作中，我们证明了模仿对比预训练的自然而简单的方法始终优于其他微调方法。具体来说，我们将下游类标签转换为文本提示，并继续优化图像嵌入和类描述性提示嵌入之间的对比损失（对比微调）。我们的方法在 7 个分布变化、6 个迁移学习和 3 个小样本学习基准中始终优于基线。在 WILDS-iWILDCam 上，我们提出的方法 FLYP 的表现优于排行榜顶部的 $2.3\%$ ID 和 $2.7\%$ OOD，给出了最高的报告准确度。对 7 个 OOD 数据集（2 个 WILDS 和 5 个 ImageNet 相关移位）进行平均，FLYP 比标准微调获得 $4.2\%$ OOD 收益，并且在 ID 和 OOD 方面均优于当前最先进的技术 (LP-FT) 超过 $1\%$。同样，在 3 个小样本学习基准上，我们的方法比标准微调获得了高达 4.6%$ 的收益，比现有技术获得了 4.4%$ 的收益。总的来说，这些基准将对比微调建立为一种简单、直观且最先进的方法，用于对 CLIP 等图像文本模型进行监督微调。代码可在 https://github.com/locuslab/FLYP 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的微调方法FLYP，通过模仿对比预训练过程提升零样本视觉模型的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有微调方法在分布内和分布外数据上的表现受微调过程细节影响较大，需寻找更鲁棒且通用的微调策略。
AI.method: 将下游任务类别标签转化为文本提示，通过持续优化图像嵌入与类别描述提示嵌入间的对比损失进行微调。
AI.result: 在7个分布偏移、6个迁移学习和3个少样本基准测试中均优于基线方法，WILDS-iWILDCam数据集上分别提升2.3%（分布内）和2.7%（分布外）。
AI.conclusion: 对比微调是一种简单直观的监督微调方法，为CLIP等图文模型的微调建立了新的状态-of-the-art标准。

In total, these benchmarks establish contrastive finetuning as a simple, intuitive, and state-of-the-art approach for supervised finetuning of image-text models like CLIP. authors_text: Suma G. Cardwell,Catherine D. Schuman,J. Darby Smith,Karan Patel,Jaesuk Kwon,Samuel Liu,Christopher Allemang,Shashank Misra,Jean Anne Incorvia,James B. Aimone
title: Probabilistic Neural Circuits leveraging AI-Enhanced Codesign for Random Number Generation
title_zh: 利用 AI 增强型协同设计生成随机数的概率神经电路
abstract: Stochasticity is ubiquitous in the world around us. However, our predominant computing paradigm is deterministic. Random number generation (RNG) can be a computationally inefficient operation in this system especially for larger workloads. Our work leverages the underlying physics of emerging devices to develop probabilistic neural circuits for RNGs from a given distribution. However, codesign for novel circuits and systems that leverage inherent device stochasticity is a hard problem. This is mostly due to the large design space and complexity of doing so. It requires concurrent input from multiple areas in the design stack from algorithms, architectures, circuits, to devices. In this paper, we present examples of optimal circuits developed leveraging AI-enhanced codesign techniques using constraints from emerging devices and algorithms. Our AI-enhanced codesign approach accelerated design and enabled interactions between experts from different areas of the microelectronics design stack including theory, algorithms, circuits, and devices. We demonstrate optimal probabilistic neural circuits using magnetic tunnel junction and tunnel diode devices that generate an RNG from a given distribution.
summary: Stochasticity is ubiquitous in the world around us. However, our predominant computing paradigm is deterministic. Random number generation (RNG) can be a computationally inefficient operation in this system especially for larger workloads. Our work leverages the underlying physics of emerging devices to develop probabilistic neural circuits for RNGs from a given distribution. However, codesign for novel circuits and systems that leverage inherent device stochasticity is a hard problem. This is mostly due to the large design space and complexity of doing so. It requires concurrent input from multiple areas in the design stack from algorithms, architectures, circuits, to devices. In this paper, we present examples of optimal circuits developed leveraging AI-enhanced codesign techniques using constraints from emerging devices and algorithms. Our AI-enhanced codesign approach accelerated design and enabled interactions between experts from different areas of the microelectronics design stack including theory, algorithms, circuits, and devices. We demonstrate optimal probabilistic neural circuits using magnetic tunnel junction and tunnel diode devices that generate an RNG from a given distribution.
abstract_zh: 随机性在我们周围的世界中无处不在。然而，我们的主要计算范式是确定性的。在此系统中，随机数生成 (RNG) 可能是一种计算效率低下的操作，尤其是对于较大的工作负载。我们的工作利用新兴设备的基础物理原理，为给定分布的 RNG 开发概率神经电路。然而，利用固有器件随机性的新型电路和系统的协同设计是一个难题。这主要是由于设计空间大且复杂。它需要设计堆栈中多个区域（从算法、架构、电路到设备）的并发输入。在本文中，我们展示了利用人工智能增强协同设计技术开发的最佳电路示例，并使用新兴设备和算法的约束。我们的人工智能增强型协同设计方法加速了设计，并实现了来自微电子设计堆栈不同领域（包括理论、算法、电路和设备）的专家之间的互动。我们使用磁隧道结和隧道二极管器件演示了最佳概率神经电路，这些器件根据给定的分布生成 RNG。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用AI增强的协同设计方法，开发基于新兴器件的概率神经电路以实现指定分布的随机数生成。
AI.motivation: 传统计算系统中随机数生成效率低下，而新兴器件的物理随机性为高效RNG提供了新思路，但跨层级协同设计存在巨大挑战。
AI.method: 结合AI算法与器件物理特性，通过约束驱动的协同设计框架优化神经电路结构，整合算法、架构、电路和器件多领域知识。
AI.result: 成功设计出基于磁隧道结和隧道二极管的最优概率神经电路，可从给定分布生成随机数，验证了跨学科协同设计的有效性。
AI.conclusion: AI增强的协同设计方法显著加速了新型随机数生成电路的研发，为异构系统设计提供了跨领域协作的新范式。

authors_text: Jianing Li,Ming Lu,Jiaming Liu,Yandong Guo,Li Du,Shanghang Zhang
title: BEV-LGKD: A Unified LiDAR-Guided Knowledge Distillation Framework for BEV 3D Object Detection
title_zh: BEV-LGKD：用于 BEV 3D 物体检测的统一激光雷达引导知识蒸馏框架
abstract: Recently, Bird's-Eye-View (BEV) representation has gained increasing attention in multi-view 3D object detection, which has demonstrated promising applications in autonomous driving. Although multi-view camera systems can be deployed at low cost, the lack of depth information makes current approaches adopt large models for good performance. Therefore, it is essential to improve the efficiency of BEV 3D object detection. Knowledge Distillation (KD) is one of the most practical techniques to train efficient yet accurate models. However, BEV KD is still under-explored to the best of our knowledge. Different from image classification tasks, BEV 3D object detection approaches are more complicated and consist of several components. In this paper, we propose a unified framework named BEV-LGKD to transfer the knowledge in the teacher-student manner. However, directly applying the teacher-student paradigm to BEV features fails to achieve satisfying results due to heavy background information in RGB cameras. To solve this problem, we propose to leverage the localization advantage of LiDAR points. Specifically, we transform the LiDAR points to BEV space and generate the foreground mask and view-dependent mask for the teacher-student paradigm. It is to be noted that our method only uses LiDAR points to guide the KD between RGB models. As the quality of depth estimation is crucial for BEV perception, we further introduce depth distillation to our framework. Our unified framework is simple yet effective and achieves a significant performance boost. Code will be released.
summary: Recently, Bird's-Eye-View (BEV) representation has gained increasing attention in multi-view 3D object detection, which has demonstrated promising applications in autonomous driving. Although multi-view camera systems can be deployed at low cost, the lack of depth information makes current approaches adopt large models for good performance. Therefore, it is essential to improve the efficiency of BEV 3D object detection. Knowledge Distillation (KD) is one of the most practical techniques to train efficient yet accurate models. However, BEV KD is still under-explored to the best of our knowledge. Different from image classification tasks, BEV 3D object detection approaches are more complicated and consist of several components. In this paper, we propose a unified framework named BEV-LGKD to transfer the knowledge in the teacher-student manner. However, directly applying the teacher-student paradigm to BEV features fails to achieve satisfying results due to heavy background information in RGB cameras. To solve this problem, we propose to leverage the localization advantage of LiDAR points. Specifically, we transform the LiDAR points to BEV space and generate the foreground mask and view-dependent mask for the teacher-student paradigm. It is to be noted that our method only uses LiDAR points to guide the KD between RGB models. As the quality of depth estimation is crucial for BEV perception, we further introduce depth distillation to our framework. Our unified framework is simple yet effective and achieves a significant performance boost. Code will be released.
abstract_zh: 最近，鸟瞰（BEV）表示在多视图 3D 目标检测中受到越来越多的关注，在自动驾驶中展示了有前景的应用。尽管多视图相机系统可以以低成本部署，但深度信息的缺乏使得当前的方法采用大型模型来获得良好的性能。因此，提高 BEV 3D 物体检测的效率至关重要。知识蒸馏（KD）是训练高效而准确的模型的最实用的技术之一。然而，据我们所知，BEV KD 仍未得到充分探索。与图像分类任务不同，BEV 3D 目标检测方法更加复杂并且由多个组件组成。在本文中，我们提出了一个名为 BEV-LGKD 的统一框架，以师生方式传递知识。然而，由于 RGB 相机中的背景信息较多，直接将师生范式应用于 BEV 特征无法取得令人满意的结果。为了解决这个问题，我们建议利用激光雷达点的定位优势。具体来说，我们将 LiDAR 点转换到 BEV 空间，并为师生范式生成前景掩模和视图相关掩模。需要注意的是，我们的方法仅使用 LiDAR 点来引导 RGB 模型之间的 KD。由于深度估计的质量对于 BEV 感知至关重要，因此我们进一步将深度蒸馏引入到我们的框架中。我们的统一框架简单而有效，并实现了显着的性能提升。代码将被发布。

AI.tldr: 本文提出BEV-LGKD框架，通过LiDAR引导的知识蒸馏技术提升BEV三维目标检测的效率。
AI.motivation: 多视角相机系统成本低但缺乏深度信息，导致现有BEV检测方法依赖大模型。知识蒸馏（KD）可提升效率，但BEV领域的KD研究不足，需结合LiDAR优势解决背景干扰问题。
AI.method: 将LiDAR点云转换为BEV空间，生成前景掩码和视角相关掩码指导教师-学生模型的知识蒸馏，并引入深度蒸馏模块提升深度估计质量。
AI.result: 该框架在保持模型轻量化的同时显著提升BEV三维目标检测性能，代码将公开。
AI.conclusion: BEV-LGKD通过LiDAR引导的掩码生成和深度蒸馏有效解决了RGB相机的背景干扰问题，为高效BEV检测提供了统一框架。

As the quality of depth estimation is crucial for BEV perception, we further introduce depth distillation to our framework. Our unified framework is simple yet effective and achieves a significant performance boost. Code will be released. 最近，鸟瞰（BEV）表示在多视图 3D 目标检测中受到越来越多的关注，在自动驾驶中展示了有前景的应用。尽管多视图相机系统可以以低成本部署，但深度信息的缺乏使得当前的方法采用大型模型来获得良好的性能。因此，提高 BEV 3D 物体检测的效率至关重要。知识蒸馏（KD）是训练高效而准确的模型的最实用的技术之一。然而，据我们所知，BEV KD 仍未得到充分探索。与图像分类任务不同，BEV 3D 目标检测方法更加复杂并且由多个组件组成。在本文中，我们提出了一个名为 BEV-LGKD 的统一框架，以师生方式传递知识。然而，由于 RGB 相机中的背景信息较多，直接将师生范式应用于 BEV 特征无法取得令人满意的结果。为了解决这个问题，我们建议利用激光雷达点的定位优势。具体来说，我们将 LiDAR 点转换到 BEV 空间，并为师生范式生成前景掩模和视图相关掩模。需要注意的是，我们的方法仅使用 LiDAR 点来引导 RGB 模型之间的 KD。由于深度估计的质量对于 BEV 感知至关重要，因此我们进一步将深度蒸馏引入到我们的框架中。我们的统一框架简单而有效，并实现了显着的性能提升。代码将被发布。 本文提出BEV-LGKD框架，通过LiDAR引导的知识蒸馏技术提升BEV三维目标检测的效率。 Jianing Li,Ming Lu,Jiaming Liu,Yandong Guo,Li Du,Shanghang Zhang cs.CV

authors_text: Afsana Khan,Marijn ten Thij,Anna Wilbik
title: Vertical Federated Learning: A Structured Literature Review
title_zh: 垂直联邦学习：结构化文献综述
abstract: Federated Learning (FL) has emerged as a promising distributed learning paradigm with an added advantage of data privacy. With the growing interest in having collaboration among data owners, FL has gained significant attention of organizations. The idea of FL is to enable collaborating participants train machine learning (ML) models on decentralized data without breaching privacy. In simpler words, federated learning is the approach of ``bringing the model to the data, instead of bringing the data to the mode''. Federated learning, when applied to data which is partitioned vertically across participants, is able to build a complete ML model by combining local models trained only using the data with distinct features at the local sites. This architecture of FL is referred to as vertical federated learning (VFL), which differs from the conventional FL on horizontally partitioned data. As VFL is different from conventional FL, it comes with its own issues and challenges. In this paper, we present a structured literature review discussing the state-of-the-art approaches in VFL. Additionally, the literature review highlights the existing solutions to challenges in VFL and provides potential research directions in this domain.
summary: Federated Learning (FL) has emerged as a promising distributed learning paradigm with an added advantage of data privacy. With the growing interest in having collaboration among data owners, FL has gained significant attention of organizations. The idea of FL is to enable collaborating participants train machine learning (ML) models on decentralized data without breaching privacy. In simpler words, federated learning is the approach of ``bringing the model to the data, instead of bringing the data to the mode''. Federated learning, when applied to data which is partitioned vertically across participants, is able to build a complete ML model by combining local models trained only using the data with distinct features at the local sites. This architecture of FL is referred to as vertical federated learning (VFL), which differs from the conventional FL on horizontally partitioned data. As VFL is different from conventional FL, it comes with its own issues and challenges. In this paper, we present a structured literature review discussing the state-of-the-art approaches in VFL. Additionally, the literature review highlights the existing solutions to challenges in VFL and provides potential research directions in this domain.
abstract_zh: 联邦学习（FL）已成为一种有前景的分布式学习范式，并具有数据隐私的附加优势。随着数据所有者之间协作的兴趣日益浓厚，FL 已获得组织的极大关注。 FL 的想法是让协作参与者能够在去中心化数据上训练机器学习 (ML) 模型，而不会侵犯隐私。简单来说，联邦学习是“将模型带入数据，而不是将数据带入模式”的方法。当联邦学习应用于在参与者之间垂直划分的数据时，能够通过组合仅使用具有本地站点的不同特征的数据训练的本地模型来构建完整的机器学习模型。这种 FL 架构被称为垂直联合学习 (VFL)，它不同于水平分区数据上的传统 FL。由于 VFL 与传统 FL 不同，它也有自己的问题和挑战。在本文中，我们提出了一篇结构化的文献综述，讨论了 VFL 中最先进的方法。此外，文献综述强调了 VFL 挑战的现有解决方案，并提供了该领域的潜在研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文对垂直联邦学习（VFL）领域的最新研究进行了结构化文献综述，分析了其挑战与潜在研究方向。
AI.motivation: 随着数据隐私需求增加，垂直联邦学习作为横向联邦学习的补充，其独特挑战和解决方案亟需系统性总结与研究方向指引。
AI.method: 通过系统梳理VFL领域文献，分类讨论现有技术框架、隐私保护机制及跨域协作中的关键技术问题。
AI.result: 总结了VFL的典型应用场景与核心挑战，归纳了当前主流解决方案，并提出了模型安全性、异构数据对齐等未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: VFL在隐私保护协作中具有重要价值，但需进一步解决模型泛化、计算效率及跨机构信任机制等核心问题。

authors_text: Thanh-Dat Truong,Pierce Helton,Ahmed Moustafa,Jackson David Cothren,Khoa Luu
title: CONDA: Continual Unsupervised Domain Adaptation Learning in Visual Perception for Self-Driving Cars
title_zh: CONDA：自动驾驶汽车视觉感知中的持续无监督域适应学习
abstract: Although unsupervised domain adaptation methods have achieved remarkable performance in semantic scene segmentation in visual perception for self-driving cars, these approaches remain impractical in real-world use cases. In practice, the segmentation models may encounter new data that have not been seen yet. Also, the previous data training of segmentation models may be inaccessible due to privacy problems. Therefore, to address these problems, in this work, we propose a Continual Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (CONDA) approach that allows the model to continuously learn and adapt with respect to the presence of the new data. Moreover, our proposed approach is designed without the requirement of accessing previous training data. To avoid the catastrophic forgetting problem and maintain the performance of the segmentation models, we present a novel Bijective Maximum Likelihood loss to impose the constraint of predicted segmentation distribution shifts. The experimental results on the benchmark of continual unsupervised domain adaptation have shown the advanced performance of the proposed CONDA method.
summary: Although unsupervised domain adaptation methods have achieved remarkable performance in semantic scene segmentation in visual perception for self-driving cars, these approaches remain impractical in real-world use cases. In practice, the segmentation models may encounter new data that have not been seen yet. Also, the previous data training of segmentation models may be inaccessible due to privacy problems. Therefore, to address these problems, in this work, we propose a Continual Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (CONDA) approach that allows the model to continuously learn and adapt with respect to the presence of the new data. Moreover, our proposed approach is designed without the requirement of accessing previous training data. To avoid the catastrophic forgetting problem and maintain the performance of the segmentation models, we present a novel Bijective Maximum Likelihood loss to impose the constraint of predicted segmentation distribution shifts. The experimental results on the benchmark of continual unsupervised domain adaptation have shown the advanced performance of the proposed CONDA method.
abstract_zh: 尽管无监督域适应方法在自动驾驶汽车视觉感知的语义场景分割方面取得了显着的性能，但这些方法在现实世界的用例中仍然不切实际。在实践中，分割模型可能会遇到尚未见过的新数据。此外，由于隐私问题，分割模型之前的数据训练可能无法访问。因此，为了解决这些问题，在这项工作中，我们提出了一种持续无监督域适应（CONDA）方法，该方法允许模型不断学习和适应新数据的存在。此外，我们提出的方法的设计不需要访问以前的训练数据。为了避免灾难性遗忘问题并保持分割模型的性能，我们提出了一种新颖的双射最大似然损失来施加预测分割分布变化的约束。连续无监督域适应基准的实验结果表明了所提出的 CONDA 方法的先进性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为CONDA的持续无监督域适应方法，用于自动驾驶汽车的视觉感知中的语义场景分割，以应对新数据和无法访问历史训练数据的挑战。
AI.motivation: 现有无监督域适应方法在实际应用中面临新数据不断出现及历史训练数据因隐私问题无法访问的困境，需设计无需历史数据且能持续学习的模型以避免灾难性遗忘。
AI.method: 提出CONDA方法，通过引入双向最大似然损失约束预测分割分布变化，实现模型在无历史数据情况下的持续学习与域适应。
AI.result: 在持续无监督域适应基准测试中，CONDA方法展现出优于现有方法的先进性能。
AI.conclusion: CONDA有效解决了传统方法在新数据适应与历史数据依赖间的矛盾，为自动驾驶视觉感知提供了更实用的域适应解决方案。

authors_text: Aritra Sarkar
title: Automated Quantum Software Engineering: why? what? how?
title_zh: 自动化量子软件工程：为什么？什么？如何？
comment: 9 pages, article is based on a talk delivered at Vrije Universiteit Brussel
comments: 9 pages, article is based on a talk delivered at Vrije Universiteit Brussel
abstract: This article provides a personal perspective on research in Automated Quantum Software Engineering (AQSE). It elucidates the motivation to research AQSE (why?), a precise description of such a framework (what?), and reflections on components that are required for implementing it (how?).
summary: This article provides a personal perspective on research in Automated Quantum Software Engineering (AQSE). It elucidates the motivation to research AQSE (why?), a precise description of such a framework (what?), and reflections on components that are required for implementing it (how?).
abstract_zh: 本文提供了对自动化量子软件工程 (AQSE) 研究的个人观点。它阐明了研究 AQSE 的动机（为什么？）、对这样一个框架的精确描述（什么？）以及对实现它所需的组件的反思（如何实现？）。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了自动化量子软件工程（AQSE）的研究动机、框架定义及实现方法。
AI.motivation: 量子软件开发面临复杂性与错误率高的挑战，需通过自动化工具提升效率与可靠性。
AI.method: 通过文献分析与框架设计，结合作者对AQSE核心组件的思考，提出实现路径。
AI.result: 明确了AQSE的研究方向，提出了包含验证、优化与生成工具的框架结构。
AI.conclusion: AQSE是量子计算发展的关键，需跨学科协作推动工具链与标准化建设。

search_text: Automated Quantum Software Engineering: why? what? how? 自动化量子软件工程：为什么？什么？如何？ This article provides a personal perspective on research in Automated Quantum Software Engineering (AQSE). It elucidates the motivation to research AQSE (why?), a precise description of such a framework (what?), and reflections on components that are required for implementing it (how?). 本文提供了对自动化量子软件工程 (AQSE) 研究的个人观点。它阐明了研究 AQSE 的动机（为什么？）、对这样一个框架的精确描述（什么？）以及对实现它所需的组件的反思（如何实现？）。 本文探讨了自动化量子软件工程（AQSE）的研究动机、框架定义及实现方法。 Aritra Sarkar quant-ph,cs.ET,cs.SE

authors_text: Soumith Udatha,Yiwei Lyu,John Dolan
title: Safe Reinforcement Learning with Probabilistic Control Barrier Functions for Ramp Merging
title_zh: 具有用于斜坡合并的概率控制屏障函数的安全强化学习
comment: Safe Learning for Autonomous Driving Workshop, ICML 2022
comments: Safe Learning for Autonomous Driving Workshop, ICML 2022
abstract: Prior work has looked at applying reinforcement learning and imitation learning approaches to autonomous driving scenarios, but either the safety or the efficiency of the algorithm is compromised. With the use of control barrier functions embedded into the reinforcement learning policy, we arrive at safe policies to optimize the performance of the autonomous driving vehicle. However, control barrier functions need a good approximation of the model of the car. We use probabilistic control barrier functions as an estimate of the model uncertainty. The algorithm is implemented as an online version in the CARLA (Dosovitskiy et al., 2017) Simulator and as an offline version on a dataset extracted from the NGSIM Database. The proposed algorithm is not just a safe ramp merging algorithm but a safe autonomous driving algorithm applied to address ramp merging on highways.
summary: Prior work has looked at applying reinforcement learning and imitation learning approaches to autonomous driving scenarios, but either the safety or the efficiency of the algorithm is compromised. With the use of control barrier functions embedded into the reinforcement learning policy, we arrive at safe policies to optimize the performance of the autonomous driving vehicle. However, control barrier functions need a good approximation of the model of the car. We use probabilistic control barrier functions as an estimate of the model uncertainty. The algorithm is implemented as an online version in the CARLA (Dosovitskiy et al., 2017) Simulator and as an offline version on a dataset extracted from the NGSIM Database. The proposed algorithm is not just a safe ramp merging algorithm but a safe autonomous driving algorithm applied to address ramp merging on highways.
abstract_zh: 之前的工作着眼于将强化学习和模仿学习方法应用于自动驾驶场景，但算法的安全性或效率都受到了影响。通过使用嵌入到强化学习策略中的控制障碍函数，我们得出了优化自动驾驶车辆性能的安全策略。然而，控制障碍函数需要对汽车模型有很好的近似。我们使用概率控制障碍函数作为模型不确定性的估计。该算法在 CARLA (Dosovitskiy et al., 2017) 模拟器中实现为在线版本，并在从 NGSIM 数据库提取的数据集上实现为离线版本。所提出的算法不仅仅是一种安全匝道合道算法，而且是一种应用于解决高速公路匝道合道问题的安全自动驾驶算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合概率控制屏障函数的安全强化学习方法，用于解决高速公路坡道合并场景中的自动驾驶安全问题。
AI.motivation: 现有强化学习方法在自动驾驶场景中难以同时保证安全性和效率，需通过控制屏障函数提升安全性并处理模型不确定性。
AI.method: 将概率控制屏障函数嵌入强化学习策略，通过在线（CARLA模拟器）和离线（NGSIM数据集）实验验证算法有效性。
AI.result: 成功实现安全的坡道合并控制，验证了算法在模型不确定性下的鲁棒性与效率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为高速公路自动驾驶提供了通用的安全强化学习框架，可扩展至更复杂的交通场景。

authors_text: Ziyan Wang,Giljoo Nam,Tuur Stuyck,Stephen Lombardi,Chen Cao,Jason Saragih,Michael Zollhoefer,Jessica Hodgins,Christoph Lassner
title: NeuWigs: A Neural Dynamic Model for Volumetric Hair Capture and Animation
title_zh: NeuWigs：用于体积毛发捕捉和动画的神经动态模型
abstract: The capture and animation of human hair are two of the major challenges in the creation of realistic avatars for the virtual reality. Both problems are highly challenging, because hair has complex geometry and appearance, as well as exhibits challenging motion. In this paper, we present a two-stage approach that models hair independently from the head to address these challenges in a data-driven manner. The first stage, state compression, learns a low-dimensional latent space of 3D hair states containing motion and appearance, via a novel autoencoder-as-a-tracker strategy. To better disentangle the hair and head in appearance learning, we employ multi-view hair segmentation masks in combination with a differentiable volumetric renderer. The second stage learns a novel hair dynamics model that performs temporal hair transfer based on the discovered latent codes. To enforce higher stability while driving our dynamics model, we employ the 3D point-cloud autoencoder from the compression stage for de-noising of the hair state. Our model outperforms the state of the art in novel view synthesis and is capable of creating novel hair animations without having to rely on hair observations as a driving signal. Project page is here https://ziyanw1.github.io/neuwigs/.
summary: The capture and animation of human hair are two of the major challenges in the creation of realistic avatars for the virtual reality. Both problems are highly challenging, because hair has complex geometry and appearance, as well as exhibits challenging motion. In this paper, we present a two-stage approach that models hair independently from the head to address these challenges in a data-driven manner. The first stage, state compression, learns a low-dimensional latent space of 3D hair states containing motion and appearance, via a novel autoencoder-as-a-tracker strategy. To better disentangle the hair and head in appearance learning, we employ multi-view hair segmentation masks in combination with a differentiable volumetric renderer. The second stage learns a novel hair dynamics model that performs temporal hair transfer based on the discovered latent codes. To enforce higher stability while driving our dynamics model, we employ the 3D point-cloud autoencoder from the compression stage for de-noising of the hair state. Our model outperforms the state of the art in novel view synthesis and is capable of creating novel hair animations without having to rely on hair observations as a driving signal. Project page is here https://ziyanw1.github.io/neuwigs/.
abstract_zh: 人类头发的捕捉和动画是为虚拟现实创建逼真的化身的两个主要挑战。这两个问题都非常具有挑战性，因为头发具有复杂的几何形状和外观，并且表现出具有挑战性的运动。在本文中，我们提出了一种两阶段的方法，独立于头部对头发进行建模，以数据驱动的方式应对这些挑战。第一阶段是状态压缩，通过新颖的自动编码器作为跟踪器策略学习包含运动和外观的 3D 头发状态的低维潜在空间。为了在外观学习中更好地解开头发和头部的纠缠，我们采用多视图头发分割掩模与可微分体积渲染器相结合。第二阶段学习一种新颖的头发动力学模型，该模型根据发现的潜在代码执行时间头发转移。为了在驱动动态模型时实现更高的稳定性，我们在压缩阶段使用 3D 点云自动编码器来对头发状态进行降噪。我们的模型在新颖的视图合成方面优于最先进的技术，并且能够创建新颖的头发动画，而无需依赖头发观察作为驱动信号。项目页面在这里 https://ziyanw1.github.io/neuwigs/。

AI.tldr: 提出一种神经动态模型，用于体积头发捕捉与动画生成，解决复杂几何和运动建模难题
AI.motivation: 头发因复杂几何结构、外观变化及运动特性，成为虚拟现实真实化身制作中的关键技术难题，现有方法难以有效建模
AI.method: 两阶段方法：第一阶段通过自编码器学习低维潜在空间，结合多视角分割与可微体积渲染；第二阶段构建动态模型实现时间传递，并利用点云自编码器去噪增强稳定性
AI.result: 在新视角合成任务中优于现有方法，可生成无需依赖头发观测信号的新型动画
AI.conclusion: 提出数据驱动的头发建模框架，有效解决几何、外观与运动建模难题，推动虚拟化身真实感提升
