authors_text: Franyell Silfa,Jose Maria Arnau,Antonio González
title: Exploiting Kernel Compression on BNNs
title_zh: 在 BNN 上利用内核压缩
abstract: Binary Neural Networks (BNNs) are showing tremendous success on realistic image classification tasks. Notably, their accuracy is similar to the state-of-the-art accuracy obtained by full-precision models tailored to edge devices. In this regard, BNNs are very amenable to edge devices since they employ 1-bit to store the inputs and weights, and thus, their storage requirements are low. Also, BNNs computations are mainly done using xnor and pop-counts operations which are implemented very efficiently using simple hardware structures. Nonetheless, supporting BNNs efficiently on mobile CPUs is far from trivial since their benefits are hindered by frequent memory accesses to load weights and inputs. In BNNs, a weight or an input is stored using one bit, and aiming to increase storage and computation efficiency, several of them are packed together as a sequence of bits. In this work, we observe that the number of unique sequences representing a set of weights is typically low. Also, we have seen that during the evaluation of a BNN layer, a small group of unique sequences is employed more frequently than others. Accordingly, we propose exploiting this observation by using Huffman Encoding to encode the bit sequences and then using an indirection table to decode them during the BNN evaluation. Also, we propose a clustering scheme to identify the most common sequences of bits and replace the less common ones with some similar common sequences. Hence, we decrease the storage requirements and memory accesses since common sequences are encoded with fewer bits. We extend a mobile CPU by adding a small hardware structure that can efficiently cache and decode the compressed sequence of bits. We evaluate our scheme using the ReAacNet model with the Imagenet dataset. Our experimental results show that our technique can reduce memory requirement by 1.32x and improve performance by 1.35x.
summary: Binary Neural Networks (BNNs) are showing tremendous success on realistic image classification tasks. Notably, their accuracy is similar to the state-of-the-art accuracy obtained by full-precision models tailored to edge devices. In this regard, BNNs are very amenable to edge devices since they employ 1-bit to store the inputs and weights, and thus, their storage requirements are low. Also, BNNs computations are mainly done using xnor and pop-counts operations which are implemented very efficiently using simple hardware structures. Nonetheless, supporting BNNs efficiently on mobile CPUs is far from trivial since their benefits are hindered by frequent memory accesses to load weights and inputs. In BNNs, a weight or an input is stored using one bit, and aiming to increase storage and computation efficiency, several of them are packed together as a sequence of bits. In this work, we observe that the number of unique sequences representing a set of weights is typically low. Also, we have seen that during the evaluation of a BNN layer, a small group of unique sequences is employed more frequently than others. Accordingly, we propose exploiting this observation by using Huffman Encoding to encode the bit sequences and then using an indirection table to decode them during the BNN evaluation. Also, we propose a clustering scheme to identify the most common sequences of bits and replace the less common ones with some similar common sequences. Hence, we decrease the storage requirements and memory accesses since common sequences are encoded with fewer bits. We extend a mobile CPU by adding a small hardware structure that can efficiently cache and decode the compressed sequence of bits. We evaluate our scheme using the ReAacNet model with the Imagenet dataset. Our experimental results show that our technique can reduce memory requirement by 1.32x and improve performance by 1.35x.
abstract_zh: 二元神经网络 (BNN) 在现实图像分类任务上取得了巨大成功。值得注意的是，它们的精度与针对边缘设备定制的全精度模型获得的最先进的精度相似。在这方面，BNN 非常适合边缘设备，因为它们使用 1 位来存储输入和权重，因此它们的存储要求很低。此外，BNN 计算主要使用 xnor 和 pop-counts 操作来完成，这些操作使用简单的硬件结构可以非常有效地实现。尽管如此，在移动 CPU 上有效支持 BNN 绝非易事，因为负载权重和输入的频繁内存访问阻碍了它们的优势。在 BNN 中，权重或输入使用一位存储，为了提高存储和计算效率，将其中的几个打包在一起作为位序列。在这项工作中，我们观察到代表一组权重的唯一序列的数量通常很低。此外，我们还发现，在 BNN 层的评估过程中，一小组独特的序列比其他序列被更频繁地使用。因此，我们建议利用这一观察结果，使用霍夫曼编码对比特序列进行编码，然后在 BNN 评估期间使用间接表对它们进行解码。此外，我们提出了一种聚类方案来识别最常见的比特序列，并用一些类似的常见序列替换不太常见的序列。因此，我们减少了存储要求和内存访问，因为公共序列用更少的位进行编码。我们通过添加一个小型硬件结构来扩展移动 CPU，该结构可以有效地缓存和解码压缩的位序列。我们使用 ReAacNet 模型和 Imagenet 数据集来评估我们的方案。我们的实验结果表明，我们的技术可以将内存需求减少 1.32 倍，并将性能提高 1.35 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过霍夫曼编码和聚类方案压缩二值神经网络（BNN）的权重序列，以降低边缘设备上的内存需求并提升计算性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管BNN具有低存储需求和高效计算的优势，但其在移动CPU上频繁的内存访问限制了性能，需优化存储和访问效率。
AI.method: 利用霍夫曼编码压缩权重序列，构建间接表加速解码；通过聚类替换低频序列，结合硬件扩展实现高效缓存与解码。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上，ReAacNet模型内存需求降低1.32倍，性能提升1.35倍。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过压缩权重序列和硬件协同优化，有效提升了BNN在边缘设备上的存储与计算效率。

search_text: Exploiting Kernel Compression on BNNs 在 BNN 上利用内核压缩 Binary Neural Networks (BNNs) are showing tremendous success on realistic image classification tasks. Notably, their accuracy is similar to the state-of-the-art accuracy obtained by full-precision models tailored to edge devices. In this regard, BNNs are very amenable to edge devices since they employ 1-bit to store the inputs and weights, and thus, their storage requirements are low. Also, BNNs computations are mainly done using xnor and pop-counts operations which are implemented very efficiently using simple hardware structures. Nonetheless, supporting BNNs efficiently on mobile CPUs is far from trivial since their benefits are hindered by frequent memory accesses to load weights and inputs. In BNNs, a weight or an input is stored using one bit, and aiming to increase storage and computation efficiency, several of them are packed together as a sequence of bits. In this work, we observe that the number of unique sequences representing a set of weights is typically low. Also, we have seen that during the evaluation of a BNN layer, a small group of unique sequences is employed more frequently than others. Accordingly, we propose exploiting this observation by using Huffman Encoding to encode the bit sequences and then using an indirection table to decode them during the BNN evaluation. Also, we propose a clustering scheme to identify the most common sequences of bits and replace the less common ones with some similar common sequences. Hence, we decrease the storage requirements and memory accesses since common sequences are encoded with fewer bits. We extend a mobile CPU by adding a small hardware structure that can efficiently cache and decode the compressed sequence of bits. We evaluate our scheme using the ReAacNet model with the Imagenet dataset. Our experimental results show that our technique can reduce memory requirement by 1.32x and improve performance by 1.35x. 二元神经网络 (BNN) 在现实图像分类任务上取得了巨大成功。值得注意的是，它们的精度与针对边缘设备定制的全精度模型获得的最先进的精度相似。在这方面，BNN 非常适合边缘设备，因为它们使用 1 位来存储输入和权重，因此它们的存储要求很低。此外，BNN 计算主要使用 xnor 和 pop-counts 操作来完成，这些操作使用简单的硬件结构可以非常有效地实现。尽管如此，在移动 CPU 上有效支持 BNN 绝非易事，因为负载权重和输入的频繁内存访问阻碍了它们的优势。在 BNN 中，权重或输入使用一位存储，为了提高存储和计算效率，将其中的几个打包在一起作为位序列。在这项工作中，我们观察到代表一组权重的唯一序列的数量通常很低。此外，我们还发现，在 BNN 层的评估过程中，一小组独特的序列比其他序列被更频繁地使用。因此，我们建议利用这一观察结果，使用霍夫曼编码对比特序列进行编码，然后在 BNN 评估期间使用间接表对它们进行解码。此外，我们提出了一种聚类方案来识别最常见的比特序列，并用一些类似的常见序列替换不太常见的序列。因此，我们减少了存储要求和内存访问，因为公共序列用更少的位进行编码。我们通过添加一个小型硬件结构来扩展移动 CPU，该结构可以有效地缓存和解码压缩的位序列。我们使用 ReAacNet 模型和 Imagenet 数据集来评估我们的方案。我们的实验结果表明，我们的技术可以将内存需求减少 1.32 倍，并将性能提高 1.35 倍。 本文提出通过霍夫曼编码和聚类方案压缩二值神经网络（BNN）的权重序列，以降低边缘设备上的内存需求并提升计算性能。 Franyell Silfa,Jose Maria Arnau,Antonio González cs.AR,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Jackie Ayoub,Lilit Avetisian,X. Jessie Yang,Feng Zhou
title: Real-time Trust Prediction in Conditionally Automated Driving Using Physiological Measures
title_zh: 使用生理测量的有条件自动驾驶中的实时信任预测
abstract: Trust calibration presents a main challenge during the interaction between drivers and automated vehicles (AVs). In order to calibrate trust, it is important to measure drivers' trust in real time. One possible method is through modeling its dynamic changes using machine learning models and physiological measures. In this paper, we proposed a technique based on machine learning models to predict drivers' dynamic trust in conditional AVs using physiological measurements in real time. We conducted the study in a driving simulator where participants were requested to take over control from automated driving in three conditions that included a control condition, a false alarm condition, a miss condition with eight takeover requests (TORs) in different scenarios. Drivers' physiological measures were recorded during the experiment, including galvanic skin response (GSR), heart rate (HR) indices, and eye-tracking metrics. Using five machine learning models, we found that eXtreme Gradient Boosting (XGBoost) performed the best and was able to predict drivers' trust in real time with an f1-score of 89.1%. Our findings provide good implications on how to design an in-vehicle trust monitoring system to calibrate drivers' trust to facilitate interaction between the driver and the AV in real time.
summary: Trust calibration presents a main challenge during the interaction between drivers and automated vehicles (AVs). In order to calibrate trust, it is important to measure drivers' trust in real time. One possible method is through modeling its dynamic changes using machine learning models and physiological measures. In this paper, we proposed a technique based on machine learning models to predict drivers' dynamic trust in conditional AVs using physiological measurements in real time. We conducted the study in a driving simulator where participants were requested to take over control from automated driving in three conditions that included a control condition, a false alarm condition, a miss condition with eight takeover requests (TORs) in different scenarios. Drivers' physiological measures were recorded during the experiment, including galvanic skin response (GSR), heart rate (HR) indices, and eye-tracking metrics. Using five machine learning models, we found that eXtreme Gradient Boosting (XGBoost) performed the best and was able to predict drivers' trust in real time with an f1-score of 89.1%. Our findings provide good implications on how to design an in-vehicle trust monitoring system to calibrate drivers' trust to facilitate interaction between the driver and the AV in real time.
abstract_zh: 信任校准在驾驶员和自动驾驶车辆 (AV) 之间的交互过程中提出了主要挑战。为了校准信任，实时衡量驾驶员的信任非常重要。一种可能的方法是使用机器学习模型和生理测量对其动态变化进行建模。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于机器学习模型的技术，利用实时生理测量来预测驾驶员对条件自动驾驶汽车的动态信任。我们在驾驶模拟器中进行了这项研究，参与者被要求在三种情况下接管自动驾驶的控制权，包括控制条件、误报条件、错过条件，以及在不同场景下的八个接管请求 (TOR)。实验期间记录了驾驶员的生理测量，包括皮肤电反应（GSR）、心率（HR）指数和眼动追踪指标。使用五个机器学习模型，我们发现 eXtreme Gradient Boosting (XGBoost) 表现最好，能够实时预测驾驶员的信任度，f1 得分为 89.1%。我们的研究结果对于如何设计车载信任监控系统来校准驾驶员的信任以促进驾驶员与自动驾驶汽车之间的实时交互提供了良好的启示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于生理指标的实时信任预测技术，用于条件自动驾驶中的驾驶员信任动态建模。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆与驾驶员的交互中，信任校准存在挑战，需通过实时测量驾驶员信任状态以提升系统安全性与交互效率。
AI.method: 通过驾驶模拟器采集驾驶员在三种接管场景下的生理数据（皮肤电反应、心率、眼动指标），采用五种机器学习模型进行实时信任预测建模。
AI.result: XGBoost模型在实时信任预测中取得最佳效果，F1分数达89.1%。
AI.conclusion: 生理信号结合机器学习可有效实现驾驶员信任动态监测，为车载信任校准系统设计提供理论支持。

authors_text: Jinghan Wang,Mengdi Wang,Lin F. Yang
title: Near Sample-Optimal Reduction-based Policy Learning for Average Reward MDP
title_zh: 基于近样本最优缩减的平均奖励 MDP 策略学习
abstract: This work considers the sample complexity of obtaining an $\varepsilon$-optimal policy in an average reward Markov Decision Process (AMDP), given access to a generative model (simulator). When the ground-truth MDP is weakly communicating, we prove an upper bound of $\widetilde O(H \varepsilon^{-3} \ln \frac{1}δ)$ samples per state-action pair, where $H := sp(h^*)$ is the span of bias of any optimal policy, $\varepsilon$ is the accuracy and $δ$ is the failure probability. This bound improves the best-known mixing-time-based approaches in [Jin & Sidford 2021], which assume the mixing-time of every deterministic policy is bounded. The core of our analysis is a proper reduction bound from AMDP problems to discounted MDP (DMDP) problems, which may be of independent interests since it allows the application of DMDP algorithms for AMDP in other settings. We complement our upper bound by proving a minimax lower bound of $Ω(|\mathcal S| |\mathcal A| H \varepsilon^{-2} \ln \frac{1}δ)$ total samples, showing that a linear dependent on $H$ is necessary and that our upper bound matches the lower bound in all parameters of $(|\mathcal S|, |\mathcal A|, H, \ln \frac{1}δ)$ up to some logarithmic factors.
summary: This work considers the sample complexity of obtaining an $\varepsilon$-optimal policy in an average reward Markov Decision Process (AMDP), given access to a generative model (simulator). When the ground-truth MDP is weakly communicating, we prove an upper bound of $\widetilde O(H \varepsilon^{-3} \ln \frac{1}δ)$ samples per state-action pair, where $H := sp(h^*)$ is the span of bias of any optimal policy, $\varepsilon$ is the accuracy and $δ$ is the failure probability. This bound improves the best-known mixing-time-based approaches in [Jin & Sidford 2021], which assume the mixing-time of every deterministic policy is bounded. The core of our analysis is a proper reduction bound from AMDP problems to discounted MDP (DMDP) problems, which may be of independent interests since it allows the application of DMDP algorithms for AMDP in other settings. We complement our upper bound by proving a minimax lower bound of $Ω(|\mathcal S| |\mathcal A| H \varepsilon^{-2} \ln \frac{1}δ)$ total samples, showing that a linear dependent on $H$ is necessary and that our upper bound matches the lower bound in all parameters of $(|\mathcal S|, |\mathcal A|, H, \ln \frac{1}δ)$ up to some logarithmic factors.
abstract_zh: 这项工作考虑了在平均奖励马尔可夫决策过程（AMDP）中获得 $\varepsilon$ 最优策略的样本复杂性，并且可以访问生成模型（模拟器）。当真实 MDP 弱通信时，我们证明每个状态-动作对 $\widetilde O(H \varepsilon^{-3} \ln \frac{1}δ)$ 样本的上限，其中 $H := sp(h^*)$ 是任何最优策略的偏差范围，$\varepsilon$ 是准确性，$δ$ 是失败概率。这一界限改进了 [Jin & Sidford 2021] 中最著名的基于混合时间的方法，该方法假设每个确定性策略的混合时间都是有界的。我们分析的核心是从 AMDP 问题到贴现 MDP (DMDP) 问题的适当约简界限，这可能具有独立的利益，因为它允许在其他设置中应用 AMDP 的 DMDP 算法。我们通过证明 $Ω(|\mathcal S| |\mathcal A| H \varepsilon^{-2} \ln \frac{1}δ)$ 总样本的极小最大下界来补充我们的上限，表明线性依赖于 $H$ 是必要的，并且我们的上限与 $(|\mathcal S|, |\mathcal A|, H, \ln \frac{1}δ)$ 的所有参数的下限相匹配，直到某个对数因素。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在平均奖励马尔可夫决策过程（AMDP）中，通过生成模型获取ε-最优策略的样本复杂度问题。
AI.motivation: 现有基于混合时间的方法在弱通信MDP中存在局限性，需改进样本复杂度上界并证明下界以指导算法设计。
AI.method: 通过将AMDP问题转化为折扣MDP（DMDP）问题，建立适当的约减界，结合DMDP算法实现策略学习。
AI.result: 证明了样本复杂度上界为~O(H ε⁻³ ln(1/δ))，并证明了Ω(|S||A|H ε⁻² ln(1/δ))的 minimax 下界，显示上界在参数上达到最优。
AI.conclusion: 提出了近样本最优的策略学习方法，其约减框架为AMDP与其他场景的应用提供了新思路。

search_text: Near Sample-Optimal Reduction-based Policy Learning for Average Reward MDP 基于近样本最优缩减的平均奖励 MDP 策略学习 This work considers the sample complexity of obtaining an $\varepsilon$-optimal policy in an average reward Markov Decision Process (AMDP), given access to a generative model (simulator). When the ground-truth MDP is weakly communicating, we prove an upper bound of $\widetilde O(H \varepsilon^{-3} \ln \frac{1}δ)$ samples per state-action pair, where $H := sp(h^*)$ is the span of bias of any optimal policy, $\varepsilon$ is the accuracy and $δ$ is the failure probability. This bound improves the best-known mixing-time-based approaches in [Jin & Sidford 2021], which assume the mixing-time of every deterministic policy is bounded. The core of our analysis is a proper reduction bound from AMDP problems to discounted MDP (DMDP) problems, which may be of independent interests since it allows the application of DMDP algorithms for AMDP in other settings. We complement our upper bound by proving a minimax lower bound of $Ω(|\mathcal S| |\mathcal A| H \varepsilon^{-2} \ln \frac{1}δ)$ total samples, showing that a linear dependent on $H$ is necessary and that our upper bound matches the lower bound in all parameters of $(|\mathcal S|, |\mathcal A|, H, \ln \frac{1}δ)$ up to some logarithmic factors. 这项工作考虑了在平均奖励马尔可夫决策过程（AMDP）中获得 $\varepsilon$ 最优策略的样本复杂性，并且可以访问生成模型（模拟器）。当真实 MDP 弱通信时，我们证明每个状态-动作对 $\widetilde O(H \varepsilon^{-3} \ln \frac{1}δ)$ 样本的上限，其中 $H := sp(h^*)$ 是任何最优策略的偏差范围，$\varepsilon$ 是准确性，$δ$ 是失败概率。这一界限改进了 [Jin & Sidford 2021] 中最著名的基于混合时间的方法，该方法假设每个确定性策略的混合时间都是有界的。我们分析的核心是从 AMDP 问题到贴现 MDP (DMDP) 问题的适当约简界限，这可能具有独立的利益，因为它允许在其他设置中应用 AMDP 的 DMDP 算法。我们通过证明 $Ω(|\mathcal S| |\mathcal A| H \varepsilon^{-2} \ln \frac{1}δ)$ 总样本的极小最大下界来补充我们的上限，表明线性依赖于 $H$ 是必要的，并且我们的上限与 $(|\mathcal S|, |\mathcal A|, H, \ln \frac{1}δ)$ 的所有参数的下限相匹配，直到某个对数因素。 本文研究在平均奖励马尔可夫决策过程（AMDP）中，通过生成模型获取ε-最优策略的样本复杂度问题。 Jinghan Wang,Mengdi Wang,Lin F. Yang cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Junde Wu,Huihui Fang,Yehui Yang,Yuanpei Liu,Jing Gao,Lixin Duan,Weihua Yang,Yanwu Xu
title: Multi-rater Prism: Learning self-calibrated medical image segmentation from multiple raters
title_zh: 多评估者棱镜：从多个评估者学习自校准医学图像分割
abstract: In medical image segmentation, it is often necessary to collect opinions from multiple experts to make the final decision. This clinical routine helps to mitigate individual bias. But when data is multiply annotated, standard deep learning models are often not applicable. In this paper, we propose a novel neural network framework, called Multi-Rater Prism (MrPrism) to learn the medical image segmentation from multiple labels. Inspired by the iterative half-quadratic optimization, the proposed MrPrism will combine the multi-rater confidences assignment task and calibrated segmentation task in a recurrent manner. In this recurrent process, MrPrism can learn inter-observer variability taking into account the image semantic properties, and finally converges to a self-calibrated segmentation result reflecting the inter-observer agreement. Specifically, we propose Converging Prism (ConP) and Diverging Prism (DivP) to process the two tasks iteratively. ConP learns calibrated segmentation based on the multi-rater confidence maps estimated by DivP. DivP generates multi-rater confidence maps based on the segmentation masks estimated by ConP. The experimental results show that by recurrently running ConP and DivP, the two tasks can achieve mutual improvement. The final converged segmentation result of MrPrism outperforms state-of-the-art (SOTA) strategies on a wide range of medical image segmentation tasks.
summary: In medical image segmentation, it is often necessary to collect opinions from multiple experts to make the final decision. This clinical routine helps to mitigate individual bias. But when data is multiply annotated, standard deep learning models are often not applicable. In this paper, we propose a novel neural network framework, called Multi-Rater Prism (MrPrism) to learn the medical image segmentation from multiple labels. Inspired by the iterative half-quadratic optimization, the proposed MrPrism will combine the multi-rater confidences assignment task and calibrated segmentation task in a recurrent manner. In this recurrent process, MrPrism can learn inter-observer variability taking into account the image semantic properties, and finally converges to a self-calibrated segmentation result reflecting the inter-observer agreement. Specifically, we propose Converging Prism (ConP) and Diverging Prism (DivP) to process the two tasks iteratively. ConP learns calibrated segmentation based on the multi-rater confidence maps estimated by DivP. DivP generates multi-rater confidence maps based on the segmentation masks estimated by ConP. The experimental results show that by recurrently running ConP and DivP, the two tasks can achieve mutual improvement. The final converged segmentation result of MrPrism outperforms state-of-the-art (SOTA) strategies on a wide range of medical image segmentation tasks.
abstract_zh: 在医学图像分割中，常常需要收集多位专家的意见才能做出最终的决定。这种临床常规有助于减轻个人偏见。但当数据被多重注释时，标准深度学习模型通常不适用。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的神经网络框架，称为多评估者棱镜（MrPrism），用于从多个标签学习医学图像分割。受迭代半二次优化的启发，所提出的 MrPrism 将以循环方式结合多评估者置信度分配任务和校准分割任务。在这个循环过程中，MrPrism 可以考虑图像语义属性来学习观察者间的变异性，并最终收敛到反映观察者间一致性的自校准分割结果。具体来说，我们提出会聚棱镜（ConP）和发散棱镜（DivP）来迭代处理这两个任务。 ConP 根据 DivP 估计的多评估者置信图学习校准分割。 DivP 根据 ConP 估计的分割掩模生成多评估者置信图。实验结果表明，通过循环运行ConP和DivP，两个任务可以实现相互改进。 MrPrism 的最终聚合分割结果在广泛的医学图像分割任务上优于最先进的 (SOTA) 策略。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Multi-Rater Prism (MrPrism)的新型神经网络框架，用于从多个专家标注的医学图像中学习自校准的分割结果。
AI.motivation: 医学图像分割通常需要多个专家标注以减少个体偏差，但现有深度学习模型难以处理多标注数据，且需考虑观察者间差异性。
AI.method: 基于迭代半二次优化，设计Converging Prism (ConP)和Diverging Prism (DivP)模块，通过递归交互学习分割掩码与多标注置信度图，最终收敛到自校准分割结果。
AI.result: 实验表明，MrPrism在多种医学图像分割任务中优于现有最先进方法，分割结果能有效反映观察者间一致性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过分割与置信度估计的递归优化，成功解决了多标注医学图像分割中的校准问题，为多专家协作标注场景提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yu Yuan,Jiaqi Wu,Zhongliang Jing,Henry Leung,Han Pan
title: Ghost-free High Dynamic Range Imaging via Hybrid CNN-Transformer and Structure Tensor
title_zh: 通过混合 CNN 变压器和结构张量进行无重影高动态范围成像
abstract: Eliminating ghosting artifacts due to moving objects is a challenging problem in high dynamic range (HDR) imaging. In this letter, we present a hybrid model consisting of a convolutional encoder and a Transformer decoder to generate ghost-free HDR images. In the encoder, a context aggregation network and non-local attention block are adopted to optimize multi-scale features and capture both global and local dependencies of multiple low dynamic range (LDR) images. The decoder based on Swin Transformer is utilized to improve the reconstruction capability of the proposed model. Motivated by the phenomenal difference between the presence and absence of artifacts under the field of structure tensor (ST), we integrate the ST information of LDR images as auxiliary inputs of the network and use ST loss to further constrain artifacts. Different from previous approaches, our network is capable of processing an arbitrary number of input LDR images. Qualitative and quantitative experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method by comparing it with existing state-of-the-art HDR deghosting models. Codes are available at https://github.com/pandayuanyu/HSTHdr.
summary: Eliminating ghosting artifacts due to moving objects is a challenging problem in high dynamic range (HDR) imaging. In this letter, we present a hybrid model consisting of a convolutional encoder and a Transformer decoder to generate ghost-free HDR images. In the encoder, a context aggregation network and non-local attention block are adopted to optimize multi-scale features and capture both global and local dependencies of multiple low dynamic range (LDR) images. The decoder based on Swin Transformer is utilized to improve the reconstruction capability of the proposed model. Motivated by the phenomenal difference between the presence and absence of artifacts under the field of structure tensor (ST), we integrate the ST information of LDR images as auxiliary inputs of the network and use ST loss to further constrain artifacts. Different from previous approaches, our network is capable of processing an arbitrary number of input LDR images. Qualitative and quantitative experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method by comparing it with existing state-of-the-art HDR deghosting models. Codes are available at https://github.com/pandayuanyu/HSTHdr.
abstract_zh: 消除移动物体造成的重影伪影是高动态范围 (HDR) 成像中的一个具有挑战性的问题。在这封信中，我们提出了一种由卷积编码器和 Transformer 解码器组成的混合模型，用于生成无重影的 HDR 图像。在编码器中，采用上下文聚合网络和非局部注意块来优化多尺度特征并捕获多个低动态范围（LDR）图像的全局和局部依赖性。利用基于Swin Transformer的解码器来提高所提出模型的重构能力。受结构张量（ST）场下伪影存在和不存在之间的显着差异的启发，我们整合LDR图像的ST信息作为网络的辅助输入，并使用ST损失来进一步约束伪影。与以前的方法不同，我们的网络能够处理任意数量的输入 LDR 图像。通过与现有最先进的 HDR 去鬼影模型进行比较，定性和定量实验证明了该方法的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/pandayuanyu/HSTHdr 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种混合CNN-Transformer模型，通过结合结构张量信息解决高动态范围成像中的鬼影问题。
AI.motivation: 现有HDR去鬼影方法难以处理移动物体引起的伪影，且无法灵活处理任意数量的输入低动态范围图像。
AI.method: 采用卷积编码器（含上下文聚合网络和非局部注意力模块）与Swin Transformer解码器的混合架构，并引入结构张量作为辅助输入与损失函数约束。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在定性和定量指标上优于现有最先进模型，且支持任意数量输入LDR图像。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合结构张量信息与混合网络架构，有效解决了HDR成像中的鬼影问题，代码已开源。

motivation: 现有HDR去鬼影方法难以处理移动物体引起的伪影，且无法灵活处理任意数量的输入低动态范围图像。
method: 采用卷积编码器（含上下文聚合网络和非局部注意力模块）与Swin Transformer解码器的混合架构，并引入结构张量作为辅助输入与损失函数约束。
result: 实验表明该方法在定性和定量指标上优于现有最先进模型，且支持任意数量输入LDR图像。
conclusion: 通过融合结构张量信息与混合网络架构，有效解决了HDR成像中的鬼影问题，代码已开源。
search_text: Ghost-free High Dynamic Range Imaging via Hybrid CNN-Transformer and Structure Tensor 通过混合 CNN 变压器和结构张量进行无重影高动态范围成像 Eliminating ghosting artifacts due to moving objects is a challenging problem in high dynamic range (HDR) imaging. In this letter, we present a hybrid model consisting of a convolutional encoder and a Transformer decoder to generate ghost-free HDR images. In the encoder, a context aggregation network and non-local attention block are adopted to optimize multi-scale features and capture both global and local dependencies of multiple low dynamic range (LDR) images. The decoder based on Swin Transformer is utilized to improve the reconstruction capability of the proposed model. Motivated by the phenomenal difference between the presence and absence of artifacts under the field of structure tensor (ST), we integrate the ST information of LDR images as auxiliary inputs of the network and use ST loss to further constrain artifacts. Different from previous approaches, our network is capable of processing an arbitrary number of input LDR images. Qualitative and quantitative experiments demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method by comparing it with existing state-of-the-art HDR deghosting models. Codes are available at https://github.com/pandayuanyu/HSTHdr. 消除移动物体造成的重影伪影是高动态范围 (HDR) 成像中的一个具有挑战性的问题。在这封信中，我们提出了一种由卷积编码器和 Transformer 解码器组成的混合模型，用于生成无重影的 HDR 图像。在编码器中，采用上下文聚合网络和非局部注意块来优化多尺度特征并捕获多个低动态范围（LDR）图像的全局和局部依赖性。利用基于Swin Transformer的解码器来提高所提出模型的重构能力。受结构张量（ST）场下伪影存在和不存在之间的显着差异的启发，我们整合LDR图像的ST信息作为网络的辅助输入，并使用ST损失来进一步约束伪影。与以前的方法不同，我们的网络能够处理任意数量的输入 LDR 图像。通过与现有最先进的 HDR 去鬼影模型进行比较，定性和定量实验证明了该方法的有效性。代码可在 https://github.com/pandayuanyu/HSTHdr 获取。 本文提出一种混合CNN-Transformer模型，通过结合结构张量信息解决高动态范围成像中的鬼影问题。 Yu Yuan,Jiaqi Wu,Zhongliang Jing,Henry Leung,Han Pan cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Jingchuan Chen,Wei Chen,Jing Li,Xiguang Wei,Wenzhe Tan,Zuo-Jun Max Shen,Hongbo Li
title: Path Planning Considering Time-Varying and Uncertain Movement Speed in Multi-Robot Automatic Warehouses: Problem Formulation and Algorithm
title_zh: 多机器人自动仓库中考虑时变和不确定运动速度的路径规划：问题表述和算法
abstract: Path planning in the multi-robot system refers to calculating a set of actions for each robot, which will move each robot to its goal without conflicting with other robots. Lately, the research topic has received significant attention for its extensive applications, such as airport ground, drone swarms, and automatic warehouses. Despite these available research results, most of the existing investigations are concerned with the cases of robots with a fixed movement speed without considering uncertainty. Therefore, in this work, we study the problem of path-planning in the multi-robot automatic warehouse context, which considers the time-varying and uncertain robots' movement speed. Specifically, the path-planning module searches a path with as few conflicts as possible for a single agent by calculating traffic cost based on customarily distributed conflict probability and combining it with the classic A* algorithm. However, this probability-based method cannot eliminate all conflicts, and speed's uncertainty will constantly cause new conflicts. As a supplement, we propose the other two modules. The conflict detection and re-planning module chooses objects requiring re-planning paths from the agents involved in different types of conflicts periodically by our designed rules. Also, at each step, the scheduling module fills up the agent's preserved queue and decides who has a higher priority when the same element is assigned to two agents simultaneously. Finally, we compare the proposed algorithm with other algorithms from academia and industry, and the results show that the proposed method is validated as the best performance.
summary: Path planning in the multi-robot system refers to calculating a set of actions for each robot, which will move each robot to its goal without conflicting with other robots. Lately, the research topic has received significant attention for its extensive applications, such as airport ground, drone swarms, and automatic warehouses. Despite these available research results, most of the existing investigations are concerned with the cases of robots with a fixed movement speed without considering uncertainty. Therefore, in this work, we study the problem of path-planning in the multi-robot automatic warehouse context, which considers the time-varying and uncertain robots' movement speed. Specifically, the path-planning module searches a path with as few conflicts as possible for a single agent by calculating traffic cost based on customarily distributed conflict probability and combining it with the classic A* algorithm. However, this probability-based method cannot eliminate all conflicts, and speed's uncertainty will constantly cause new conflicts. As a supplement, we propose the other two modules. The conflict detection and re-planning module chooses objects requiring re-planning paths from the agents involved in different types of conflicts periodically by our designed rules. Also, at each step, the scheduling module fills up the agent's preserved queue and decides who has a higher priority when the same element is assigned to two agents simultaneously. Finally, we compare the proposed algorithm with other algorithms from academia and industry, and the results show that the proposed method is validated as the best performance.
abstract_zh: 多机器人系统中的路径规划是指为每个机器人计算一组动作，这将使每个机器人在不与其他机器人发生冲突的情况下向其目标移动。最近，该研究课题因其广泛的应用而受到广泛关注，例如机场地面、无人机群和自动仓库。尽管有这些可用的研究结果，但现有的大多数研究都涉及具有固定运动速度的机器人的情况，而不考虑不确定性。因此，在这项工作中，我们研究了多机器人自动仓库背景下的路径规划问题，该问题考虑了时变和不确定的机器人运动速度。具体来说，路径规划模块根据惯常分布的冲突概率计算流量成本，并与经典的A*算法相结合，为单个智能体搜索一条冲突尽可能少的路径。然而，这种基于概率的方法并不能消除所有冲突，而且速度的不确定性会不断引发新的冲突。作为补充，我们提出了其他两个模块。冲突检测和重新规划模块根据我们设计的规则定期从涉及不同类型冲突的代理中选择需要重新规划路径的对象。此外，在每个步骤中，调度模块都会填充代理的保留队列，并在同一元素同时分配给两个代理时决定谁具有更高的优先级。最后，我们将所提出的算法与学术界和工业界的其他算法进行了比较，结果表明所提出的方法被验证为最佳性能。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了多机器人自动仓库中考虑时变和不确定移动速度的路径规划问题，提出了一种结合冲突概率和调度模块的算法。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多假设机器人速度固定且无不确定性，无法有效应对实际场景中的动态冲突问题，需改进以提升多机器人系统的路径规划效率与安全性。
AI.method: 基于A*算法引入交通成本计算，结合自定义冲突概率分布进行路径搜索；设计冲突检测与重规划模块及调度模块，通过规则筛选冲突对象并解决优先级冲突。
AI.result: 实验表明，该算法在学术与工业算法对比中表现最优，有效减少了路径冲突并提升了多机器人系统的整体效率。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法通过融合不确定性建模与动态调度机制，为多机器人自动仓库的复杂路径规划提供了可行解决方案，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Lorenzo Porcaro,Emilia Gómez,Carlos Castillo
title: Assessing the Impact of Music Recommendation Diversity on Listeners: A Longitudinal Study
title_zh: 评估音乐推荐多样性对听众的影响：一项纵向研究
abstract: We present the results of a 12-week longitudinal user study wherein the participants, 110 subjects from Southern Europe, received on a daily basis Electronic Music (EM) diversified recommendations. By analyzing their explicit and implicit feedback, we show that exposure to specific levels of music recommendation diversity may be responsible for long-term impacts on listeners' attitudes. In particular, we highlight the function of diversity in increasing the openness in listening to EM, a music genre not particularly known or liked by the participants previous to their participation in the study. Moreover, we demonstrate that recommendations may help listeners in removing positive and negative attachments towards EM, deconstructing pre-existing implicit associations but also stereotypes associated with this music. In addition, our results show the significant clout that recommendation diversity has in generating curiosity in listeners.
summary: We present the results of a 12-week longitudinal user study wherein the participants, 110 subjects from Southern Europe, received on a daily basis Electronic Music (EM) diversified recommendations. By analyzing their explicit and implicit feedback, we show that exposure to specific levels of music recommendation diversity may be responsible for long-term impacts on listeners' attitudes. In particular, we highlight the function of diversity in increasing the openness in listening to EM, a music genre not particularly known or liked by the participants previous to their participation in the study. Moreover, we demonstrate that recommendations may help listeners in removing positive and negative attachments towards EM, deconstructing pre-existing implicit associations but also stereotypes associated with this music. In addition, our results show the significant clout that recommendation diversity has in generating curiosity in listeners.
abstract_zh: 我们展示了一项为期 12 周的纵向用户研究的结果，其中来自南欧的 110 名受试者每天收到电子音乐 (EM) 的多样化推荐。通过分析他们的显性和隐性反馈，我们表明，接触特定水平的音乐推荐多样性可能会对听众的态度产生长期影响。我们特别强调了多样性在增加听 EM 开放性方面的作用，这是一种参与者在参与研究之前并不特别了解或不喜欢的音乐流派。此外，我们证明，建议可以帮助听众消除对 EM 的积极和消极依恋，解构预先存在的隐性关联以及与这种音乐相关的刻板印象。此外，我们的结果表明，推荐多样性对于激发听众的好奇心具有重要影响力。

AI.tldr: 评估音乐推荐多样性对听众长期态度的影响，特别是对电子音乐的接受度和刻板印象的改变。
AI.motivation: 探讨音乐推荐多样性如何影响听众对不熟悉音乐类型（如电子音乐）的态度，以及其在消除刻板印象和促进开放性方面的作用。
AI.method: 通过为期12周的纵向实验，对110名南欧受试者每日提供电子音乐多样化推荐，并分析其显性（如评分）和隐性反馈（如点击、播放时长）数据。
AI.result: 结果显示，推荐多样性显著提升听众对电子音乐的开放性，减少其原有积极或消极情感，打破刻板印象，并有效激发听众好奇心。
AI.conclusion: 结论表明，推荐系统的多样性设计对听众长期音乐态度和探索行为具有显著影响，有助于打破音乐类型刻板印象并促进跨类型接受度。

By analyzing their explicit and implicit feedback, we show that exposure to specific levels of music recommendation diversity may be responsible for long-term impacts on listeners' attitudes. In particular, we highlight the function of diversity in increasing the openness in listening to EM, a music genre not particularly known or liked by the participants previous to their participation in the study. Moreover, we demonstrate that recommendations may help listeners in removing positive and negative attachments towards EM, deconstructing pre-existing implicit associations but also stereotypes associated with this music. In addition, our results show the significant clout that recommendation diversity has in generating curiosity in listeners. 我们展示了一项为期 12 周的纵向用户研究的结果，其中来自南欧的 110 名受试者每天收到电子音乐 (EM) 的多样化推荐。通过分析他们的显性和隐性反馈，我们表明，接触特定水平的音乐推荐多样性可能会对听众的态度产生长期影响。我们特别强调了多样性在增加听 EM 开放性方面的作用，这是一种参与者在参与研究之前并不特别了解或不喜欢的音乐流派。此外，我们证明，建议可以帮助听众消除对 EM 的积极和消极依恋，解构预先存在的隐性关联以及与这种音乐相关的刻板印象。此外，我们的结果表明，推荐多样性对于激发听众的好奇心具有重要影响力。 评估音乐推荐多样性对听众长期态度的影响，特别是对电子音乐的接受度和刻板印象的改变。 Lorenzo Porcaro,Emilia Gómez,Carlos Castillo cs.HC,cs.IR

authors: João Baptista de Oliveira e Souza Filho
authors_json: João Baptista de Oliveira e Souza Filho
authors_text: Frederico Dias Souza,João Baptista de Oliveira e Souza Filho
title: Embedding generation for text classification of Brazilian Portuguese user reviews: from bag-of-words to transformers
title_zh: 用于巴西葡萄牙语用户评论文本分类的嵌入生成：从词袋到变压器
comment: 14 pages, 6 figures. Published at Springer Neural Computing and Applications journal
comments: 14 pages, 6 figures. Published at Springer Neural Computing and Applications journal
abstract: Text classification is a natural language processing (NLP) task relevant to many commercial applications, like e-commerce and customer service. Naturally, classifying such excerpts accurately often represents a challenge, due to intrinsic language aspects, like irony and nuance. To accomplish this task, one must provide a robust numerical representation for documents, a process known as embedding. Embedding represents a key NLP field nowadays, having faced a significant advance in the last decade, especially after the introduction of the word-to-vector concept and the popularization of Deep Learning models for solving NLP tasks, including Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs), Recurrent Neural Networks (RNNs), and Transformer-based Language Models (TLMs). Despite the impressive achievements in this field, the literature coverage regarding generating embeddings for Brazilian Portuguese texts is scarce, especially when considering commercial user reviews. Therefore, this work aims to provide a comprehensive experimental study of embedding approaches targeting a binary sentiment classification of user reviews in Brazilian Portuguese. This study includes from classical (Bag-of-Words) to state-of-the-art (Transformer-based) NLP models. The methods are evaluated with five open-source databases with pre-defined data partitions made available in an open digital repository to encourage reproducibility. The Fine-tuned TLMs achieved the best results for all cases, being followed by the Feature-based TLM, LSTM, and CNN, with alternate ranks, depending on the database under analysis.

Despite the impressive achievements in this field, the literature coverage regarding generating embeddings for Brazilian Portuguese texts is scarce, especially when considering commercial user reviews. The Fine-tuned TLMs achieved the best results for all cases, being followed by the Feature-based TLM, LSTM, and CNN, with alternate ranks, depending on the database under analysis.
abstract_zh: 文本分类是一项与许多商业应用相关的自然语言处理 (NLP) 任务，例如电子商务和客户服务。当然，由于内在的语言方面，如反讽和细微差别，对此类摘录进行准确分类通常是一项挑战。为了完成这一任务，必须为文档提供可靠的数字表示，这一过程称为嵌入。嵌入代表了当今 NLP 的一个关键领域，在过去十年中取得了重大进展，特别是在引入词到向量概念以及用于解决 NLP 任务的深度学习模型（包括卷积神经网络（CNN）、循环神经网络（RNN）和基于 Transformer 的语言模型（TLM））的普及之后。尽管该领域取得了令人印象深刻的成就，但有关为巴西葡萄牙语文本生成嵌入的文献报道却很少，特别是在考虑商业用户评论时。因此，这项工作旨在提供针对巴西葡萄牙语用户评论的二元情感分类的嵌入方法的全面实验研究。这项研究包括从经典（词袋）到最先进（基于 Transformer）的 NLP 模型。这些方法使用五个开源数据库进行评估，这些数据库具有开放数字存储库中提供的预定义数据分区，以鼓励可重复性。微调 TLM 在所有情况下都取得了最佳结果，其次是基于特征的 TLM、LSTM 和 CNN，并根据所分析的数据库具有交替排名。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过对比从传统词袋模型到先进Transformer模型的多种嵌入方法，研究巴西葡萄牙语用户评论的二元情感分类效果。
AI.motivation: 现有文献对巴西葡萄牙语文本嵌入生成的研究较少，尤其针对商业用户评论场景缺乏系统性实验，需探索更有效的分类方法。
AI.method: 在五个开源数据集上对比实验了词袋模型、LSTM、CNN及基于Transformer的语言模型（含微调和特征级应用），并公开数据集以保证可复现性。
AI.result: 微调后的Transformer模型在所有数据集中表现最佳，其次为特征级Transformer、LSTM和CNN，具体排名因数据集而异。
AI.conclusion: Transformer类模型在巴西葡萄牙语情感分类中效果最优，但需进一步研究适应本地语言特性的优化方法。

authors_text: Shaohui Zheng,Zhixu Li,Jiaan Wang,Jianfeng Qu,An Liu,Lei Zhao,Zhigang Chen
title: Long-Document Cross-Lingual Summarization
title_zh: 长文档跨语言摘要
abstract: Cross-Lingual Summarization (CLS) aims at generating summaries in one language for the given documents in another language. CLS has attracted wide research attention due to its practical significance in the multi-lingual world. Though great contributions have been made, existing CLS works typically focus on short documents, such as news articles, short dialogues and guides. Different from these short texts, long documents such as academic articles and business reports usually discuss complicated subjects and consist of thousands of words, making them non-trivial to process and summarize. To promote CLS research on long documents, we construct Perseus, the first long-document CLS dataset which collects about 94K Chinese scientific documents paired with English summaries. The average length of documents in Perseus is more than two thousand tokens. As a preliminary study on long-document CLS, we build and evaluate various CLS baselines, including pipeline and end-to-end methods. Experimental results on Perseus show the superiority of the end-to-end baseline, outperforming the strong pipeline models equipped with sophisticated machine translation systems. Furthermore, to provide a deeper understanding, we manually analyze the model outputs and discuss specific challenges faced by current approaches. We hope that our work could benchmark long-document CLS and benefit future studies.
summary: Cross-Lingual Summarization (CLS) aims at generating summaries in one language for the given documents in another language. CLS has attracted wide research attention due to its practical significance in the multi-lingual world. Though great contributions have been made, existing CLS works typically focus on short documents, such as news articles, short dialogues and guides. Different from these short texts, long documents such as academic articles and business reports usually discuss complicated subjects and consist of thousands of words, making them non-trivial to process and summarize. To promote CLS research on long documents, we construct Perseus, the first long-document CLS dataset which collects about 94K Chinese scientific documents paired with English summaries. The average length of documents in Perseus is more than two thousand tokens. As a preliminary study on long-document CLS, we build and evaluate various CLS baselines, including pipeline and end-to-end methods. Experimental results on Perseus show the superiority of the end-to-end baseline, outperforming the strong pipeline models equipped with sophisticated machine translation systems. Furthermore, to provide a deeper understanding, we manually analyze the model outputs and discuss specific challenges faced by current approaches. We hope that our work could benchmark long-document CLS and benefit future studies.
abstract_zh: 跨语言摘要（CLS）旨在用一种语言为另一种语言的给定文档生成摘要。 CLS 由于其在多语言世界中的实际意义而引起了广泛的研究关注。尽管已经做出了巨大的贡献，但现有的 CLS 作品通常侧重于简短的文档，例如新闻文章、简短的对话和指南。与这些短文本不同，学术文章和商业报告等长文档通常讨论复杂的主题，并且由数千个单词组成，这使得它们的处理和总结并不容易。为了促进长文档的 CLS 研究，我们构建了 Perseus，这是第一个长文档 CLS 数据集，收集了约 94K 中文科学文档并配有英文摘要。 Perseus 中的文档平均长度超过两千个标记。作为对长文档 CLS 的初步研究，我们构建并评估了各种 CLS 基线，包括管道和端到端方法。 Perseus 上的实验结果显示了端到端基线的优越性，优于配备复杂机器翻译系统的强大管道模型。此外，为了提供更深入的理解，我们手动分析模型输出并讨论当前方法面临的具体挑战。我们希望我们的工作能够对长文档 CLS 进行基准测试并有益于未来的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个长文档跨语言摘要数据集Perseus，并评估多种跨语言摘要方法。
AI.motivation: 现有跨语言摘要研究主要针对短文本，而长文档（如学术论文）因内容复杂且篇幅长，处理难度大，缺乏相应研究。
AI.method: 构建包含94K中文学术文档及其英文摘要的Perseus数据集，文档平均长度超2000词；对比实验采用流水线方法和端到端方法进行基准测试，并分析模型输出。
AI.result: 端到端方法在Perseus数据集上优于配备复杂翻译系统的流水线模型，人工分析揭示了当前方法在处理长文档时的具体挑战。
AI.conclusion: Perseus数据集为长文档跨语言摘要研究提供基准，未来需进一步优化模型以应对长文本的复杂性。

Experimental results on Perseus show the superiority of the end-to-end baseline, outperforming the strong pipeline models equipped with sophisticated machine translation systems. Furthermore, to provide a deeper understanding, we manually analyze the model outputs and discuss specific challenges faced by current approaches. We hope that our work could benchmark long-document CLS and benefit future studies. 跨语言摘要（CLS）旨在用一种语言为另一种语言的给定文档生成摘要。 CLS 由于其在多语言世界中的实际意义而引起了广泛的研究关注。尽管已经做出了巨大的贡献，但现有的 CLS 作品通常侧重于简短的文档，例如新闻文章、简短的对话和指南。与这些短文本不同，学术文章和商业报告等长文档通常讨论复杂的主题，并且由数千个单词组成，这使得它们的处理和总结并不容易。为了促进长文档的 CLS 研究，我们构建了 Perseus，这是第一个长文档 CLS 数据集，收集了约 94K 中文科学文档并配有英文摘要。 Perseus 中的文档平均长度超过两千个标记。作为对长文档 CLS 的初步研究，我们构建并评估了各种 CLS 基线，包括管道和端到端方法。 Perseus 上的实验结果显示了端到端基线的优越性，优于配备复杂机器翻译系统的强大管道模型。此外，为了提供更深入的理解，我们手动分析模型输出并讨论当前方法面临的具体挑战。我们希望我们的工作能够对长文档 CLS 进行基准测试并有益于未来的研究。 本文提出一个长文档跨语言摘要数据集Perseus，并评估多种跨语言摘要方法。 Shaohui Zheng,Zhixu Li,Jiaan Wang,Jianfeng Qu,An Liu,Lei Zhao,Zhigang Chen cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Matthew Ciolino,Grant Rosario,David Noever
title: Soft Labels for Rapid Satellite Object Detection
title_zh: 用于快速卫星物体检测的软标签
abstract: Soft labels in image classification are vector representations of an image's true classification. In this paper, we investigate soft labels in the context of satellite object detection. We propose using detections as the basis for a new dataset of soft labels. Much of the effort in creating a high-quality model is gathering and annotating the training data. If we could use a model to generate a dataset for us, we could not only rapidly create datasets, but also supplement existing open-source datasets. Using a subset of the xView dataset, we train a YOLOv5 model to detect cars, planes, and ships. We then use that model to generate soft labels for the second training set which we then train and compare to the original model. We show that soft labels can be used to train a model that is almost as accurate as a model trained on the original data.
summary: Soft labels in image classification are vector representations of an image's true classification. In this paper, we investigate soft labels in the context of satellite object detection. We propose using detections as the basis for a new dataset of soft labels. Much of the effort in creating a high-quality model is gathering and annotating the training data. If we could use a model to generate a dataset for us, we could not only rapidly create datasets, but also supplement existing open-source datasets. Using a subset of the xView dataset, we train a YOLOv5 model to detect cars, planes, and ships. We then use that model to generate soft labels for the second training set which we then train and compare to the original model. We show that soft labels can be used to train a model that is almost as accurate as a model trained on the original data.
abstract_zh: 图像分类中的软标签是图像真实分类的向量表示。在本文中，我们研究了卫星物体检测背景下的软标签。我们建议使用检测作为新软标签数据集的基础。创建高质量模型的大部分工作是收集和注释训练数据。如果我们可以使用模型为我们生成数据集，我们不仅可以快速创建数据集，还可以补充现有的开源数据集。我们使用 xView 数据集的子集训练 YOLOv5 模型来检测汽车、飞机和船舶。然后，我们使用该模型为第二个训练集生成软标签，然后我们对其进行训练并与原始模型进行比较。我们证明，软标签可用于训练模型，该模型几乎与在原始数据上训练的模型一样准确。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用软标签加速卫星图像目标检测，通过预训练模型生成软标签数据集以替代传统标注方法。
AI.motivation: 传统卫星目标检测依赖大量人工标注数据，耗时耗力。软标签可自动补充数据集，提升模型训练效率。
AI.method: 基于xView数据集训练YOLOv5检测模型，使用该模型生成汽车、飞机、船只的软标签数据，训练新模型并对比性能。
AI.result: 软标签训练模型在精度上接近原始标注数据训练的模型，验证了软标签的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 软标签能显著减少对人工标注数据的依赖，为快速构建卫星目标检测模型提供可行方案。

authors_text: Danilo Carastan dos Santos
title: Understanding the Energy Consumption of HPC Scale Artificial Intelligence
title_zh: 了解 HPC 规模人工智能的能耗
comment: ef:Latin America High Performance Computing Conference (CARLA 2022), Sep 2022, Porto Alegre, Brazil
comments: ef:Latin America High Performance Computing Conference (CARLA 2022), Sep 2022, Porto Alegre, Brazil
abstract: This paper contributes towards better understanding the energy consumption trade-offs of HPC scale Artificial Intelligence (AI), and more specifically Deep Learning (DL) algorithms. For this task we developed benchmark-tracker, a benchmark tool to evaluate the speed and energy consumption of DL algorithms in HPC environments. We exploited hardware counters and Python libraries to collect energy information through software, which enabled us to instrument a known AI benchmark tool, and to evaluate the energy consumption of numerous DL algorithms and models. Through an experimental campaign, we show a case example of the potential of benchmark-tracker to measure the computing speed and the energy consumption for training and inference DL algorithms, and also the potential of Benchmark-Tracker to help better understanding the energy behavior of DL algorithms in HPC platforms. This work is a step forward to better understand the energy consumption of Deep Learning in HPC, and it also contributes with a new tool to help HPC DL developers to better balance the HPC infrastructure in terms of speed and energy consumption.
summary: This paper contributes towards better understanding the energy consumption trade-offs of HPC scale Artificial Intelligence (AI), and more specifically Deep Learning (DL) algorithms. For this task we developed benchmark-tracker, a benchmark tool to evaluate the speed and energy consumption of DL algorithms in HPC environments. We exploited hardware counters and Python libraries to collect energy information through software, which enabled us to instrument a known AI benchmark tool, and to evaluate the energy consumption of numerous DL algorithms and models. Through an experimental campaign, we show a case example of the potential of benchmark-tracker to measure the computing speed and the energy consumption for training and inference DL algorithms, and also the potential of Benchmark-Tracker to help better understanding the energy behavior of DL algorithms in HPC platforms. This work is a step forward to better understand the energy consumption of Deep Learning in HPC, and it also contributes with a new tool to help HPC DL developers to better balance the HPC infrastructure in terms of speed and energy consumption.
abstract_zh: 本文有助于更好地理解 HPC 规模人工智能 (AI)，特别是深度学习 (DL) 算法的能耗权衡。对于这项任务，我们开发了 benchmark-tracker，这是一个基准工具，用于评估 HPC 环境中深度学习算法的速度和能耗。我们利用硬件计数器和 Python 库通过软件收集能源信息，这使我们能够检测已知的 AI 基准工具，并评估众多深度学习算法和模型的能源消耗。通过实验活动，我们展示了基准跟踪器在测量训练和推理深度学习算法的计算速度和能耗方面的潜力，以及基准跟踪器在帮助更好地理解 HPC 平台中深度学习算法的能量行为方面的潜力。这项工作是更好地理解 HPC 中深度学习的能耗的一步，它还提供了一种新工具来帮助 HPC DL 开发人员更好地平衡 HPC 基础设施的速度和能耗。

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一种名为benchmark-tracker的基准工具，用于评估高性能计算（HPC）环境中深度学习（DL）算法的速度和能耗，以更好地理解AI在HPC中的能耗权衡。
AI.motivation: 当前缺乏有效工具来评估HPC环境中深度学习算法的能耗，导致难以平衡计算速度与能源效率，亟需开发针对性工具进行系统研究。
AI.method: 通过硬件计数器和Python库收集能耗数据，对AI基准工具进行仪器化，利用实验测试多种DL算法和模型的训练与推理阶段的能耗及性能表现。
AI.result: 验证了benchmark-tracker在测量DL算法能耗与速度方面的有效性，并展示了其在HPC平台中分析能耗行为的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该工作为理解HPC中深度学习能耗提供了新视角，并为开发者提供了平衡速度与能耗的实用工具，推动绿色AI发展。

authors_text: Carlos Alberto Barrera-Diaz,Amir Nourmohammdi,Henrik Smedberg,Tehseen Aslam,Amos H. C. Ng
title: An enhanced simulation-based multi-objective optimization approach with knowledge discovery for reconfigurable manufacturing systems
title_zh: 一种增强的基于仿真的多目标优化方法，具有可重构制造系统的知识发现功能
abstract: In today's uncertain and competitive market, where enterprises are subjected to increasingly shortened product life-cycles and frequent volume changes, reconfigurable manufacturing systems (RMS) applications play a significant role in the manufacturing industry's success. Despite the advantages offered by RMS, achieving a high-efficiency degree constitutes a challenging task for stakeholders and decision-makers when they face the trade-off decisions inherent in these complex systems. This study addresses work tasks and resource allocations to workstations together with buffer capacity allocation in RMS. The aim is to simultaneously maximize throughput and minimize total buffer capacity under fluctuating production volumes and capacity changes while considering the stochastic behavior of the system. An enhanced simulation-based multi-objective optimization (SMO) approach with customized simulation and optimization components is proposed to address the abovementioned challenges. Apart from presenting the optimal solutions subject to volume and capacity changes, the proposed approach support decision-makers with discovered knowledge to further understand the RMS design. In particular, this study presents a problem-specific customized SMO combined with a novel flexible pattern mining method for optimizing RMS and conducting post-optimal analyzes. To this extent, this study demonstrates the benefits of applying SMO and knowledge discovery methods for fast decision-support and production planning of RMS.
summary: In today's uncertain and competitive market, where enterprises are subjected to increasingly shortened product life-cycles and frequent volume changes, reconfigurable manufacturing systems (RMS) applications play a significant role in the manufacturing industry's success. Despite the advantages offered by RMS, achieving a high-efficiency degree constitutes a challenging task for stakeholders and decision-makers when they face the trade-off decisions inherent in these complex systems. This study addresses work tasks and resource allocations to workstations together with buffer capacity allocation in RMS. The aim is to simultaneously maximize throughput and minimize total buffer capacity under fluctuating production volumes and capacity changes while considering the stochastic behavior of the system. An enhanced simulation-based multi-objective optimization (SMO) approach with customized simulation and optimization components is proposed to address the abovementioned challenges. Apart from presenting the optimal solutions subject to volume and capacity changes, the proposed approach support decision-makers with discovered knowledge to further understand the RMS design. In particular, this study presents a problem-specific customized SMO combined with a novel flexible pattern mining method for optimizing RMS and conducting post-optimal analyzes. To this extent, this study demonstrates the benefits of applying SMO and knowledge discovery methods for fast decision-support and production planning of RMS.
abstract_zh: In today's uncertain and competitive market, where enterprises are subjected to increasingly shortened product life-cycles and frequent volume changes, reconfigurable manufacturing systems (RMS) applications play a significant role in the manufacturing industry's success. Despite the advantages offered by RMS, achieving a high-efficiency degree constitutes a challenging task for stakeholders and decision-makers when they face the trade-off decisions inherent in these complex systems.本研究解决了工作站的工作任务和资源分配以及 RMS 中的缓冲区容量分配。 The aim is to simultaneously maximize throughput and minimize total buffer capacity under fluctuating production volumes and capacity changes while considering the stochastic behavior of the system. An enhanced simulation-based multi-objective optimization (SMO) approach with customized simulation and optimization components is proposed to address the abovementioned challenges. Apart from presenting the optimal solutions subject to volume and capacity changes, the proposed approach support decision-makers with discovered knowledge to further understand the RMS design. In particular, this study presents a problem-specific customized SMO combined with a novel flexible pattern mining method for optimizing RMS and conducting post-optimal analyzes. To this extent, this study demonstrates the benefits of applying SMO and knowledge discovery methods for fast decision-support and production planning of RMS.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合仿真与知识发现的增强型多目标优化方法，用于解决再配置制造系统（RMS）中的任务分配、资源分配及缓冲区容量优化问题。
AI.motivation: 在产品生命周期缩短和生产需求波动的市场环境下，RMS需平衡吞吐量与缓冲区容量的矛盾，传统方法难以满足动态优化与决策支持需求。
AI.method: 设计定制化仿真-优化框架，集成多目标优化算法与灵活模式挖掘技术，实现动态生产场景下的优化求解与后优化知识提取。
AI.result: 验证了所提方法在波动生产条件下同时优化吞吐量与缓冲区容量的有效性，并通过知识发现辅助决策者理解系统设计规律。
AI.conclusion: 融合仿真优化与知识发现技术可显著提升RMS的动态决策效率，为复杂制造系统的快速规划提供新思路。

search_text: An enhanced simulation-based multi-objective optimization approach with knowledge discovery for reconfigurable manufacturing systems 一种增强的基于仿真的多目标优化方法，具有可重构制造系统的知识发现功能 In today's uncertain and competitive market, where enterprises are subjected to increasingly shortened product life-cycles and frequent volume changes, reconfigurable manufacturing systems (RMS) applications play a significant role in the manufacturing industry's success. Despite the advantages offered by RMS, achieving a high-efficiency degree constitutes a challenging task for stakeholders and decision-makers when they face the trade-off decisions inherent in these complex systems. This study addresses work tasks and resource allocations to workstations together with buffer capacity allocation in RMS. The aim is to simultaneously maximize throughput and minimize total buffer capacity under fluctuating production volumes and capacity changes while considering the stochastic behavior of the system. An enhanced simulation-based multi-objective optimization (SMO) approach with customized simulation and optimization components is proposed to address the abovementioned challenges. Apart from presenting the optimal solutions subject to volume and capacity changes, the proposed approach support decision-makers with discovered knowledge to further understand the RMS design. In particular, this study presents a problem-specific customized SMO combined with a novel flexible pattern mining method for optimizing RMS and conducting post-optimal analyzes. To this extent, this study demonstrates the benefits of applying SMO and knowledge discovery methods for fast decision-support and production planning of RMS. authors_text: Manuel Cossio
title: A perspective on the use of health digital twins in computational pathology
title_zh: 健康数字孪生在计算病理学中的应用视角
abstract: A digital health twin can be defined as a virtual model of a physical person, in this specific case, a patient. This virtual model is constituted by multidimensional data that can host from clinical, molecular and therapeutic parameters to sensor data and living conditions. Given that in computational pathology, it is very important to have the information from image donors to create computational models, the integration of digital twins in this field could be crucial. However, since these virtual entities collect sensitive data from physical people, privacy safeguards must also be considered and implemented. With these data safeguards in place, health digital twins could integrate digital clinical trials and be necessary participants in the generation of real-world evidence, which could positively change both fields.
summary: A digital health twin can be defined as a virtual model of a physical person, in this specific case, a patient. This virtual model is constituted by multidimensional data that can host from clinical, molecular and therapeutic parameters to sensor data and living conditions. Given that in computational pathology, it is very important to have the information from image donors to create computational models, the integration of digital twins in this field could be crucial. However, since these virtual entities collect sensitive data from physical people, privacy safeguards must also be considered and implemented. With these data safeguards in place, health digital twins could integrate digital clinical trials and be necessary participants in the generation of real-world evidence, which could positively change both fields.
abstract_zh: 数字健康双胞胎可以定义为自然人（在本例中为患者）的虚拟模型。该虚拟模型由多维数据构成，可以承载从临床、分子和治疗参数到传感器数据和生活条件的数据。鉴于在计算病理学中，从图像捐赠者那里获取信息来创建计算模型非常重要，因此数字孪生在该领域的集成可能至关重要。然而，由于这些虚拟实体从自然人那里收集敏感数据，因此还必须考虑和实施隐私保护措施。有了这些数据保障措施，健康数字孪生就可以整合数字临床试验，并成为生成现实世界证据的必要参与者，这可以积极改变这两个领域。

AI.tldr: 探讨健康数字孪生在计算病理学中的应用潜力及其隐私保护的重要性。
AI.motivation: 计算病理学需要整合多维数据以构建模型，而健康数字孪生能提供这些数据，但需解决隐私问题。
AI.method: 通过整合多维患者数据构建数字孪生，并实施隐私保护措施。
AI.result: 数字孪生能够整合数字临床试验，生成真实世界证据，推动病理学和医疗领域发展。
AI.conclusion: 健康数字孪生在隐私保护下可显著促进计算病理学和医疗研究的发展。

authors_text: Penny Johnston,Keiller Nogueira,Kevin Swingler
title: GMM-IL: Image Classification using Incrementally Learnt, Independent Probabilistic Models for Small Sample Sizes
title_zh: GMM-IL：使用增量学习的小样本独立概率模型进行图像分类
abstract: Current deep learning classifiers, carry out supervised learning and store class discriminatory information in a set of shared network weights. These weights cannot be easily altered to incrementally learn additional classes, since the classification weights all require retraining to prevent old class information from being lost and also require the previous training data to be present. We present a novel two stage architecture which couples visual feature learning with probabilistic models to represent each class in the form of a Gaussian Mixture Model. By using these independent class representations within our classifier, we outperform a benchmark of an equivalent network with a Softmax head, obtaining increased accuracy for sample sizes smaller than 12 and increased weighted F1 score for 3 imbalanced class profiles in that sample range. When learning new classes our classifier exhibits no catastrophic forgetting issues and only requires the new classes' training images to be present. This enables a database of growing classes over time which can be visually indexed and reasoned over.
summary: Current deep learning classifiers, carry out supervised learning and store class discriminatory information in a set of shared network weights. These weights cannot be easily altered to incrementally learn additional classes, since the classification weights all require retraining to prevent old class information from being lost and also require the previous training data to be present. We present a novel two stage architecture which couples visual feature learning with probabilistic models to represent each class in the form of a Gaussian Mixture Model. By using these independent class representations within our classifier, we outperform a benchmark of an equivalent network with a Softmax head, obtaining increased accuracy for sample sizes smaller than 12 and increased weighted F1 score for 3 imbalanced class profiles in that sample range. When learning new classes our classifier exhibits no catastrophic forgetting issues and only requires the new classes' training images to be present. This enables a database of growing classes over time which can be visually indexed and reasoned over.
abstract_zh: 当前的深度学习分类器进行监督学习并将类别区分信息存储在一组共享网络权重中。这些权重不能轻易更改以增量学习附加类别，因为分类权重都需要重新训练以防止旧类别信息丢失，并且还需要存在先前的训练数据。我们提出了一种新颖的两阶段架构，它将视觉特征学习与概率模型结合起来，以高斯混合模型的形式表示每个类别。通过在我们的分类器中使用这些独立的类表示，我们超越了具有 Softmax 头的等效网络的基准，获得了小于 12 的样本大小的更高的准确性，并提高了该样本范围内 3 个不平衡类配置文件的加权 F1 分数。当学习新类别时，我们的分类器不会表现出灾难性的遗忘问题，并且只需要存在新类别的训练图像。这使得数据库能够随着时间的推移不断增长的类别，可以进行可视化索引和推理。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种适用于小样本图像分类的增量学习方法GMM-IL，通过独立概率模型避免传统深度学习分类器的灾难性遗忘问题。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习分类器在增量学习新类时需重新训练所有权重，导致旧类信息丢失且依赖历史数据，难以适应小样本和动态扩展场景。
AI.method: 设计两阶段架构，结合视觉特征学习与高斯混合模型（GMM），每个类别独立存储为概率模型，无需共享权重实现增量学习。
AI.result: 在样本量小于12时准确率超越softmax基线，在3种不平衡数据集上加权F1分数提升，且无灾难性遗忘，仅需新类训练数据即可扩展。
AI.conclusion: GMM-IL通过独立概率模型有效解决了小样本增量学习难题，为动态增长的视觉分类数据库提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Yutaka Momma,Weimin Wang,Edgar Simo-Serra,Satoshi Iizuka,Ryosuke Nakamura,Hiroshi Ishikawa
title: P2Net: A Post-Processing Network for Refining Semantic Segmentation of LiDAR Point Cloud based on Consistency of Consecutive Frames
title_zh: P2Net：基于连续帧一致性的细化激光雷达点云语义分割的后处理网络
comment: 2020 IEEE International Conference on Systems, Man, and Cybernetics (SMC)
comments: 2020 IEEE International Conference on Systems, Man, and Cybernetics (SMC)
abstract: We present a lightweight post-processing method to refine the semantic segmentation results of point cloud sequences. Most existing methods usually segment frame by frame and encounter the inherent ambiguity of the problem: based on a measurement in a single frame, labels are sometimes difficult to predict even for humans. To remedy this problem, we propose to explicitly train a network to refine these results predicted by an existing segmentation method. The network, which we call the P2Net, learns the consistency constraints between coincident points from consecutive frames after registration. We evaluate the proposed post-processing method both qualitatively and quantitatively on the SemanticKITTI dataset that consists of real outdoor scenes. The effectiveness of the proposed method is validated by comparing the results predicted by two representative networks with and without the refinement by the post-processing network. Specifically, qualitative visualization validates the key idea that labels of the points that are difficult to predict can be corrected with P2Net. Quantitatively, overall mIoU is improved from 10.5% to 11.7% for PointNet [1] and from 10.8% to 15.9% for PointNet++ [2].
summary: We present a lightweight post-processing method to refine the semantic segmentation results of point cloud sequences. Most existing methods usually segment frame by frame and encounter the inherent ambiguity of the problem: based on a measurement in a single frame, labels are sometimes difficult to predict even for humans. To remedy this problem, we propose to explicitly train a network to refine these results predicted by an existing segmentation method. The network, which we call the P2Net, learns the consistency constraints between coincident points from consecutive frames after registration. We evaluate the proposed post-processing method both qualitatively and quantitatively on the SemanticKITTI dataset that consists of real outdoor scenes. The effectiveness of the proposed method is validated by comparing the results predicted by two representative networks with and without the refinement by the post-processing network. Specifically, qualitative visualization validates the key idea that labels of the points that are difficult to predict can be corrected with P2Net. Quantitatively, overall mIoU is improved from 10.5% to 11.7% for PointNet [1] and from 10.8% to 15.9% for PointNet++ [2].
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种轻量级后处理方法来细化点云序列的语义分割结果。大多数现有方法通常逐帧分割，并遇到问题固有的模糊性：基于单帧中的测量，标签有时甚至对于人类来说也难以预测。为了解决这个问题，我们建议显式地训练一个网络来细化现有分割方法预测的这些结果。该网络（我们称之为 P2Net）在注册后从连续帧中学习重合点之间的一致性约束。我们在由真实户外场景组成的 SemanticKITTI 数据集上定性和定量地评估了所提出的后处理方法。通过比较两个代表性网络在经过后处理网络和未经后处理网络的细化后的预测结果，验证了该方法的有效性。具体来说，定性可视化验证了以下关键思想：难以预测的点的标签可以通过 P2Net 进行纠正。从数量上看，PointNet [1] 的总体 mIoU 从 10.5% 提高到 11.7%，PointNet++ [2] 从 10.8% 提高到 15.9%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种轻量级后处理网络P2Net，通过连续帧的一致性约束来优化LiDAR点云的语义分割结果。
AI.motivation: 现有方法逐帧分割导致单帧测量存在歧义，难以准确预测标签。通过利用连续帧间的时空一致性可提升分割准确性。
AI.method: 设计P2Net网络学习注册后连续帧中重合点的一致性约束，通过后处理修正原始分割结果中的模糊标签。
AI.result: 在SemanticKITTI数据集上，PointNet的mIoU提升1.2%（10.5%→11.7%），PointNet++提升5.1%（10.8%→15.9%），定性结果验证了难分割区域的修正效果。
AI.conclusion: P2Net通过时空一致性约束有效提升了点云语义分割性能，为现有分割方法提供了轻量级优化方案。

authors_text: José Morano,Álvaro S. Hervella,José Rouco,Jorge Novo,José I. Fernández-Vigo,Marcos Ortega
title: Weakly-supervised detection of AMD-related lesions in color fundus images using explainable deep learning
title_zh: 使用可解释的深度学习弱监督检测彩色眼底图像中 AMD 相关病变
comment: Accepted in the journal Computer Methods and Programs in Biomedicine on November 29, 2022
comments: Accepted in the journal Computer Methods and Programs in Biomedicine on November 29, 2022
abstract: Age-related macular degeneration (AMD) is a degenerative disorder affecting the macula, a key area of the retina for visual acuity. Nowadays, it is the most frequent cause of blindness in developed countries. Although some promising treatments have been developed, their effectiveness is low in advanced stages. This emphasizes the importance of large-scale screening programs. Nevertheless, implementing such programs for AMD is usually unfeasible, since the population at risk is large and the diagnosis is challenging. All this motivates the development of automatic methods. In this sense, several works have achieved positive results for AMD diagnosis using convolutional neural networks (CNNs). However, none incorporates explainability mechanisms, which limits their use in clinical practice. In that regard, we propose an explainable deep learning approach for the diagnosis of AMD via the joint identification of its associated retinal lesions. In our proposal, a CNN is trained end-to-end for the joint task using image-level labels. The provided lesion information is of clinical interest, as it allows to assess the developmental stage of AMD. Additionally, the approach allows to explain the diagnosis from the identified lesions. This is possible thanks to the use of a CNN with a custom setting that links the lesions and the diagnosis. Furthermore, the proposed setting also allows to obtain coarse lesion segmentation maps in a weakly-supervised way, further improving the explainability. The training data for the approach can be obtained without much extra work by clinicians. The experiments conducted demonstrate that our approach can identify AMD and its associated lesions satisfactorily, while providing adequate coarse segmentation maps for most common lesions.

In that regard, we propose an explainable deep learning approach for the diagnosis of AMD via the joint identification of its associated retinal lesions. abstract_zh: 年龄相关性黄斑变性 (AMD) 是一种影响黄斑的退行性疾病，黄斑是视网膜中影响视力的关键区域。如今，它是发达国家最常见的致盲原因。尽管已经开发出一些有希望的治疗方法，但它们在晚期阶段的有效性较低。这强调了大规模筛查计划的重要性。然而，针对 AMD 实施此类计划通常是不可行的，因为面临风险的人群众多且诊断具有挑战性。所有这些都促进了自动化方法的发展。从这个意义上说，一些工作已经在使用卷积神经网络（CNN）进行 AMD 诊断方面取得了积极的成果。然而，没有一个包含可解释性机制，这限制了它们在临床实践中的使用。在这方面，我们提出了一种可解释的深度学习方法，通过联合识别相关的视网膜病变来诊断 AMD。在我们的提案中，使用图像级标签对 CNN 进行端到端联合任务训练。所提供的病变信息具有临床意义，因为它可以评估 AMD 的发展阶段。此外，该方法还可以根据已识别的病变来解释诊断。这要归功于使用具有自定义设置的 CNN，将病变与诊断联系起来。此外，所提出的设置还允许以弱监督的方式获得粗略的病变分割图，进一步提高可解释性。临床医生无需做太多额外工作即可获得该方法的训练数据。进行的实验表明，我们的方法可以令人满意地识别 AMD 及其相关病变，同时为最常见的病变提供足够的粗分割图。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于可解释深度学习的弱监督方法，用于在彩色眼底图像中检测与年龄相关性黄斑变性（AMD）相关的视网膜病变。
AI.motivation: AMD是发达国家致盲的主要原因，但现有自动诊断方法缺乏可解释性，限制了其临床应用。大规模筛查因诊断难度高而难以实施，亟需兼具病变识别与诊断解释能力的自动方法。
AI.method: 采用端到端训练的卷积神经网络（CNN），通过图像级标签联合识别AMD相关病变。设计自定义网络结构关联病变与诊断结果，并以弱监督方式生成粗略病变分割图。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效识别AMD及其相关病变，生成的分割图对常见病变具有较高可用性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过结合病变识别与诊断解释，为AMD的临床筛查提供了可行的自动化解决方案，有助于评估疾病发展阶段。

authors_text: Lintai Wu,Qijian Zhang,Junhui Hou,Yong Xu
title: Leveraging Single-View Images for Unsupervised 3D Point Cloud Completion
title_zh: 利用单视图图像实现无监督 3D 点云完成
comment: Accepted in IEEE Transactions on Multimedia
comments: Accepted in IEEE Transactions on Multimedia
abstract: Point clouds captured by scanning devices are often incomplete due to occlusion. To overcome this limitation, point cloud completion methods have been developed to predict the complete shape of an object based on its partial input. These methods can be broadly classified as supervised or unsupervised. However, both categories require a large number of 3D complete point clouds, which may be difficult to capture. In this paper, we propose Cross-PCC, an unsupervised point cloud completion method without requiring any 3D complete point clouds. We only utilize 2D images of the complete objects, which are easier to capture than 3D complete and clean point clouds. Specifically, to take advantage of the complementary information from 2D images, we use a single-view RGB image to extract 2D features and design a fusion module to fuse the 2D and 3D features extracted from the partial point cloud. To guide the shape of predicted point clouds, we project the predicted points of the object to the 2D plane and use the foreground pixels of its silhouette maps to constrain the position of the projected points. To reduce the outliers of the predicted point clouds, we propose a view calibrator to move the points projected to the background into the foreground by the single-view silhouette image. To the best of our knowledge, our approach is the first point cloud completion method that does not require any 3D supervision. The experimental results of our method are superior to those of the state-of-the-art unsupervised methods by a large margin. Moreover, our method even achieves comparable performance to some supervised methods. We will make the source code publicly available at https://github.com/ltwu6/cross-pcc.
summary: Point clouds captured by scanning devices are often incomplete due to occlusion. To overcome this limitation, point cloud completion methods have been developed to predict the complete shape of an object based on its partial input. These methods can be broadly classified as supervised or unsupervised. However, both categories require a large number of 3D complete point clouds, which may be difficult to capture. In this paper, we propose Cross-PCC, an unsupervised point cloud completion method without requiring any 3D complete point clouds. We only utilize 2D images of the complete objects, which are easier to capture than 3D complete and clean point clouds. Specifically, to take advantage of the complementary information from 2D images, we use a single-view RGB image to extract 2D features and design a fusion module to fuse the 2D and 3D features extracted from the partial point cloud. To guide the shape of predicted point clouds, we project the predicted points of the object to the 2D plane and use the foreground pixels of its silhouette maps to constrain the position of the projected points. To reduce the outliers of the predicted point clouds, we propose a view calibrator to move the points projected to the background into the foreground by the single-view silhouette image. To the best of our knowledge, our approach is the first point cloud completion method that does not require any 3D supervision. The experimental results of our method are superior to those of the state-of-the-art unsupervised methods by a large margin. Moreover, our method even achieves comparable performance to some supervised methods. We will make the source code publicly available at https://github.com/ltwu6/cross-pcc.
abstract_zh: 扫描设备捕获的点云往往由于遮挡而不完整。为了克服这一限制，已经开发了点云完成方法来根据对象的部分输入来预测对象的完整形状。这些方法可以大致分为有监督的或无监督的。然而，这两个类别都需要大量的 3D 完整点云，这可能很难捕获。在本文中，我们提出了 Cross-PCC，一种无需任何 3D 完整点云的无监督点云补全方法。我们仅利用完整物体的 2D 图像，这比完整且干净的 3D 点云更容易捕获。具体来说，为了利用 2D 图像的互补信息，我们使用单视图 RGB 图像来提取 2D 特征，并设计一个融合模块来融合从部分点云提取的 2D 和 3D 特征。为了引导预测点云的形状，我们将对象的预测点投影到 2D 平面，并使用其轮廓图的前景像素来约束投影点的位置。为了减少预测点云的异常值，我们提出了一个视图校准器，通过单视图轮廓图像将投影到背景的点移动到前景。据我们所知，我们的方法是第一个不需要任何 3D 监督的点云完成方法。我们的方法的实验结果大大优于最先进的无监督方法。此外，我们的方法甚至达到了与某些监督方法相当的性能。我们将在 https://github.com/ltwu6/cross-pcc 公开源代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需3D完整点云监督的无监督点云补全方法Cross-PCC，仅利用单视角2D图像完成3D点云补全。
AI.motivation: 现有点云补全方法依赖大量3D完整点云数据，而实际中获取完整干净的3D点云困难。本文旨在通过易获取的2D图像替代3D监督，解决数据获取难题。
AI.method: 通过单视角RGB图像提取2D特征，设计融合模块整合2D特征与部分点云的3D特征；利用预测点投影到2D平面的轮廓图约束点位置，并引入视图校准器将背景投影点移至前景以减少异常值。
AI.result: 实验结果显著优于现有无监督方法，且性能接近部分监督方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 本文首次实现无需3D监督的点云补全，通过有效利用2D图像信息，为降低3D数据依赖提供了新思路。

search_text: Leveraging Single-View Images for Unsupervised 3D Point Cloud Completion 利用单视图图像实现无监督 3D 点云完成 Point clouds captured by scanning devices are often incomplete due to occlusion. To overcome this limitation, point cloud completion methods have been developed to predict the complete shape of an object based on its partial input. These methods can be broadly classified as supervised or unsupervised. However, both categories require a large number of 3D complete point clouds, which may be difficult to capture. In this paper, we propose Cross-PCC, an unsupervised point cloud completion method without requiring any 3D complete point clouds. We only utilize 2D images of the complete objects, which are easier to capture than 3D complete and clean point clouds. Specifically, to take advantage of the complementary information from 2D images, we use a single-view RGB image to extract 2D features and design a fusion module to fuse the 2D and 3D features extracted from the partial point cloud. To guide the shape of predicted point clouds, we project the predicted points of the object to the 2D plane and use the foreground pixels of its silhouette maps to constrain the position of the projected points. To reduce the outliers of the predicted point clouds, we propose a view calibrator to move the points projected to the background into the foreground by the single-view silhouette image. To the best of our knowledge, our approach is the first point cloud completion method that does not require any 3D supervision. The experimental results of our method are superior to those of the state-of-the-art unsupervised methods by a large margin. Moreover, our method even achieves comparable performance to some supervised methods. We will make the source code publicly available at https://github.com/ltwu6/cross-pcc. 扫描设备捕获的点云往往由于遮挡而不完整。为了克服这一限制，已经开发了点云完成方法来根据对象的部分输入来预测对象的完整形状。这些方法可以大致分为有监督的或无监督的。然而，这两个类别都需要大量的 3D 完整点云，这可能很难捕获。在本文中，我们提出了 Cross-PCC，一种无需任何 3D 完整点云的无监督点云补全方法。我们仅利用完整物体的 2D 图像，这比完整且干净的 3D 点云更容易捕获。具体来说，为了利用 2D 图像的互补信息，我们使用单视图 RGB 图像来提取 2D 特征，并设计一个融合模块来融合从部分点云提取的 2D 和 3D 特征。为了引导预测点云的形状，我们将对象的预测点投影到 2D 平面，并使用其轮廓图的前景像素来约束投影点的位置。为了减少预测点云的异常值，我们提出了一个视图校准器，通过单视图轮廓图像将投影到背景的点移动到前景。据我们所知，我们的方法是第一个不需要任何 3D 监督的点云完成方法。我们的方法的实验结果大大优于最先进的无监督方法。此外，我们的方法甚至达到了与某些监督方法相当的性能。我们将在 https://github.com/ltwu6/cross-pcc 公开源代码。 本文提出一种无需3D完整点云监督的无监督点云补全方法Cross-PCC，仅利用单视角2D图像完成3D点云补全。 Lintai Wu,Qijian Zhang,Junhui Hou,Yong Xu cs.CV

authors_text: Zhengwang Xia,Tao Zhou,Saqib Mamoon,Amani Alfakih,Jianfeng Lu
title: A Structure-guided Effective and Temporal-lag Connectivity Network for Revealing Brain Disorder Mechanisms
title_zh: 结构引导的有效和时间滞后连接网络，用于揭示脑部疾病机制
abstract: Brain network provides important insights for the diagnosis of many brain disorders, and how to effectively model the brain structure has become one of the core issues in the domain of brain imaging analysis. Recently, various computational methods have been proposed to estimate the causal relationship (i.e., effective connectivity) between brain regions. Compared with traditional correlation-based methods, effective connectivity can provide the direction of information flow, which may provide additional information for the diagnosis of brain diseases. However, existing methods either ignore the fact that there is a temporal-lag in the information transmission across brain regions, or simply set the temporal-lag value between all brain regions to a fixed value. To overcome these issues, we design an effective temporal-lag neural network (termed ETLN) to simultaneously infer the causal relationships and the temporal-lag values between brain regions, which can be trained in an end-to-end manner. In addition, we also introduce three mechanisms to better guide the modeling of brain networks. The evaluation results on the Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative (ADNI) database demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method.
summary: Brain network provides important insights for the diagnosis of many brain disorders, and how to effectively model the brain structure has become one of the core issues in the domain of brain imaging analysis. Recently, various computational methods have been proposed to estimate the causal relationship (i.e., effective connectivity) between brain regions. Compared with traditional correlation-based methods, effective connectivity can provide the direction of information flow, which may provide additional information for the diagnosis of brain diseases. However, existing methods either ignore the fact that there is a temporal-lag in the information transmission across brain regions, or simply set the temporal-lag value between all brain regions to a fixed value. To overcome these issues, we design an effective temporal-lag neural network (termed ETLN) to simultaneously infer the causal relationships and the temporal-lag values between brain regions, which can be trained in an end-to-end manner. In addition, we also introduce three mechanisms to better guide the modeling of brain networks. The evaluation results on the Alzheimer's Disease Neuroimaging Initiative (ADNI) database demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 脑网络为许多脑部疾病的诊断提供了重要的见解，如何有效地建模脑结构已成为脑成像分析领域的核心问题之一。最近，人们提出了各种计算方法来估计大脑区域之间的因果关系（即有效连接性）。与传统的基于相关性的方法相比，有效的连接可以提供信息流的方向，这可能为脑部疾病的诊断提供额外的信息。然而，现有的方法要么忽略了跨大脑区域的信息传输存在时间滞后的事实，要么简单地将所有大脑区域之间的时间滞后值设置为固定值。为了克服这些问题，我们设计了一种有效的时间滞后神经网络（称为 ETLN）来同时推断大脑区域之间的因果关系和时间滞后值，并且可以以端到端的方式进行训练。此外，我们还引入了三种机制来更好地指导大脑网络的建模。阿尔茨海默病神经影像倡议（ADNI）数据库的评估结果证明了该方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结构引导的有效性和时滞连接网络（ETLN），用于揭示脑部疾病的机制，通过同时建模脑区间的因果关系及时滞值来改进脑网络分析。
AI.motivation: 现有方法或忽略脑区信息传递的时滞特性，或简单使用固定时滞值，无法准确反映脑网络动态特性，影响脑疾病诊断效果。
AI.method: 设计端到端训练的ETLN网络，同时推断脑区间因果关系及时滞值，并引入三种机制优化脑网络建模。
AI.result: 在ADNI数据库上的实验验证了该方法在阿尔茨海默病诊断中的有效性，优于传统相关性方法及现有因果推断模型。
AI.conclusion: ETLN通过融合有效连接与时滞建模，为脑部疾病机制解析提供了新思路，推动了脑网络分析方法的发展。
