authors_text: Korbinian Randl,Núria Lladós Armengol,Lena Mondrejevski,Ioanna Miliou
title: Early prediction of the risk of ICU mortality with Deep Federated Learning
title_zh: 利用深度联合学习早期预测 ICU 死亡风险
abstract: Intensive Care Units usually carry patients with a serious risk of mortality. Recent research has shown the ability of Machine Learning to indicate the patients' mortality risk and point physicians toward individuals with a heightened need for care. Nevertheless, healthcare data is often subject to privacy regulations and can therefore not be easily shared in order to build Centralized Machine Learning models that use the combined data of multiple hospitals. Federated Learning is a Machine Learning framework designed for data privacy that can be used to circumvent this problem. In this study, we evaluate the ability of deep Federated Learning to predict the risk of Intensive Care Unit mortality at an early stage. We compare the predictive performance of Federated, Centralized, and Local Machine Learning in terms of AUPRC, F1-score, and AUROC. Our results show that Federated Learning performs equally well as the centralized approach and is substantially better than the local approach, thus providing a viable solution for early Intensive Care Unit mortality prediction. In addition, we show that the prediction performance is higher when the patient history window is closer to discharge or death. Finally, we show that using the F1-score as an early stopping metric can stabilize and increase the performance of our approach for the task at hand.
summary: Intensive Care Units usually carry patients with a serious risk of mortality. Recent research has shown the ability of Machine Learning to indicate the patients' mortality risk and point physicians toward individuals with a heightened need for care. Nevertheless, healthcare data is often subject to privacy regulations and can therefore not be easily shared in order to build Centralized Machine Learning models that use the combined data of multiple hospitals. Federated Learning is a Machine Learning framework designed for data privacy that can be used to circumvent this problem. In this study, we evaluate the ability of deep Federated Learning to predict the risk of Intensive Care Unit mortality at an early stage. We compare the predictive performance of Federated, Centralized, and Local Machine Learning in terms of AUPRC, F1-score, and AUROC. Our results show that Federated Learning performs equally well as the centralized approach and is substantially better than the local approach, thus providing a viable solution for early Intensive Care Unit mortality prediction. In addition, we show that the prediction performance is higher when the patient history window is closer to discharge or death. Finally, we show that using the F1-score as an early stopping metric can stabilize and increase the performance of our approach for the task at hand.
abstract_zh: 重症监护病房通常运送有严重死亡风险的患者。最近的研究表明，机器学习能够指示患者的死亡风险，并为医生指明更需要护理的个人。然而，医疗保健数据通常受到隐私法规的约束，因此无法轻松共享以构建使用多个医院的组合数据的集中式机器学习模型。联邦学习是一种专为数据隐私而设计的机器学习框架，可以用来规避这个问题。在这项研究中，我们评估了深度联合学习在早期预测重症监护病房死亡风险的能力。我们根据 AUPRC、F1 分数和 AUROC 比较联合机器学习、集中式机器学习和本地机器学习的预测性能。我们的结果表明，联邦学习的性能与集中式方法相当，并且明显优于本地方法，从而为早期重症监护病房死亡率预测提供了可行的解决方案。此外，我们还发现，当患者病史窗口越接近出院或死亡时，预测性能越高。最后，我们证明使用 F1 分数作为早期停止指标可以稳定并提高我们的方法针对手头任务的性能。

AI.tldr: 本研究评估深度联邦学习在早期预测重症监护病房(ICU)死亡风险中的应用效果。
AI.motivation: 医疗数据因隐私法规难以共享，传统集中式机器学习模型受限，需寻找兼顾隐私与预测性能的解决方案。
AI.method: 比较联邦学习、集中式学习和本地机器学习的预测性能，采用AUPRC、F1分数和AUROC指标，并以F1分数作为早停指标优化模型。
AI.result: 联邦学习性能与集中式方法相当且显著优于本地方法，患者历史窗口接近出院或死亡时预测效果更佳，F1分数早停策略提升模型稳定性。
AI.conclusion: 联邦学习为ICU死亡风险早期预测提供了可行方案，在保障隐私的同时实现高精度预测，F1分数早停策略有效优化模型表现。

search_text: Early prediction of the risk of ICU mortality with Deep Federated Learning 利用深度联合学习早期预测 ICU 死亡风险 Intensive Care Units usually carry patients with a serious risk of mortality. Recent research has shown the ability of Machine Learning to indicate the patients' mortality risk and point physicians toward individuals with a heightened need for care. Nevertheless, healthcare data is often subject to privacy regulations and can therefore not be easily shared in order to build Centralized Machine Learning models that use the combined data of multiple hospitals. Federated Learning is a Machine Learning framework designed for data privacy that can be used to circumvent this problem. In this study, we evaluate the ability of deep Federated Learning to predict the risk of Intensive Care Unit mortality at an early stage. We compare the predictive performance of Federated, Centralized, and Local Machine Learning in terms of AUPRC, F1-score, and AUROC. Our results show that Federated Learning performs equally well as the centralized approach and is substantially better than the local approach, thus providing a viable solution for early Intensive Care Unit mortality prediction. In addition, we show that the prediction performance is higher when the patient history window is closer to discharge or death. Finally, we show that using the F1-score as an early stopping metric can stabilize and increase the performance of our approach for the task at hand. 重症监护病房通常运送有严重死亡风险的患者。最近的研究表明，机器学习能够指示患者的死亡风险，并为医生指明更需要护理的个人。然而，医疗保健数据通常受到隐私法规的约束，因此无法轻松共享以构建使用多个医院的组合数据的集中式机器学习模型。联邦学习是一种专为数据隐私而设计的机器学习框架，可以用来规避这个问题。在这项研究中，我们评估了深度联合学习在早期预测重症监护病房死亡风险的能力。我们根据 AUPRC、F1 分数和 AUROC 比较联合机器学习、集中式机器学习和本地机器学习的预测性能。我们的结果表明，联邦学习的性能与集中式方法相当，并且明显优于本地方法，从而为早期重症监护病房死亡率预测提供了可行的解决方案。此外，我们还发现，当患者病史窗口越接近出院或死亡时，预测性能越高。最后，我们证明使用 F1 分数作为早期停止指标可以稳定并提高我们的方法针对手头任务的性能。 本研究评估深度联邦学习在早期预测重症监护病房(ICU)死亡风险中的应用效果。 Korbinian Randl,Núria Lladós Armengol,Lena Mondrejevski,Ioanna Miliou cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Hongrui Zheng,Zirui Zang,Shuo Yang,Rahul Mangharam
title: Towards Explainability in Modular Autonomous Vehicle Software
title_zh: 模块化自动驾驶汽车软件的可解释性
abstract: Safety-critical Autonomous Systems require trustworthy and transparent decision-making process to be deployable in the real world. The advancement of Machine Learning introduces high performance but largely through black-box algorithms. We focus the discussion of explainability specifically with Autonomous Vehicles (AVs). As a safety-critical system, AVs provide the unique opportunity to utilize cutting-edge Machine Learning techniques while requiring transparency in decision making. Interpretability in every action the AV takes becomes crucial in post-hoc analysis where blame assignment might be necessary. In this paper, we provide positioning on how researchers could consider incorporating explainability and interpretability into design and optimization of separate Autonomous Vehicle modules including Perception, Planning, and Control.
summary: Safety-critical Autonomous Systems require trustworthy and transparent decision-making process to be deployable in the real world. The advancement of Machine Learning introduces high performance but largely through black-box algorithms. We focus the discussion of explainability specifically with Autonomous Vehicles (AVs). As a safety-critical system, AVs provide the unique opportunity to utilize cutting-edge Machine Learning techniques while requiring transparency in decision making. Interpretability in every action the AV takes becomes crucial in post-hoc analysis where blame assignment might be necessary. In this paper, we provide positioning on how researchers could consider incorporating explainability and interpretability into design and optimization of separate Autonomous Vehicle modules including Perception, Planning, and Control.
abstract_zh: 安全关键型自主系统需要可靠且透明的决策过程才能在现实世界中部署。机器学习的进步带来了高性能，但主要是通过黑盒算法实现的。我们重点讨论自动驾驶汽车 (AV) 的可解释性。作为一个安全关键系统，自动驾驶汽车提供了利用尖端机器学习技术的独特机会，同时要求决策透明。 AV 采取的每项行动的可解释性在事后分析中变得至关重要，因为可能需要进行责任分配。在本文中，我们提出了研究人员如何考虑将可解释性和可解释性纳入单独的自动驾驶汽车模块（包括感知、规划和控制）的设计和优化中的定位。

AI.tldr: 探讨如何在自动驾驶车辆的模块化软件中融入可解释性与可解释性，以提升系统透明度与安全性。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶系统需兼顾高性能与透明度，以确保安全性和责任追溯，而现有机器学习模型的黑箱特性阻碍了这一目标。
AI.method: 通过分析各模块（感知、规划、控制）的特性，提出在设计阶段集成解释性机制的框架与优化策略。
AI.result: 提出了一种模块化集成可解释性机制的框架，为自动驾驶系统的透明化设计提供理论指导。
AI.conclusion: 可解释性是自动驾驶系统可信部署的关键，需在各模块设计中优先考虑，并推动跨学科方法研究。

authors_text: Bin Liu,Jin Wang,Kaiwei Sun,Grigorios Tsoumakas
title: Fine-Grained Selective Similarity Integration for Drug-Target Interaction Prediction
title_zh: 用于药物-靶点相互作用预测的细粒度选择性相似性整合
abstract: The discovery of drug-target interactions (DTIs) is a pivotal process in pharmaceutical development. Computational approaches are a promising and efficient alternative to tedious and costly wet-lab experiments for predicting novel DTIs from numerous candidates. Recently, with the availability of abundant heterogeneous biological information from diverse data sources, computational methods have been able to leverage multiple drug and target similarities to boost the performance of DTI prediction. Similarity integration is an effective and flexible strategy to extract crucial information across complementary similarity views, providing a compressed input for any similarity-based DTI prediction model. However, existing similarity integration methods filter and fuse similarities from a global perspective, neglecting the utility of similarity views for each drug and target. In this study, we propose a Fine-Grained Selective similarity integration approach, called FGS, which employs a local interaction consistency-based weight matrix to capture and exploit the importance of similarities at a finer granularity in both similarity selection and combination steps. We evaluate FGS on five DTI prediction datasets under various prediction settings. Experimental results show that our method not only outperforms similarity integration competitors with comparable computational costs, but also achieves better prediction performance than state-of-the-art DTI prediction approaches by collaborating with conventional base models. Furthermore, case studies on the analysis of similarity weights and on the verification of novel predictions confirm the practical ability of FGS.
summary: The discovery of drug-target interactions (DTIs) is a pivotal process in pharmaceutical development. Computational approaches are a promising and efficient alternative to tedious and costly wet-lab experiments for predicting novel DTIs from numerous candidates. Recently, with the availability of abundant heterogeneous biological information from diverse data sources, computational methods have been able to leverage multiple drug and target similarities to boost the performance of DTI prediction. Similarity integration is an effective and flexible strategy to extract crucial information across complementary similarity views, providing a compressed input for any similarity-based DTI prediction model. However, existing similarity integration methods filter and fuse similarities from a global perspective, neglecting the utility of similarity views for each drug and target. In this study, we propose a Fine-Grained Selective similarity integration approach, called FGS, which employs a local interaction consistency-based weight matrix to capture and exploit the importance of similarities at a finer granularity in both similarity selection and combination steps. We evaluate FGS on five DTI prediction datasets under various prediction settings. Experimental results show that our method not only outperforms similarity integration competitors with comparable computational costs, but also achieves better prediction performance than state-of-the-art DTI prediction approaches by collaborating with conventional base models. Furthermore, case studies on the analysis of similarity weights and on the verification of novel predictions confirm the practical ability of FGS.
abstract_zh: 药物-靶点相互作用（DTI）的发现是药物开发的关键过程。计算方法是一种有前途且有效的替代方案，可替代繁琐且昂贵的湿实验室实验，用于预测来自众多候选物的新型 DTI。最近，随着来自不同数据源的丰富异质生物信息的可用性，计算方法已经能够利用多种药物和靶标的相似性来提高 DTI 预测的性能。相似性集成是一种有效且灵活的策略，可跨互补相似性视图提取关键信息，为任何基于相似性的 DTI 预测模型提供压缩输入。然而，现有的相似性整合方法从全局角度过滤和融合相似性，忽略了每种药物和靶标的相似性视图的效用。在本研究中，我们提出了一种细粒度选择性相似性集成方法，称为 FGS，它采用基于局部交互一致性的权重矩阵来捕获和利用相似性选择和组合步骤中更细粒度的相似性的重要性。我们在不同预测设置下的五个 DTI 预测数据集上评估 FGS。实验结果表明，我们的方法不仅在计算成本相当的情况下优于相似性集成竞争对手，而且通过与传统基础模型协作，比最先进的 DTI 预测方法获得了更好的预测性能。此外，相似权重分析和新颖预测验证的案例研究证实了 FGS 的实用能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种细粒度选择性相似性集成方法FGS，用于提升药物-靶点相互作用预测的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有相似性集成方法从全局视角筛选融合相似性，忽视了不同药物和靶点对相似性视图的差异化需求，导致信息利用不充分。
AI.method: 设计基于局部交互一致性的权重矩阵，在相似性选择和组合阶段实现细粒度的重要性捕捉与利用。
AI.result: 在五个数据集上实验表明，FGS在计算成本可比的前提下优于相似性集成方法，并通过与传统基模型协作取得优于最先进方法的预测性能。
AI.conclusion: FGS通过细粒度相似性集成有效提升了药物-靶点相互作用预测能力，案例研究验证了其实际应用价值。

method: 设计基于局部交互一致性的权重矩阵，在相似性选择和组合阶段实现细粒度的重要性捕捉与利用。
result: 在五个数据集上实验表明，FGS在计算成本可比的前提下优于相似性集成方法，并通过与传统基模型协作取得优于最先进方法的预测性能。
conclusion: FGS通过细粒度相似性集成有效提升了药物-靶点相互作用预测能力，案例研究验证了其实际应用价值。
search_text: Fine-Grained Selective Similarity Integration for Drug-Target Interaction Prediction 用于药物-靶点相互作用预测的细粒度选择性相似性整合 The discovery of drug-target interactions (DTIs) is a pivotal process in pharmaceutical development. Computational approaches are a promising and efficient alternative to tedious and costly wet-lab experiments for predicting novel DTIs from numerous candidates. Recently, with the availability of abundant heterogeneous biological information from diverse data sources, computational methods have been able to leverage multiple drug and target similarities to boost the performance of DTI prediction. Similarity integration is an effective and flexible strategy to extract crucial information across complementary similarity views, providing a compressed input for any similarity-based DTI prediction model. However, existing similarity integration methods filter and fuse similarities from a global perspective, neglecting the utility of similarity views for each drug and target. In this study, we propose a Fine-Grained Selective similarity integration approach, called FGS, which employs a local interaction consistency-based weight matrix to capture and exploit the importance of similarities at a finer granularity in both similarity selection and combination steps. We evaluate FGS on five DTI prediction datasets under various prediction settings. Experimental results show that our method not only outperforms similarity integration competitors with comparable computational costs, but also achieves better prediction performance than state-of-the-art DTI prediction approaches by collaborating with conventional base models. Furthermore, case studies on the analysis of similarity weights and on the verification of novel predictions confirm the practical ability of FGS. 药物-靶点相互作用（DTI）的发现是药物开发的关键过程。计算方法是一种有前途且有效的替代方案，可替代繁琐且昂贵的湿实验室实验，用于预测来自众多候选物的新型 DTI。最近，随着来自不同数据源的丰富异质生物信息的可用性，计算方法已经能够利用多种药物和靶标的相似性来提高 DTI 预测的性能。相似性集成是一种有效且灵活的策略，可跨互补相似性视图提取关键信息，为任何基于相似性的 DTI 预测模型提供压缩输入。然而，现有的相似性整合方法从全局角度过滤和融合相似性，忽略了每种药物和靶标的相似性视图的效用。在本研究中，我们提出了一种细粒度选择性相似性集成方法，称为 FGS，它采用基于局部交互一致性的权重矩阵来捕获和利用相似性选择和组合步骤中更细粒度的相似性的重要性。我们在不同预测设置下的五个 DTI 预测数据集上评估 FGS。实验结果表明，我们的方法不仅在计算成本相当的情况下优于相似性集成竞争对手，而且通过与传统基础模型协作，比最先进的 DTI 预测方法获得了更好的预测性能。此外，相似权重分析和新颖预测验证的案例研究证实了 FGS 的实用能力。 本文提出一种细粒度选择性相似性集成方法FGS，用于提升药物-靶点相互作用预测的性能。 Bin Liu,Jin Wang,Kaiwei Sun,Grigorios Tsoumakas cs.AI

authors_text: Taylor Howell,Nimrod Gileadi,Saran Tunyasuvunakool,Kevin Zakka,Tom Erez,Yuval Tassa
title: Predictive Sampling: Real-time Behaviour Synthesis with MuJoCo
title_zh: 预测采样：使用 MuJoCo 进行实时行为合成
abstract: We introduce MuJoCo MPC (MJPC), an open-source, interactive application and software framework for real-time predictive control, based on MuJoCo physics. MJPC allows the user to easily author and solve complex robotics tasks, and currently supports three shooting-based planners: derivative-based iLQG and Gradient Descent, and a simple derivative-free method we call Predictive Sampling. Predictive Sampling was designed as an elementary baseline, mostly for its pedagogical value, but turned out to be surprisingly competitive with the more established algorithms. This work does not present algorithmic advances, and instead, prioritises performant algorithms, simple code, and accessibility of model-based methods via intuitive and interactive software. MJPC is available at: github.com/deepmind/mujoco_mpc, a video summary can be viewed at: dpmd.ai/mjpc.
summary: We introduce MuJoCo MPC (MJPC), an open-source, interactive application and software framework for real-time predictive control, based on MuJoCo physics. MJPC allows the user to easily author and solve complex robotics tasks, and currently supports three shooting-based planners: derivative-based iLQG and Gradient Descent, and a simple derivative-free method we call Predictive Sampling. Predictive Sampling was designed as an elementary baseline, mostly for its pedagogical value, but turned out to be surprisingly competitive with the more established algorithms. This work does not present algorithmic advances, and instead, prioritises performant algorithms, simple code, and accessibility of model-based methods via intuitive and interactive software. MJPC is available at: github.com/deepmind/mujoco_mpc, a video summary can be viewed at: dpmd.ai/mjpc.
abstract_zh: 我们介绍 MuJoCo MPC (MJPC)，这是一种基于 MuJoCo 物理原理的实时预测控制的开源交互式应用程序和软件框架。 MJPC 允许用户轻松编写和解决复杂的机器人任务，目前支持三种基于射击的规划器：基于导数的 iLQG 和梯度下降，以及我们称为预测采样的简单无导数方法。预测采样被设计为基本基线，主要是因为它的教学价值，但事实证明它与更成熟的算法相比具有令人惊讶的竞争力。这项工作并没有呈现算法的进步，而是优先考虑高性能算法、简单的代码以及通过直观和交互式软件实现基于模型的方法的可访问性。 MJPC 位于：github.com/deepmind/mujoco_mpc，视频摘要可在以下位置观看：dpmd.ai/mjpc。

AI.tldr: 介绍基于MuJoCo的实时预测控制框架MJPC，支持多种规划算法，重点展示预测采样的有效性。
AI.motivation: 为实时机器人控制提供直观易用的软件框架，推广基于模型的方法，并验证预测采样作为基础算法的竞争力。
AI.method: 开发了三种基于射击法的规划器，包括iLQG、梯度下降和预测采样，其中预测采样作为无导数方法被提出并验证其性能。
AI.result: 预测采样方法在性能上出乎意料地接近传统算法，同时框架因代码简洁和易用性而提升模型预测控制的可访问性。
AI.conclusion: 通过MJPC框架降低了模型预测控制的使用门槛，证明了预测采样作为简单有效方法的潜力，推动了实时机器人任务的开发。

authors_text: Rahul Sharma,Shrikanth Narayanan
title: Audio-Visual Activity Guided Cross-Modal Identity Association for Active Speaker Detection
title_zh: 用于主动说话者检测的视听活动引导的跨模式身份关联
abstract: Active speaker detection in videos addresses associating a source face, visible in the video frames, with the underlying speech in the audio modality. The two primary sources of information to derive such a speech-face relationship are i) visual activity and its interaction with the speech signal and ii) co-occurrences of speakers' identities across modalities in the form of face and speech. The two approaches have their limitations: the audio-visual activity models get confused with other frequently occurring vocal activities, such as laughing and chewing, while the speakers' identity-based methods are limited to videos having enough disambiguating information to establish a speech-face association. Since the two approaches are independent, we investigate their complementary nature in this work. We propose a novel unsupervised framework to guide the speakers' cross-modal identity association with the audio-visual activity for active speaker detection. Through experiments on entertainment media videos from two benchmark datasets, the AVA active speaker (movies) and Visual Person Clustering Dataset (TV shows), we show that a simple late fusion of the two approaches enhances the active speaker detection performance.
summary: Active speaker detection in videos addresses associating a source face, visible in the video frames, with the underlying speech in the audio modality. The two primary sources of information to derive such a speech-face relationship are i) visual activity and its interaction with the speech signal and ii) co-occurrences of speakers' identities across modalities in the form of face and speech. The two approaches have their limitations: the audio-visual activity models get confused with other frequently occurring vocal activities, such as laughing and chewing, while the speakers' identity-based methods are limited to videos having enough disambiguating information to establish a speech-face association. Since the two approaches are independent, we investigate their complementary nature in this work. We propose a novel unsupervised framework to guide the speakers' cross-modal identity association with the audio-visual activity for active speaker detection. Through experiments on entertainment media videos from two benchmark datasets, the AVA active speaker (movies) and Visual Person Clustering Dataset (TV shows), we show that a simple late fusion of the two approaches enhances the active speaker detection performance.
abstract_zh: 视频中的主动说话者检测解决了将视频帧中可见的源面部与音频模态中的底层语音相关联的问题。导出这种语音-面部关系的两个主要信息源是 i) 视觉活动及其与语音信号的交互，以及 ii) 说话者身份以面部和语音形式跨模态的共现。这两种方法都有其局限性：视听活动模型与其他经常发生的声音活动（例如笑和咀嚼）相混淆，而说话者基于身份的方法仅限于具有足够的消歧信息来建立语音-面部关联的视频。由于这两种方法是独立的，我们在这项工作中研究了它们的互补性。我们提出了一种新颖的无监督框架来指导说话者的跨模式身份关联与视听活动，以进行主动说话者检测。通过对来自两个基准数据集（AVA 主动说话者（电影）和视觉人物聚类数据集（电视节目））的娱乐媒体视频进行实验，我们表明，两种方法的简单后期融合可以增强主动说话者检测性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合视听活动与跨模态身份关联的无监督框架，用于提升主动说话人检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法或因混淆非语音音频活动（如笑声）而失效，或因缺乏身份区分信息而受限，需探索两者互补性。
AI.method: 设计无监督框架，利用视听活动引导跨模态身份关联，通过简单晚期融合结合两种方法优势。
AI.result: 在AVA和VPC数据集上实验表明，融合方法显著提升主动说话人检测准确率。
AI.conclusion: 视听活动与身份关联具有互补性，联合建模可有效提升跨模态说话人检测性能。

authors_text: Liyu Shi,Xiaoyan Li,Weiming Hu,Haoyuan Chen,Jing Chen,Zizhen Fan,Minghe Gao,Yujie Jing,Guotao Lu,Deguo Ma,Zhiyu Ma,Qingtao Meng,Dechao Tang,Hongzan Sun,Marcin Grzegorzek,Shouliang Qi,Yueyang Teng,Chen Li
title: EBHI-Seg: A Novel Enteroscope Biopsy Histopathological Haematoxylin and Eosin Image Dataset for Image Segmentation Tasks
title_zh: EBHI-Seg：用于图像分割任务的新型肠镜活检组织病理学苏木精和伊红图像数据集
abstract: Background and Purpose: Colorectal cancer is a common fatal malignancy, the fourth most common cancer in men, and the third most common cancer in women worldwide. Timely detection of cancer in its early stages is essential for treating the disease. Currently, there is a lack of datasets for histopathological image segmentation of rectal cancer, which often hampers the assessment accuracy when computer technology is used to aid in diagnosis. Methods: This present study provided a new publicly available Enteroscope Biopsy Histopathological Hematoxylin and Eosin Image Dataset for Image Segmentation Tasks (EBHI-Seg). To demonstrate the validity and extensiveness of EBHI-Seg, the experimental results for EBHI-Seg are evaluated using classical machine learning methods and deep learning methods. Results: The experimental results showed that deep learning methods had a better image segmentation performance when utilizing EBHI-Seg. The maximum accuracy of the Dice evaluation metric for the classical machine learning method is 0.948, while the Dice evaluation metric for the deep learning method is 0.965. Conclusion: This publicly available dataset contained 5,170 images of six types of tumor differentiation stages and the corresponding ground truth images. The dataset can provide researchers with new segmentation algorithms for medical diagnosis of colorectal cancer, which can be used in the clinical setting to help doctors and patients.

Results: The experimental results showed that deep learning methods had a better image segmentation performance when utilizing EBHI-Seg. The maximum accuracy of the Dice evaluation metric for the classical machine learning method is 0.948, while the Dice evaluation metric for the deep learning method is 0.965. Conclusion: This publicly available dataset contained 5,170 images of six types of tumor differentiation stages and the corresponding ground truth images. The dataset can provide researchers with new segmentation algorithms for medical diagnosis of colorectal cancer, which can be used in the clinical setting to help doctors and patients.
abstract_zh: 背景和目的：结直肠癌是一种常见的致命恶性肿瘤，是全球男性第四大常见癌症、女性第三大常见癌症。在早期阶段及时发现癌症对于治疗该疾病至关重要。目前，缺乏直肠癌组织病理学图像分割数据集，这往往会影响计算机技术辅助诊断时评估的准确性。方法：本研究提供了一个新的公开可用的肠镜活检组织病理学苏木精和曙红图像数据集，用于图像分割任务（EBHI-Seg）。为了证明 EBHI-Seg 的有效性和广泛性，使用经典机器学习方法和深度学习方法对 EBHI-Seg 的实验结果进行了评估。结果：实验结果表明，深度学习方法在利用 EBHI-Seg 时具有更好的图像分割性能。经典机器学习方法的Dice评估指标的最大准确度为0.948，而深度学习方法的Dice评估指标的最大准确度为0.965。结论：该公开数据集包含六种肿瘤分化阶段的 5,170 张图像以及相应的地面真实图像。该数据集可以为研究人员提供用于结直肠癌医学诊断的新分割算法，可用于临床环境以帮助医生和患者。

AI.motivation: 当前缺乏用于直肠癌组织病理学图像分割的数据集，限制了计算机辅助诊断的准确性，亟需公开数据集推动算法发展。

AI.result: 深度学习方法在Dice评估指标上达到0.965，显著优于经典机器学习方法的0.948。
AI.conclusion: 该公开数据集为结直肠癌医学诊断的分割算法研究提供了新资源，可助力临床医生和患者诊疗。

search_text: EBHI-Seg: A Novel Enteroscope Biopsy Histopathological Haematoxylin and Eosin Image Dataset for Image Segmentation Tasks EBHI-Seg：用于图像分割任务的新型肠镜活检组织病理学苏木精和伊红图像数据集 Background and Purpose: Colorectal cancer is a common fatal malignancy, the fourth most common cancer in men, and the third most common cancer in women worldwide. Timely detection of cancer in its early stages is essential for treating the disease. Currently, there is a lack of datasets for histopathological image segmentation of rectal cancer, which often hampers the assessment accuracy when computer technology is used to aid in diagnosis. Methods: This present study provided a new publicly available Enteroscope Biopsy Histopathological Hematoxylin and Eosin Image Dataset for Image Segmentation Tasks (EBHI-Seg). To demonstrate the validity and extensiveness of EBHI-Seg, the experimental results for EBHI-Seg are evaluated using classical machine learning methods and deep learning methods. Results: The experimental results showed that deep learning methods had a better image segmentation performance when utilizing EBHI-Seg. The maximum accuracy of the Dice evaluation metric for the classical machine learning method is 0.948, while the Dice evaluation metric for the deep learning method is 0.965. Conclusion: This publicly available dataset contained 5,170 images of six types of tumor differentiation stages and the corresponding ground truth images. The dataset can provide researchers with new segmentation algorithms for medical diagnosis of colorectal cancer, which can be used in the clinical setting to help doctors and patients. 背景和目的：结直肠癌是一种常见的致命恶性肿瘤，是全球男性第四大常见癌症、女性第三大常见癌症。在早期阶段及时发现癌症对于治疗该疾病至关重要。目前，缺乏直肠癌组织病理学图像分割数据集，这往往会影响计算机技术辅助诊断时评估的准确性。方法：本研究提供了一个新的公开可用的肠镜活检组织病理学苏木精和曙红图像数据集，用于图像分割任务（EBHI-Seg）。为了证明 EBHI-Seg 的有效性和广泛性，使用经典机器学习方法和深度学习方法对 EBHI-Seg 的实验结果进行了评估。结果：实验结果表明，深度学习方法在利用 EBHI-Seg 时具有更好的图像分割性能。经典机器学习方法的Dice评估指标的最大准确度为0.948，而深度学习方法的Dice评估指标的最大准确度为0.965。结论：该公开数据集包含六种肿瘤分化阶段的 5,170 张图像以及相应的地面真实图像。该数据集可以为研究人员提供用于结直肠癌医学诊断的新分割算法，可用于临床环境以帮助医生和患者。 本文提出一种新的肠镜活检组织病理学苏木精和伊红图像数据集EBHI-Seg，并评估其在图像分割任务中的有效性。 Liyu Shi,Xiaoyan Li,Weiming Hu,Haoyuan Chen,Jing Chen,Zizhen Fan,Minghe Gao,Yujie Jing,Guotao Lu,Deguo Ma,Zhiyu Ma,Qingtao Meng,Dechao Tang,Hongzan Sun,Marcin Grzegorzek,Shouliang Qi,Yueyang Teng,Chen Li eess.IV,cs.CV

authors_text: Basak Sakcak,Vadim Weinstein,Steven M. LaValle
title: The Limits of Learning and Planning: Minimal Sufficient Information Transition Systems
title_zh: 学习和规划的局限性：最小的充分信息转换系统
abstract: In this paper, we view a policy or plan as a transition system over a space of information states that reflect a robot's or other observer's perspective based on limited sensing, memory, computation, and actuation. Regardless of whether policies are obtained by learning algorithms, planning algorithms, or human insight, we want to know the limits of feasibility for given robot hardware and tasks. Toward the quest to find the best policies, we establish in a general setting that minimal information transition systems (ITSs) exist up to reasonable equivalence assumptions, and are unique under some general conditions. We then apply the theory to generate new insights into several problems, including optimal sensor fusion/filtering, solving basic planning tasks, and finding minimal representations for feasible policies.
summary: In this paper, we view a policy or plan as a transition system over a space of information states that reflect a robot's or other observer's perspective based on limited sensing, memory, computation, and actuation. Regardless of whether policies are obtained by learning algorithms, planning algorithms, or human insight, we want to know the limits of feasibility for given robot hardware and tasks. Toward the quest to find the best policies, we establish in a general setting that minimal information transition systems (ITSs) exist up to reasonable equivalence assumptions, and are unique under some general conditions. We then apply the theory to generate new insights into several problems, including optimal sensor fusion/filtering, solving basic planning tasks, and finding minimal representations for feasible policies.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们将策略或计划视为信息状态空间上的过渡系统，该系统基于有限的感知、记忆、计算和驱动反映了机器人或其他观察者的视角。无论策略是通过学习算法、规划算法还是人类洞察获得的，我们都想知道给定机器人硬件和任务的可行性极限。为了寻求最佳策略，我们在一般环境中建立了最小信息转换系统（ITS）在合理的等价假设下存在，并且在某些一般条件下是唯一的。然后，我们应用该理论对几个问题产生新的见解，包括最佳传感器融合/过滤、解决基本规划任务以及找到可行策略的最小表示。

AI.tldr: 本文研究在有限感知、记忆、计算和执行条件下，机器人策略或计划的可行性极限，并建立最小充分信息转移系统（ITS）的理论框架。
AI.motivation: 确定机器人硬件和任务限制下策略的可行性边界，寻找最优策略的理论基础，并解决传感器融合、规划等实际问题。
AI.method: 通过构建信息状态转移系统理论，证明在合理等价假设下最小ITS存在且在一般条件下唯一，进而应用于具体问题分析。
AI.result: 确立最小ITS的通用存在性与唯一性，揭示传感器融合、基本规划任务及策略表示的最小信息需求。
AI.conclusion: 理论为策略优化提供基础，表明信息效率是规划与学习的核心限制因素，未来需探索更高效的ITS应用方法。

authors_text: Fangye Wang,Yingxu Wang,Dongsheng Li,Hansu Gu,Tun Lu,Peng Zhang,Ning Gu
title: CL4CTR: A Contrastive Learning Framework for CTR Prediction
title_zh: CL4CTR：CTR 预测的对比学习框架
abstract: Many Click-Through Rate (CTR) prediction works focused on designing advanced architectures to model complex feature interactions but neglected the importance of feature representation learning, e.g., adopting a plain embedding layer for each feature, which results in sub-optimal feature representations and thus inferior CTR prediction performance. For instance, low frequency features, which account for the majority of features in many CTR tasks, are less considered in standard supervised learning settings, leading to sub-optimal feature representations. In this paper, we introduce self-supervised learning to produce high-quality feature representations directly and propose a model-agnostic Contrastive Learning for CTR (CL4CTR) framework consisting of three self-supervised learning signals to regularize the feature representation learning: contrastive loss, feature alignment, and field uniformity. The contrastive module first constructs positive feature pairs by data augmentation and then minimizes the distance between the representations of each positive feature pair by the contrastive loss. The feature alignment constraint forces the representations of features from the same field to be close, and the field uniformity constraint forces the representations of features from different fields to be distant. Extensive experiments verify that CL4CTR achieves the best performance on four datasets and has excellent effectiveness and compatibility with various representative baselines.
summary: Many Click-Through Rate (CTR) prediction works focused on designing advanced architectures to model complex feature interactions but neglected the importance of feature representation learning, e.g., adopting a plain embedding layer for each feature, which results in sub-optimal feature representations and thus inferior CTR prediction performance. For instance, low frequency features, which account for the majority of features in many CTR tasks, are less considered in standard supervised learning settings, leading to sub-optimal feature representations. In this paper, we introduce self-supervised learning to produce high-quality feature representations directly and propose a model-agnostic Contrastive Learning for CTR (CL4CTR) framework consisting of three self-supervised learning signals to regularize the feature representation learning: contrastive loss, feature alignment, and field uniformity. The contrastive module first constructs positive feature pairs by data augmentation and then minimizes the distance between the representations of each positive feature pair by the contrastive loss. The feature alignment constraint forces the representations of features from the same field to be close, and the field uniformity constraint forces the representations of features from different fields to be distant. Extensive experiments verify that CL4CTR achieves the best performance on four datasets and has excellent effectiveness and compatibility with various representative baselines.
abstract_zh: 许多点击率（CTR）预测工作专注于设计先进的架构来模拟复杂的特征交互，但忽略了特征表示学习的重要性，例如，为每个特征采用简单的嵌入层，这会导致特征表示次优，从而导致 CTR 预测性能较差。例如，低频特征在许多 CTR 任务中占大部分特征，但在标准监督学习设置中较少考虑，从而导致特征表示次优。 In this paper, we introduce self-supervised learning to produce high-quality feature representations directly and propose a model-agnostic Contrastive Learning for CTR (CL4CTR) framework consisting of three self-supervised learning signals to regularize the feature representation learning: contrastive loss, feature alignment, and field uniformity. The contrastive module first constructs positive feature pairs by data augmentation and then minimizes the distance between the representations of each positive feature pair by the contrastive loss.特征对齐约束迫使来自同一场的特征的表示靠近，场均匀性约束迫使来自不同场的特征的表示远离。大量的实验验证了CL4CTR在四个数据集上取得了最佳性能，并且与各种代表性基线具有出色的有效性和兼容性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CL4CTR框架，通过对比学习提升点击率预测中的特征表示质量。
AI.motivation: 现有CTR预测方法过度依赖复杂架构而忽视特征表示学习，导致低频特征表示效果差，影响预测性能。
AI.method: 设计包含对比损失、特征对齐和领域均匀性的自监督学习框架，通过数据增强构建正样本对并优化特征表示。
AI.result: 在四个数据集上实现最优预测性能，且与多种基线模型具有良好兼容性。
AI.conclusion: CL4CTR通过自监督学习有效提升特征表示质量，为CTR预测提供通用且高效的解决方案。

search_text: CL4CTR: A Contrastive Learning Framework for CTR Prediction CL4CTR：CTR 预测的对比学习框架 Many Click-Through Rate (CTR) prediction works focused on designing advanced architectures to model complex feature interactions but neglected the importance of feature representation learning, e.g., adopting a plain embedding layer for each feature, which results in sub-optimal feature representations and thus inferior CTR prediction performance. For instance, low frequency features, which account for the majority of features in many CTR tasks, are less considered in standard supervised learning settings, leading to sub-optimal feature representations. In this paper, we introduce self-supervised learning to produce high-quality feature representations directly and propose a model-agnostic Contrastive Learning for CTR (CL4CTR) framework consisting of three self-supervised learning signals to regularize the feature representation learning: contrastive loss, feature alignment, and field uniformity. The contrastive module first constructs positive feature pairs by data augmentation and then minimizes the distance between the representations of each positive feature pair by the contrastive loss. The feature alignment constraint forces the representations of features from the same field to be close, and the field uniformity constraint forces the representations of features from different fields to be distant. Extensive experiments verify that CL4CTR achieves the best performance on four datasets and has excellent effectiveness and compatibility with various representative baselines. 许多点击率（CTR）预测工作专注于设计先进的架构来模拟复杂的特征交互，但忽略了特征表示学习的重要性，例如，为每个特征采用简单的嵌入层，这会导致特征表示次优，从而导致 CTR 预测性能较差。例如，低频特征在许多 CTR 任务中占大部分特征，但在标准监督学习设置中较少考虑，从而导致特征表示次优。 In this paper, we introduce self-supervised learning to produce high-quality feature representations directly and propose a model-agnostic Contrastive Learning for CTR (CL4CTR) framework consisting of three self-supervised learning signals to regularize the feature representation learning: contrastive loss, feature alignment, and field uniformity. The contrastive module first constructs positive feature pairs by data augmentation and then minimizes the distance between the representations of each positive feature pair by the contrastive loss.特征对齐约束迫使来自同一场的特征的表示靠近，场均匀性约束迫使来自不同场的特征的表示远离。大量的实验验证了CL4CTR在四个数据集上取得了最佳性能，并且与各种代表性基线具有出色的有效性和兼容性。 本文提出CL4CTR框架，通过对比学习提升点击率预测中的特征表示质量。 Fangye Wang,Yingxu Wang,Dongsheng Li,Hansu Gu,Tun Lu,Peng Zhang,Ning Gu cs.IR,cs.AI

authors_text: Ilya Kokorin,Alexander Fedorov,Trevor Brown,Vitaly Aksenov
title: Unexpected Scaling in Path Copying Trees
title_zh: 路径复制树中的意外缩放
abstract: Although a wide variety of handcrafted concurrent data structures have been proposed, there is considerable interest in universal approaches (henceforth called Universal Constructions or UCs) for building concurrent data structures. These approaches (semi-)automatically convert a sequential data structure into a concurrent one. The simplest approach uses locks that protect a sequential data structure and allow only one process to access it at a time. The resulting data structures use locks, and hence are blocking. Most work on UCs instead focuses on obtaining non-blocking progress guarantees such as obstruction-freedom, lock-freedom, or wait-freedom. Many non-blocking UCs have appeared. Key examples include the seminal wait-free UC by Herlihy, a NUMA-aware UC by Yi et al., and an efficient UC for large objects by Fatourou et al. We borrow ideas from persistent data structures and multi-version concurrency control (MVCC), most notably path copying, and use them to implement concurrent versions of sequential persistent data structures. Despite our expectation that our data structures would not scale under write-heavy workloads, they scale in practice. We confirm this scaling analytically in our model with private per-process caches.
summary: Although a wide variety of handcrafted concurrent data structures have been proposed, there is considerable interest in universal approaches (henceforth called Universal Constructions or UCs) for building concurrent data structures. These approaches (semi-)automatically convert a sequential data structure into a concurrent one. The simplest approach uses locks that protect a sequential data structure and allow only one process to access it at a time. The resulting data structures use locks, and hence are blocking. Most work on UCs instead focuses on obtaining non-blocking progress guarantees such as obstruction-freedom, lock-freedom, or wait-freedom. Many non-blocking UCs have appeared. Key examples include the seminal wait-free UC by Herlihy, a NUMA-aware UC by Yi et al., and an efficient UC for large objects by Fatourou et al. We borrow ideas from persistent data structures and multi-version concurrency control (MVCC), most notably path copying, and use them to implement concurrent versions of sequential persistent data structures. Despite our expectation that our data structures would not scale under write-heavy workloads, they scale in practice. We confirm this scaling analytically in our model with private per-process caches.
abstract_zh: 尽管已经提出了各种各样的手工并发数据结构，但人们对构建并发数据结构的通用方法（以下称为通用构造或 UC）非常感兴趣。这些方法（半）自动将顺序数据结构转换为并发数据结构。最简单的方法是使用锁来保护顺序数据结构，并且一次只允许一个进程访问它。生成的数据结构使用锁，因此是阻塞的。大多数关于 UC 的工作都侧重于获得非阻塞进度保证，例如无阻塞、无锁或无等待。许多非阻塞UC已经出现。关键示例包括 Herlihy 的开创性无等待 UC、Yi 等人的 NUMA 感知 UC 以及 Fatourou 等人的针对大型对象的高效 UC。我们借鉴持久数据结构和多版本并发控制（MVCC）的思想，尤其是路径复制，并使用它们来实现顺序持久数据结构的并发版本。尽管我们期望我们的数据结构不会在写入繁重的工作负载下扩展，但它们在实践中会扩展。我们通过私有的每进程缓存在我们的模型中分析确认了这种扩展。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于路径复制的并发数据结构实现方法，并发现其在写密集型工作负载下表现出意外的可扩展性。
AI.motivation: 现有通用并发构造方法存在阻塞或复杂性问题，需探索非阻塞且高效的通用方案以应对高并发场景。
AI.method: 结合持久化数据结构与多版本并发控制思想，通过路径复制技术实现顺序数据结构的并发版本，并建立私有进程缓存模型进行分析。
AI.result: 实验与理论分析表明，该方法在写操作密集场景下实现了超预期的可扩展性，突破了传统路径复制技术的性能瓶颈。
AI.conclusion: 路径复制技术结合私有缓存机制可构建高效非阻塞并发结构，为通用并发构造提供了新的研究方向。

authors_text: Luke Hyman,Ivo F. Sbalzarini,Stephen Quake,Ulrik Günther
title: Corvo: Visualizing CellxGene Single-Cell Datasets in Virtual Reality
title_zh: Corvo：在虚拟现实中可视化 CellxGene 单细胞数据集
abstract: The CellxGene project has enabled access to single-cell data in the scientific community, providing tools for browsed-based no-code analysis of more than 500 annotated datasets. However, single-cell data requires dimensional reduction to visualize, and 2D embedding does not take full advantage of three-dimensional human spatial understanding and cognition. Compared to a 2D visualization that could potentially hide gene expression patterns, 3D Virtual Reality may enable researchers to make better use of the information contained within the datasets. For this purpose, we present \emph{Corvo}, a fully free and open-source software tool that takes the visualization and analysis of CellxGene single-cell datasets to 3D Virtual Reality. Similar to CellxGene, Corvo takes a no-code approach for the end user, but also offers multimodal user input to facilitate fast navigation and analysis, and is interoperable with the existing Python data science ecosystem. In this paper, we explain the design goals of Corvo, detail its approach to the Virtual Reality visualization and analysis of single-cell data, and briefly discuss limitations and future extensions.
summary: The CellxGene project has enabled access to single-cell data in the scientific community, providing tools for browsed-based no-code analysis of more than 500 annotated datasets. However, single-cell data requires dimensional reduction to visualize, and 2D embedding does not take full advantage of three-dimensional human spatial understanding and cognition. Compared to a 2D visualization that could potentially hide gene expression patterns, 3D Virtual Reality may enable researchers to make better use of the information contained within the datasets. For this purpose, we present \emph{Corvo}, a fully free and open-source software tool that takes the visualization and analysis of CellxGene single-cell datasets to 3D Virtual Reality. Similar to CellxGene, Corvo takes a no-code approach for the end user, but also offers multimodal user input to facilitate fast navigation and analysis, and is interoperable with the existing Python data science ecosystem. In this paper, we explain the design goals of Corvo, detail its approach to the Virtual Reality visualization and analysis of single-cell data, and briefly discuss limitations and future extensions.
abstract_zh: CellxGene 项目使科学界能够访问单细胞数据，提供对 500 多个带注释的数据集进行基于浏览的无代码分析的工具。然而，单细胞数据需要降维才能可视化，而二维嵌入并没有充分利用三维人类空间理解和认知。与可能隐藏基因表达模式的 2D 可视化相比，3D 虚拟现实可以使研究人员更好地利用数据集中包含的信息。为此，我们推出了 \emph{Corvo}，这是一款完全免费的开源软件工具，可将 CellxGene 单细胞数据集的可视化和分析引入 3D 虚拟现实。与 CellxGene 类似，Corvo 对最终用户采用无代码方法，但也提供多模式用户输入以促进快速导航和分析，并且可与现有的 Python 数据科学生态系统进行互操作。在本文中，我们解释了 Corvo 的设计目标，详细介绍了其虚拟现实可视化和单细胞数据分析的方法，并简要讨论了局限性和未来的扩展。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了Corvo工具，该工具将CellxGene单细胞数据集的可视化扩展到虚拟现实环境。
AI.motivation: 二维可视化可能隐藏基因表达模式，而三维虚拟现实能更充分地利用人类空间认知能力。
AI.method: 开发开源软件Corvo，采用无代码方式结合多模态交互，与Python数据科学生态兼容。
AI.result: 实现了单细胞数据的三维VR可视化，支持快速导航分析，并讨论了工具的局限性与扩展方向。
AI.conclusion: Corvo为单细胞数据分析提供了新的三维视角，但需进一步优化交互体验和数据处理能力。

authors_text: Ta-Wei Tu
title: Subquadratic Weighted Matroid Intersection Under Rank Oracles
title_zh: Rank Oracles 下的次二次加权拟阵交集
abstract: Given two matroids $\mathcal{M}_1 = (V, \mathcal{I}_1)$ and $\mathcal{M}_2 = (V, \mathcal{I}_2)$ over an $n$-element integer-weighted ground set $V$, the weighted matroid intersection problem aims to find a common independent set $S^{*} \in \mathcal{I}_1 \cap \mathcal{I}_2$ maximizing the weight of $S^{*}$. In this paper, we present a simple deterministic algorithm for weighted matroid intersection using $\tilde{O}(nr^{3/4}\log{W})$ rank queries, where $r$ is the size of the largest intersection of $\mathcal{M}_1$ and $\mathcal{M}_2$ and $W$ is the maximum weight. This improves upon the best previously known $\tilde{O}(nr\log{W})$ algorithm given by Lee, Sidford, and Wong [FOCS'15], and is the first subquadratic algorithm for polynomially-bounded weights under the standard independence or rank oracle models. The main contribution of this paper is an efficient algorithm that computes shortest-path trees in weighted exchange graphs.
summary: Given two matroids $\mathcal{M}_1 = (V, \mathcal{I}_1)$ and $\mathcal{M}_2 = (V, \mathcal{I}_2)$ over an $n$-element integer-weighted ground set $V$, the weighted matroid intersection problem aims to find a common independent set $S^{*} \in \mathcal{I}_1 \cap \mathcal{I}_2$ maximizing the weight of $S^{*}$. In this paper, we present a simple deterministic algorithm for weighted matroid intersection using $\tilde{O}(nr^{3/4}\log{W})$ rank queries, where $r$ is the size of the largest intersection of $\mathcal{M}_1$ and $\mathcal{M}_2$ and $W$ is the maximum weight. This improves upon the best previously known $\tilde{O}(nr\log{W})$ algorithm given by Lee, Sidford, and Wong [FOCS'15], and is the first subquadratic algorithm for polynomially-bounded weights under the standard independence or rank oracle models. The main contribution of this paper is an efficient algorithm that computes shortest-path trees in weighted exchange graphs.
abstract_zh: 给定 $\mathcal{M}_1 = (V, \mathcal{I}_1)$ 和 $\mathcal{M}_2 = (V, \mathcal{I}_2)$ 在 $n$ 元素整数加权地面集 $V$ 上，加权拟阵交集问题旨在找到一个公共独立集 $S^{*} \in \mathcal{I}_1 \cap \mathcal{I}_2$最大化$S^{*}$的权重。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用 $\tilde{O}(nr^{3/4}\log{W})$ 排名查询的加权拟阵交集的简单确定性算法，其中 $r$ 是 $\mathcal{M}_1$ 和 $\mathcal{M}_2$ 的最大交集的大小，$W$ 是最大权重。这改进了 Lee、Sidford 和 Wong [FOCS'15] 给出的先前已知的最佳 $\tilde{O}(nr\log{W})$ 算法，并且是标准独立或等级预言模型下多项式有界权重的第一个次二次算法。本文的主要贡献是一种计算加权交换图中最短路径树的有效算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在秩查询模型下解决加权拟阵交问题的次二次时间算法。
AI.motivation: 现有算法在秩查询模型下的时间复杂度为Õ(nr log W)，无法处理大规模数据，需改进算法效率。
AI.method: 设计了一种高效算法，通过计算加权交换图中的最短路径树来优化拟阵交的权重计算。
AI.result: 实现了Õ(nr^(3/4) log W)时间复杂度的算法，首次在多项式权重下达到次二次复杂度。
AI.conclusion: 该算法在标准秩查询模型中突破了传统二次时间复杂度限制，为拟阵交问题提供了更优解决方案。

search_text: Subquadratic Weighted Matroid Intersection Under Rank Oracles Rank Oracles 下的次二次加权拟阵交集 Given two matroids $\mathcal{M}_1 = (V, \mathcal{I}_1)$ and $\mathcal{M}_2 = (V, \mathcal{I}_2)$ over an $n$-element integer-weighted ground set $V$, the weighted matroid intersection problem aims to find a common independent set $S^{*} \in \mathcal{I}_1 \cap \mathcal{I}_2$ maximizing the weight of $S^{*}$. In this paper, we present a simple deterministic algorithm for weighted matroid intersection using $\tilde{O}(nr^{3/4}\log{W})$ rank queries, where $r$ is the size of the largest intersection of $\mathcal{M}_1$ and $\mathcal{M}_2$ and $W$ is the maximum weight. This improves upon the best previously known $\tilde{O}(nr\log{W})$ algorithm given by Lee, Sidford, and Wong [FOCS'15], and is the first subquadratic algorithm for polynomially-bounded weights under the standard independence or rank oracle models. The main contribution of this paper is an efficient algorithm that computes shortest-path trees in weighted exchange graphs. 给定 $\mathcal{M}_1 = (V, \mathcal{I}_1)$ 和 $\mathcal{M}_2 = (V, \mathcal{I}_2)$ 在 $n$ 元素整数加权地面集 $V$ 上，加权拟阵交集问题旨在找到一个公共独立集 $S^{*} \in \mathcal{I}_1 \cap \mathcal{I}_2$最大化$S^{*}$的权重。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用 $\tilde{O}(nr^{3/4}\log{W})$ 排名查询的加权拟阵交集的简单确定性算法，其中 $r$ 是 $\mathcal{M}_1$ 和 $\mathcal{M}_2$ 的最大交集的大小，$W$ 是最大权重。这改进了 Lee、Sidford 和 Wong [FOCS'15] 给出的先前已知的最佳 $\tilde{O}(nr\log{W})$ 算法，并且是标准独立或等级预言模型下多项式有界权重的第一个次二次算法。本文的主要贡献是一种计算加权交换图中最短路径树的有效算法。 本文提出了一种在秩查询模型下解决加权拟阵交问题的次二次时间算法。 Ta-Wei Tu cs.DS

authors_text: Alberto Pozanco,Daniel Borrajo
title: Fairness in Multi-Agent Planning
title_zh: 多智能体规划的公平性
abstract: In cooperative Multi-Agent Planning (MAP), a set of goals has to be achieved by a set of agents. Independently of whether they perform a pre-assignment of goals to agents or they directly search for a solution without any goal assignment, most previous works did not focus on a fair distribution/achievement of goals by agents. This paper adapts well-known fairness schemes to MAP, and introduces two novel approaches to generate cost-aware fair plans. The first one solves an optimization problem to pre-assign goals to agents, and then solves a centralized MAP task using that assignment. The second one consists of a planning-based compilation that allows solving the joint problem of goal assignment and planning while taking into account the given fairness scheme. Empirical results in several standard MAP benchmarks show that these approaches outperform different baselines. They also show that there is no need to sacrifice much plan cost to generate fair plans.
summary: In cooperative Multi-Agent Planning (MAP), a set of goals has to be achieved by a set of agents. Independently of whether they perform a pre-assignment of goals to agents or they directly search for a solution without any goal assignment, most previous works did not focus on a fair distribution/achievement of goals by agents. This paper adapts well-known fairness schemes to MAP, and introduces two novel approaches to generate cost-aware fair plans. The first one solves an optimization problem to pre-assign goals to agents, and then solves a centralized MAP task using that assignment. The second one consists of a planning-based compilation that allows solving the joint problem of goal assignment and planning while taking into account the given fairness scheme. Empirical results in several standard MAP benchmarks show that these approaches outperform different baselines. They also show that there is no need to sacrifice much plan cost to generate fair plans.
abstract_zh: 在协作多智能体规划（MAP）中，一组目标必须由一组智能体实现。无论他们是向智能体预先分配目标，还是在没有任何目标分配的情况下直接搜索解决方案，大多数先前的工作都没有关注智能体的目标的公平分配/实现。本文将众所周知的公平方案应用于 MAP，并介绍了两种新方法来生成成本感知的公平计划。第一个解决优化问题，将目标预先分配给代理，然后使用该分配解决集中式 MAP 任务。第二个包含基于规划的编译，允许解决目标分配和规划的联合问题，同时考虑给定的公平方案。几个标准 MAP 基准的实证结果表明，这些方法优于不同的基线。他们还表明，无需牺牲太多计划成本来生成公平的计划。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在解决多智能体规划中的公平性问题，提出两种方法以实现成本感知的公平计划分配。
AI.motivation: 传统多智能体规划方法忽视了目标分配的公平性，可能导致资源分配不均，影响协作效率。
AI.method: 提出两种方法：一是通过优化问题预分配目标后进行集中式规划；二是基于规划的编译方法，同时处理目标分配与规划，兼顾公平性。
AI.result: 实验表明，两种方法在多个标准基准上优于现有方法，且能保持较低的计划成本。
AI.conclusion: 证明了公平性可有效融入多智能体规划，且无需显著牺牲计划成本。

authors_text: Linbo Luo,Yuanjing Li,Haiyan Yin,Shangwei Xie,Ruimin Hu,Wentong Cai
title: Crowd-level Abnormal Behavior Detection via Multi-scale Motion Consistency Learning
title_zh: 通过多尺度运动一致性学习进行人群级别的异常行为检测
comment: Version with appendix for the AAAI-23 publication
comments: Version with appendix for the AAAI-23 publication
abstract: Detecting abnormal crowd motion emerging from complex interactions of individuals is paramount to ensure the safety of crowds. Crowd-level abnormal behaviors (CABs), e.g., counter flow and crowd turbulence, are proven to be the crucial causes of many crowd disasters. In the recent decade, video anomaly detection (VAD) techniques have achieved remarkable success in detecting individual-level abnormal behaviors (e.g., sudden running, fighting and stealing), but research on VAD for CABs is rather limited. Unlike individual-level anomaly, CABs usually do not exhibit salient difference from the normal behaviors when observed locally, and the scale of CABs could vary from one scenario to another. In this paper, we present a systematic study to tackle the important problem of VAD for CABs with a novel crowd motion learning framework, multi-scale motion consistency network (MSMC-Net). MSMC-Net first captures the spatial and temporal crowd motion consistency information in a graph representation. Then, it simultaneously trains multiple feature graphs constructed at different scales to capture rich crowd patterns. An attention network is used to adaptively fuse the multi-scale features for better CAB detection. For the empirical study, we consider three large-scale crowd event datasets, UMN, Hajj and Love Parade. Experimental results show that MSMC-Net could substantially improve the state-of-the-art performance on all the datasets.
summary: Detecting abnormal crowd motion emerging from complex interactions of individuals is paramount to ensure the safety of crowds. Crowd-level abnormal behaviors (CABs), e.g., counter flow and crowd turbulence, are proven to be the crucial causes of many crowd disasters. In the recent decade, video anomaly detection (VAD) techniques have achieved remarkable success in detecting individual-level abnormal behaviors (e.g., sudden running, fighting and stealing), but research on VAD for CABs is rather limited. Unlike individual-level anomaly, CABs usually do not exhibit salient difference from the normal behaviors when observed locally, and the scale of CABs could vary from one scenario to another. In this paper, we present a systematic study to tackle the important problem of VAD for CABs with a novel crowd motion learning framework, multi-scale motion consistency network (MSMC-Net). MSMC-Net first captures the spatial and temporal crowd motion consistency information in a graph representation. Then, it simultaneously trains multiple feature graphs constructed at different scales to capture rich crowd patterns. An attention network is used to adaptively fuse the multi-scale features for better CAB detection. For the empirical study, we consider three large-scale crowd event datasets, UMN, Hajj and Love Parade. Experimental results show that MSMC-Net could substantially improve the state-of-the-art performance on all the datasets.
abstract_zh: 检测因个人复杂互动而出现的异常人群运动对于确保人群安全至关重要。人群层面的异常行为（CAB），例如逆流和人群湍流，被证明是许多人群灾难的关键原因。 In the recent decade, video anomaly detection (VAD) techniques have achieved remarkable success in detecting individual-level abnormal behaviors (e.g., sudden running, fighting and stealing), but research on VAD for CABs is rather limited.与个体层面的异常不同，CAB 在局部观察时通常不会表现出与正常行为的显着差异，并且 CAB 的规模可能因一种情况而异。在本文中，我们提出了一项系统研究，通过一种新颖的人群运动学习框架——多尺度运动一致性网络（MSMC-Net）来解决 CAB 的 VAD 重要问题。 MSMC-Net 首先以图形表示形式捕获空间和时间人群运动一致性信息。然后，它同时训练在不同尺度构建的多个特征图，以捕获丰富的人群模式。注意力网络用于自适应融合多尺度特征，以实现更好的 CAB 检测。对于实证研究，我们考虑三个大型人群事件数据集：UMN、Hajj 和 Love Parade。实验结果表明，MSMC-Net 可以显着提高所有数据集上的最新性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多尺度运动一致性学习框架（MSMC-Net），用于检测群体层面的异常行为（如逆向流动和人群湍流）。
AI.motivation: 现有视频异常检测技术主要针对个体级异常行为，而群体级异常行为（CABs）因局部特征不明显且尺度变化大，缺乏有效检测方法。
AI.method: 通过图表示捕捉时空运动一致性，构建多尺度特征图并利用注意力网络自适应融合特征，实现对CABs的检测。
AI.result: 在UMN、Hajj和Love Parade三个大规模数据集上，MSMC-Net显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 多尺度运动一致性学习结合注意力机制能有效提升群体异常行为检测性能。

authors_text: Xiaohuan Zhou,Jiaming Wang,Zeyu Cui,Shiliang Zhang,Zhijie Yan,Jingren Zhou,Chang Zhou
title: MMSpeech: Multi-modal Multi-task Encoder-Decoder Pre-training for Speech Recognition
title_zh: MMSpeech：语音识别的多模态多任务编码器-解码器预训练
abstract: In this paper, we propose a novel multi-modal multi-task encoder-decoder pre-training framework (MMSpeech) for Mandarin automatic speech recognition (ASR), which employs both unlabeled speech and text data. The main difficulty in speech-text joint pre-training comes from the significant difference between speech and text modalities, especially for Mandarin speech and text. Unlike English and other languages with an alphabetic writing system, Mandarin uses an ideographic writing system where character and sound are not tightly mapped to one another. Therefore, we propose to introduce the phoneme modality into pre-training, which can help capture modality-invariant information between Mandarin speech and text. Specifically, we employ a multi-task learning framework including five self-supervised and supervised tasks with speech and text data. For end-to-end pre-training, we introduce self-supervised speech-to-pseudo-codes (S2C) and phoneme-to-text (P2T) tasks utilizing unlabeled speech and text data, where speech-pseudo-codes pairs and phoneme-text pairs are a supplement to the supervised speech-text pairs. To train the encoder to learn better speech representation, we introduce self-supervised masked speech prediction (MSP) and supervised phoneme prediction (PP) tasks to learn to map speech into phonemes. Besides, we directly add the downstream supervised speech-to-text (S2T) task into the pre-training process, which can further improve the pre-training performance and achieve better recognition results even without fine-tuning. Experiments on AISHELL-1 show that our proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance, with a more than 40% relative improvement compared with other pre-training methods.

For end-to-end pre-training, we introduce self-supervised speech-to-pseudo-codes (S2C) and phoneme-to-text (P2T) tasks utilizing unlabeled speech and text data, where speech-pseudo-codes pairs and phoneme-text pairs are a supplement to the supervised speech-text pairs. To train the encoder to learn better speech representation, we introduce self-supervised masked speech prediction (MSP) and supervised phoneme prediction (PP) tasks to learn to map speech into phonemes. Besides, we directly add the downstream supervised speech-to-text (S2T) task into the pre-training process, which can further improve the pre-training performance and achieve better recognition results even without fine-tuning. Experiments on AISHELL-1 show that our proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance, with a more than 40% relative improvement compared with other pre-training methods.
abstract_zh: In this paper, we propose a novel multi-modal multi-task encoder-decoder pre-training framework (MMSpeech) for Mandarin automatic speech recognition (ASR), which employs both unlabeled speech and text data. The main difficulty in speech-text joint pre-training comes from the significant difference between speech and text modalities, especially for Mandarin speech and text. Unlike English and other languages with an alphabetic writing system, Mandarin uses an ideographic writing system where character and sound are not tightly mapped to one another. Therefore, we propose to introduce the phoneme modality into pre-training, which can help capture modality-invariant information between Mandarin speech and text.具体来说，我们采用了一个多任务学习框架，包括五个带有语音和文本数据的自监督和监督任务。 For end-to-end pre-training, we introduce self-supervised speech-to-pseudo-codes (S2C) and phoneme-to-text (P2T) tasks utilizing unlabeled speech and text data, where speech-pseudo-codes pairs and phoneme-text pairs are a supplement to the supervised speech-text pairs. To train the encoder to learn better speech representation, we introduce self-supervised masked speech prediction (MSP) and supervised phoneme prediction (PP) tasks to learn to map speech into phonemes. Besides, we directly add the downstream supervised speech-to-text (S2T) task into the pre-training process, which can further improve the pre-training performance and achieve better recognition results even without fine-tuning. Experiments on AISHELL-1 show that our proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance, with a more than 40% relative improvement compared with other pre-training methods.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多模态多任务编码器-解码器预训练框架MMSpeech，用于 Mandarin 自动语音识别（ASR），结合未标注语音和文本数据进行训练。
AI.motivation: 由于 Mandarin 采用意音文字系统，语音与文本的对应关系不紧密，传统联合预训练面临模态差异大的挑战，需引入音素模态以捕捉跨模态不变信息。
AI.method: 设计包含五项任务的多任务学习框架：自监督语音到伪码（S2C）、音素到文本（P2T）、掩码语音预测（MSP）、音素预测（PP）及直接下游语音到文本（S2T）任务，利用未标注数据与监督数据联合训练。
AI.result: 在 AISHELL-1 数据集上，MMSpeech 相比其他预训练方法实现超过40%的相对性能提升，达到当时最优水平。
AI.conclusion: 通过多模态融合与多任务学习结合音素信息，MMSpeech 有效提升了 Mandarin ASR 的预训练效果，无需微调即可获得更优识别结果。

The main difficulty in speech-text joint pre-training comes from the significant difference between speech and text modalities, especially for Mandarin speech and text. Unlike English and other languages with an alphabetic writing system, Mandarin uses an ideographic writing system where character and sound are not tightly mapped to one another. Therefore, we propose to introduce the phoneme modality into pre-training, which can help capture modality-invariant information between Mandarin speech and text. Specifically, we employ a multi-task learning framework including five self-supervised and supervised tasks with speech and text data. For end-to-end pre-training, we introduce self-supervised speech-to-pseudo-codes (S2C) and phoneme-to-text (P2T) tasks utilizing unlabeled speech and text data, where speech-pseudo-codes pairs and phoneme-text pairs are a supplement to the supervised speech-text pairs. Besides, we directly add the downstream supervised speech-to-text (S2T) task into the pre-training process, which can further improve the pre-training performance and achieve better recognition results even without fine-tuning. Experiments on AISHELL-1 show that our proposed method achieves state-of-the-art performance, with a more than 40% relative improvement compared with other pre-training methods. authors_text: Yinhuai Wang,Jiwen Yu,Jian Zhang
title: Zero-Shot Image Restoration Using Denoising Diffusion Null-Space Model
title_zh: 使用去噪扩散零空间模型的零样本图像恢复
abstract: Most existing Image Restoration (IR) models are task-specific, which can not be generalized to different degradation operators. In this work, we propose the Denoising Diffusion Null-Space Model (DDNM), a novel zero-shot framework for arbitrary linear IR problems, including but not limited to image super-resolution, colorization, inpainting, compressed sensing, and deblurring. DDNM only needs a pre-trained off-the-shelf diffusion model as the generative prior, without any extra training or network modifications. By refining only the null-space contents during the reverse diffusion process, we can yield diverse results satisfying both data consistency and realness. We further propose an enhanced and robust version, dubbed DDNM+, to support noisy restoration and improve restoration quality for hard tasks. Our experiments on several IR tasks reveal that DDNM outperforms other state-of-the-art zero-shot IR methods. We also demonstrate that DDNM+ can solve complex real-world applications, e.g., old photo restoration.
summary: Most existing Image Restoration (IR) models are task-specific, which can not be generalized to different degradation operators. In this work, we propose the Denoising Diffusion Null-Space Model (DDNM), a novel zero-shot framework for arbitrary linear IR problems, including but not limited to image super-resolution, colorization, inpainting, compressed sensing, and deblurring. DDNM only needs a pre-trained off-the-shelf diffusion model as the generative prior, without any extra training or network modifications. By refining only the null-space contents during the reverse diffusion process, we can yield diverse results satisfying both data consistency and realness. We further propose an enhanced and robust version, dubbed DDNM+, to support noisy restoration and improve restoration quality for hard tasks. Our experiments on several IR tasks reveal that DDNM outperforms other state-of-the-art zero-shot IR methods. We also demonstrate that DDNM+ can solve complex real-world applications, e.g., old photo restoration.
abstract_zh: 大多数现有的图像恢复（IR）模型都是特定于任务的，不能推广到不同的退化算子。在这项工作中，我们提出了去噪扩散零空间模型（DDNM），这是一种用于任意线性红外问题的新型零样本框架，包括但不限于图像超分辨率、着色、修复、压缩感知和去模糊。 DDNM 只需要一个预训练的现成扩散模型作为生成先验，无需任何额外的训练或网络修改。通过在反向扩散过程中仅细化零空间内容，我们可以得到满足数据一致性和真实性的多样化结果。我们进一步提出了一个增强且强大的版本，称为 DDNM+，以支持噪声恢复并提高困难任务的恢复质量。我们对多个 IR 任务的实验表明，DDNM 优于其他最先进的零样本 IR 方法。我们还证明了 DDNM+ 可以解决复杂的现实应用，例如旧照片修复。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种零样本图像修复框架DDNM，利用去噪扩散空域模型解决多种线性图像修复任务。
AI.motivation: 现有图像修复模型通常针对特定任务设计，难以泛化到不同退化操作，缺乏通用性。
AI.method: 基于预训练扩散模型构建生成先验，通过反向扩散过程中仅优化空域内容实现数据一致性与真实感平衡，并提出增强版DDNM+处理噪声与复杂任务。
AI.result: 在多个修复任务中优于现有零样本方法，且DDNM+能有效处理老照片等真实场景修复。
AI.conclusion: DDNM通过空域优化实现了跨任务泛化能力，为零样本图像修复提供了高效且通用的解决方案。

authors_text: Qiong Chang,Tsutomu Maruyama
title: Real-Time High-Quality Stereo Matching System on a GPU
title_zh: GPU 上的实时高质量立体匹配系统
abstract: In this paper, we propose a low error rate and real-time stereo vision system on GPU. Many stereo vision systems on GPU have been proposed to date. In those systems, the error rates and the processing speed are in trade-off relationship. We propose a real-time stereo vision system on GPU for the high resolution images. This system also maintains a low error rate compared to other fast systems. In our approach, we have implemented the cost aggregation (CA), cross-checking and median filter on GPU in order to realize the real-time processing. Its processing speed is 40 fps for 1436x992 pixels images when the maximum disparity is 145, and its error rate is the lowest among the GPU systems which are faster than 30 fps.
summary: In this paper, we propose a low error rate and real-time stereo vision system on GPU. Many stereo vision systems on GPU have been proposed to date. In those systems, the error rates and the processing speed are in trade-off relationship. We propose a real-time stereo vision system on GPU for the high resolution images. This system also maintains a low error rate compared to other fast systems. In our approach, we have implemented the cost aggregation (CA), cross-checking and median filter on GPU in order to realize the real-time processing. Its processing speed is 40 fps for 1436x992 pixels images when the maximum disparity is 145, and its error rate is the lowest among the GPU systems which are faster than 30 fps.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 GPU 的低错误率实时立体视觉系统。迄今为止，已经提出了许多基于 GPU 的立体视觉系统。在这些系统中，错误率和处理速度处于权衡关系。我们提出了一种基于 GPU 的实时立体视觉系统，用于高分辨率图像。与其他快速系统相比，该系统还保持较低的错误率。在我们的方法中，我们在 GPU 上实现了成本聚合（CA）、交叉检查和中值过滤，以实现实时处理。当最大视差为145时，其对1436x992像素图像的处理速度为40 fps，并且其错误率是高于30 fps的GPU系统中最低的。

AI.tldr: 开发一种在GPU上实现实时高质量立体匹配的系统，解决传统系统中速度与错误率的权衡问题。
AI.motivation: 现有GPU立体视觉系统难以同时实现高处理速度和低错误率，需突破速度与精度的矛盾。
AI.method: 在GPU上实现成本聚合（CA）、交叉验证和中值滤波算法，优化实时处理流程。
AI.result: 处理速度达40fps（1436x992像素，最大视差145），错误率低于其他30fps以上的GPU系统。
AI.conclusion: 通过GPU加速关键算法，在保持低错误率的同时实现高分辨率图像的实时立体匹配。

ai_content.motivation: 现有GPU立体视觉系统难以同时实现高处理速度和低错误率，需突破速度与精度的矛盾。
ai_content.method: 在GPU上实现成本聚合（CA）、交叉验证和中值滤波算法，优化实时处理流程。
ai_content.result: 处理速度达40fps（1436x992像素，最大视差145），错误率低于其他30fps以上的GPU系统。
ai_content.conclusion: 通过GPU加速关键算法，在保持低错误率的同时实现高分辨率图像的实时立体匹配。

search_text: Real-Time High-Quality Stereo Matching System on a GPU GPU 上的实时高质量立体匹配系统 In this paper, we propose a low error rate and real-time stereo vision system on GPU. Many stereo vision systems on GPU have been proposed to date. In those systems, the error rates and the processing speed are in trade-off relationship. We propose a real-time stereo vision system on GPU for the high resolution images. This system also maintains a low error rate compared to other fast systems. In our approach, we have implemented the cost aggregation (CA), cross-checking and median filter on GPU in order to realize the real-time processing. Its processing speed is 40 fps for 1436x992 pixels images when the maximum disparity is 145, and its error rate is the lowest among the GPU systems which are faster than 30 fps. 在本文中，我们提出了一种基于 GPU 的低错误率实时立体视觉系统。迄今为止，已经提出了许多基于 GPU 的立体视觉系统。在这些系统中，错误率和处理速度处于权衡关系。我们提出了一种基于 GPU 的实时立体视觉系统，用于高分辨率图像。与其他快速系统相比，该系统还保持较低的错误率。在我们的方法中，我们在 GPU 上实现了成本聚合（CA）、交叉检查和中值过滤，以实现实时处理。当最大视差为145时，其对1436x992像素图像的处理速度为40 fps，并且其错误率是高于30 fps的GPU系统中最低的。 开发一种在GPU上实现实时高质量立体匹配的系统，解决传统系统中速度与错误率的权衡问题。 Qiong Chang,Tsutomu Maruyama cs.CV,cs.DC

authors_text: Hansang Lee,Haeil Lee,Helen Hong,Junmo Kim
title: Noisy Label Classification using Label Noise Selection with Test-Time Augmentation Cross-Entropy and NoiseMix Learning
title_zh: 使用标签噪声选择和测试时间增强交叉熵和 NoiseMix 学习进行噪声标签分类
comment: Accepted at the 2nd MICCAI workshop on Data Augmentation, Labeling, and Imperfections (DALI @ MICCAI 2022)
comments: Accepted at the 2nd MICCAI workshop on Data Augmentation, Labeling, and Imperfections (DALI @ MICCAI 2022)
abstract: As the size of the dataset used in deep learning tasks increases, the noisy label problem, which is a task of making deep learning robust to the incorrectly labeled data, has become an important task. In this paper, we propose a method of learning noisy label data using the label noise selection with test-time augmentation (TTA) cross-entropy and classifier learning with the NoiseMix method. In the label noise selection, we propose TTA cross-entropy by measuring the cross-entropy to predict the test-time augmented training data. In the classifier learning, we propose the NoiseMix method based on MixUp and BalancedMix methods by mixing the samples from the noisy and the clean label data. In experiments on the ISIC-18 public skin lesion diagnosis dataset, the proposed TTA cross-entropy outperformed the conventional cross-entropy and the TTA uncertainty in detecting label noise data in the label noise selection process. Moreover, the proposed NoiseMix not only outperformed the state-of-the-art methods in the classification performance but also showed the most robustness to the label noise in the classifier learning.
summary: As the size of the dataset used in deep learning tasks increases, the noisy label problem, which is a task of making deep learning robust to the incorrectly labeled data, has become an important task. In this paper, we propose a method of learning noisy label data using the label noise selection with test-time augmentation (TTA) cross-entropy and classifier learning with the NoiseMix method. In the label noise selection, we propose TTA cross-entropy by measuring the cross-entropy to predict the test-time augmented training data. In the classifier learning, we propose the NoiseMix method based on MixUp and BalancedMix methods by mixing the samples from the noisy and the clean label data. In experiments on the ISIC-18 public skin lesion diagnosis dataset, the proposed TTA cross-entropy outperformed the conventional cross-entropy and the TTA uncertainty in detecting label noise data in the label noise selection process. Moreover, the proposed NoiseMix not only outperformed the state-of-the-art methods in the classification performance but also showed the most robustness to the label noise in the classifier learning.
abstract_zh: 随着深度学习任务中使用的数据集大小的增加，噪声标签问题（使深度学习对错误标签数据具有鲁棒性的任务）已成为一项重要任务。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用带有测试时间增强（TTA）交叉熵的标签噪声选择和NoiseMix方法的分类器学习来学习噪声标签数据的方法。在标签噪声选择中，我们提出了TTA交叉熵，通过测量交叉熵来预测测试时增强的训练数据。在分类器学习中，我们通过混合来自噪声和干净标签数据的样本，提出了基于 MixUp 和 BalancedMix 方法的 NoiseMix 方法。在ISIC-18公共皮肤病变诊断数据集上的实验中，所提出的TTA交叉熵在标签噪声选择过程中检测标签噪声数据方面优于传统交叉熵和TTA不确定性。此外，所提出的 NoiseMix 不仅在分类性能上优于最先进的方法，而且在分类器学习中对标签噪声表现出最强的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合测试时增强交叉熵（TTA Cross-Entropy）和NoiseMix学习的方法，用于处理深度学习中的噪声标签分类问题。
AI.motivation: 随着深度学习数据集规模扩大，噪声标签问题日益严重，传统方法在噪声检测和分类鲁棒性上存在不足，亟需更有效的解决方案。
AI.method: 通过测试时增强交叉熵筛选噪声标签，并采用基于MixUp和BalancedMix的NoiseMix方法混合噪声与干净数据进行分类器训练。
AI.result: 在ISIC-18数据集实验中，TTA交叉熵优于传统方法，NoiseMix在分类性能和抗噪声鲁棒性上均达到最优。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法在噪声标签分类任务中有效提升了模型鲁棒性，为处理大规模噪声数据提供了新思路。

authors_text: Armin Lederer,Azra Begzadić,Neha Das,Sandra Hirche
title: Safe Learning-Based Control of Elastic Joint Robots via Control Barrier Functions
title_zh: 通过控制屏障函数对弹性关节机器人进行基于安全学习的控制
abstract: Ensuring safety is of paramount importance in physical human-robot interaction applications. This requires both adherence to safety constraints defined on the system state, as well as guaranteeing compliant behavior of the robot. If the underlying dynamical system is known exactly, the former can be addressed with the help of control barrier functions. The incorporation of elastic actuators in the robot's mechanical design can address the latter requirement. However, this elasticity can increase the complexity of the resulting system, leading to unmodeled dynamics, such that control barrier functions cannot directly ensure safety. In this paper, we mitigate this issue by learning the unknown dynamics using Gaussian process regression. By employing the model in a feedback linearizing control law, the safety conditions resulting from control barrier functions can be robustified to take into account model errors, while remaining feasible. In order to enforce them on-line, we formulate the derived safety conditions in the form of a second-order cone program. We demonstrate our proposed approach with simulations on a two-degree-of-freedom planar robot with elastic joints.
summary: Ensuring safety is of paramount importance in physical human-robot interaction applications. This requires both adherence to safety constraints defined on the system state, as well as guaranteeing compliant behavior of the robot. If the underlying dynamical system is known exactly, the former can be addressed with the help of control barrier functions. The incorporation of elastic actuators in the robot's mechanical design can address the latter requirement. However, this elasticity can increase the complexity of the resulting system, leading to unmodeled dynamics, such that control barrier functions cannot directly ensure safety. In this paper, we mitigate this issue by learning the unknown dynamics using Gaussian process regression. By employing the model in a feedback linearizing control law, the safety conditions resulting from control barrier functions can be robustified to take into account model errors, while remaining feasible. In order to enforce them on-line, we formulate the derived safety conditions in the form of a second-order cone program. We demonstrate our proposed approach with simulations on a two-degree-of-freedom planar robot with elastic joints.
abstract_zh: 确保安全在人机交互应用中至关重要。这需要遵守系统状态定义的安全约束，并保证机器人的合规行为。如果确切地知道底层的动力系统，则可以借助控制障碍函数来解决前者。在机器人的机械设计中加入弹性执行器可以满足后一个要求。然而，这种弹性会增加所得系统的复杂性，导致未建模的动态，使得控制屏障功能无法直接确保安全。在本文中，我们通过使用高斯过程回归学习未知动态来缓解这个问题。通过在反馈线性化控制律中采用该模型，可以增强控制障碍函数产生的安全条件，以考虑模型误差，同时保持可行。为了在线执行它们，我们以二阶锥程序的形式制定了导出的安全条件。我们通过对具有弹性关节的二自由度平面机器人的模拟来演示我们提出的方法。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于学习的控制方法，结合控制屏障函数，以确保弹性关节机器人在物理人机交互中的安全性。
AI.motivation: 在物理人机交互中，弹性关节机器人需要同时满足安全约束和合规性，但弹性带来的未建模动力学使得传统控制屏障函数难以直接应用，需解决模型不确定性带来的安全问题。
AI.method: 通过高斯过程回归学习未知动力学，结合反馈线性化控制律，并将安全条件转化为二阶锥规划问题，以鲁棒化控制屏障函数。
AI.result: 仿真结果验证了该方法在两自由度平面弹性关节机器人上的有效性，能够保证安全约束下的合规控制。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效结合了学习与控制屏障函数，解决了弹性关节机器人模型不确定性下的安全控制问题，为物理人机交互提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Qiong Chang,Aolong Zha,Weimin Wang,Xin Liu,Masaki Onishi,Lei Lei,Meng Joo Er,Tsutomu Maruyama
title: Efficient stereo matching on embedded GPUs with zero-means cross correlation
title_zh: 具有零均值互相关的嵌入式 GPU 上的高效立体匹配
abstract: Mobile stereo-matching systems have become an important part of many applications, such as automated-driving vehicles and autonomous robots. Accurate stereo-matching methods usually lead to high computational complexity; however, mobile platforms have only limited hardware resources to keep their power consumption low; this makes it difficult to maintain both an acceptable processing speed and accuracy on mobile platforms. To resolve this trade-off, we herein propose a novel acceleration approach for the well-known zero-means normalized cross correlation (ZNCC) matching cost calculation algorithm on a Jetson Tx2 embedded GPU. In our method for accelerating ZNCC, target images are scanned in a zigzag fashion to efficiently reuse one pixel's computation for its neighboring pixels; this reduces the amount of data transmission and increases the utilization of on-chip registers, thus increasing the processing speed. As a result, our method is 2X faster than the traditional image scanning method, and 26% faster than the latest NCC method. By combining this technique with the domain transformation (DT) algorithm, our system show real-time processing speed of 32 fps, on a Jetson Tx2 GPU for 1,280x384 pixel images with a maximum disparity of 128. Additionally, the evaluation results on the KITTI 2015 benchmark show that our combined system is more accurate than the same algorithm combined with census by 7.26%, while maintaining almost the same processing speed. Source Code: https://github.com/changqiong/Z2ZNCC.git

abstract_zh: 移动立体匹配系统已成为许多应用的重要组成部分，例如自动驾驶车辆和自主机器人。精确的立体匹配方法通常会导致较高的计算复杂度；然而，移动平台只有有限的硬件资源来保持低功耗；这使得在移动平台上保持可接受的处理速度和准确性变得困难。为了解决这种权衡问题，我们在此提出了一种新颖的加速方法，用于 Jetson Tx2 嵌入式 GPU 上著名的零均值归一化互相关 (ZNCC) 匹配成本计算算法。在我们加速 ZNCC 的方法中，目标图像以锯齿形方式扫描，以有效地重用一个像素对其相邻像素的计算；这减少了数据传输量并提高了片内寄存器的利用率，从而提高了处理速度。因此，我们的方法比传统图像扫描方法快 2 倍，比最新的 NCC 方法快 26%。通过将该技术与域变换（DT）算法相结合，我们的系统在 Jetson Tx2 GPU 上对最大视差为 128 的 1,280x384 像素图像显示出 32 fps 的实时处理速度。此外，KITTI 2015 基准测试的评估结果表明，我们的组合系统比结合人口普查的相同算法准确率提高了 7.26%，同时保持几乎相同的处理速度。源代码：https://github.com/changqiong/Z2ZNCC.git

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种在嵌入式GPU上加速零均值归一化互相关（ZNCC）立体匹配算法的方法，以在移动平台上实现高效且准确的实时立体匹配。
AI.motivation: 准确的立体匹配算法计算复杂度高，而移动平台硬件资源有限，难以兼顾处理速度与精度，需解决这一矛盾以满足自动驾驶等实时应用需求。
AI.method: 通过Z字形扫描目标图像，复用单个像素的计算结果以减少数据传输并提高寄存器利用率；结合域变换（DT）算法，在Jetson Tx2嵌入式GPU上优化ZNCC计算。
AI.result: 相比传统方法提速2倍，较最新NCC方法快26%，在1280x384像素图像上实现32fps实时处理；KITTI 2015数据集测试显示精度比Census方法高7.26%且速度相近。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效平衡了移动平台立体匹配的实时性与精度，为嵌入式系统提供了高效的ZNCC加速方案。

authors_text: An Mo,Fabio Izzi,Emre Cemal Gönen,Daniel Haeufle,Alexander Badri-Spröwitz
title: Slack-based tunable damping leads to a trade-off between robustness and efficiency in legged locomotion
title_zh: 基于松弛的可调阻尼导致腿部运动的鲁棒性和效率之间的权衡
comment: For associated videos, see https://youtu.be/ewBDVwMAgLI , https://youtu.be/ZPBnjEAQDYs , and https://youtu.be/eW7Sgdul2Aw
comments: For associated videos, see https://youtu.be/ewBDVwMAgLI , https://youtu.be/ZPBnjEAQDYs , and https://youtu.be/eW7Sgdul2Aw
abstract: Animals run robustly in diverse terrain. This locomotion robustness is puzzling because axon conduction velocity is limited to a few ten meters per second. If reflex loops deliver sensory information with significant delays, one would expect a destabilizing effect on sensorimotor control. Hence, an alternative explanation describes a hierarchical structure of low-level adaptive mechanics and high-level sensorimotor control to help mitigate the effects of transmission delays. Motivated by the concept of an adaptive mechanism triggering an immediate response, we developed a tunable physical damper system. Our mechanism combines a tendon with adjustable slackness connected to a physical damper. The slack damper allows adjustment of damping force, onset timing, effective stroke, and energy dissipation. We characterize the slack damper mechanism mounted to a legged robot controlled in open-loop mode. The robot hops vertically and planar over varying terrains and perturbations. During forward hopping, slack-based damping improves faster perturbation recovery (up to 170%) at higher energetic cost (27%). The tunable slack mechanism auto-engages the damper during perturbations, leading to a perturbation-trigger damping, improving robustness at minimum energetic cost. With the results from the slack damper mechanism, we propose a new functional interpretation of animals' redundant muscle tendons as tunable dampers.

With the results from the slack damper mechanism, we propose a new functional interpretation of animals' redundant muscle tendons as tunable dampers.
abstract_zh: 动物在不同的地形中都能稳健地奔跑。这种运动的鲁棒性令人费解，因为轴突传导速度仅限于每秒几十米。如果反射环路以显着延迟传递感觉信息，人们就会预期会对感觉运动控制产生不稳定的影响。因此，另一种解释描述了低级自适应力学和高级感觉运动控制的分层结构，以帮助减轻传输延迟的影响。受触发即时响应的自适应机制概念的启发，我们开发了一种可调物理阻尼器系统。我们的机制将肌腱与连接到物理阻尼器的可调节松弛度结合在一起。松弛阻尼器可以调节阻尼力、启动时间、有效行程和能量耗散。我们描述了安装在以开环模式控制的有腿机器人上的松弛阻尼器机构。机器人在不同的地形和扰动下垂直和平面跳跃。在正向跳跃期间，基于松弛的阻尼以更高的能量成本 (27%) 提高了更快的扰动恢复 (高达 170%)。可调松弛机构在扰动期间自动接合阻尼器，从而产生扰动触发阻尼，从而以最小的能量成本提高鲁棒性。根据松弛阻尼器机制的结果，我们提出了一种将动物多余肌腱作为可调阻尼器的新功能解释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于可调松弛阻尼器的腿部运动机制，通过平衡鲁棒性与效率解决神经延迟对运动控制的影响问题。
AI.motivation: 动物在复杂地形中能保持运动鲁棒性，但神经传导速度有限导致反射延迟，传统控制方法难以解释这种稳定性，需探索机械层面的自适应机制。
AI.method: 设计结合可调松弛肌腱与物理阻尼器的混合系统，通过调整阻尼力、触发时机等参数，在开环控制的腿部机器人上测试垂直跳跃与平面运动的鲁棒性与能耗。
AI.result: 松弛阻尼器使扰动恢复速度提升170%但能耗增加27%，自触发机制在最小能耗下提升鲁棒性，并提出动物冗余肌腱可能作为可调阻尼器的功能解释。
AI.conclusion: 可调松弛阻尼器机制揭示了生物运动中鲁棒性与效率的权衡规律，为仿生机器人设计提供新思路，同时深化对动物运动控制机制的理解。
