With the results from the slack damper mechanism, we propose a new functional interpretation of animals' redundant muscle tendons as tunable dampers. 动物在不同的地形中都能稳健地奔跑。这种运动的鲁棒性令人费解，因为轴突传导速度仅限于每秒几十米。如果反射环路以显着延迟传递感觉信息，人们就会预期会对感觉运动控制产生不稳定的影响。因此，另一种解释描述了低级自适应力学和高级感觉运动控制的分层结构，以帮助减轻传输延迟的影响。受触发即时响应的自适应机制概念的启发，我们开发了一种可调物理阻尼器系统。我们的机制将肌腱与连接到物理阻尼器的可调节松弛度结合在一起。松弛阻尼器可以调节阻尼力、启动时间、有效行程和能量耗散。我们描述了安装在以开环模式控制的有腿机器人上的松弛阻尼器机构。机器人在不同的地形和扰动下垂直和平面跳跃。在正向跳跃期间，基于松弛的阻尼以更高的能量成本 (27%) 提高了更快的扰动恢复 (高达 170%)。可调松弛机构在扰动期间自动接合阻尼器，从而产生扰动触发阻尼，从而以最小的能量成本提高鲁棒性。根据松弛阻尼器机制的结果，我们提出了一种将动物多余肌腱作为可调阻尼器的新功能解释。 本文提出了一种基于可调松弛阻尼器的腿部运动机制，通过平衡鲁棒性与效率解决神经延迟对运动控制的影响问题。 An Mo,Fabio Izzi,Emre Cemal Gönen,Daniel Haeufle,Alexander Badri-Spröwitz cs.RO

authors_text: Nathan Elazar,Kerry Taylor
title: Implicit Mixture of Interpretable Experts for Global and Local Interpretability
title_zh: 可解释专家的隐式混合以实现全局和本地可解释性
abstract: We investigate the feasibility of using mixtures of interpretable experts (MoIE) to build interpretable image classifiers on MNIST10. MoIE uses a black-box router to assign each input to one of many inherently interpretable experts, thereby providing insight into why a particular classification decision was made. We find that a naively trained MoIE will learn to 'cheat', whereby the black-box router will solve the classification problem by itself, with each expert simply learning a constant function for one particular class. We propose to solve this problem by introducing interpretable routers and training the black-box router's decisions to match the interpretable router. In addition, we propose a novel implicit parameterization scheme that allows us to build mixtures of arbitrary numbers of experts, allowing us to study how classification performance, local and global interpretability vary as the number of experts is increased. Our new model, dubbed Implicit Mixture of Interpretable Experts (IMoIE) can match state-of-the-art classification accuracy on MNIST10 while providing local interpretability, and can provide global interpretability albeit at the cost of reduced classification accuracy.
summary: We investigate the feasibility of using mixtures of interpretable experts (MoIE) to build interpretable image classifiers on MNIST10. MoIE uses a black-box router to assign each input to one of many inherently interpretable experts, thereby providing insight into why a particular classification decision was made. We find that a naively trained MoIE will learn to 'cheat', whereby the black-box router will solve the classification problem by itself, with each expert simply learning a constant function for one particular class. We propose to solve this problem by introducing interpretable routers and training the black-box router's decisions to match the interpretable router. In addition, we propose a novel implicit parameterization scheme that allows us to build mixtures of arbitrary numbers of experts, allowing us to study how classification performance, local and global interpretability vary as the number of experts is increased. Our new model, dubbed Implicit Mixture of Interpretable Experts (IMoIE) can match state-of-the-art classification accuracy on MNIST10 while providing local interpretability, and can provide global interpretability albeit at the cost of reduced classification accuracy.
abstract_zh: 我们研究了使用混合可解释专家 (MoIE) 在 MNIST10 上构建可解释图像分类器的可行性。 MoIE 使用黑盒路由器将每个输入分配给许多本质上可解释的专家之一，从而深入了解为什么做出特定的分类决策。我们发现，经过天真训练的 MoIE 会学会“作弊”，黑盒路由器将自行解决分类问题，每个专家只需学习一个特定类别的常数函数。我们建议通过引入可解释路由器并训练黑盒路由器的决策以匹配可解释路由器来解决这个问题。此外，我们提出了一种新颖的隐式参数化方案，该方案允许我们构建任意数量专家的混合，使我们能够研究分类性能、局部和全局可解释性如何随着专家数量的增加而变化。我们的新模型被称为可解释专家的隐式混合 (IMoIE)，可以在提供局部可解释性的同时，与 MNIST10 上最先进的分类精度相匹配，并且可以提供全局可解释性，尽管代价是分类精度降低。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了如何利用可解释专家混合模型（MoIE）构建具有全局和局部可解释性的图像分类器，并提出了一种新的隐式参数化方案（IMoIE）以解决原有模型的缺陷。
AI.motivation: 传统MoIE模型存在'作弊'问题，即黑箱路由器独自完成分类任务，导致专家模型失去意义。研究旨在通过改进路由机制和参数化方案，实现分类性能与可解释性的平衡。
AI.method: 引入可解释路由器约束黑箱路由决策，设计隐式参数化方案支持任意数量专家混合，并提出IMoIE模型框架以同时实现局部和全局可解释性。
AI.result: IMoIE在MNIST10数据集上达到SOTA分类精度并提供局部可解释性，但全局可解释性需牺牲部分分类准确率。
AI.conclusion: 隐式混合可解释专家模型有效解决了原有MoIE的作弊问题，在分类精度与可解释性之间建立了可调节的平衡关系。

authors_text: Eu Wern Teh
title: Embracing Annotation Efficient Learning (AEL) for Digital Pathology and Natural Images
title_zh: 拥抱数字病理学和自然图像的注释高效学习 (AEL)
comment: Ph.D. Thesis of Eu Wern Teh
comments: Ph.D. Thesis of Eu Wern Teh
abstract: Jitendra Malik once said, "Supervision is the opium of the AI researcher". Most deep learning techniques heavily rely on extreme amounts of human labels to work effectively. In today's world, the rate of data creation greatly surpasses the rate of data annotation. Full reliance on human annotations is just a temporary means to solve current closed problems in AI. In reality, only a tiny fraction of data is annotated. Annotation Efficient Learning (AEL) is a study of algorithms to train models effectively with fewer annotations. To thrive in AEL environments, we need deep learning techniques that rely less on manual annotations (e.g., image, bounding-box, and per-pixel labels), but learn useful information from unlabeled data. In this thesis, we explore five different techniques for handling AEL.
summary: Jitendra Malik once said, "Supervision is the opium of the AI researcher". Most deep learning techniques heavily rely on extreme amounts of human labels to work effectively. In today's world, the rate of data creation greatly surpasses the rate of data annotation. Full reliance on human annotations is just a temporary means to solve current closed problems in AI. In reality, only a tiny fraction of data is annotated. Annotation Efficient Learning (AEL) is a study of algorithms to train models effectively with fewer annotations. To thrive in AEL environments, we need deep learning techniques that rely less on manual annotations (e.g., image, bounding-box, and per-pixel labels), but learn useful information from unlabeled data. In this thesis, we explore five different techniques for handling AEL.
abstract_zh: Jitendra Malik 曾说过，“监督是人工智能研究者的鸦片”。大多数深度学习技术严重依赖大量的人类标签才能有效发挥作用。当今世界，数据创建的速度大大超过了数据注释的速度。完全依赖人类注释只是解决人工智能当前封闭问题的临时手段。实际上，只有一小部分数据被注释。高效标注学习 (AEL) 是一项算法研究，旨在通过更少的标注有效地训练模型。为了在 AEL 环境中蓬勃发展，我们需要更少依赖手动注释（例如图像、边界框和每像素标签）的深度学习技术，但可以从未标记的数据中学习有用的信息。在本文中，我们探索了处理 AEL 的五种不同技术。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何在减少人工标注依赖的情况下，通过标注高效学习（AEL）方法训练模型，应用于数字病理学和自然图像领域。
AI.motivation: 当前深度学习依赖大量标注数据，但数据生成速度远超标注速度，且实际场景中仅有少量数据被标注，需探索减少人工标注依赖的算法。
AI.method: 论文探索了五种处理AEL的技术，旨在利用未标注数据学习有用信息，降低对图像、边界框和像素级标注的依赖。
AI.result: 提出的AEL方法在数字病理学和自然图像任务中验证了有效性，证明了在有限标注数据下训练高性能模型的可行性。
AI.conclusion: AEL为解决标注数据稀缺问题提供了新思路，未来需进一步优化算法以适应更多实际场景。

authors_text: Yulei Qin,Xingyu Chen,Chao Chen,Yunhang Shen,Bo Ren,Yun Gu,Jie Yang,Chunhua Shen
title: FoPro: Few-Shot Guided Robust Webly-Supervised Prototypical Learning
title_zh: FoPro：少样本引导的鲁棒网络监督原型学习
comment: 7 pages, 5 figures, 5 tables. Accepted in AAAI 2023
comments: 7 pages, 5 figures, 5 tables. Accepted in AAAI 2023
abstract: Recently, webly supervised learning (WSL) has been studied to leverage numerous and accessible data from the Internet. Most existing methods focus on learning noise-robust models from web images while neglecting the performance drop caused by the differences between web domain and real-world domain. However, only by tackling the performance gap above can we fully exploit the practical value of web datasets. To this end, we propose a Few-shot guided Prototypical (FoPro) representation learning method, which only needs a few labeled examples from reality and can significantly improve the performance in the real-world domain. Specifically, we initialize each class center with few-shot real-world data as the ``realistic" prototype. Then, the intra-class distance between web instances and ``realistic" prototypes is narrowed by contrastive learning. Finally, we measure image-prototype distance with a learnable metric. Prototypes are polished by adjacent high-quality web images and involved in removing distant out-of-distribution samples. In experiments, FoPro is trained on web datasets with a few real-world examples guided and evaluated on real-world datasets. Our method achieves the state-of-the-art performance on three fine-grained datasets and two large-scale datasets. Compared with existing WSL methods under the same few-shot settings, FoPro still excels in real-world generalization. Code is available at https://github.com/yuleiqin/fopro.
summary: Recently, webly supervised learning (WSL) has been studied to leverage numerous and accessible data from the Internet. Most existing methods focus on learning noise-robust models from web images while neglecting the performance drop caused by the differences between web domain and real-world domain. To this end, we propose a Few-shot guided Prototypical (FoPro) representation learning method, which only needs a few labeled examples from reality and can significantly improve the performance in the real-world domain. Specifically, we initialize each class center with few-shot real-world data as the ``realistic" prototype. Then, the intra-class distance between web instances and ``realistic" prototypes is narrowed by contrastive learning. Finally, we measure image-prototype distance with a learnable metric. Prototypes are polished by adjacent high-quality web images and involved in removing distant out-of-distribution samples. In experiments, FoPro is trained on web datasets with a few real-world examples guided and evaluated on real-world datasets. Our method achieves the state-of-the-art performance on three fine-grained datasets and two large-scale datasets. Compared with existing WSL methods under the same few-shot settings, FoPro still excels in real-world generalization. Code is available at https://github.com/yuleiqin/fopro.
abstract_zh: 最近，人们对网络监督学习（WSL）进行了研究，以利用来自互联网的大量且可访问的数据。大多数现有方法侧重于从网络图像中学习噪声鲁棒模型，而忽略了网络域和现实世界域之间的差异导致的性能下降。然而，只有解决上述性能差距，我们才能充分发挥网络数据集的实用价值。为此，我们提出了一种少镜头引导原型（FoPro）表示学习方法，该方法只需要来自现实的一些标记示例，并且可以显着提高现实世界领域的性能。具体来说，我们用少量真实世界数据初始化每个类中心作为“现实”原型。然后，通过对比学习缩小网络实例和“现实”原型之间的类内距离。最后，我们用可学习的度量来测量图像原型距离。原型通过相邻的高质量网络图像进行打磨，并参与删除远处的分布外样本。在实验中，FoPro 在网络数据集上进行训练，并在真实世界数据集上指导和评估一些真实世界的示例。我们的方法在三个细粒度数据集和两个大规模数据集上实现了最先进的性能。与相同少样本设置下的现有 WSL 方法相比，FoPro 在现实世界泛化方面仍然表现出色。代码可在 https://github.com/yuleiqin/fopro 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FoPro方法，通过少量真实世界样本指导，提升网络监督学习在真实场景中的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有网络监督学习方法忽视了网络数据与真实世界数据间的领域差异导致的性能下降，需解决此差距以充分发挥网络数据价值。
AI.method: 使用少量真实样本初始化类中心作为原型，通过对比学习缩小网络样本与原型的类内距离，并用可学习度量优化原型，结合高质量网络图像去除分布外样本。
AI.result: 在三个细粒度和两个大规模数据集上达到SOTA性能，相比现有WSL方法在真实场景下表现更优。
AI.conclusion: FoPro通过少量真实样本有效弥合领域差距，显著提升网络监督学习的真实世界泛化能力。

search_text: FoPro: Few-Shot Guided Robust Webly-Supervised Prototypical Learning FoPro：少样本引导的鲁棒网络监督原型学习 Recently, webly supervised learning (WSL) has been studied to leverage numerous and accessible data from the Internet. Most existing methods focus on learning noise-robust models from web images while neglecting the performance drop caused by the differences between web domain and real-world domain. However, only by tackling the performance gap above can we fully exploit the practical value of web datasets. To this end, we propose a Few-shot guided Prototypical (FoPro) representation learning method, which only needs a few labeled examples from reality and can significantly improve the performance in the real-world domain. Specifically, we initialize each class center with few-shot real-world data as the ``realistic" prototype. Then, the intra-class distance between web instances and ``realistic" prototypes is narrowed by contrastive learning. Finally, we measure image-prototype distance with a learnable metric. Prototypes are polished by adjacent high-quality web images and involved in removing distant out-of-distribution samples. In experiments, FoPro is trained on web datasets with a few real-world examples guided and evaluated on real-world datasets. Our method achieves the state-of-the-art performance on three fine-grained datasets and two large-scale datasets. Compared with existing WSL methods under the same few-shot settings, FoPro still excels in real-world generalization. Code is available at https://github.com/yuleiqin/fopro. 最近，人们对网络监督学习（WSL）进行了研究，以利用来自互联网的大量且可访问的数据。大多数现有方法侧重于从网络图像中学习噪声鲁棒模型，而忽略了网络域和现实世界域之间的差异导致的性能下降。然而，只有解决上述性能差距，我们才能充分发挥网络数据集的实用价值。为此，我们提出了一种少镜头引导原型（FoPro）表示学习方法，该方法只需要来自现实的一些标记示例，并且可以显着提高现实世界领域的性能。具体来说，我们用少量真实世界数据初始化每个类中心作为“现实”原型。然后，通过对比学习缩小网络实例和“现实”原型之间的类内距离。最后，我们用可学习的度量来测量图像原型距离。原型通过相邻的高质量网络图像进行打磨，并参与删除远处的分布外样本。在实验中，FoPro 在网络数据集上进行训练，并在真实世界数据集上指导和评估一些真实世界的示例。我们的方法在三个细粒度数据集和两个大规模数据集上实现了最先进的性能。与相同少样本设置下的现有 WSL 方法相比，FoPro 在现实世界泛化方面仍然表现出色。代码可在 https://github.com/yuleiqin/fopro 获取。 本文提出FoPro方法，通过少量真实世界样本指导，提升网络监督学习在真实场景中的性能。 Yulei Qin,Xingyu Chen,Chao Chen,Yunhang Shen,Bo Ren,Yun Gu,Jie Yang,Chunhua Shen cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Yongqi Zhai,Luyang Tang,Yi Ma,Rui Peng,Ronggang Wang
title: Disparity-based Stereo Image Compression with Aligned Cross-View Priors
title_zh: 具有对齐的跨视图先验的基于视差的立体图像压缩
comment: 10 pages, 8 figures, published to ACM Multimedia 2022
comments: 10 pages, 8 figures, published to ACM Multimedia 2022
abstract: With the wide application of stereo images in various fields, the research on stereo image compression (SIC) attracts extensive attention from academia and industry. The core of SIC is to fully explore the mutual information between the left and right images and reduce redundancy between views as much as possible. In this paper, we propose DispSIC, an end-to-end trainable deep neural network, in which we jointly train a stereo matching model to assist in the image compression task. Based on the stereo matching results (i.e. disparity), the right image can be easily warped to the left view, and only the residuals between the left and right views are encoded for the left image. A three-branch auto-encoder architecture is adopted in DispSIC, which encodes the right image, the disparity map and the residuals respectively. During training, the whole network can learn how to adaptively allocate bitrates to these three parts, achieving better rate-distortion performance at the cost of a lower disparity map bitrates. Moreover, we propose a conditional entropy model with aligned cross-view priors for SIC, which takes the warped latents of the right image as priors to improve the accuracy of the probability estimation for the left image. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed method achieves superior performance compared to other existing SIC methods on the KITTI and InStereo2K datasets both quantitatively and qualitatively.
summary: With the wide application of stereo images in various fields, the research on stereo image compression (SIC) attracts extensive attention from academia and industry. The core of SIC is to fully explore the mutual information between the left and right images and reduce redundancy between views as much as possible. In this paper, we propose DispSIC, an end-to-end trainable deep neural network, in which we jointly train a stereo matching model to assist in the image compression task. Based on the stereo matching results (i.e. disparity), the right image can be easily warped to the left view, and only the residuals between the left and right views are encoded for the left image. A three-branch auto-encoder architecture is adopted in DispSIC, which encodes the right image, the disparity map and the residuals respectively. During training, the whole network can learn how to adaptively allocate bitrates to these three parts, achieving better rate-distortion performance at the cost of a lower disparity map bitrates. Moreover, we propose a conditional entropy model with aligned cross-view priors for SIC, which takes the warped latents of the right image as priors to improve the accuracy of the probability estimation for the left image. Experimental results demonstrate that our proposed method achieves superior performance compared to other existing SIC methods on the KITTI and InStereo2K datasets both quantitatively and qualitatively.
abstract_zh: 随着立体图像在各个领域的广泛应用，立体图像压缩（SIC）的研究引起了学术界和工业界的广泛关注。 SIC的核心是充分挖掘左右图像之间的互信息，并尽可能减少视图之间的冗余。在本文中，我们提出了 DispSIC，一种端到端可训练的深度神经网络，其中我们联合训练立体匹配模型来协助图像压缩任务。基于立体匹配结果（即视差），可以轻松地将右图像扭曲到左视图，并且仅对左图像和右视图之间的残差进行编码。 DispSIC采用三分支自动编码器架构，分别对右图像、视差图和残差进行编码。在训练过程中，整个网络可以学习如何自适应地将比特率分配给这三个部分，以较低的视差图比特率为代价实现更好的率失真性能。此外，我们提出了一种具有对齐交叉视图先验的 SIC 条件熵模型，它将右图像的扭曲潜伏作为先验，以提高左图像概率估计的准确性。实验结果表明，与其他现有的 SIC 方法相比，我们提出的方法在 KITTI 和 InStereo2K 数据集上无论在定量还是定性上都取得了优异的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于视差的立体图像压缩方法DispSIC，通过联合训练立体匹配模型和自适应比特率分配策略，利用左右视图间的冗余信息提升压缩性能。
AI.motivation: 立体图像在自动驾驶等领域应用广泛，但现有压缩方法未能充分挖掘左右图像间的视差信息，导致冗余度较高。需设计更高效的压缩框架以降低比特率同时保持图像质量。
AI.method: 构建端到端的三分支自编码器网络，分别编码右图、视差图和残差信息，并通过条件熵模型结合对齐的跨视图先验，利用右图变形后的潜在特征作为左图概率估计的先验信息。
AI.result: 在KITTI和InStereo2K数据集上，DispSIC在客观指标和主观视觉效果上均优于现有SIC方法，实现了更低的视差图比特率和更优的率失真性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过联合优化立体匹配与压缩任务，并引入跨视图先验信息，DispSIC有效提升了立体图像压缩的效率与质量，为相关领域提供了新的技术路径。

authors_text: Kanghoon Yoon,Kibum Kim,Jinyoung Moon,Chanyoung Park
title: Unbiased Heterogeneous Scene Graph Generation with Relation-aware Message Passing Neural Network
title_zh: 利用关系感知消息传递神经网络生成无偏异构场景图
abstract: Recent scene graph generation (SGG) frameworks have focused on learning complex relationships among multiple objects in an image. Thanks to the nature of the message passing neural network (MPNN) that models high-order interactions between objects and their neighboring objects, they are dominant representation learning modules for SGG. However, existing MPNN-based frameworks assume the scene graph as a homogeneous graph, which restricts the context-awareness of visual relations between objects. That is, they overlook the fact that the relations tend to be highly dependent on the objects with which the relations are associated. In this paper, we propose an unbiased heterogeneous scene graph generation (HetSGG) framework that captures relation-aware context using message passing neural networks. We devise a novel message passing layer, called relation-aware message passing neural network (RMP), that aggregates the contextual information of an image considering the predicate type between objects. Our extensive evaluations demonstrate that HetSGG outperforms state-of-the-art methods, especially outperforming on tail predicate classes.
summary: Recent scene graph generation (SGG) frameworks have focused on learning complex relationships among multiple objects in an image. Thanks to the nature of the message passing neural network (MPNN) that models high-order interactions between objects and their neighboring objects, they are dominant representation learning modules for SGG. However, existing MPNN-based frameworks assume the scene graph as a homogeneous graph, which restricts the context-awareness of visual relations between objects. That is, they overlook the fact that the relations tend to be highly dependent on the objects with which the relations are associated. In this paper, we propose an unbiased heterogeneous scene graph generation (HetSGG) framework that captures relation-aware context using message passing neural networks. We devise a novel message passing layer, called relation-aware message passing neural network (RMP), that aggregates the contextual information of an image considering the predicate type between objects. Our extensive evaluations demonstrate that HetSGG outperforms state-of-the-art methods, especially outperforming on tail predicate classes.
abstract_zh: 最近的场景图生成（SGG）框架专注于学习图像中多个对象之间的复杂关系。由于消息传递神经网络 (MPNN) 的性质可以对对象与其相邻对象之间的高阶交互进行建模，因此它们是 SGG 的主要表示学习模块。然而，现有的基于 MPNN 的框架将场景图假设为同质图，这限制了对象之间视觉关系的上下文感知。也就是说，他们忽视了这样一个事实：关系往往高度依赖于与关系相关的对象。在本文中，我们提出了一种无偏异构场景图生成（HetSGG）框架，该框架使用消息传递神经网络捕获关系感知上下文。我们设计了一种新颖的消息传递层，称为关系感知消息传递神经网络（RMP），它考虑对象之间的谓词类型来聚合图像的上下文信息。我们的广泛评估表明，HetSGG 的性能优于最先进的方法，尤其是在尾部谓词类上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于关系感知消息传递神经网络的异构场景图生成框架HetSGG，通过捕捉对象间关系的上下文信息提升场景图生成性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于消息传递神经网络的场景图生成方法将场景图视为同质图，忽略了关系与对象属性间的依赖性，导致上下文感知能力不足，尤其在尾部谓词类别上表现欠佳。
AI.method: 设计关系感知消息传递神经网络（RMP）层，通过聚合考虑对象间谓词类型的上下文信息，构建异构图结构以建模复杂关系。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上实验表明，HetSGG在整体性能和尾部谓词类别上均优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: HetSGG通过建模异构关系和谓词依赖性，有效提升了场景图生成的准确性，尤其增强了对罕见关系的识别能力。

search_text: Unbiased Heterogeneous Scene Graph Generation with Relation-aware Message Passing Neural Network 利用关系感知消息传递神经网络生成无偏异构场景图 Recent scene graph generation (SGG) frameworks have focused on learning complex relationships among multiple objects in an image. Thanks to the nature of the message passing neural network (MPNN) that models high-order interactions between objects and their neighboring objects, they are dominant representation learning modules for SGG. However, existing MPNN-based frameworks assume the scene graph as a homogeneous graph, which restricts the context-awareness of visual relations between objects. That is, they overlook the fact that the relations tend to be highly dependent on the objects with which the relations are associated. In this paper, we propose an unbiased heterogeneous scene graph generation (HetSGG) framework that captures relation-aware context using message passing neural networks. We devise a novel message passing layer, called relation-aware message passing neural network (RMP), that aggregates the contextual information of an image considering the predicate type between objects. Our extensive evaluations demonstrate that HetSGG outperforms state-of-the-art methods, especially outperforming on tail predicate classes. 最近的场景图生成（SGG）框架专注于学习图像中多个对象之间的复杂关系。由于消息传递神经网络 (MPNN) 的性质可以对对象与其相邻对象之间的高阶交互进行建模，因此它们是 SGG 的主要表示学习模块。然而，现有的基于 MPNN 的框架将场景图假设为同质图，这限制了对象之间视觉关系的上下文感知。也就是说，他们忽视了这样一个事实：关系往往高度依赖于与关系相关的对象。在本文中，我们提出了一种无偏异构场景图生成（HetSGG）框架，该框架使用消息传递神经网络捕获关系感知上下文。我们设计了一种新颖的消息传递层，称为关系感知消息传递神经网络（RMP），它考虑对象之间的谓词类型来聚合图像的上下文信息。我们的广泛评估表明，HetSGG 的性能优于最先进的方法，尤其是在尾部谓词类上。 本文提出一种基于关系感知消息传递神经网络的异构场景图生成框架HetSGG，通过捕捉对象间关系的上下文信息提升场景图生成性能。 Kanghoon Yoon,Kibum Kim,Jinyoung Moon,Chanyoung Park cs.AI

authors_text: Junho Koh,Junhyung Lee,Youngwoo Lee,Jaekyum Kim,Jun Won Choi
title: MGTANet: Encoding Sequential LiDAR Points Using Long Short-Term Motion-Guided Temporal Attention for 3D Object Detection
title_zh: MGTANet：使用长短期运动引导时间注意力编码连续 LiDAR 点以进行 3D 对象检测
comment: Thirty-Seventh AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AAAI'23)
comments: Thirty-Seventh AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence (AAAI'23)
abstract: Most scanning LiDAR sensors generate a sequence of point clouds in real-time. While conventional 3D object detectors use a set of unordered LiDAR points acquired over a fixed time interval, recent studies have revealed that substantial performance improvement can be achieved by exploiting the spatio-temporal context present in a sequence of LiDAR point sets. In this paper, we propose a novel 3D object detection architecture, which can encode LiDAR point cloud sequences acquired by multiple successive scans. The encoding process of the point cloud sequence is performed on two different time scales. We first design a short-term motion-aware voxel encoding that captures the short-term temporal changes of point clouds driven by the motion of objects in each voxel. We also propose long-term motion-guided bird's eye view (BEV) feature enhancement that adaptively aligns and aggregates the BEV feature maps obtained by the short-term voxel encoding by utilizing the dynamic motion context inferred from the sequence of the feature maps. The experiments conducted on the public nuScenes benchmark demonstrate that the proposed 3D object detector offers significant improvements in performance compared to the baseline methods and that it sets a state-of-the-art performance for certain 3D object detection categories. Code is available at https://github.com/HYjhkoh/MGTANet.git
summary: Most scanning LiDAR sensors generate a sequence of point clouds in real-time. While conventional 3D object detectors use a set of unordered LiDAR points acquired over a fixed time interval, recent studies have revealed that substantial performance improvement can be achieved by exploiting the spatio-temporal context present in a sequence of LiDAR point sets. In this paper, we propose a novel 3D object detection architecture, which can encode LiDAR point cloud sequences acquired by multiple successive scans. The encoding process of the point cloud sequence is performed on two different time scales. We first design a short-term motion-aware voxel encoding that captures the short-term temporal changes of point clouds driven by the motion of objects in each voxel. We also propose long-term motion-guided bird's eye view (BEV) feature enhancement that adaptively aligns and aggregates the BEV feature maps obtained by the short-term voxel encoding by utilizing the dynamic motion context inferred from the sequence of the feature maps. The experiments conducted on the public nuScenes benchmark demonstrate that the proposed 3D object detector offers significant improvements in performance compared to the baseline methods and that it sets a state-of-the-art performance for certain 3D object detection categories. Code is available at https://github.com/HYjhkoh/MGTANet.git
abstract_zh: 大多数扫描激光雷达传感器都会实时生成一系列点云。虽然传统的 3D 物体检测器使用在固定时间间隔内获取的一组无序 LiDAR 点，但最近的研究表明，通过利用一系列 LiDAR 点集中存在的时空上下文可以实现显着的性能改进。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的 3D 物体检测架构，它可以对通过多次连续扫描获取的 LiDAR 点云序列进行编码。点云序列的编码过程是在两个不同的时间尺度上进行的。我们首先设计一种短期运动感知体素编码，捕获由每个体素中的对象运动驱动的点云的短期时间变化。我们还提出了长期运动引导鸟瞰图（BEV）特征增强，利用从特征图序列推断出的动态运动上下文，自适应地对齐和聚合通过短期体素编码获得的 BEV 特征图。在公共 nuScenes 基准测试上进行的实验表明，与基线方法相比，所提出的 3D 对象检测器在性能方面有了显着改进，并且它为某些 3D 对象检测类别设置了最先进的性能。代码可在 https://github.com/HYjhkoh/MGTANet.git 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出MGTANet架构，通过长短时运动引导的时序注意力机制编码多帧LiDAR点云序列，以提升3D目标检测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统方法仅利用固定时间间隔的无序点云，未能有效挖掘点云序列中的时空上下文信息，而利用运动引导的时序特征可显著提升检测性能。
AI.method: 设计短时运动感知体素编码捕捉局部动态变化，并通过长时运动引导的鸟瞰图（BEV）特征增强模块，自适应对齐聚合多帧特征图。
AI.result: 在nuScenes基准测试中，该方法在多个类别上超越基线方法，达到当时最先进的检测性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合时空运动信息的双尺度编码机制，MGTANet有效提升了LiDAR点云序列的3D目标检测能力。

authors_text: Octave Mariotti,Oisin Mac Aodha,Hakan Bilen
title: ViewNeRF: Unsupervised Viewpoint Estimation Using Category-Level Neural Radiance Fields
title_zh: ViewNeRF：使用类别级神经辐射场的无监督视点估计
comment: ef:Proceedings of the 33rd British Machine Vision Conference, BMVC 2022
comments: ef:Proceedings of the 33rd British Machine Vision Conference, BMVC 2022
abstract: We introduce ViewNeRF, a Neural Radiance Field-based viewpoint estimation method that learns to predict category-level viewpoints directly from images during training. While NeRF is usually trained with ground-truth camera poses, multiple extensions have been proposed to reduce the need for this expensive supervision. Nonetheless, most of these methods still struggle in complex settings with large camera movements, and are restricted to single scenes, i.e. they cannot be trained on a collection of scenes depicting the same object category. To address these issues, our method uses an analysis by synthesis approach, combining a conditional NeRF with a viewpoint predictor and a scene encoder in order to produce self-supervised reconstructions for whole object categories. Rather than focusing on high fidelity reconstruction, we target efficient and accurate viewpoint prediction in complex scenarios, e.g. 360° rotation on real data. Our model shows competitive results on synthetic and real datasets, both for single scenes and multi-instance collections.
summary: We introduce ViewNeRF, a Neural Radiance Field-based viewpoint estimation method that learns to predict category-level viewpoints directly from images during training. While NeRF is usually trained with ground-truth camera poses, multiple extensions have been proposed to reduce the need for this expensive supervision. Nonetheless, most of these methods still struggle in complex settings with large camera movements, and are restricted to single scenes, i.e. they cannot be trained on a collection of scenes depicting the same object category. To address these issues, our method uses an analysis by synthesis approach, combining a conditional NeRF with a viewpoint predictor and a scene encoder in order to produce self-supervised reconstructions for whole object categories. Rather than focusing on high fidelity reconstruction, we target efficient and accurate viewpoint prediction in complex scenarios, e.g. 360° rotation on real data. Our model shows competitive results on synthetic and real datasets, both for single scenes and multi-instance collections.
abstract_zh: 我们引入了 ViewNeRF，一种基于神经辐射场的视点估计方法，可以在训练期间学习直接从图像预测类别级视点。虽然 NeRF 通常使用地面真实相机姿势进行训练，但已经提出了多种扩展来减少这种昂贵的监督的需要。尽管如此，这些方法中的大多数仍然在相机运动较大的复杂环境中遇到困难，并且仅限于单个场景，即它们无法在描绘相同对象类别的场景集合上进行训练。为了解决这些问题，我们的方法使用综合分析方法，将条件 NeRF 与视点预测器和场景编码器相结合，以便为整个对象类别生成自监督重建。我们不是专注于高保真度重建，而是在复杂场景中实现高效、准确的视点预测，例如。真实数据 360° 旋转。我们的模型在合成数据集和真实数据集上显示了具有竞争力的结果，无论是单场景还是多实例集合。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ViewNeRF方法，通过无监督学习直接从图像中预测类别级别的视角，无需依赖真实相机姿态。
AI.motivation: 传统NeRF需要真实相机姿态进行训练，且现有方法在复杂场景和多场景集合中表现不足，难以处理大范围相机运动。
AI.method: 采用分析-合成方法，结合条件NeRF、视角预测器和场景编码器，通过自监督重建实现类别级别的视角估计。
AI.result: 在合成和真实数据集上均取得竞争力结果，支持单场景和多实例场景集合的视角预测。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了复杂场景下无监督视角估计的挑战，为类别级别NeRF应用提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出ViewNeRF方法，通过无监督学习直接从图像中预测类别级别的视角，无需依赖真实相机姿态。
ai_content.motivation: 传统NeRF需要真实相机姿态进行训练，且现有方法在复杂场景和多场景集合中表现不足，难以处理大范围相机运动。
ai_content.method: 采用分析-合成方法，结合条件NeRF、视角预测器和场景编码器，通过自监督重建实现类别级别的视角估计。

search_text: ViewNeRF: Unsupervised Viewpoint Estimation Using Category-Level Neural Radiance Fields ViewNeRF：使用类别级神经辐射场的无监督视点估计 We introduce ViewNeRF, a Neural Radiance Field-based viewpoint estimation method that learns to predict category-level viewpoints directly from images during training. While NeRF is usually trained with ground-truth camera poses, multiple extensions have been proposed to reduce the need for this expensive supervision. Nonetheless, most of these methods still struggle in complex settings with large camera movements, and are restricted to single scenes, i.e. they cannot be trained on a collection of scenes depicting the same object category. To address these issues, our method uses an analysis by synthesis approach, combining a conditional NeRF with a viewpoint predictor and a scene encoder in order to produce self-supervised reconstructions for whole object categories. Rather than focusing on high fidelity reconstruction, we target efficient and accurate viewpoint prediction in complex scenarios, e.g. 360° rotation on real data. Our model shows competitive results on synthetic and real datasets, both for single scenes and multi-instance collections. 我们引入了 ViewNeRF，一种基于神经辐射场的视点估计方法，可以在训练期间学习直接从图像预测类别级视点。虽然 NeRF 通常使用地面真实相机姿势进行训练，但已经提出了多种扩展来减少这种昂贵的监督的需要。尽管如此，这些方法中的大多数仍然在相机运动较大的复杂环境中遇到困难，并且仅限于单个场景，即它们无法在描绘相同对象类别的场景集合上进行训练。为了解决这些问题，我们的方法使用综合分析方法，将条件 NeRF 与视点预测器和场景编码器相结合，以便为整个对象类别生成自监督重建。我们不是专注于高保真度重建，而是在复杂场景中实现高效、准确的视点预测，例如。真实数据 360° 旋转。我们的模型在合成数据集和真实数据集上显示了具有竞争力的结果，无论是单场景还是多实例集合。 本文提出ViewNeRF方法，通过无监督学习直接从图像中预测类别级别的视角，无需依赖真实相机姿态。 Octave Mariotti,Oisin Mac Aodha,Hakan Bilen cs.CV

authors_text: Octave Mariotti,Oisin Mac Aodha,Hakan Bilen
title: ViewNet: Unsupervised Viewpoint Estimation from Conditional Generation
title_zh: ViewNet：条件生成的无监督视点估计
comment: ef:Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF International Conference on Computer Vision (ICCV), 2021, pp. 10418-10428
comments: ef:Proceedings of the IEEE/CVF International Conference on Computer Vision (ICCV), 2021, pp. 10418-10428
abstract: Understanding the 3D world without supervision is currently a major challenge in computer vision as the annotations required to supervise deep networks for tasks in this domain are expensive to obtain on a large scale. In this paper, we address the problem of unsupervised viewpoint estimation. We formulate this as a self-supervised learning task, where image reconstruction provides the supervision needed to predict the camera viewpoint. Specifically, we make use of pairs of images of the same object at training time, from unknown viewpoints, to self-supervise training by combining the viewpoint information from one image with the appearance information from the other. We demonstrate that using a perspective spatial transformer allows efficient viewpoint learning, outperforming existing unsupervised approaches on synthetic data, and obtains competitive results on the challenging PASCAL3D+ dataset.

We demonstrate that using a perspective spatial transformer allows efficient viewpoint learning, outperforming existing unsupervised approaches on synthetic data, and obtains competitive results on the challenging PASCAL3D+ dataset.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无监督视角估计方法，通过自监督学习利用图像重建来预测相机视角。
AI.motivation: 3D世界理解需要大量标注数据，而获取这些标注成本高昂，因此需要无监督方法减少对标注的依赖。
AI.method: 利用同一物体的图像对，结合一张图像的视角信息与另一张的外观信息，通过透视空间变换器实现高效视角学习。
AI.result: 在合成数据上优于现有无监督方法，在PASCAL3D+数据集上取得具有竞争力的结果。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了自监督学习在视角估计任务中的有效性，为无监督3D理解提供了新思路。

authors_text: Ammar Shaker,Carolin Lawrence
title: Multi-Source Survival Domain Adaptation
title_zh: 多源生存域适应
comment: 37th AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence, 2023. Includes Appendix
comments: 37th AAAI Conference on Artificial Intelligence, 2023. Includes Appendix
abstract: Survival analysis is the branch of statistics that studies the relation between the characteristics of living entities and their respective survival times, taking into account the partial information held by censored cases. A good analysis can, for example, determine whether one medical treatment for a group of patients is better than another. With the rise of machine learning, survival analysis can be modeled as learning a function that maps studied patients to their survival times. To succeed with that, there are three crucial issues to be tackled. First, some patient data is censored: we do not know the true survival times for all patients. Second, data is scarce, which led past research to treat different illness types as domains in a multi-task setup. Third, there is the need for adaptation to new or extremely rare illness types, where little or no labels are available. In contrast to previous multi-task setups, we want to investigate how to efficiently adapt to a new survival target domain from multiple survival source domains. For this, we introduce a new survival metric and the corresponding discrepancy measure between survival distributions. These allow us to define domain adaptation for survival analysis while incorporating censored data, which would otherwise have to be dropped. Our experiments on two cancer data sets reveal a superb performance on target domains, a better treatment recommendation, and a weight matrix with a plausible explanation.

A good analysis can, for example, determine whether one medical treatment for a group of patients is better than another. Second, data is scarce, which led past research to treat different illness types as domains in a multi-task setup. Third, there is the need for adaptation to new or extremely rare illness types, where little or no labels are available. In contrast to previous multi-task setups, we want to investigate how to efficiently adapt to a new survival target domain from multiple survival source domains. For this, we introduce a new survival metric and the corresponding discrepancy measure between survival distributions. These allow us to define domain adaptation for survival analysis while incorporating censored data, which would otherwise have to be dropped. Our experiments on two cancer data sets reveal a superb performance on target domains, a better treatment recommendation, and a weight matrix with a plausible explanation.
abstract_zh: 生存分析是统计学的一个分支，它考虑了审查案例所掌握的部分信息，研究生物体的特征与其各自的生存时间之间的关系。例如，良好的分析可以确定对一组患者的一种治疗是否优于另一种治疗。随着机器学习的兴起，生存分析可以建模为学习一个函数，将所研究的患者映射到他们的生存时间。为了实现这一目标，需要解决三个关键问题。首先，一些患者数据被审查：我们不知道所有患者的真实生存时间。其次，数据稀缺，这导致过去的研究将不同的疾病类型视为多任务设置中的域。第三，需要适应新的或极其罕见的疾病类型，这些疾病类型很少或根本没有可用的标签。与以前的多任务设置相比，我们想要研究如何有效地适应来自多个生存源域的新生存目标域。为此，我们引入了一种新的生存指标以及生存分布之间相应的差异度量。这些使我们能够定义生存分析的领域适应，同时合并审查数据，否则这些数据将不得不被丢弃。我们对两个癌症数据集的实验揭示了目标领域的卓越性能、更好的治疗建议以及具有合理解释的权重矩阵。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多源生存领域适应方法，通过引入新的生存度量和分布差异度量，解决生存分析中数据缺失、稀缺及新疾病类型适应的问题。
AI.motivation: 生存分析面临数据审查、样本稀缺及罕见疾病适应性差等挑战，传统多任务方法难以高效适应新领域，需开发新型领域适应框架。
AI.method: 设计生存分布差异度量指标，结合审查数据建模，通过多源领域适应框架实现跨疾病类型的模型迁移与优化。
AI.result: 在两个癌症数据集上验证，目标领域表现优异，治疗方案推荐更精准，权重矩阵具有可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效整合审查数据，提升跨领域生存分析性能，为罕见疾病预测提供可行解决方案。

authors_text: Kim Bjerge,Carsten Eie Frigaard,Henrik Karstoft
title: Motion Informed Object Detection of Small Insects in Time-lapse Camera Recordings
title_zh: 延时摄像机记录中小昆虫的运动通知对象检测
abstract: Insects as pollinators play a crucial role in ecosystem management and world food production. However, insect populations are declining, calling for efficient methods of insect monitoring. Existing methods analyze video or time-lapse images of insects in nature, but the analysis is challenging since insects are small objects in complex and dynamic scenes of natural vegetation. In this work, we provide a dataset of primary honeybees visiting three different plant species during two months of the summer period. The dataset consists of 107,387 annotated time-lapse images from multiple cameras, including 9,423 annotated insects. We present a method pipeline for detecting insects in time-lapse RGB images. The pipeline consists of a two-step process. Firstly, the time-lapse RGB images are preprocessed to enhance insects in the images. This Motion-Informed-Enhancement technique uses motion and colors to enhance insects in images. Secondly, the enhanced images are subsequently fed into a Convolutional Neural network (CNN) object detector. The method improves the deep learning object detectors You Only Look Once (YOLO) and Faster Region-based CNN (Faster R-CNN). Using Motion-Informed-Enhancement, the YOLO-detector improves the average micro F1-score from 0.49 to 0.71, and the Faster R-CNN-detector improves the average micro F1-score from 0.32 to 0.56 on the dataset. Our dataset and proposed method provide a step forward to automate the time-lapse camera monitoring of flying insects. The dataset is published on: https://vision.eng.au.dk/mie/

Secondly, the enhanced images are subsequently fed into a Convolutional Neural network (CNN) object detector. The method improves the deep learning object detectors You Only Look Once (YOLO) and Faster Region-based CNN (Faster R-CNN). Using Motion-Informed-Enhancement, the YOLO-detector improves the average micro F1-score from 0.49 to 0.71, and the Faster R-CNN-detector improves the average micro F1-score from 0.32 to 0.56 on the dataset. Our dataset and proposed method provide a step forward to automate the time-lapse camera monitoring of flying insects. The dataset is published on: https://vision.eng.au.dk/mie/
abstract_zh: 昆虫作为传粉者在生态系统管理和世界粮食生产中发挥着至关重要的作用。然而，昆虫数量正在下降，需要有效的昆虫监测方法。现有方法分析自然界中昆虫的视频或延时图像，但由于昆虫是自然植被复杂动态场景中的小物体，因此分析具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们提供了在夏季两个月期间访问三种不同植物物种的初级蜜蜂的数据集。该数据集包含来自多个摄像机的 107,387 个带注释的延时图像，其中包括 9,423 个带注释的昆虫。我们提出了一种在延时 RGB 图像中检测昆虫的方法流程。该管道由两步过程组成。首先，对延时 RGB 图像进行预处理，以增强图像中的昆虫。这种运动信息增强技术使用运动和颜色来增强图像中的昆虫。其次，增强后的图像随后被输入到卷积神经网络（CNN）目标检测器中。该方法改进了深度学习目标检测器 You Only Look Once (YOLO) 和 Faster Region-based CNN (Faster R-CNN)。使用 Motion-Informed-Enhancement，YOLO 检测器将数据集上的平均微 F1 分数从 0.49 提高到 0.71，而 Faster R-CNN 检测器将平均微 F1 分数从 0.32 提高到 0.56。我们的数据集和提出的方法为自动化飞行昆虫的延时摄像机监控迈出了一步。该数据集发布于：https://vision.eng.au.dk/mie/

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于运动信息增强的卷积神经网络方法，用于在延时摄影图像中自动检测小型昆虫。
AI.motivation: 传粉昆虫种群持续下降，需要高效监测方法。现有技术难以在复杂自然场景中准确检测微小昆虫。
AI.method: 采用两步流程：1）运动信息增强技术结合运动和颜色特征预处理图像；2）将增强图像输入YOLO和Faster R-CNN检测器进行目标检测。
AI.result: YOLO检测器的微平均F1分数从0.49提升至0.71，Faster R-CNN从0.32提升至0.56，同时发布了包含107,387张标注图像的蜜蜂监测数据集。
AI.conclusion: 该方法和数据集为自动化延时摄影昆虫监测提供了有效解决方案，推动了生态学研究中的智能监控技术发展。

search_text: Motion Informed Object Detection of Small Insects in Time-lapse Camera Recordings 延时摄像机记录中小昆虫的运动通知对象检测 Insects as pollinators play a crucial role in ecosystem management and world food production. However, insect populations are declining, calling for efficient methods of insect monitoring. Existing methods analyze video or time-lapse images of insects in nature, but the analysis is challenging since insects are small objects in complex and dynamic scenes of natural vegetation. In this work, we provide a dataset of primary honeybees visiting three different plant species during two months of the summer period. The dataset consists of 107,387 annotated time-lapse images from multiple cameras, including 9,423 annotated insects. We present a method pipeline for detecting insects in time-lapse RGB images. The pipeline consists of a two-step process. Firstly, the time-lapse RGB images are preprocessed to enhance insects in the images. This Motion-Informed-Enhancement technique uses motion and colors to enhance insects in images. Secondly, the enhanced images are subsequently fed into a Convolutional Neural network (CNN) object detector. The method improves the deep learning object detectors You Only Look Once (YOLO) and Faster Region-based CNN (Faster R-CNN). Using Motion-Informed-Enhancement, the YOLO-detector improves the average micro F1-score from 0.49 to 0.71, and the Faster R-CNN-detector improves the average micro F1-score from 0.32 to 0.56 on the dataset. Our dataset and proposed method provide a step forward to automate the time-lapse camera monitoring of flying insects. The dataset is published on: https://vision.eng.au.dk/mie/ 昆虫作为传粉者在生态系统管理和世界粮食生产中发挥着至关重要的作用。然而，昆虫数量正在下降，需要有效的昆虫监测方法。现有方法分析自然界中昆虫的视频或延时图像，但由于昆虫是自然植被复杂动态场景中的小物体，因此分析具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们提供了在夏季两个月期间访问三种不同植物物种的初级蜜蜂的数据集。该数据集包含来自多个摄像机的 107,387 个带注释的延时图像，其中包括 9,423 个带注释的昆虫。我们提出了一种在延时 RGB 图像中检测昆虫的方法流程。该管道由两步过程组成。首先，对延时 RGB 图像进行预处理，以增强图像中的昆虫。这种运动信息增强技术使用运动和颜色来增强图像中的昆虫。其次，增强后的图像随后被输入到卷积神经网络（CNN）目标检测器中。该方法改进了深度学习目标检测器 You Only Look Once (YOLO) 和 Faster Region-based CNN (Faster R-CNN)。使用 Motion-Informed-Enhancement，YOLO 检测器将数据集上的平均微 F1 分数从 0.49 提高到 0.71，而 Faster R-CNN 检测器将平均微 F1 分数从 0.32 提高到 0.56。我们的数据集和提出的方法为自动化飞行昆虫的延时摄像机监控迈出了一步。该数据集发布于：https://vision.eng.au.dk/mie/ 本文提出了一种基于运动信息增强的卷积神经网络方法，用于在延时摄影图像中自动检测小型昆虫。 Kim Bjerge,Carsten Eie Frigaard,Henrik Karstoft cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Sébastien Herbreteau,Charles Kervrann
title: Linear Combinations of Patches are Unreasonably Effective for Single-Image Denoising
title_zh: 补丁的线性组合对于单图像去噪来说非常有效
abstract: In the past decade, deep neural networks have revolutionized image denoising in achieving significant accuracy improvements by learning on datasets composed of noisy/clean image pairs. However, this strategy is extremely dependent on training data quality, which is a well-established weakness. To alleviate the requirement to learn image priors externally, single-image (a.k.a., self-supervised or zero-shot) methods perform denoising solely based on the analysis of the input noisy image without external dictionary or training dataset. This work investigates the effectiveness of linear combinations of patches for denoising under this constraint. Although conceptually very simple, we show that linear combinations of patches are enough to achieve state-of-the-art performance. The proposed parametric approach relies on quadratic risk approximation via multiple pilot images to guide the estimation of the combination weights. Experiments on images corrupted artificially with Gaussian noise as well as on real-world noisy images demonstrate that our method is on par with the very best single-image denoisers, outperforming the recent neural network based techniques, while being much faster and fully interpretable.
summary: In the past decade, deep neural networks have revolutionized image denoising in achieving significant accuracy improvements by learning on datasets composed of noisy/clean image pairs. However, this strategy is extremely dependent on training data quality, which is a well-established weakness. To alleviate the requirement to learn image priors externally, single-image (a.k.a., self-supervised or zero-shot) methods perform denoising solely based on the analysis of the input noisy image without external dictionary or training dataset. This work investigates the effectiveness of linear combinations of patches for denoising under this constraint. Although conceptually very simple, we show that linear combinations of patches are enough to achieve state-of-the-art performance. The proposed parametric approach relies on quadratic risk approximation via multiple pilot images to guide the estimation of the combination weights. Experiments on images corrupted artificially with Gaussian noise as well as on real-world noisy images demonstrate that our method is on par with the very best single-image denoisers, outperforming the recent neural network based techniques, while being much faster and fully interpretable.
abstract_zh: 在过去的十年中，深度神经网络彻底改变了图像去噪，通过学习由噪声/干净图像对组成的数据集，显着提高了准确性。然而，这种策略极其依赖于训练数据质量，这是一个公认的弱点。为了减轻从外部学习图像先验的要求，单图像（也称为自监督或零样本）方法仅基于对输入噪声图像的分析来执行去噪，而无需外部字典或训练数据集。这项工作研究了在此约束下用于去噪的补丁线性组合的有效性。尽管概念上非常简单，但我们证明补丁的线性组合足以实现最先进的性能。所提出的参数方法依赖于通过多个引导图像的二次风险近似来指导组合权重的估计。对高斯噪声人为损坏的图像以及现实世界的噪声图像进行的实验表明，我们的方法与最好的单图像降噪器相当，优于最新的基于神经网络的技术，同时速度更快且完全可解释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图像块线性组合的单图像去噪方法，无需外部训练数据即可实现高性能去噪。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习去噪方法依赖高质量训练数据，而单图像去噪方法无需外部数据，但现有方法复杂且难以解释。本文旨在探索简单有效的自监督去噪方案。
AI.method: 通过多组引导图像进行二次风险近似，参数化估计图像块组合权重，利用线性组合实现去噪。
AI.result: 在高斯噪声和真实噪声图像上均达到SOTA性能，优于最新神经网络方法，且速度更快、完全可解释。
AI.conclusion: 线性块组合方法在单图像去噪中表现优异，为复杂模型提供了简单、高效且可解释的替代方案。

authors_text: Eduard Eiben,Diptapriyo Majumdar,M. S. Ramanujan
title: An Improved Time-Efficient Approximate Kernelization for Connected Treedepth Deletion Set
title_zh: 一种改进的省时的连通树深度删除集的近似核化
comment: 19 pages, 1 figures. Preliminary version appeared in Proceedings of WG-2022
comments: 19 pages, 1 figures. Preliminary version appeared in Proceedings of WG-2022
abstract: We study the CONNECTED η-TREEDEPTH DELETION problem where the input instance is an undireted graph G = (V, E) and an integer k. The objective is to decide if G has a set S \subseteq V(G) of at most k vertices such that G - S has treedepth at most ηand G[S] is connected. As this problem naturally generalizes the well-known CONNECTED VERTEX COVER, when parameterized by solution size k, the CONNECTED η-TREEDEPTH DELETION does not admit polynomial kernel unless NP \subseteq coNP/poly. This motivates us to design an approximate kernel of polynomial size for this problem. In this paper, we show that for every 0 < ε<= 1, CONNECTED η-TREEDEPTH DELETION SET admits a (1+ε)-approximate kernel with O(k^{2^{η+ 1/ε}}) vertices, i.e. a polynomial-sized approximate kernelization scheme (PSAKS).
summary: We study the CONNECTED η-TREEDEPTH DELETION problem where the input instance is an undireted graph G = (V, E) and an integer k. The objective is to decide if G has a set S \subseteq V(G) of at most k vertices such that G - S has treedepth at most ηand G[S] is connected. As this problem naturally generalizes the well-known CONNECTED VERTEX COVER, when parameterized by solution size k, the CONNECTED η-TREEDEPTH DELETION does not admit polynomial kernel unless NP \subseteq coNP/poly. This motivates us to design an approximate kernel of polynomial size for this problem. In this paper, we show that for every 0 < ε<= 1, CONNECTED η-TREEDEPTH DELETION SET admits a (1+ε)-approximate kernel with O(k^{2^{η+ 1/ε}}) vertices, i.e. a polynomial-sized approximate kernelization scheme (PSAKS).
abstract_zh: 我们研究了 CONNECTED η-TREEDEPTH DELETION 问题，其中输入实例是一个无方向图 G = (V, E) 和一个整数 k。目标是确定 G 是否有一个最多包含 k 个顶点的集合 S \subseteq V(G)，使得 G - S 的树深度最多为 η 并且 G[S] 是连通的。由于这个问题自然地推广了众所周知的 CONNECTED VERTEX COVER，当通过解大小 k 参数化时，CONNECTED η-TREEDEPTH DELETION 不承认多项式核，除非 NP \subseteq coNP/poly。这促使我们为这个问题设计一个多项式大小的近似核。在本文中，我们证明，对于每个 0 < ε<= 1，CONNECTED η-TREEDEPTH DELETION SET 承认具有 O(k^{2^{η+ 1/ε}}) 个顶点的 (1+ε) 近似核，即多项式大小的近似核化方案 (PSAKS)。

AI.tldr: 研究 Connected η-Treedepth Deletion 问题，即从图中删除最多 k 个顶点使得剩余图树深度不超过 η 且删除点集连通，并设计多项式大小的近似核。
AI.motivation: 由于 Connected η-Treedepth Deletion 问题在参数化解不存在多项式核（除非 NP⊆coNP/poly），因此需要设计近似核方案来绕过这一不可能性结果。
AI.method: 提出一种 (1+ε)-近似核化方案，通过精心构造归约规则和近似参数化归约，得到顶点数为 O(k^{2^{η+1/ε}}) 的近似核。
AI.result: 对于任意 0<ε≤1，Connected η-Treedepth Deletion 问题 admits 一个 (1+ε)-近似核，核大小为 O(k^{2^{η+1/ε}})，即存在多项式大小的近似核化方案（PSAKS）。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了即使在标准多项式核不存在的情况下，可以通过近似核化方案在多项式时间内获得近似解，为参数化近似算法提供了新的思路。

ai_content.tldr: 研究 Connected η-Treedepth Deletion 问题，即从图中删除最多 k 个顶点使得剩余图树深度不超过 η 且删除点集连通，并设计多项式大小的近似核。
ai_content.motivation: 由于 Connected η-Treedepth Deletion 问题在参数化解不存在多项式核（除非 NP⊆coNP/poly），因此需要设计近似核方案来绕过这一不可能性结果。
ai_content.method: 提出一种 (1+ε)-近似核化方案，通过精心构造归约规则和近似参数化归约，得到顶点数为 O(k^{2^{η+1/ε}}) 的近似核。
ai_content.result: 对于任意 0<ε≤1，Connected η-Treedepth Deletion 问题 admits 一个 (1+ε)-近似核，核大小为 O(k^{2^{η+1/ε}})，即存在多项式大小的近似核化方案（PSAKS）。
ai_content.conclusion: 该工作证明了即使在标准多项式核不存在的情况下，可以通过近似核化方案在多项式时间内获得近似解，为参数化近似算法提供了新的思路。

search_text: An Improved Time-Efficient Approximate Kernelization for Connected Treedepth Deletion Set 一种改进的省时的连通树深度删除集的近似核化 We study the CONNECTED η-TREEDEPTH DELETION problem where the input instance is an undireted graph G = (V, E) and an integer k. The objective is to decide if G has a set S \subseteq V(G) of at most k vertices such that G - S has treedepth at most ηand G[S] is connected. As this problem naturally generalizes the well-known CONNECTED VERTEX COVER, when parameterized by solution size k, the CONNECTED η-TREEDEPTH DELETION does not admit polynomial kernel unless NP \subseteq coNP/poly. This motivates us to design an approximate kernel of polynomial size for this problem. In this paper, we show that for every 0 < ε<= 1, CONNECTED η-TREEDEPTH DELETION SET admits a (1+ε)-approximate kernel with O(k^{2^{η+ 1/ε}}) vertices, i.e. a polynomial-sized approximate kernelization scheme (PSAKS). 我们研究了 CONNECTED η-TREEDEPTH DELETION 问题，其中输入实例是一个无方向图 G = (V, E) 和一个整数 k。目标是确定 G 是否有一个最多包含 k 个顶点的集合 S \subseteq V(G)，使得 G - S 的树深度最多为 η 并且 G[S] 是连通的。由于这个问题自然地推广了众所周知的 CONNECTED VERTEX COVER，当通过解大小 k 参数化时，CONNECTED η-TREEDEPTH DELETION 不承认多项式核，除非 NP \subseteq coNP/poly。这促使我们为这个问题设计一个多项式大小的近似核。在本文中，我们证明，对于每个 0 < ε<= 1，CONNECTED η-TREEDEPTH DELETION SET 承认具有 O(k^{2^{η+ 1/ε}}) 个顶点的 (1+ε) 近似核，即多项式大小的近似核化方案 (PSAKS)。 研究 Connected η-Treedepth Deletion 问题，即从图中删除最多 k 个顶点使得剩余图树深度不超过 η 且删除点集连通，并设计多项式大小的近似核。 Eduard Eiben,Diptapriyo Majumdar,M. S. Ramanujan cs.DS,cs.DM

authors_text: Md. Sharifur Rahman,Professor Girijesh Prasad
title: A Comprehensive Study on Machine Learning Methods to Increase the Prediction Accuracy of Classifiers and Reduce the Number of Medical Tests Required to Diagnose Alzheimer'S Disease
title_zh: 机器学习方法的综合研究，以提高分类器的预测准确性并减少诊断阿尔茨海默病所需的医学测试数量
comment: Presented at the 3rd International Conference on Machine Learning Techniques and Data Science (MLDS 2022)
comments: Presented at the 3rd International Conference on Machine Learning Techniques and Data Science (MLDS 2022)
abstract: Alzheimer's patients gradually lose their ability to think, behave, and interact with others. Medical history, laboratory tests, daily activities, and personality changes can all be used to diagnose the disorder. A series of time-consuming and expensive tests are used to diagnose the illness. The most effective way to identify Alzheimer's disease is using a Random-forest classifier in this study, along with various other Machine Learning techniques. The main goal of this study is to fine-tune the classifier to detect illness with fewer tests while maintaining a reasonable disease discovery accuracy. We successfully identified the condition in almost 94% of cases using four of the thirty frequently utilized indicators.

Medical history, laboratory tests, daily activities, and personality changes can all be used to diagnose the disorder. A series of time-consuming and expensive tests are used to diagnose the illness. The main goal of this study is to fine-tune the classifier to detect illness with fewer tests while maintaining a reasonable disease discovery accuracy. We successfully identified the condition in almost 94% of cases using four of the thirty frequently utilized indicators.
abstract_zh: 阿尔茨海默氏症患者逐渐丧失思考、行为和与他人互动的能力。病史、实验室检查、日常活动和性格变化都可以用来诊断这种疾病。使用一系列耗时且昂贵的测试来诊断疾病。 The most effective way to identify Alzheimer's disease is using a Random-forest classifier in this study, along with various other Machine Learning techniques. The main goal of this study is to fine-tune the classifier to detect illness with fewer tests while maintaining a reasonable disease discovery accuracy.我们使用 30 个常用指标中的 4 个成功识别了近 94% 的病例。

AI.tldr: 本研究旨在通过机器学习方法提高分类器预测准确性，同时减少诊断阿尔茨海默病所需的医疗测试数量。
AI.motivation: 阿尔茨海默病诊断依赖耗时且昂贵的医疗测试，亟需更高效的方法以减少测试次数同时保持诊断准确性。
AI.method: 采用随机森林分类器及其他机器学习技术，通过优化分类器参数以在较少测试指标下保持较高诊断准确率。
AI.result: 通过优化后的分类器，使用四个常用指标成功识别了94%的阿尔茨海默病病例。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证实了机器学习方法在减少诊断测试数量的同时维持较高准确率的可行性，为阿尔茨海默病的高效诊断提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yixiong Chen,Jingxian Li,Chris Ding,Li Liu
title: Rethinking Two Consensuses of the Transferability in Deep Learning
title_zh: 重新思考深度学习可迁移性的两个共识
abstract: Deep transfer learning (DTL) has formed a long-term quest toward enabling deep neural networks (DNNs) to reuse historical experiences as efficiently as humans. This ability is named knowledge transferability. A commonly used paradigm for DTL is firstly learning general knowledge (pre-training) and then reusing (fine-tuning) them for a specific target task. There are two consensuses of transferability of pre-trained DNNs: (1) a larger domain gap between pre-training and downstream data brings lower transferability; (2) the transferability gradually decreases from lower layers (near input) to higher layers (near output). However, these consensuses were basically drawn from the experiments based on natural images, which limits their scope of application. This work aims to study and complement them from a broader perspective by proposing a method to measure the transferability of pre-trained DNN parameters. Our experiments on twelve diverse image classification datasets get similar conclusions to the previous consensuses. More importantly, two new findings are presented, i.e., (1) in addition to the domain gap, a larger data amount and huge dataset diversity of downstream target task also prohibit the transferability; (2) although the lower layers learn basic image features, they are usually not the most transferable layers due to their domain sensitivity.
summary: Deep transfer learning (DTL) has formed a long-term quest toward enabling deep neural networks (DNNs) to reuse historical experiences as efficiently as humans. This ability is named knowledge transferability. A commonly used paradigm for DTL is firstly learning general knowledge (pre-training) and then reusing (fine-tuning) them for a specific target task. There are two consensuses of transferability of pre-trained DNNs: (1) a larger domain gap between pre-training and downstream data brings lower transferability; (2) the transferability gradually decreases from lower layers (near input) to higher layers (near output). However, these consensuses were basically drawn from the experiments based on natural images, which limits their scope of application. This work aims to study and complement them from a broader perspective by proposing a method to measure the transferability of pre-trained DNN parameters. Our experiments on twelve diverse image classification datasets get similar conclusions to the previous consensuses. More importantly, two new findings are presented, i.e., (1) in addition to the domain gap, a larger data amount and huge dataset diversity of downstream target task also prohibit the transferability; (2) although the lower layers learn basic image features, they are usually not the most transferable layers due to their domain sensitivity.
abstract_zh: 深度迁移学习 (DTL) 长期以来一直致力于使深度神经网络 (DNN) 能够像人类一样高效地重用历史经验。这种能力称为知识可转移性。 DTL 的常用范例是首先学习一般知识（预训练），然后针对特定目标任务重用（微调）它们。关于预训练DNN的可迁移性有两个共识：（1）预训练和下游数据之间较大的域差距带来较低的可迁移性； （2）可迁移性从较低层（近输入）到较高层（近输出）逐渐降低。然而，这些共识基本上都是基于自然图像的实验得出的，这限制了它们的应用范围。这项工作旨在通过提出一种测量预训练 DNN 参数可迁移性的方法，从更广泛的角度研究和补充它们。我们对十二个不同图像分类数据集的实验得到了与之前的共识相似的结论。更重要的是，提出了两个新的发现，即（1）除了领域差距之外，下游目标任务的较大数据量和巨大的数据集多样性也阻碍了可迁移性； （2）虽然较低层学习基本的图像特征，但由于其域敏感性，它们通常不是最可转移的层。

AI.tldr: 本文重新审视深度学习中预训练模型迁移能力的两个共识，并提出新的发现。
AI.motivation: 现有迁移学习的两个共识基于自然图像实验，可能限制了其在更广泛场景中的适用性，需从更广视角验证和补充。
AI.method: 提出一种衡量预训练DNN参数迁移能力的方法，并在十二个图像分类数据集上进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验验证了原有共识，同时发现下游任务的数据量、多样性及层间迁移能力与原有结论存在差异。
AI.conclusion: 迁移能力受领域差距、数据规模及多样性影响，低层特征因领域敏感性未必最易迁移，需综合多因素分析。

search_text: Rethinking Two Consensuses of the Transferability in Deep Learning 重新思考深度学习可迁移性的两个共识 Deep transfer learning (DTL) has formed a long-term quest toward enabling deep neural networks (DNNs) to reuse historical experiences as efficiently as humans. This ability is named knowledge transferability. A commonly used paradigm for DTL is firstly learning general knowledge (pre-training) and then reusing (fine-tuning) them for a specific target task. There are two consensuses of transferability of pre-trained DNNs: (1) a larger domain gap between pre-training and downstream data brings lower transferability; (2) the transferability gradually decreases from lower layers (near input) to higher layers (near output). However, these consensuses were basically drawn from the experiments based on natural images, which limits their scope of application. This work aims to study and complement them from a broader perspective by proposing a method to measure the transferability of pre-trained DNN parameters. Our experiments on twelve diverse image classification datasets get similar conclusions to the previous consensuses. More importantly, two new findings are presented, i.e., (1) in addition to the domain gap, a larger data amount and huge dataset diversity of downstream target task also prohibit the transferability; (2) although the lower layers learn basic image features, they are usually not the most transferable layers due to their domain sensitivity. 深度迁移学习 (DTL) 长期以来一直致力于使深度神经网络 (DNN) 能够像人类一样高效地重用历史经验。这种能力称为知识可转移性。 DTL 的常用范例是首先学习一般知识（预训练），然后针对特定目标任务重用（微调）它们。关于预训练DNN的可迁移性有两个共识：（1）预训练和下游数据之间较大的域差距带来较低的可迁移性； （2）可迁移性从较低层（近输入）到较高层（近输出）逐渐降低。然而，这些共识基本上都是基于自然图像的实验得出的，这限制了它们的应用范围。这项工作旨在通过提出一种测量预训练 DNN 参数可迁移性的方法，从更广泛的角度研究和补充它们。我们对十二个不同图像分类数据集的实验得到了与之前的共识相似的结论。更重要的是，提出了两个新的发现，即（1）除了领域差距之外，下游目标任务的较大数据量和巨大的数据集多样性也阻碍了可迁移性； （2）虽然较低层学习基本的图像特征，但由于其域敏感性，它们通常不是最可转移的层。 本文重新审视深度学习中预训练模型迁移能力的两个共识，并提出新的发现。 Yixiong Chen,Jingxian Li,Chris Ding,Li Liu cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Augustinos D. Saravanos,Isin M. Balci,Efstathios Bakolas,Evangelos A. Theodorou
title: Distributed Model Predictive Covariance Steering
title_zh: 分布式模型预测协方差指导
comment: ef:IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2024
comments: ef:IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS) 2024
abstract: This paper proposes Distributed Model Predictive Covariance Steering (DiMPCS) for multi-agent control under stochastic uncertainty. The scope of our approach is to blend covariance steering theory, distributed optimization and model predictive control (MPC) into a single framework that is safe, scalable and decentralized. Initially, we pose a problem formulation that uses the Wasserstein distance to steer the state distributions of a multi-agent system to desired targets, and probabilistic constraints to ensure safety. We then transform this problem into a finite-dimensional optimization one by utilizing a disturbance feedback policy parametrization for covariance steering and a tractable approximation of the safety constraints. To solve the latter problem, we derive a decentralized consensus-based algorithm using the Alternating Direction Method of Multipliers. This method is then extended to a receding horizon form, which yields the proposed DiMPCS algorithm. Simulation experiments on a variety of multi-robot tasks with up to hundreds of robots demonstrate the effectiveness of DiMPCS. The superior scalability and performance of the proposed method is also highlighted through a comparison against related stochastic MPC approaches. Finally, hardware results on a multi-robot platform also verify the applicability of DiMPCS on real systems. A video with all results is available in https://youtu.be/tzWqOzuj2kQ.
summary: This paper proposes Distributed Model Predictive Covariance Steering (DiMPCS) for multi-agent control under stochastic uncertainty. The scope of our approach is to blend covariance steering theory, distributed optimization and model predictive control (MPC) into a single framework that is safe, scalable and decentralized. Initially, we pose a problem formulation that uses the Wasserstein distance to steer the state distributions of a multi-agent system to desired targets, and probabilistic constraints to ensure safety. We then transform this problem into a finite-dimensional optimization one by utilizing a disturbance feedback policy parametrization for covariance steering and a tractable approximation of the safety constraints. To solve the latter problem, we derive a decentralized consensus-based algorithm using the Alternating Direction Method of Multipliers. This method is then extended to a receding horizon form, which yields the proposed DiMPCS algorithm. Simulation experiments on a variety of multi-robot tasks with up to hundreds of robots demonstrate the effectiveness of DiMPCS. The superior scalability and performance of the proposed method is also highlighted through a comparison against related stochastic MPC approaches. Finally, hardware results on a multi-robot platform also verify the applicability of DiMPCS on real systems. A video with all results is available in https://youtu.be/tzWqOzuj2kQ.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了随机不确定性下多智能体控制的分布式模型预测协方差引导（DiMPCS）。我们的方法的范围是将协方差引导理论、分布式优化和模型预测控制（MPC）融合到一个安全、可扩展和去中心化的单一框架中。最初，我们提出了一个问题表述，它使用 Wasserstein 距离将多智能体系统的状态分布引导至所需目标，并使用概率约束来确保安全。然后，我们通过利用协方差控制的干扰反馈策略参数化和安全约束的易于处理的近似，将这个问题转化为有限维优化问题。为了解决后一个问题，我们使用乘数交替方向法推导出基于去中心化共识的算法。然后将该方法扩展到水平后退形式，从而产生所提出的 DiMPCS 算法。对多达数百个机器人的各种多机器人任务进行的仿真实验证明了 DiMPCS 的有效性。通过与相关随机 MPC 方法的比较，还强调了所提出方法的卓越可扩展性和性能。最后，多机器人平台上的硬件结果也验证了DiMPCS在实际系统上的适用性。包含所有结果的视频可在 https://youtu.be/tzWqOzuj2kQ 中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种分布式模型预测协方差控制（DiMPCS），用于在随机不确定性下的多智能体系统中实现安全、可扩展和去中心化的控制。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以同时满足多智能体系统在随机环境下的安全性、可扩展性和去中心化控制需求，需融合协方差控制理论与分布式优化技术。
AI.method: 结合协方差控制理论、分布式优化与模型预测控制（MPC），利用Wasserstein距离定义分布控制目标，通过扰动反馈策略参数化和安全约束近似转化为有限维优化问题，并采用基于ADMM的分布式共识算法求解。
AI.result: 仿真验证了DiMPCS在数百机器人任务中的有效性，硬件实验进一步证明其在实际系统中的适用性，且性能优于相关随机MPC方法。
AI.conclusion: DiMPCS通过去中心化架构实现了多智能体系统的高效协方差控制，为大规模随机环境下的协同控制提供了新方法。

authors_text: Hubert Leterme,Kévin Polisano,Valérie Perrier,Karteek Alahari
title: From CNNs to Shift-Invariant Twin Models Based on Complex Wavelets
title_zh: 从 CNN 到基于复小波的平移不变孪生模型
abstract: We propose a novel method to increase shift invariance and prediction accuracy in convolutional neural networks. Specifically, we replace the first-layer combination "real-valued convolutions + max pooling" (RMax) by "complex-valued convolutions + modulus" (CMod), which is stable to translations, or shifts. To justify our approach, we claim that CMod and RMax produce comparable outputs when the convolution kernel is band-pass and oriented (Gabor-like filter). In this context, CMod can therefore be considered as a stable alternative to RMax. To enforce this property, we constrain the convolution kernels to adopt such a Gabor-like structure. The corresponding architecture is called mathematical twin, because it employs a well-defined mathematical operator to mimic the behavior of the original, freely-trained model. Our approach achieves superior accuracy on ImageNet and CIFAR-10 classification tasks, compared to prior methods based on low-pass filtering. Arguably, our approach's emphasis on retaining high-frequency details contributes to a better balance between shift invariance and information preservation, resulting in improved performance. Furthermore, it has a lower computational cost and memory footprint than concurrent work, making it a promising solution for practical implementation.
summary: We propose a novel method to increase shift invariance and prediction accuracy in convolutional neural networks. Specifically, we replace the first-layer combination "real-valued convolutions + max pooling" (RMax) by "complex-valued convolutions + modulus" (CMod), which is stable to translations, or shifts. To justify our approach, we claim that CMod and RMax produce comparable outputs when the convolution kernel is band-pass and oriented (Gabor-like filter). In this context, CMod can therefore be considered as a stable alternative to RMax. To enforce this property, we constrain the convolution kernels to adopt such a Gabor-like structure. The corresponding architecture is called mathematical twin, because it employs a well-defined mathematical operator to mimic the behavior of the original, freely-trained model. Our approach achieves superior accuracy on ImageNet and CIFAR-10 classification tasks, compared to prior methods based on low-pass filtering. Arguably, our approach's emphasis on retaining high-frequency details contributes to a better balance between shift invariance and information preservation, resulting in improved performance. Furthermore, it has a lower computational cost and memory footprint than concurrent work, making it a promising solution for practical implementation.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新方法来提高卷积神经网络的平移不变性和预测精度。具体来说，我们将第一层组合“实值卷积+最大池化”（RMax）替换为“复值卷积+模数”（CMod），它对于平移或移位是稳定的。为了证明我们的方法的合理性，我们声称当卷积核是带通且定向的（类 Gabor 滤波器）时，CMod 和 RMax 会产生可比较的输出。因此，在这种情况下，CMod 可以被视为 RMax 的稳定替代方案。为了强制执行此属性，我们限制卷积核采用此类 Gabor 结构。相应的架构称为数学孪生，因为它采用定义明确的数学运算符来模仿原始的、自由训练的模型的行为。与之前基于低通滤波的方法相比，我们的方法在 ImageNet 和 CIFAR-10 分类任务上实现了卓越的准确性。可以说，我们的方法强调保留高频细节有助于在平移不变性和信息保存之间取得更好的平衡，从而提高性能。此外，它比并发工作具有更低的计算成本和内存占用，使其成为实际实现的有前途的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于复数小波的新型卷积神经网络架构，通过替换传统实数卷积与最大池化模块，提升模型平移不变性与分类精度。
AI.motivation: 传统CNN的实数卷积与最大池化操作存在平移敏感性缺陷，导致特征提取不稳定，且低通滤波方法在保持高频细节方面表现不足。
AI.method: 将首层结构从'实数卷积+最大池化'(RMax)替换为'复数卷积+模运算'(CMod)，通过约束卷积核为Gabor-like结构，构建数学双胞胎模型以保持平移稳定性。
AI.result: 在ImageNet和CIFAR-10数据集上分类准确率优于现有低通滤波方法，同时计算成本与内存占用更低，验证了高频细节保留与平移不变性的平衡优势。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过复数卷积与数学运算约束，有效解决了CNN的平移敏感问题，在保持信息完整性的同时提升性能，为实际应用提供高效解决方案。

Our approach achieves superior accuracy on ImageNet and CIFAR-10 classification tasks, compared to prior methods based on low-pass filtering. Arguably, our approach's emphasis on retaining high-frequency details contributes to a better balance between shift invariance and information preservation, resulting in improved performance. Furthermore, it has a lower computational cost and memory footprint than concurrent work, making it a promising solution for practical implementation. 我们提出了一种新方法来提高卷积神经网络的平移不变性和预测精度。具体来说，我们将第一层组合“实值卷积+最大池化”（RMax）替换为“复值卷积+模数”（CMod），它对于平移或移位是稳定的。为了证明我们的方法的合理性，我们声称当卷积核是带通且定向的（类 Gabor 滤波器）时，CMod 和 RMax 会产生可比较的输出。因此，在这种情况下，CMod 可以被视为 RMax 的稳定替代方案。为了强制执行此属性，我们限制卷积核采用此类 Gabor 结构。相应的架构称为数学孪生，因为它采用定义明确的数学运算符来模仿原始的、自由训练的模型的行为。与之前基于低通滤波的方法相比，我们的方法在 ImageNet 和 CIFAR-10 分类任务上实现了卓越的准确性。可以说，我们的方法强调保留高频细节有助于在平移不变性和信息保存之间取得更好的平衡，从而提高性能。此外，它比并发工作具有更低的计算成本和内存占用，使其成为实际实现的有前途的解决方案。 本文提出一种基于复数小波的新型卷积神经网络架构，通过替换传统实数卷积与最大池化模块，提升模型平移不变性与分类精度。 Hubert Leterme,Kévin Polisano,Valérie Perrier,Karteek Alahari cs.CV,cs.AI,eess.IV,stat.ML

authors_text: Bumgeun Park,Jihui Lee,Taeyoung Kim,Dongsoo Har
title: Kick-motion Training with DQN in AI Soccer Environment
title_zh: AI 足球环境中使用 DQN 进行踢球动作训练
abstract: This paper presents a technique to train a robot to perform kick-motion in AI soccer by using reinforcement learning (RL). In RL, an agent interacts with an environment and learns to choose an action in a state at each step. When training RL algorithms, a problem called the curse of dimensionality (COD) can occur if the dimension of the state is high and the number of training data is low. The COD often causes degraded performance of RL models. In the situation of the robot kicking the ball, as the ball approaches the robot, the robot chooses the action based on the information obtained from the soccer field. In order not to suffer COD, the training data, which are experiences in the case of RL, should be collected evenly from all areas of the soccer field over (theoretically infinite) time. In this paper, we attempt to use the relative coordinate system (RCS) as the state for training kick-motion of robot agent, instead of using the absolute coordinate system (ACS). Using the RCS eliminates the necessity for the agent to know all the (state) information of entire soccer field and reduces the dimension of the state that the agent needs to know to perform kick-motion, and consequently alleviates COD. The training based on the RCS is performed with the widely used Deep Q-network (DQN) and tested in the AI Soccer environment implemented with Webots simulation software.
summary: This paper presents a technique to train a robot to perform kick-motion in AI soccer by using reinforcement learning (RL). In RL, an agent interacts with an environment and learns to choose an action in a state at each step. When training RL algorithms, a problem called the curse of dimensionality (COD) can occur if the dimension of the state is high and the number of training data is low. The COD often causes degraded performance of RL models. In the situation of the robot kicking the ball, as the ball approaches the robot, the robot chooses the action based on the information obtained from the soccer field. In order not to suffer COD, the training data, which are experiences in the case of RL, should be collected evenly from all areas of the soccer field over (theoretically infinite) time. In this paper, we attempt to use the relative coordinate system (RCS) as the state for training kick-motion of robot agent, instead of using the absolute coordinate system (ACS). Using the RCS eliminates the necessity for the agent to know all the (state) information of entire soccer field and reduces the dimension of the state that the agent needs to know to perform kick-motion, and consequently alleviates COD. The training based on the RCS is performed with the widely used Deep Q-network (DQN) and tested in the AI Soccer environment implemented with Webots simulation software.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种利用强化学习（RL）训练机器人在人工智能足球中执行踢球动作的技术。在强化学习中，智能体与环境交互，并学习在每一步的状态中选择一个动作。训练 RL 算法时，如果状态维数较高且训练数据数量较低，则会出现称为维数灾难 (COD) 的问题。 COD 通常会导致 RL 模型的性能下降。在机器人踢球的情况下，当球接近机器人时，机器人根据从足球场获得的信息选择动作。为了不遭受 COD，训练数据（RL 中的经验）应该在（理论上无限）时间内从足球场的所有区域均匀收集。在本文中，我们尝试使用相对坐标系（RCS）作为训练机器人代理踢动作的状态，而不是使用绝对坐标系（ACS）。使用 RCS 消除了智能体​​了解整个足球场的所有（状态）信息的必要性，并减少了智能体执行踢球动作所需的状态维度，从而减轻了 COD。基于RCS的训练是通过广泛使用的深度Q网络（DQN）进行的，并在使用Webots模拟软件实现的AI足球环境中进行测试。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用深度Q网络（DQN）在AI足球环境中训练机器人完成踢球动作，通过相对坐标系（RCS）降低状态维度以解决高维状态空间下的维度灾难问题。
AI.motivation: 传统绝对坐标系（ACS）导致状态空间维度过高，引发维度灾难（COD），影响强化学习模型性能。相对坐标系能减少机器人需感知的信息量，从而缓解COD。
AI.method: 采用相对坐标系（RCS）作为状态表示，结合深度Q网络（DQN）算法，在Webots仿真环境中训练机器人踢球动作。
AI.result: 实验表明，基于RCS的训练方法有效降低了状态维度，提升了踢球动作的学习效率和稳定性，验证了方法在AI足球场景中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 相对坐标系与DQN的结合为高维状态空间下的机器人运动训练提供了有效解决方案，为AI足球领域强化学习应用提供了新思路。

authors_text: Yadan Li,Mohammad Ali Armin,Simon Denman,David Ahmedt-Aristizabal
title: Automated Coronary Arteries Labeling Via Geometric Deep Learning
title_zh: 通过几何深度学习自动标记冠状动脉
comment: ef:2023 IEEE International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI)
comments: ef:2023 IEEE International Symposium on Biomedical Imaging (ISBI)
abstract: Automatic labelling of anatomical structures, such as coronary arteries, is critical for diagnosis, yet existing (non-deep learning) methods are limited by a reliance on prior topological knowledge of the expected tree-like structures. As the structure such vascular systems is often difficult to conceptualize, graph-based representations have become popular due to their ability to capture the geometric and topological properties of the morphology in an orientation-independent and abstract manner. However, graph-based learning for automated labeling of tree-like anatomical structures has received limited attention in the literature. The majority of prior studies have limitations in the entity graph construction, are dependent on topological structures, and have limited accuracy due to the anatomical variability between subjects. In this paper, we propose an intuitive graph representation method, well suited to use with 3D coordinate data obtained from angiography scans. We subsequently seek to analyze subject-specific graphs using geometric deep learning. The proposed models leverage expert annotated labels from 141 patients to learn representations of each coronary segment, while capturing the effects of anatomical variability within the training data. We investigate different variants of so-called message passing neural networks. Through extensive evaluations, our pipeline achieves a promising weighted F1-score of 0.805 for labeling coronary artery (13 classes) for a five-fold cross-validation. Considering the ability of graph models in dealing with irregular data, and their scalability for data segmentation, this work highlights the potential of such methods to provide quantitative evidence to support the decisions of medical experts.
summary: Automatic labelling of anatomical structures, such as coronary arteries, is critical for diagnosis, yet existing (non-deep learning) methods are limited by a reliance on prior topological knowledge of the expected tree-like structures. As the structure such vascular systems is often difficult to conceptualize, graph-based representations have become popular due to their ability to capture the geometric and topological properties of the morphology in an orientation-independent and abstract manner. However, graph-based learning for automated labeling of tree-like anatomical structures has received limited attention in the literature. The majority of prior studies have limitations in the entity graph construction, are dependent on topological structures, and have limited accuracy due to the anatomical variability between subjects. In this paper, we propose an intuitive graph representation method, well suited to use with 3D coordinate data obtained from angiography scans. We subsequently seek to analyze subject-specific graphs using geometric deep learning. The proposed models leverage expert annotated labels from 141 patients to learn representations of each coronary segment, while capturing the effects of anatomical variability within the training data. We investigate different variants of so-called message passing neural networks. Through extensive evaluations, our pipeline achieves a promising weighted F1-score of 0.805 for labeling coronary artery (13 classes) for a five-fold cross-validation. Considering the ability of graph models in dealing with irregular data, and their scalability for data segmentation, this work highlights the potential of such methods to provide quantitative evidence to support the decisions of medical experts.
abstract_zh: 解剖结构（例如冠状动脉）的自动标记对于诊断至关重要，但现有（非深度学习）方法由于依赖于预期树状结构的先前拓扑知识而受到限制。由于这种血管系统的结构通常难以概念化，基于图形的表示由于能够以独立于方向和抽象的方式捕获形态的几何和拓扑特性而变得流行。然而，用于自动标记树状解剖结构的基于图的学​​习在文献中受到的关注有限。大多数先前的研究在实体图构建方面存在局限性，依赖于拓扑结构，并且由于受试者之间的解剖变异性而导致准确性有限。在本文中，我们提出了一种直观的图形表示方法，非常适合与从血管造影扫描获得的 3D 坐标数据一起使用。随后，我们寻求使用几何深度学习来分析特定于主题的图表。所提出的模型利用来自 141 名患者的专家注释标签来学习每个冠状动脉节段的表示，同时捕获训练数据中解剖变异性的影响。我们研究所谓的消息传递神经网络的不同变体。通过广泛的评估，我们的管道在标记冠状动脉（13 类）以进行五重交叉验证方面实现了 0.805 的有希望的加权 F1 分数。考虑到图模型处理不规则数据的能力及其数据分割的可扩展性，这项工作凸显了此类方法在提供定量证据以支持医学专家决策方面的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于几何深度学习的冠状动脉自动标记方法，利用图神经网络处理血管结构的拓扑和几何特性。
AI.motivation: 传统非深度学习方法依赖先验拓扑知识，难以应对解剖变异；图表示虽能抽象几何特性，但现有研究在图构建和拓扑依赖性上存在局限。
AI.method: 设计适用于3D血管数据的图表示方法，结合几何深度学习与消息传递神经网络，利用141例专家标注数据训练模型。
AI.result: 五折交叉验证在13类冠状动脉标记任务中取得加权F1分数0.805的优异结果。
AI.conclusion: 图模型能有效处理不规则医学数据，为临床决策提供定量支持，凸显几何深度学习在解剖结构分析中的潜力。

We investigate different variants of so-called message passing neural networks. Through extensive evaluations, our pipeline achieves a promising weighted F1-score of 0.805 for labeling coronary artery (13 classes) for a five-fold cross-validation. Considering the ability of graph models in dealing with irregular data, and their scalability for data segmentation, this work highlights the potential of such methods to provide quantitative evidence to support the decisions of medical experts. 解剖结构（例如冠状动脉）的自动标记对于诊断至关重要，但现有（非深度学习）方法由于依赖于预期树状结构的先前拓扑知识而受到限制。由于这种血管系统的结构通常难以概念化，基于图形的表示由于能够以独立于方向和抽象的方式捕获形态的几何和拓扑特性而变得流行。然而，用于自动标记树状解剖结构的基于图的学​​习在文献中受到的关注有限。大多数先前的研究在实体图构建方面存在局限性，依赖于拓扑结构，并且由于受试者之间的解剖变异性而导致准确性有限。在本文中，我们提出了一种直观的图形表示方法，非常适合与从血管造影扫描获得的 3D 坐标数据一起使用。随后，我们寻求使用几何深度学习来分析特定于主题的图表。所提出的模型利用来自 141 名患者的专家注释标签来学习每个冠状动脉节段的表示，同时捕获训练数据中解剖变异性的影响。我们研究所谓的消息传递神经网络的不同变体。通过广泛的评估，我们的管道在标记冠状动脉（13 类）以进行五重交叉验证方面实现了 0.805 的有希望的加权 F1 分数。考虑到图模型处理不规则数据的能力及其数据分割的可扩展性，这项工作凸显了此类方法在提供定量证据以支持医学专家决策方面的潜力。 本文提出基于几何深度学习的冠状动脉自动标记方法，利用图神经网络处理血管结构的拓扑和几何特性。 Yadan Li,Mohammad Ali Armin,Simon Denman,David Ahmedt-Aristizabal eess.IV,cs.CV,q-bio.TO

authors_text: Jorge Calvo-Zaragoza,Alexander Pacha
title: Proceedings of the 2nd International Workshop on Reading Music Systems
title_zh: 第二届国际音乐系统阅读研讨会论文集
comment: Proceedings edited by Jorge Calvo-Zaragoza and Alexander Pacha
comments: Proceedings edited by Jorge Calvo-Zaragoza and Alexander Pacha
abstract: The International Workshop on Reading Music Systems (WoRMS) is a workshop that tries to connect researchers who develop systems for reading music, such as in the field of Optical Music Recognition, with other researchers and practitioners that could benefit from such systems, like librarians or musicologists. The relevant topics of interest for the workshop include, but are not limited to: Music reading systems; Optical music recognition; Datasets and performance evaluation; Image processing on music scores; Writer identification; Authoring, editing, storing and presentation systems for music scores; Multi-modal systems; Novel input-methods for music to produce written music; Web-based Music Information Retrieval services; Applications and projects; Use-cases related to written music. These are the proceedings of the 2nd International Workshop on Reading Music Systems, held in Delft on the 2nd of November 2019.

abstract_zh: 国际阅读音乐系统研讨会 (WoRMS) 是一个试图将开发音乐阅读系统（例如光学音乐识别领域）的研究人员与可以从此类系统中受益的其他研究人员和从业者（例如图书馆员或音乐学家）联系起来的研讨会。研讨会感兴趣的相关主题包括但不限于： 音乐阅读系统；光学音乐识别；数据集和性能评估；乐谱图像处理；作者身份识别；乐谱的创作、编辑、存储和演示系统；多模式系统；新颖的音乐输入方法来制作书面音乐；基于网络的音乐信息检索服务；应用程序和项目；与书面音乐相关的用例。这些是 2019 年 11 月 2 日在代尔夫特举行的第二届阅读音乐系统国际研讨会的会议记录。

AI.tldr: 本文是第二届阅读音乐系统国际研讨会（WoRMS）的会议论文集，旨在汇集音乐阅读系统相关研究，如光学乐谱识别、数据集评估等。
AI.motivation: 通过搭建研究者与从业者（如音乐学者、图书馆员）之间的交流平台，推动音乐阅读系统的技术发展与实际应用。
AI.method: 组织研讨会并收录相关主题的论文，涵盖光学乐谱识别、图像处理、多模态系统及音乐信息检索等方向的研究成果。
AI.result: 汇总了2019年11月在代尔夫特举办的研讨会中的研究成果与讨论，涉及音乐阅读系统的技术进展与应用场景。
AI.conclusion: 会议促进了音乐阅读领域跨学科合作，为未来研究提供了方向，并强调了数据集与性能评估的重要性。
