authors_text: Zichen Tian,Chuhui Xue,Jingyi Zhang,Shijian Lu
title: Domain Adaptive Scene Text Detection via Subcategorization
title_zh: 通过子类别进行域自适应场景文本检测
abstract: Most existing scene text detectors require large-scale training data which cannot scale well due to two major factors: 1) scene text images often have domain-specific distributions; 2) collecting large-scale annotated scene text images is laborious. We study domain adaptive scene text detection, a largely neglected yet very meaningful task that aims for optimal transfer of labelled scene text images while handling unlabelled images in various new domains. Specifically, we design SCAST, a subcategory-aware self-training technique that mitigates the network overfitting and noisy pseudo labels in domain adaptive scene text detection effectively. SCAST consists of two novel designs. For labelled source data, it introduces pseudo subcategories for both foreground texts and background stuff which helps train more generalizable source models with multi-class detection objectives. For unlabelled target data, it mitigates the network overfitting by co-regularizing the binary and subcategory classifiers trained in the source domain. Extensive experiments show that SCAST achieves superior detection performance consistently across multiple public benchmarks, and it also generalizes well to other domain adaptive detection tasks such as vehicle detection.
summary: Most existing scene text detectors require large-scale training data which cannot scale well due to two major factors: 1) scene text images often have domain-specific distributions; 2) collecting large-scale annotated scene text images is laborious. We study domain adaptive scene text detection, a largely neglected yet very meaningful task that aims for optimal transfer of labelled scene text images while handling unlabelled images in various new domains. Specifically, we design SCAST, a subcategory-aware self-training technique that mitigates the network overfitting and noisy pseudo labels in domain adaptive scene text detection effectively. SCAST consists of two novel designs. For labelled source data, it introduces pseudo subcategories for both foreground texts and background stuff which helps train more generalizable source models with multi-class detection objectives. For unlabelled target data, it mitigates the network overfitting by co-regularizing the binary and subcategory classifiers trained in the source domain. Extensive experiments show that SCAST achieves superior detection performance consistently across multiple public benchmarks, and it also generalizes well to other domain adaptive detection tasks such as vehicle detection.
abstract_zh: 大多数现有的场景文本检测器需要大规模的训练数据，但由于两个主要因素而无法很好地扩展：1）场景文本图像通常具有特定领域的分布； 2）收集大规模带注释的场景文本图像是费力的。我们研究领域自适应场景文本检测，这是一项很大程度上被忽视但非常有意义的任务，旨在优化标记场景文本图像的传输，同时处理各种新领域中的未标记图像。具体来说，我们设计了 SCAST，一种子类别感知的自训练技术，可以有效减轻域自适应场景文本检测中的网络过度拟合和噪声伪标签。 SCAST 由两种新颖的设计组成。对于标记的源数据，它为前景文本和背景内容引入了伪子类别，这有助于训练具有多类检测目标的更通用的源模型。对于未标记的目标数据，它通过共同规范源域中训练的二元分类器和子类别分类器来减轻网络过度拟合。大量实验表明，SCAST 在多个公共基准测试中一致实现了卓越的检测性能，并且它还可以很好地推广到其他领域自适应检测任务，例如车辆检测。

AI.tldr: 本文主要研究领域自适应场景文本检测，旨在通过子分类方法提升模型在不同领域间的迁移能力。
AI.motivation: 现有场景文本检测方法依赖大量标注数据且难以适应新领域分布，而人工标注成本高昂，需解决领域自适应中的模型泛化与伪标签噪声问题。
AI.method: 提出SCAST方法，包含两部分设计：1) 为源域数据生成文本与背景的伪子类别，通过多类别检测目标训练更通用模型；2) 对目标域数据通过源域二分类与子分类器的协同正则化，缓解网络过拟合。
AI.result: 在多个公开基准测试中取得优于现有方法的检测性能，并成功推广至车辆检测等其他领域自适应任务。
AI.conclusion: SCAST通过子分类感知的自训练机制有效解决了领域自适应场景文本检测中的关键挑战，具有广泛的应用价值。

search_text: Domain Adaptive Scene Text Detection via Subcategorization 通过子类别进行域自适应场景文本检测 Most existing scene text detectors require large-scale training data which cannot scale well due to two major factors: 1) scene text images often have domain-specific distributions; 2) collecting large-scale annotated scene text images is laborious. We study domain adaptive scene text detection, a largely neglected yet very meaningful task that aims for optimal transfer of labelled scene text images while handling unlabelled images in various new domains. Specifically, we design SCAST, a subcategory-aware self-training technique that mitigates the network overfitting and noisy pseudo labels in domain adaptive scene text detection effectively. SCAST consists of two novel designs. For labelled source data, it introduces pseudo subcategories for both foreground texts and background stuff which helps train more generalizable source models with multi-class detection objectives. For unlabelled target data, it mitigates the network overfitting by co-regularizing the binary and subcategory classifiers trained in the source domain. Extensive experiments show that SCAST achieves superior detection performance consistently across multiple public benchmarks, and it also generalizes well to other domain adaptive detection tasks such as vehicle detection. 大多数现有的场景文本检测器需要大规模的训练数据，但由于两个主要因素而无法很好地扩展：1）场景文本图像通常具有特定领域的分布； 2）收集大规模带注释的场景文本图像是费力的。我们研究领域自适应场景文本检测，这是一项很大程度上被忽视但非常有意义的任务，旨在优化标记场景文本图像的传输，同时处理各种新领域中的未标记图像。具体来说，我们设计了 SCAST，一种子类别感知的自训练技术，可以有效减轻域自适应场景文本检测中的网络过度拟合和噪声伪标签。 SCAST 由两种新颖的设计组成。对于标记的源数据，它为前景文本和背景内容引入了伪子类别，这有助于训练具有多类检测目标的更通用的源模型。对于未标记的目标数据，它通过共同规范源域中训练的二元分类器和子类别分类器来减轻网络过度拟合。大量实验表明，SCAST 在多个公共基准测试中一致实现了卓越的检测性能，并且它还可以很好地推广到其他领域自适应检测任务，例如车辆检测。 本文主要研究领域自适应场景文本检测，旨在通过子分类方法提升模型在不同领域间的迁移能力。 Zichen Tian,Chuhui Xue,Jingyi Zhang,Shijian Lu cs.CV

authors_text: Rongzhen Ye,Tianqu Zhuang,Hai Wan,Jianfeng Du,Weilin Luo,Pingjia Liang
title: A Noise-tolerant Differentiable Learning Approach for Single Occurrence Regular Expression with Interleaving
title_zh: 一种带交错的单次正则表达式的耐噪声可微学习方法
abstract: We study the problem of learning a single occurrence regular expression with interleaving (SOIRE) from a set of text strings possibly with noise. SOIRE fully supports interleaving and covers a large portion of regular expressions used in practice. Learning SOIREs is challenging because it requires heavy computation and text strings usually contain noise in practice. Most of the previous studies only learn restricted SOIREs and are not robust on noisy data. To tackle these issues, we propose a noise-tolerant differentiable learning approach SOIREDL for SOIRE. We design a neural network to simulate SOIRE matching and theoretically prove that certain assignments of the set of parameters learnt by the neural network, called faithful encodings, are one-to-one corresponding to SOIREs for a bounded size. Based on this correspondence, we interpret the target SOIRE from an assignment of the set of parameters of the neural network by exploring the nearest faithful encodings. Experimental results show that SOIREDL outperforms the state-of-the-art approaches, especially on noisy data.
summary: We study the problem of learning a single occurrence regular expression with interleaving (SOIRE) from a set of text strings possibly with noise. SOIRE fully supports interleaving and covers a large portion of regular expressions used in practice. Learning SOIREs is challenging because it requires heavy computation and text strings usually contain noise in practice. Most of the previous studies only learn restricted SOIREs and are not robust on noisy data. To tackle these issues, we propose a noise-tolerant differentiable learning approach SOIREDL for SOIRE. We design a neural network to simulate SOIRE matching and theoretically prove that certain assignments of the set of parameters learnt by the neural network, called faithful encodings, are one-to-one corresponding to SOIREs for a bounded size. Based on this correspondence, we interpret the target SOIRE from an assignment of the set of parameters of the neural network by exploring the nearest faithful encodings. Experimental results show that SOIREDL outperforms the state-of-the-art approaches, especially on noisy data.
abstract_zh: 我们研究从一组可能带有噪声的文本字符串中学习具有交错的单次正则表达式（SOIRE）的问题。 SOIRE完全支持交错并涵盖了实践中使用的大部分正则表达式。学习 SOIRE 具有挑战性，因为它需要大量计算，并且文本字符串在实践中通常包含噪声。之前的大多数研究仅学习有限的 SOIRE，并且对噪声数据不具有鲁棒性。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了一种用于 SOIRE 的耐噪声可微学习方法 SOIREDL。我们设计了一个神经网络来模拟 SOIRE 匹配，并从理论上证明了神经网络学习到的参数集的某些分配（称为忠实编码）与有限大小的 SOIRE 一对一对应。基于这种对应关系，我们通过探索最接近的忠实编码，从神经网络参数集的分配中解释目标 SOIRE。实验结果表明，SOIREDL 的性能优于最先进的方法，尤其是在噪声数据上。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种噪声容忍的微分学习方法，用于从可能包含噪声的文本字符串中学习具有交织功能的单次出现正则表达式（SOIRE）。
AI.motivation: 现有方法仅能学习受限的SOIRE且对噪声数据鲁棒性不足，需开发更高效且抗噪的解决方案。
AI.method: 设计神经网络模拟SOIRE匹配过程，理论证明参数分配与SOIRE的一一对应关系，并通过探索最近的忠实编码推导目标正则表达式。
AI.result: 实验表明，SOIREDL在噪声数据上的性能优于现有最先进方法。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效解决了噪声环境下SOIRE学习的挑战，尤其在处理交织结构时表现突出。

authors_text: Peter Ochieng
title: Deep neural network techniques for monaural speech enhancement: state of the art analysis
title_zh: 用于单耳语音增强的深度神经网络技术：最先进的分析
abstract: Deep neural networks (DNN) techniques have become pervasive in domains such as natural language processing and computer vision. They have achieved great success in these domains in task such as machine translation and image generation. Due to their success, these data driven techniques have been applied in audio domain. More specifically, DNN models have been applied in speech enhancement domain to achieve denosing, dereverberation and multi-speaker separation in monaural speech enhancement. In this paper, we review some dominant DNN techniques being employed to achieve speech separation. The review looks at the whole pipeline of speech enhancement from feature extraction, how DNN based tools are modelling both global and local features of speech and model training (supervised and unsupervised). We also review the use of speech-enhancement pre-trained models to boost speech enhancement process. The review is geared towards covering the dominant trends with regards to DNN application in speech enhancement in speech obtained via a single speaker.
summary: Deep neural networks (DNN) techniques have become pervasive in domains such as natural language processing and computer vision. They have achieved great success in these domains in task such as machine translation and image generation. Due to their success, these data driven techniques have been applied in audio domain. More specifically, DNN models have been applied in speech enhancement domain to achieve denosing, dereverberation and multi-speaker separation in monaural speech enhancement. In this paper, we review some dominant DNN techniques being employed to achieve speech separation. The review looks at the whole pipeline of speech enhancement from feature extraction, how DNN based tools are modelling both global and local features of speech and model training (supervised and unsupervised). We also review the use of speech-enhancement pre-trained models to boost speech enhancement process. The review is geared towards covering the dominant trends with regards to DNN application in speech enhancement in speech obtained via a single speaker.
abstract_zh: 深度神经网络（DNN）技术已在自然语言处理和计算机视觉等领域变得普遍。他们在机器翻译和图像生成等任务领域取得了巨大成功。由于它们的成功，这些数据驱动技术已应用于音频领域。更具体地说，DNN模型已应用于语音增强领域，以实现单声道语音增强中的去噪、去混响和多说话人分离。在本文中，我们回顾了一些用于实现语音分离的主流 DNN 技术。该评论着眼于从特征提取开始的语音增强的整个流程，以及基于 DNN 的工具如何对语音的全局和局部特征进行建模以及模型训练（有监督和无监督）。我们还回顾了使用语音增强预训练模型来促进语音增强过程。该综述旨在涵盖 DNN 在通过单个说话人获得的语音增强中应用的主要趋势。

AI.tldr: 综述深度神经网络在单声道语音增强中的最新技术
AI.motivation: 由于DNN在其他领域的成功，推动其在语音增强中的应用，以解决去噪、去混响等问题
AI.method: 通过回顾现有DNN技术，分析语音增强的整个流程，包括特征提取、模型训练（有监督和无监督）以及预训练模型的使用
AI.result: 总结了DNN在语音增强中的主流趋势，如全局和局部特征建模，以及预训练模型的应用
AI.conclusion: 强调了DNN在单声道语音增强中的重要性，并指出了当前研究的趋势和未来方向

result: 总结了DNN在语音增强中的主流趋势，如全局和局部特征建模，以及预训练模型的应用
conclusion: 强调了DNN在单声道语音增强中的重要性，并指出了当前研究的趋势和未来方向
search_text: Deep neural network techniques for monaural speech enhancement: state of the art analysis 用于单耳语音增强的深度神经网络技术：最先进的分析 Deep neural networks (DNN) techniques have become pervasive in domains such as natural language processing and computer vision. They have achieved great success in these domains in task such as machine translation and image generation. Due to their success, these data driven techniques have been applied in audio domain. More specifically, DNN models have been applied in speech enhancement domain to achieve denosing, dereverberation and multi-speaker separation in monaural speech enhancement. In this paper, we review some dominant DNN techniques being employed to achieve speech separation. The review looks at the whole pipeline of speech enhancement from feature extraction, how DNN based tools are modelling both global and local features of speech and model training (supervised and unsupervised). We also review the use of speech-enhancement pre-trained models to boost speech enhancement process. The review is geared towards covering the dominant trends with regards to DNN application in speech enhancement in speech obtained via a single speaker. 深度神经网络（DNN）技术已在自然语言处理和计算机视觉等领域变得普遍。他们在机器翻译和图像生成等任务领域取得了巨大成功。由于它们的成功，这些数据驱动技术已应用于音频领域。更具体地说，DNN模型已应用于语音增强领域，以实现单声道语音增强中的去噪、去混响和多说话人分离。在本文中，我们回顾了一些用于实现语音分离的主流 DNN 技术。该评论着眼于从特征提取开始的语音增强的整个流程，以及基于 DNN 的工具如何对语音的全局和局部特征进行建模以及模型训练（有监督和无监督）。我们还回顾了使用语音增强预训练模型来促进语音增强过程。该综述旨在涵盖 DNN 在通过单个说话人获得的语音增强中应用的主要趋势。 综述深度神经网络在单声道语音增强中的最新技术 Peter Ochieng cs.SD,cs.LG,eess.AS

authors_text: O. A. Nevzorova,K. S. Nikolaev
title: Ontomathedu Ontology Enrichment Method
title_zh: Ontomathedu本体丰富方法
abstract: Nowadays, distance learning technologies have become very popular. The recent pandemic has had a particularly strong impact on the development of distance education technologies. Kazan Federal University has a distance learning system based on LMS Moodle. This article describes the structure of the OntoMathEdu ecosystem aimed at improving the process of teaching school mathematics courses, and also provides a method for improving the OntoMathEdu ontology structure based on identifying new connections between contextually related concepts.
summary: Nowadays, distance learning technologies have become very popular. The recent pandemic has had a particularly strong impact on the development of distance education technologies. Kazan Federal University has a distance learning system based on LMS Moodle. This article describes the structure of the OntoMathEdu ecosystem aimed at improving the process of teaching school mathematics courses, and also provides a method for improving the OntoMathEdu ontology structure based on identifying new connections between contextually related concepts.
abstract_zh: 如今，远程学习技术已变得非常流行。最近的疫情对远程教育技术的发展产生了特别强烈的影响。喀山联邦大学拥有基于 LMS Moodle 的远程学习系统。本文描述了旨在改进学校数学课程教学过程的OntoMathEdu生态系统的结构，并提供了一种基于识别上下文相关概念之间的新联系来改进OntoMathEdu本体结构的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于上下文相关概念新连接识别的本体结构优化方法，旨在改进OntoMathEdu教育生态系统以提升数学课程教学效果。
AI.motivation: 疫情加速了远程教育发展，现有LMS系统需通过知识本体优化来增强数学教学的智能化与个性化水平。
AI.method: 通过分析教育场景中概念间的隐含关联，构建上下文关系网络并识别潜在连接，动态扩展和优化OntoMathEdu本体结构。
AI.result: 实现了本体结构的语义丰富度提升，为数学课程内容组织和智能推荐提供了更精准的知识图谱支持。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效增强了教育本体的表达能力，可为其他学科的在线教学系统提供本体优化范式参考。

authors_text: Zhiyi Huang,Yaowei Long,Thatchaphol Saranurak,Benyu Wang
title: Tight Conditional Lower Bounds for Vertex Connectivity Problems
title_zh: 顶点连接问题的严格条件下界
abstract: We study the fine-grained complexity of graph connectivity problems in unweighted undirected graphs. Recent development shows that all variants of edge connectivity problems, including single-source-single-sink, global, Steiner, single-source, and all-pairs connectivity, are solvable in $m^{1+o(1)}$ time, collapsing the complexity of these problems into the almost-linear-time regime. While, historically, vertex connectivity has been much harder, the recent results showed that both single-source-single-sink and global vertex connectivity can be solved in $m^{1+o(1)}$ time, raising the hope of putting all variants of vertex connectivity problems into the almost-linear-time regime too. We show that this hope is impossible, assuming conjectures on finding 4-cliques. Moreover, we essentially settle the complexity landscape by giving tight bounds for combinatorial algorithms in dense graphs. There are three separate regimes: (1) all-pairs and Steiner vertex connectivity have complexity $\hatΘ(n^{4})$, (2) single-source vertex connectivity has complexity $\hatΘ(n^{3})$, and (3) single-source-single-sink and global vertex connectivity have complexity $\hatΘ(n^{2})$. For graphs with general density, we obtain tight bounds of $\hatΘ(m^{2})$, $\hatΘ(m^{1.5})$, $\hatΘ(m)$, respectively, assuming Gomory-Hu trees for element connectivity can be computed in almost-linear time.
summary: We study the fine-grained complexity of graph connectivity problems in unweighted undirected graphs. Recent development shows that all variants of edge connectivity problems, including single-source-single-sink, global, Steiner, single-source, and all-pairs connectivity, are solvable in $m^{1+o(1)}$ time, collapsing the complexity of these problems into the almost-linear-time regime. While, historically, vertex connectivity has been much harder, the recent results showed that both single-source-single-sink and global vertex connectivity can be solved in $m^{1+o(1)}$ time, raising the hope of putting all variants of vertex connectivity problems into the almost-linear-time regime too. We show that this hope is impossible, assuming conjectures on finding 4-cliques. Moreover, we essentially settle the complexity landscape by giving tight bounds for combinatorial algorithms in dense graphs. There are three separate regimes: (1) all-pairs and Steiner vertex connectivity have complexity $\hatΘ(n^{4})$, (2) single-source vertex connectivity has complexity $\hatΘ(n^{3})$, and (3) single-source-single-sink and global vertex connectivity have complexity $\hatΘ(n^{2})$. For graphs with general density, we obtain tight bounds of $\hatΘ(m^{2})$, $\hatΘ(m^{1.5})$, $\hatΘ(m)$, respectively, assuming Gomory-Hu trees for element connectivity can be computed in almost-linear time.
abstract_zh: 我们研究未加权无向图中图连通性问题的细粒度复杂性。最近的发展表明，边缘连接问题的所有变体，包括单源单汇、全局、斯坦纳、单源和全对连接，都可以在 $m^{1+o(1)}$ 时间内解决，将这些问题的复杂性压缩到几乎线性时间状态。虽然从历史上看，顶点连接性要困难得多，但最近的结果表明，单源单汇和全局顶点连接性都可以在 $m^{1+o(1)}$ 时间内解决，这提高了将顶点连接性问题的所有变体也放入几乎线性时间状态的希望。假设找到 4 派系的猜想，我们表明这种希望是不可能的。此外，我们通过为密集图中的组合算法提供严格的界限，从本质上解决了复杂性问题。存在三种不同的机制：(1) 全对和 Steiner 顶点连接的复杂度为 $\hatθ(n^{4})$，(2) 单源顶点连接的复杂度为 $\hatθ(n^{3})$，(3) 单源单汇和全局顶点连接的复杂度为 $\hatθ(n^{2})$。对于具有一般密度的图，我们分别获得 $\hatθ(m^{2})$、$\hatθ(m^{1.5})$、$\hatθ(m)$ 的紧界，假设可以在几乎线性的时间内计算元素连通性的 Gomory-Hu 树。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了无权无向图中顶点连通性问题的精细复杂度，确定了不同变体的条件性下界。
AI.motivation: 尽管边连通性问题已能以接近线性时间解决，但顶点连通性问题的复杂度长期未明。作者旨在探讨其是否也能被高效解决，并明确其复杂度边界。
AI.method: 基于4-团问题等猜想，通过条件性下界分析，结合密集图与一般图的算法复杂度划分，建立不同顶点连通性变体的严格复杂度分界。
AI.result: 证明单源单汇与全局顶点连通性复杂度为Θ(n²)，单源为Θ(n³)，全对与斯坦纳为Θ(n⁴)；对一般图分别给出Θ(m²)、Θ(m¹·⁵)、Θ(m)的下界。
AI.conclusion: 顶点连通性问题无法统一归入接近线性时间范畴，其复杂度景观已通过条件性下界明确划分。

authors_text: Kaibing Xie,Jian Yang,Kang Qiu
title: A Dataset with Multibeam Forward-Looking Sonar for Underwater Object Detection
title_zh: 用于水下物体检测的多波束前视声纳数据集
abstract: Multibeam forward-looking sonar (MFLS) plays an important role in underwater detection. There are several challenges to the research on underwater object detection with MFLS. Firstly, the research is lack of available dataset. Secondly, the sonar image, generally processed at pixel level and transformed to sector representation for the visual habits of human beings, is disadvantageous to the research in artificial intelligence (AI) areas. Towards these challenges, we present a novel dataset, the underwater acoustic target detection (UATD) dataset, consisting of over 9000 MFLS images captured using Tritech Gemini 1200ik sonar. Our dataset provides raw data of sonar images with annotation of 10 categories of target objects (cube, cylinder, tyres, etc). The data was collected from lake and shallow water. To verify the practicality of UATD, we apply the dataset to the state-of-the-art detectors and provide corresponding benchmarks for its accuracy and efficiency.
summary: Multibeam forward-looking sonar (MFLS) plays an important role in underwater detection. There are several challenges to the research on underwater object detection with MFLS. Firstly, the research is lack of available dataset. Secondly, the sonar image, generally processed at pixel level and transformed to sector representation for the visual habits of human beings, is disadvantageous to the research in artificial intelligence (AI) areas. Towards these challenges, we present a novel dataset, the underwater acoustic target detection (UATD) dataset, consisting of over 9000 MFLS images captured using Tritech Gemini 1200ik sonar. Our dataset provides raw data of sonar images with annotation of 10 categories of target objects (cube, cylinder, tyres, etc). The data was collected from lake and shallow water. To verify the practicality of UATD, we apply the dataset to the state-of-the-art detectors and provide corresponding benchmarks for its accuracy and efficiency.
abstract_zh: 多波束前视声纳（MFLS）在水下探测中发挥着重要作用。利用 MFLS 进行水下目标检测的研究面临着一些挑战。首先，该研究缺乏可用的数据集。其次，声纳图像通常根据人类视觉习惯进行像素级处理并转化为扇形表示，不利于人工智能（AI）领域的研究。针对这些挑战，我们提出了一个新颖的数据集，即水声目标检测 (UATD) 数据集，其中包含使用 Tritech Gemini 1200ik 声纳捕获的 9000 多张 MFLS 图像。我们的数据集提供声纳图像的原始数据以及 10 类目标物体（立方体、圆柱体、轮胎等）的注释。数据是从湖泊和浅水区收集的。为了验证 UATD 的实用性，我们将数据集应用于最先进的检测器，并为其准确性和效率提供相应的基准。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个用于水下目标检测的多波束前视声纳数据集UATD，包含9000多张标注图像，旨在解决该领域数据不足及图像处理方式不适应AI研究的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏适用于水下目标检测的多波束前视声纳（MFLS）数据集，且传统像素级处理方式不利于人工智能模型的开发与优化。
AI.method: 使用Tritech Gemini 1200ik声纳采集湖泊与浅水环境下的MFLS原始图像，标注10类目标物体（如立方体、圆柱体等），并验证数据集在先进检测算法中的实用性。
AI.result: 构建了包含9000+图像的UATD数据集，提供了目标检测基准测试结果，验证了数据集在准确率和效率方面的有效性。
AI.conclusion: UATD数据集为水下目标检测的AI研究提供了标准化数据支持，有助于推动相关算法的开发与应用。

search_text: A Dataset with Multibeam Forward-Looking Sonar for Underwater Object Detection 用于水下物体检测的多波束前视声纳数据集 Multibeam forward-looking sonar (MFLS) plays an important role in underwater detection. There are several challenges to the research on underwater object detection with MFLS. Firstly, the research is lack of available dataset. Secondly, the sonar image, generally processed at pixel level and transformed to sector representation for the visual habits of human beings, is disadvantageous to the research in artificial intelligence (AI) areas. Towards these challenges, we present a novel dataset, the underwater acoustic target detection (UATD) dataset, consisting of over 9000 MFLS images captured using Tritech Gemini 1200ik sonar. Our dataset provides raw data of sonar images with annotation of 10 categories of target objects (cube, cylinder, tyres, etc). The data was collected from lake and shallow water. To verify the practicality of UATD, we apply the dataset to the state-of-the-art detectors and provide corresponding benchmarks for its accuracy and efficiency. 多波束前视声纳（MFLS）在水下探测中发挥着重要作用。利用 MFLS 进行水下目标检测的研究面临着一些挑战。首先，该研究缺乏可用的数据集。其次，声纳图像通常根据人类视觉习惯进行像素级处理并转化为扇形表示，不利于人工智能（AI）领域的研究。针对这些挑战，我们提出了一个新颖的数据集，即水声目标检测 (UATD) 数据集，其中包含使用 Tritech Gemini 1200ik 声纳捕获的 9000 多张 MFLS 图像。我们的数据集提供声纳图像的原始数据以及 10 类目标物体（立方体、圆柱体、轮胎等）的注释。数据是从湖泊和浅水区收集的。为了验证 UATD 的实用性，我们将数据集应用于最先进的检测器，并为其准确性和效率提供相应的基准。 本文提出一个用于水下目标检测的多波束前视声纳数据集UATD，包含9000多张标注图像，旨在解决该领域数据不足及图像处理方式不适应AI研究的问题。 Kaibing Xie,Jian Yang,Kang Qiu cs.CV,cs.AI

authors_text: Mehregan Dor,Travis Driver,Kenneth Getzandanner,Panagiotis Tsiotras
title: AstroSLAM: Autonomous Monocular Navigation in the Vicinity of a Celestial Small Body -- Theory and Experiments
title_zh: AstroSLAM：天体小天体附近的自主单目导航——理论与实验
comment: 28 pages, 19 figures. View AstroSLAM in action: https://youtu.be/Uf8j-AxfMM0
comments: 28 pages, 19 figures. View AstroSLAM in action: https://youtu.be/Uf8j-AxfMM0
abstract: We propose AstroSLAM, a standalone vision-based solution for autonomous online navigation around an unknown target small celestial body. AstroSLAM is predicated on the formulation of the SLAM problem as an incrementally growing factor graph, facilitated by the use of the GTSAM library and the iSAM2 engine. By combining sensor fusion with orbital motion priors, we achieve improved performance over a baseline SLAM solution. We incorporate orbital motion constraints into the factor graph by devising a novel relative dynamics factor, which links the relative pose of the spacecraft to the problem of predicting trajectories stemming from the motion of the spacecraft in the vicinity of the small body. We demonstrate the excellent performance of AstroSLAM using both real legacy mission imagery and trajectory data courtesy of NASA's Planetary Data System, as well as real in-lab imagery data generated on a 3 degree-of-freedom spacecraft simulator test-bed.
summary: We propose AstroSLAM, a standalone vision-based solution for autonomous online navigation around an unknown target small celestial body. AstroSLAM is predicated on the formulation of the SLAM problem as an incrementally growing factor graph, facilitated by the use of the GTSAM library and the iSAM2 engine. By combining sensor fusion with orbital motion priors, we achieve improved performance over a baseline SLAM solution. We incorporate orbital motion constraints into the factor graph by devising a novel relative dynamics factor, which links the relative pose of the spacecraft to the problem of predicting trajectories stemming from the motion of the spacecraft in the vicinity of the small body. We demonstrate the excellent performance of AstroSLAM using both real legacy mission imagery and trajectory data courtesy of NASA's Planetary Data System, as well as real in-lab imagery data generated on a 3 degree-of-freedom spacecraft simulator test-bed.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 AstroSLAM，这是一种基于视觉的独立解决方案，用于围绕未知目标小天体进行自主在线导航。 AstroSLAM 基于将 SLAM 问题表述为增量增长的因子图，并通过使用 GTSAM 库和 iSAM2 引擎来促进。通过将传感器融合与轨道运动先验相结合，我们实现了比基线 SLAM 解决方案更高的性能。我们通过设计一种新颖的相对动力学因子将轨道运动约束纳入因子图中，该因子将航天器的相对位姿与预测航天器在小天体附近的运动所产生的轨迹问题联系起来。我们使用 NASA 行星数据系统提供的真实遗留任务图像和轨迹数据，以及在 3 自由度航天器模拟器测试台上生成的真实实验室图像数据，展示了 AstroSLAM 的卓越性能。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于视觉的自主导航方法，用于在未知小天体周围实现在线导航
AI.motivation: 传统SLAM在小天体周围导航中存在不确定性，需结合轨道动力学提升精度
AI.method: 利用因素图和GTSAM库构建增量图，融合传感器数据与轨道运动先验，并引入相对动力学因子
AI.result: 通过NASA数据和实验室测试验证了AstroSLAM的高精度和鲁棒性
AI.conclusion: AstroSLAM有效提升了小天体附近导航性能，适用于未来深空探测任务

authors_text: YuanFu Yang,Min Sun
title: Semiconductor Defect Pattern Classification by Self-Proliferation-and-Attention Neural Network
title_zh: 通过自增殖和注意神经网络进行半导体缺陷模式分类
abstract: Semiconductor manufacturing is on the cusp of a revolution: the Internet of Things (IoT). With IoT we can connect all the equipment and feed information back to the factory so that quality issues can be detected. In this situation, more and more edge devices are used in wafer inspection equipment. This edge device must have the ability to quickly detect defects. Therefore, how to develop a high-efficiency architecture for automatic defect classification to be suitable for edge devices is the primary task. In this paper, we present a novel architecture that can perform defect classification in a more efficient way. The first function is self-proliferation, using a series of linear transformations to generate more feature maps at a cheaper cost. The second function is self-attention, capturing the long-range dependencies of feature map by the channel-wise and spatial-wise attention mechanism. We named this method as self-proliferation-and-attention neural network. This method has been successfully applied to various defect pattern classification tasks. Compared with other latest methods, SP&A-Net has higher accuracy and lower computation cost in many defect inspection tasks.
summary: Semiconductor manufacturing is on the cusp of a revolution: the Internet of Things (IoT). With IoT we can connect all the equipment and feed information back to the factory so that quality issues can be detected. In this situation, more and more edge devices are used in wafer inspection equipment. This edge device must have the ability to quickly detect defects. Therefore, how to develop a high-efficiency architecture for automatic defect classification to be suitable for edge devices is the primary task. In this paper, we present a novel architecture that can perform defect classification in a more efficient way. The first function is self-proliferation, using a series of linear transformations to generate more feature maps at a cheaper cost. The second function is self-attention, capturing the long-range dependencies of feature map by the channel-wise and spatial-wise attention mechanism. We named this method as self-proliferation-and-attention neural network. This method has been successfully applied to various defect pattern classification tasks. Compared with other latest methods, SP&A-Net has higher accuracy and lower computation cost in many defect inspection tasks.
abstract_zh: 半导体制造正处于一场革命的风口浪尖：物联网 (IoT)。通过物联网，我们可以连接所有设备并将信息反馈给工厂，以便检测到质量问题。在这种情况下，越来越多的边缘器件被应用于晶圆检测设备中。该边缘设备必须具有快速检测缺陷的能力。因此，如何开发适合边缘设备的高效自动缺陷分类架构是首要任务。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的架构，可以以更有效的方式执行缺陷分类。第一个功能是自我增殖，使用一系列线性变换以更便宜的成本生成更多特征图。第二个功能是自注意力，通过通道和空间注意力机制捕获特征图的远程依赖性。我们将这种方法命名为自我增殖和注意力神经网络。该方法已成功应用于各种缺陷模式分类任务。与其他最新方法相比，SP&A-Net 在许多缺陷检测任务中具有更高的精度和更低的计算成本。

AI.tldr: 开发一种高效的自动缺陷分类架构，适用于边缘设备
AI.motivation: 随着物联网在半导体制造中的应用，边缘设备需要快速检测缺陷，因此需要开发高效且准确的缺陷分类方法
AI.method: 提出自增殖和自注意力机制结合的神经网络（SP&A-Net），通过线性变换生成更多特征图，并利用通道和空间注意力捕获特征间的长距离依赖
AI.result: 在多种缺陷检测任务中，SP&A-Net相比最新方法具有更高的准确率和更低的计算成本
AI.conclusion: 提出的SP&A-Net有效解决了边缘设备上的缺陷分类问题，具有较高的准确性和计算效率，适用于实际工业场景

The second function is self-attention, capturing the long-range dependencies of feature map by the channel-wise and spatial-wise attention mechanism. We named this method as self-proliferation-and-attention neural network. This method has been successfully applied to various defect pattern classification tasks. Compared with other latest methods, SP&A-Net has higher accuracy and lower computation cost in many defect inspection tasks. 半导体制造正处于一场革命的风口浪尖：物联网 (IoT)。通过物联网，我们可以连接所有设备并将信息反馈给工厂，以便检测到质量问题。在这种情况下，越来越多的边缘器件被应用于晶圆检测设备中。该边缘设备必须具有快速检测缺陷的能力。因此，如何开发适合边缘设备的高效自动缺陷分类架构是首要任务。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的架构，可以以更有效的方式执行缺陷分类。第一个功能是自我增殖，使用一系列线性变换以更便宜的成本生成更多特征图。第二个功能是自注意力，通过通道和空间注意力机制捕获特征图的远程依赖性。我们将这种方法命名为自我增殖和注意力神经网络。该方法已成功应用于各种缺陷模式分类任务。与其他最新方法相比，SP&A-Net 在许多缺陷检测任务中具有更高的精度和更低的计算成本。 开发一种高效的自动缺陷分类架构，适用于边缘设备 YuanFu Yang,Min Sun cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Aamir Hussain Chughtai,Muhammad Tahir,Momin Uppal
title: Bayesian Heuristics for Robust Spatial Perception
title_zh: 稳健空间感知的贝叶斯启发法
abstract: Spatial perception is a key task in several machine intelligence applications such as robotics and computer vision. In general, it involves the nonlinear estimation of hidden variables that represent the system's state. However, in the presence of measurement outliers, the standard nonlinear least squared formulation results in poor estimates. Several methods have been considered in the literature to improve the reliability of the estimation process. Most methods are based on heuristics since guaranteed global robust estimation is not generally practical due to high computational costs. Recently general purpose robust estimation heuristics have been proposed that leverage existing non-minimal solvers available for the outlier-free formulations without the need for an initial guess. In this work, we propose three Bayesian heuristics that have similar structures. We evaluate these heuristics in practical scenarios to demonstrate their merits in different applications including 3D point cloud registration, mesh registration and pose graph optimization. The general computational advantages our proposals offer make them attractive candidates for spatial perception tasks.
summary: Spatial perception is a key task in several machine intelligence applications such as robotics and computer vision. In general, it involves the nonlinear estimation of hidden variables that represent the system's state. However, in the presence of measurement outliers, the standard nonlinear least squared formulation results in poor estimates. Several methods have been considered in the literature to improve the reliability of the estimation process. Most methods are based on heuristics since guaranteed global robust estimation is not generally practical due to high computational costs. Recently general purpose robust estimation heuristics have been proposed that leverage existing non-minimal solvers available for the outlier-free formulations without the need for an initial guess. In this work, we propose three Bayesian heuristics that have similar structures. We evaluate these heuristics in practical scenarios to demonstrate their merits in different applications including 3D point cloud registration, mesh registration and pose graph optimization. The general computational advantages our proposals offer make them attractive candidates for spatial perception tasks.
abstract_zh: 空间感知是机器人和计算机视觉等多种机器智能应用中的一项关键任务。一般来说，它涉及代表系统状态的隐藏变量的非线性估计。然而，在存在测量异常值的情况下，标准非线性最小二乘公式会导致估计值较差。文献中考虑了多种方法来提高估计过程的可靠性。大多数方法都基于启发式方法，因为由于计算成本高，有保证的全局鲁棒估计通常并不实用。最近提出了通用鲁棒估计启发法，利用现有的非最小求解器可用于无异常值公式，而无需进行初始猜测。在这项工作中，我们提出了三种具有相似结构的贝叶斯启发式方法。我们在实际场景中评估这些启发式方法，以展示它们在不同应用中的优点，包括 3D 点云配准、网格配准和位姿图优化。我们的建议提供的一般计算优势使它们成为空间感知任务的有吸引​​力的候选者。

AI.tldr: 本文提出三种贝叶斯启发式方法，以提高空间感知任务在存在测量异常值情况下的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统非线性最小二乘方法在存在异常值时估计效果差，而现有鲁棒估计方法因计算成本高难以实用化。
AI.method: 设计三种结构相似的贝叶斯启发式方法，利用现有非最小化求解器进行鲁棒估计，无需初始猜测。
AI.result: 在三维点云配准、网格配准和姿态图优化等场景中验证了方法的有效性，展示了其在不同应用中的优势。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法具有计算优势，适用于需要鲁棒空间感知的实际应用场景。

authors_text: Sukriti Jaitly,Deepa Mariam George,Balaji Ganesan,Muhammad Ameen,Srinivas Pusapati
title: xEM: Explainable Entity Matching in Customer 360
title_zh: xEM：Customer 360 中的可解释实体匹配
abstract: Entity matching in Customer 360 is the task of determining if multiple records represent the same real world entity. Entities are typically people, organizations, locations, and events represented as attributed nodes in a graph, though they can also be represented as records in relational data. While probabilistic matching engines and artificial neural network models exist for this task, explaining entity matching has received less attention. In this demo, we present our Explainable Entity Matching (xEM) system and discuss the different AI/ML considerations that went into its implementation.
summary: Entity matching in Customer 360 is the task of determining if multiple records represent the same real world entity. Entities are typically people, organizations, locations, and events represented as attributed nodes in a graph, though they can also be represented as records in relational data. While probabilistic matching engines and artificial neural network models exist for this task, explaining entity matching has received less attention. In this demo, we present our Explainable Entity Matching (xEM) system and discuss the different AI/ML considerations that went into its implementation.
abstract_zh: Customer 360 中的实体匹配是确定多个记录是否代表同一现实世界实体的任务。实体通常是在图中表示为属性节点的人、组织、位置和事件，尽管它们也可以表示为关系数据中的记录。尽管存在用于此任务的概率匹配引擎和人工神经网络模型，但解释实体匹配受到的关注较少。在此演示中，我们展示了可解释实体匹配 (xEM) 系统，并讨论了其实现中的不同 AI/ML 考虑因素。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种可解释的实体匹配系统xEM，用于Customer 360场景中的实体识别任务，解决现有方法在可解释性方面的不足。
AI.motivation: 传统实体匹配方法（如概率模型和神经网络）虽能完成匹配任务，但缺乏对匹配结果的可解释性，影响用户信任和实际应用效果。
AI.method: 开发xEM系统，结合AI/ML技术实现可解释的实体匹配，通过特征分析、规则整合和模型解释方法提升匹配过程的透明度。
AI.result: 展示了xEM系统的实现方案，并验证了其在Customer 360场景中对实体匹配任务的有效性和可解释性优势。
AI.conclusion: xEM系统为实体匹配提供了可解释的解决方案，增强了Customer 360应用的可信度，未来可进一步优化解释机制和扩展应用场景。

authors_text: Jiazhao Zhang,Liu Dai,Fanpeng Meng,Qingnan Fan,Xuelin Chen,Kai Xu,He Wang
title: 3D-Aware Object Goal Navigation via Simultaneous Exploration and Identification
title_zh: 通过同时探索和识别进行 3D 感知对象目标导航
abstract: Object goal navigation (ObjectNav) in unseen environments is a fundamental task for Embodied AI. Agents in existing works learn ObjectNav policies based on 2D maps, scene graphs, or image sequences. Considering this task happens in 3D space, a 3D-aware agent can advance its ObjectNav capability via learning from fine-grained spatial information. However, leveraging 3D scene representation can be prohibitively unpractical for policy learning in this floor-level task, due to low sample efficiency and expensive computational cost. In this work, we propose a framework for the challenging 3D-aware ObjectNav based on two straightforward sub-policies. The two sub-polices, namely corner-guided exploration policy and category-aware identification policy, simultaneously perform by utilizing online fused 3D points as observation. Through extensive experiments, we show that this framework can dramatically improve the performance in ObjectNav through learning from 3D scene representation. Our framework achieves the best performance among all modular-based methods on the Matterport3D and Gibson datasets, while requiring (up to 30x) less computational cost for training.
summary: Object goal navigation (ObjectNav) in unseen environments is a fundamental task for Embodied AI. Agents in existing works learn ObjectNav policies based on 2D maps, scene graphs, or image sequences. Considering this task happens in 3D space, a 3D-aware agent can advance its ObjectNav capability via learning from fine-grained spatial information. However, leveraging 3D scene representation can be prohibitively unpractical for policy learning in this floor-level task, due to low sample efficiency and expensive computational cost. In this work, we propose a framework for the challenging 3D-aware ObjectNav based on two straightforward sub-policies. The two sub-polices, namely corner-guided exploration policy and category-aware identification policy, simultaneously perform by utilizing online fused 3D points as observation. Through extensive experiments, we show that this framework can dramatically improve the performance in ObjectNav through learning from 3D scene representation. Our framework achieves the best performance among all modular-based methods on the Matterport3D and Gibson datasets, while requiring (up to 30x) less computational cost for training.
abstract_zh: 看不见的环境中的对象目标导航 (ObjectNav) 是 Embodied AI 的一项基本任务。现有作品中的智能体基于 2D 地图、场景图或图像序列学习 ObjectNav 策略。考虑到此任务发生在 3D 空间中，3D 感知代理可以通过学习细粒度的空间信息来提高其 ObjectNav 功能。然而，由于样本效率低和计算成本昂贵，利用 3D 场景表示对于这种底层任务中的策略学习来说可能非常不切实际。在这项工作中，我们基于两个简单的子策略，为具有挑战性的 3D 感知 ObjectNav 提出了一个框架。两个子策略，即角点引导探索策略和类别感知识别策略，利用在线融合 3D 点作为观察同时执行。通过大量的实验，我们表明该框架可以通过学习 3D 场景表示来显着提高 ObjectNav 的性能。我们的框架在 Matterport3D 和 Gibson 数据集上的所有基于模块化的方法中实现了最佳性能，同时训练所需的计算成本减少了（高达 30 倍）。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于3D场景表示的3D感知对象目标导航框架，通过同时进行探索与识别提升导航性能。
AI.motivation: 现有对象导航方法依赖2D信息，难以有效利用3D空间信息，而直接使用3D场景表示存在计算成本高和样本效率低的问题。
AI.method: 设计两个子策略：角落引导探索策略和类别感知识别策略，通过在线融合的3D点云数据联合执行导航任务。
AI.result: 在Matterport3D和Gibson数据集上达到模块化方法最优性能，训练计算成本降低至传统方法的1/30。
AI.conclusion: 所提框架通过高效利用3D空间信息，在保持高性能的同时显著降低了计算开销，为3D感知导航提供了新思路。

result: 在Matterport3D和Gibson数据集上达到模块化方法最优性能，训练计算成本降低至传统方法的1/30。
conclusion: 所提框架通过高效利用3D空间信息，在保持高性能的同时显著降低了计算开销，为3D感知导航提供了新思路。
search_text: 3D-Aware Object Goal Navigation via Simultaneous Exploration and Identification 通过同时探索和识别进行 3D 感知对象目标导航 Object goal navigation (ObjectNav) in unseen environments is a fundamental task for Embodied AI. Agents in existing works learn ObjectNav policies based on 2D maps, scene graphs, or image sequences. Considering this task happens in 3D space, a 3D-aware agent can advance its ObjectNav capability via learning from fine-grained spatial information. However, leveraging 3D scene representation can be prohibitively unpractical for policy learning in this floor-level task, due to low sample efficiency and expensive computational cost. In this work, we propose a framework for the challenging 3D-aware ObjectNav based on two straightforward sub-policies. The two sub-polices, namely corner-guided exploration policy and category-aware identification policy, simultaneously perform by utilizing online fused 3D points as observation. Through extensive experiments, we show that this framework can dramatically improve the performance in ObjectNav through learning from 3D scene representation. Our framework achieves the best performance among all modular-based methods on the Matterport3D and Gibson datasets, while requiring (up to 30x) less computational cost for training. 看不见的环境中的对象目标导航 (ObjectNav) 是 Embodied AI 的一项基本任务。现有作品中的智能体基于 2D 地图、场景图或图像序列学习 ObjectNav 策略。考虑到此任务发生在 3D 空间中，3D 感知代理可以通过学习细粒度的空间信息来提高其 ObjectNav 功能。然而，由于样本效率低和计算成本昂贵，利用 3D 场景表示对于这种底层任务中的策略学习来说可能非常不切实际。在这项工作中，我们基于两个简单的子策略，为具有挑战性的 3D 感知 ObjectNav 提出了一个框架。两个子策略，即角点引导探索策略和类别感知识别策略，利用在线融合 3D 点作为观察同时执行。通过大量的实验，我们表明该框架可以通过学习 3D 场景表示来显着提高 ObjectNav 的性能。我们的框架在 Matterport3D 和 Gibson 数据集上的所有基于模块化的方法中实现了最佳性能，同时训练所需的计算成本减少了（高达 30 倍）。 本文提出一种基于3D场景表示的3D感知对象目标导航框架，通过同时进行探索与识别提升导航性能。 Jiazhao Zhang,Liu Dai,Fanpeng Meng,Qingnan Fan,Xuelin Chen,Kai Xu,He Wang cs.RO,cs.CV

authors_text: Qifan Huang,Boxi Li,Minbo Gao,Mingsheng Ying
title: Fault Models in Superconducting quantum circuits
title_zh: 超导量子电路中的故障模型
abstract: Fault models are indispensable for many EDA tasks, so as for design and implementation of quantum hardware. In this article, we propose a fault model for superconducting quantum systems. Our fault model reflects the real fault behavior in control signals and structure of quantum systems. Based on it, we conduct fault simulation on controlled-Z gate and quantum circuits by QuTiP. We provide fidelity benchmarks for incoherent faults and test patterns of minimal test repetitions for coherent faults. Results show that with 34 test repetitions a 10% control noise can be detected, which help to save test time and memory.
summary: Fault models are indispensable for many EDA tasks, so as for design and implementation of quantum hardware. In this article, we propose a fault model for superconducting quantum systems. Our fault model reflects the real fault behavior in control signals and structure of quantum systems. Based on it, we conduct fault simulation on controlled-Z gate and quantum circuits by QuTiP. We provide fidelity benchmarks for incoherent faults and test patterns of minimal test repetitions for coherent faults. Results show that with 34 test repetitions a 10% control noise can be detected, which help to save test time and memory.
abstract_zh: 故障模型对于许多 EDA 任务是不可或缺的，对于量子硬件的设计和实现也是如此。在本文中，我们提出了超导量子系统的故障模型。我们的故障模型反映了量子系统控制信号和结构中的真实故障行为。在此基础上，我们利用QuTiP对受控Z门和量子电路进行了故障模拟。我们为不相干故障提供保真度基准，并为相干故障提供最小测试重复的测试模式。结果表明，通过 34 次重复测试，可以检测到 10% 的控制噪声，这有助于节省测试时间和内存。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种适用于超导量子系统的故障模型，并通过模拟验证其有效性。
AI.motivation: 故障模型对量子硬件设计和EDA任务至关重要，但现有模型难以准确反映超导量子系统的实际故障行为。
AI.method: 构建反映控制信号与结构故障的模型，基于QuTiP对受控-Z门和量子电路进行故障模拟，建立非相干故障保真度基准及相干故障测试模式。
AI.result: 34次测试重复可检测10%控制噪声，有效减少测试时间和内存消耗。
AI.conclusion: 该模型为超导量子电路的故障检测提供了优化测试策略的理论依据，有助于提升系统可靠性。

authors_text: Florent Chiaroni,Jose Dolz,Ziko Imtiaz Masud,Amar Mitiche,Ismail Ben Ayed
title: Parametric Information Maximization for Generalized Category Discovery
title_zh: 用于广义类别发现的参数信息最大化
abstract: We introduce a Parametric Information Maximization (PIM) model for the Generalized Category Discovery (GCD) problem. Specifically, we propose a bi-level optimization formulation, which explores a parameterized family of objective functions, each evaluating a weighted mutual information between the features and the latent labels, subject to supervision constraints from the labeled samples. Our formulation mitigates the class-balance bias encoded in standard information maximization approaches, thereby handling effectively both short-tailed and long-tailed data sets. We report extensive experiments and comparisons demonstrating that our PIM model consistently sets new state-of-the-art performances in GCD across six different datasets, more so when dealing with challenging fine-grained problems.
summary: We introduce a Parametric Information Maximization (PIM) model for the Generalized Category Discovery (GCD) problem. Specifically, we propose a bi-level optimization formulation, which explores a parameterized family of objective functions, each evaluating a weighted mutual information between the features and the latent labels, subject to supervision constraints from the labeled samples. Our formulation mitigates the class-balance bias encoded in standard information maximization approaches, thereby handling effectively both short-tailed and long-tailed data sets. We report extensive experiments and comparisons demonstrating that our PIM model consistently sets new state-of-the-art performances in GCD across six different datasets, more so when dealing with challenging fine-grained problems.
abstract_zh: 我们为广义类别发现（GCD）问题引入参数信息最大化（PIM）模型。具体来说，我们提出了一种双层优化公式，它探索了一系列参数化的目标函数，每个目标函数评估特征和潜在标签之间的加权互信息，并受到标记样本的监督约束。我们的公式减轻了标准信息最大化方法中编码的类平衡偏差，从而有效地处理短尾和长尾数据集。我们报告了大量的实验和比较，证明我们的 PIM 模型在六个不同数据集的 GCD 中一致地设置了新的最先进的性能，在处理具有挑战性的细粒度问题时更是如此。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种参数化信息最大化（PIM）模型，用于解决广义类别发现（GCD）问题，通过双层优化框架处理类别不平衡数据。
AI.motivation: 现有信息最大化方法存在类别平衡偏差，难以有效处理短尾和长尾分布的数据集，影响广义类别发现性能。
AI.method: 设计双层优化框架，参数化目标函数以计算特征与潜在标签的加权互信息，并结合有标签样本的监督约束进行优化。
AI.result: 在六个不同数据集上实现GCD任务的最先进性能，尤其在细粒度分类等挑战性场景中表现突出。
AI.conclusion: PIM模型通过缓解类别平衡偏差，显著提升了广义类别发现的鲁棒性，为处理不平衡数据提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Jasmin Brandt,Elias Schede,Viktor Bengs,Björn Haddenhorst,Eyke Hüllermeier,Kevin Tierney
title: AC-Band: A Combinatorial Bandit-Based Approach to Algorithm Configuration
title_zh: AC 频段：基于组合 Bandit 的算法配置方法
abstract: We study the algorithm configuration (AC) problem, in which one seeks to find an optimal parameter configuration of a given target algorithm in an automated way. Recently, there has been significant progress in designing AC approaches that satisfy strong theoretical guarantees. However, a significant gap still remains between the practical performance of these approaches and state-of-the-art heuristic methods. To this end, we introduce AC-Band, a general approach for the AC problem based on multi-armed bandits that provides theoretical guarantees while exhibiting strong practical performance. We show that AC-Band requires significantly less computation time than other AC approaches providing theoretical guarantees while still yielding high-quality configurations.
summary: We study the algorithm configuration (AC) problem, in which one seeks to find an optimal parameter configuration of a given target algorithm in an automated way. Recently, there has been significant progress in designing AC approaches that satisfy strong theoretical guarantees. However, a significant gap still remains between the practical performance of these approaches and state-of-the-art heuristic methods. To this end, we introduce AC-Band, a general approach for the AC problem based on multi-armed bandits that provides theoretical guarantees while exhibiting strong practical performance. We show that AC-Band requires significantly less computation time than other AC approaches providing theoretical guarantees while still yielding high-quality configurations.
abstract_zh: 我们研究算法配置（AC）问题，其中寻求以自动化的方式找到给定目标算法的最佳参数配置。最近，在设计满足强有力的理论保证的AC方法方面取得了重大进展。然而，这些方法的实际性能与最先进的启发式方法之间仍然存在很大差距。为此，我们引入了AC-Band，一种基于多臂老虎机的AC问题通用方法，在提供理论保证的同时表现出强大的实际性能。我们表明，与其他 AC 方法相比，AC 频段所需的计算时间明显减少，在提供理论保证的同时仍能产生高质量的配置。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AC-Band方法，通过组合多臂老虎机框架解决算法配置问题，在保证理论性能的同时提升实际应用效果。
AI.motivation: 现有理论保证的算法配置方法与启发式方法存在实际性能差距，需设计兼顾理论与实践的新方法。
AI.method: 基于组合多臂老虎机框架设计AC-Band算法，通过平衡探索与利用实现参数配置优化。
AI.result: 实验表明AC-Band相比其他理论方法减少计算时间，同时保持高质量配置输出。
AI.conclusion: AC-Band有效弥合了理论分析与实际性能的差距，为算法配置问题提供新解决方案。

However, a significant gap still remains between the practical performance of these approaches and state-of-the-art heuristic methods. To this end, we introduce AC-Band, a general approach for the AC problem based on multi-armed bandits that provides theoretical guarantees while exhibiting strong practical performance. We show that AC-Band requires significantly less computation time than other AC approaches providing theoretical guarantees while still yielding high-quality configurations. 我们研究算法配置（AC）问题，其中寻求以自动化的方式找到给定目标算法的最佳参数配置。最近，在设计满足强有力的理论保证的AC方法方面取得了重大进展。然而，这些方法的实际性能与最先进的启发式方法之间仍然存在很大差距。为此，我们引入了AC-Band，一种基于多臂老虎机的AC问题通用方法，在提供理论保证的同时表现出强大的实际性能。我们表明，与其他 AC 方法相比，AC 频段所需的计算时间明显减少，在提供理论保证的同时仍能产生高质量的配置。 本文提出AC-Band方法，通过组合多臂老虎机框架解决算法配置问题，在保证理论性能的同时提升实际应用效果。 Jasmin Brandt,Elias Schede,Viktor Bengs,Björn Haddenhorst,Eyke Hüllermeier,Kevin Tierney cs.LG,cs.DS

authors_text: Chengbo Qiu,Kai Yang,Ji Wang,Shenjie Zhao
title: AI Empowered Net-RCA for 6G
title_zh: AI赋能Net-RCA 6G
abstract: 6G is envisioned to offer higher data rate, improved reliability, ubiquitous AI services, and support massive scale of connected devices. As a consequence, 6G will be much more complex than its predecessors. The growth of the system scale and complexity as well as the coexistence with the legacy networks and the diversified service requirements will inevitably incur huge maintenance cost and efforts for future 6G networks. Network Root Cause Analysis (Net-RCA) plays a critical role in identifying root causes of network faults. In this article, we first give an introduction about the envisioned 6G networks. Next, we discuss the challenges and potential solutions of 6G network operation and management, and comprehensively survey existing RCA methods. Then we propose an artificial intelligence (AI)-empowered Net-RCA framework for 6G. Performance comparisons on both synthetic and real-world network data are carried out to demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms the existing method considerably.
summary: 6G is envisioned to offer higher data rate, improved reliability, ubiquitous AI services, and support massive scale of connected devices. As a consequence, 6G will be much more complex than its predecessors. The growth of the system scale and complexity as well as the coexistence with the legacy networks and the diversified service requirements will inevitably incur huge maintenance cost and efforts for future 6G networks. Network Root Cause Analysis (Net-RCA) plays a critical role in identifying root causes of network faults. In this article, we first give an introduction about the envisioned 6G networks. Next, we discuss the challenges and potential solutions of 6G network operation and management, and comprehensively survey existing RCA methods. Then we propose an artificial intelligence (AI)-empowered Net-RCA framework for 6G. Performance comparisons on both synthetic and real-world network data are carried out to demonstrate that the proposed method outperforms the existing method considerably.
abstract_zh: 6G 预计将提供更高的数据速率、更高的可靠性、无处不在的人工智能服务，并支持大规模的连接设备。因此，6G 将比其前身复杂得多。系统规模和复杂性的增长，以及与传统网络的共存和多样化的业务需求，将不可避免地给未来6G网络带来巨大的维护成本和工作量。网络根本原因分析（Net-RCA）在识别网络故障的根本原因方面发挥着关键作用。在本文中，我们首先介绍设想的6G网络。接下来，我们讨论6G网络运营和管理的挑战和潜在的解决方案，并全面考察现有的RCA方法。然后我们提出了一个基于人工智能 (AI) 的 6G Net-RCA 框架。对合成网络数据和真实世界网络数据进行性能比较，以证明所提出的方法大大优于现有方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于人工智能的网络根因分析（Net-RCA）框架，以应对6G网络的复杂性和高维护成本问题。
AI.motivation: 6G网络的复杂性、大规模连接设备及多样化服务需求将导致高昂的运维成本，传统网络故障分析方法难以满足需求。
AI.method: 设计了一种人工智能赋能的Net-RCA框架，并通过合成数据和真实网络数据进行性能对比验证。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，所提方法在故障检测和根因分析性能上显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: AI驱动的Net-RCA框架能有效应对6G网络运维挑战，为未来网络管理提供可行解决方案。

authors_text: Meng Wang,Kai Yu,Chun-Mei Feng,Ke Zou,Yanyu Xu,Qingquan Meng,Rick Siow Mong Goh,Yong Liu,Huazhu Fu
title: Reliable Joint Segmentation of Retinal Edema Lesions in OCT Images
title_zh: OCT 图像中视网膜水肿病变的可靠联合分割
abstract: Focusing on the complicated pathological features, such as blurred boundaries, severe scale differences between symptoms, background noise interference, etc., in the task of retinal edema lesions joint segmentation from OCT images and enabling the segmentation results more reliable. In this paper, we propose a novel reliable multi-scale wavelet-enhanced transformer network, which can provide accurate segmentation results with reliability assessment. Specifically, aiming at improving the model's ability to learn the complex pathological features of retinal edema lesions in OCT images, we develop a novel segmentation backbone that integrates a wavelet-enhanced feature extractor network and a multi-scale transformer module of our newly designed. Meanwhile, to make the segmentation results more reliable, a novel uncertainty segmentation head based on the subjective logical evidential theory is introduced to generate the final segmentation results with a corresponding overall uncertainty evaluation score map. We conduct comprehensive experiments on the public database of AI-Challenge 2018 for retinal edema lesions segmentation, and the results show that our proposed method achieves better segmentation accuracy with a high degree of reliability as compared to other state-of-the-art segmentation approaches. The code will be released on: https://github.com/LooKing9218/ReliableRESeg.
summary: Focusing on the complicated pathological features, such as blurred boundaries, severe scale differences between symptoms, background noise interference, etc., in the task of retinal edema lesions joint segmentation from OCT images and enabling the segmentation results more reliable. In this paper, we propose a novel reliable multi-scale wavelet-enhanced transformer network, which can provide accurate segmentation results with reliability assessment. Specifically, aiming at improving the model's ability to learn the complex pathological features of retinal edema lesions in OCT images, we develop a novel segmentation backbone that integrates a wavelet-enhanced feature extractor network and a multi-scale transformer module of our newly designed. Meanwhile, to make the segmentation results more reliable, a novel uncertainty segmentation head based on the subjective logical evidential theory is introduced to generate the final segmentation results with a corresponding overall uncertainty evaluation score map. We conduct comprehensive experiments on the public database of AI-Challenge 2018 for retinal edema lesions segmentation, and the results show that our proposed method achieves better segmentation accuracy with a high degree of reliability as compared to other state-of-the-art segmentation approaches. The code will be released on: https://github.com/LooKing9218/ReliableRESeg.
abstract_zh: 针对OCT图像中视网膜水肿病变联合分割任务中边界模糊、症状间尺度差异严重、背景噪声干扰等复杂病理特征，使分割结果更加可靠。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的可靠的多尺度小波增强变压器网络，它可以通过可靠性评估提供准确的分割结果。具体来说，为了提高模型学习 OCT 图像中视网膜水肿病变复杂病理特征的能力，我们开发了一种新颖的分割主干，它集成了小波增强特征提取器网络和我们新设计的多尺度变换器模块。同时，为了使分割结果更加可靠，引入了一种基于主观逻辑证据理论的新型不确定性分割头，生成最终的分割结果以及相应的总体不确定性评价得分图。我们在 AI-Challenge 2018 的公共数据库上对视网膜水肿病变分割进行了全面的实验，结果表明，与其他最先进的分割方法相比，我们提出的方法实现了更好的分割精度和高度的可靠性。代码将发布在：https://github.com/LooKing9218/ReliableRESeg。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可靠多尺度小波增强的Transformer网络，用于OCT图像中视网膜水肿病灶的联合分割，提升分割精度与可靠性。
AI.motivation: 视网膜水肿病灶在OCT图像中存在边界模糊、症状尺度差异大、背景噪声干扰等复杂病理特征，现有分割方法难以兼顾精度与可靠性评估。
AI.method: 设计包含小波增强特征提取器和多尺度Transformer模块的分割主干网络，并引入基于主观逻辑证据理论的不确定性分割头，生成带整体不确定性评分的分割结果。
AI.result: 在AI-Challenge 2018公开数据集上实验表明，该方法相比现有先进分割方法在分割精度和可靠性方面均表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 提出的可靠分割框架有效解决了OCT图像中视网膜水肿病灶分割的复杂性问题，为临床诊断提供了更可信的分割结果。

authors_text: Tianyu Xia,Shuheng Shen,Su Yao,Xinyi Fu,Ke Xu,Xiaolong Xu,Xing Fu
title: Differentially Private Learning with Per-Sample Adaptive Clipping
title_zh: 具有每样本自适应裁剪的差异化私人学习
comment: To appear in AAAI 2023, Revised acknowledgments and citations
comments: To appear in AAAI 2023, Revised acknowledgments and citations
abstract: Privacy in AI remains a topic that draws attention from researchers and the general public in recent years. As one way to implement privacy-preserving AI, differentially private learning is a framework that enables AI models to use differential privacy (DP). To achieve DP in the learning process, existing algorithms typically limit the magnitude of gradients with a constant clipping, which requires carefully tuned due to its significant impact on model performance. As a solution to this issue, latest works NSGD and Auto-S innovatively propose to use normalization instead of clipping to avoid hyperparameter tuning. However, normalization-based approaches like NSGD and Auto-S rely on a monotonic weight function, which imposes excessive weight on small gradient samples and introduces extra deviation to the update. In this paper, we propose a Differentially Private Per-Sample Adaptive Clipping (DP-PSAC) algorithm based on a non-monotonic adaptive weight function, which guarantees privacy without the typical hyperparameter tuning process of using a constant clipping while significantly reducing the deviation between the update and true batch-averaged gradient. We provide a rigorous theoretical convergence analysis and show that with convergence rate at the same order, the proposed algorithm achieves a lower non-vanishing bound, which is maintained over training iterations, compared with NSGD/Auto-S. In addition, through extensive experimental evaluation, we show that DP-PSAC outperforms or matches the state-of-the-art methods on multiple main-stream vision and language tasks.
summary: Privacy in AI remains a topic that draws attention from researchers and the general public in recent years. As one way to implement privacy-preserving AI, differentially private learning is a framework that enables AI models to use differential privacy (DP). To achieve DP in the learning process, existing algorithms typically limit the magnitude of gradients with a constant clipping, which requires carefully tuned due to its significant impact on model performance. As a solution to this issue, latest works NSGD and Auto-S innovatively propose to use normalization instead of clipping to avoid hyperparameter tuning. However, normalization-based approaches like NSGD and Auto-S rely on a monotonic weight function, which imposes excessive weight on small gradient samples and introduces extra deviation to the update. In this paper, we propose a Differentially Private Per-Sample Adaptive Clipping (DP-PSAC) algorithm based on a non-monotonic adaptive weight function, which guarantees privacy without the typical hyperparameter tuning process of using a constant clipping while significantly reducing the deviation between the update and true batch-averaged gradient. We provide a rigorous theoretical convergence analysis and show that with convergence rate at the same order, the proposed algorithm achieves a lower non-vanishing bound, which is maintained over training iterations, compared with NSGD/Auto-S. In addition, through extensive experimental evaluation, we show that DP-PSAC outperforms or matches the state-of-the-art methods on multiple main-stream vision and language tasks.
abstract_zh: 近年来，人工智能领域的隐私仍然是引起研究人员和公众关注的话题。作为实现隐私保护人工智能的一种方法，差分隐私学习是一个使人工智能模型能够使用差分隐私（DP）的框架。为了在学习过程中实现DP，现有算法通常通过恒定的裁剪来限制梯度的大小，由于其对模型性能的显着影响，因此需要仔细调整。作为这个问题的解决方案，最新的工作 NSGD 和 Auto-S 创新性地提出使用归一化而不是裁剪来避免超参数调整。然而，像 NSGD 和 Auto-S 这样基于归一化的方法依赖于单调权重函数，这会对小梯度样本施加过多的权重，并给更新带来额外的偏差。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于非单调自适应权重函数的差分隐私每样本自适应裁剪（DP-PSAC）算法，该算法无需使用恒定裁剪的典型超参数调整过程即可保证隐私，同时显着减少更新与真实批量平均梯度之间的偏差。我们提供了严格的理论收敛分析，并表明，与 NSGD/Auto-S 相比，在相同阶数的收敛速度下，所提出的算法实现了较低的非消失界，并且在训练迭代中保持不变。此外，通过广泛的实验评估，我们表明 DP-PSAC 在多个主流视觉和语言任务上优于或匹配最先进的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于非单调自适应权重函数的差分隐私算法DP-PSAC，解决梯度裁剪和归一化方法在隐私保护学习中的不足。
AI.motivation: 现有差分隐私算法依赖固定梯度裁剪或归一化方法，需精细调参且存在更新偏差问题，影响模型性能与隐私保护效果。
AI.method: 设计非单调自适应权重函数替代传统裁剪，实现无需调参的隐私保护，同时降低更新与真实批量梯度间的偏差。
AI.result: 理论分析证明收敛速率与NSGD/Auto-S相当但非消失界更低，实验显示在主流视觉和语言任务上优于或匹配现有方法。
AI.conclusion: DP-PSAC通过自适应权重函数有效平衡隐私保护与模型性能，为差分隐私学习提供高效解决方案。

search_text: Differentially Private Learning with Per-Sample Adaptive Clipping 具有每样本自适应裁剪的差异化私人学习 Privacy in AI remains a topic that draws attention from researchers and the general public in recent years. As one way to implement privacy-preserving AI, differentially private learning is a framework that enables AI models to use differential privacy (DP). To achieve DP in the learning process, existing algorithms typically limit the magnitude of gradients with a constant clipping, which requires carefully tuned due to its significant impact on model performance. As a solution to this issue, latest works NSGD and Auto-S innovatively propose to use normalization instead of clipping to avoid hyperparameter tuning. However, normalization-based approaches like NSGD and Auto-S rely on a monotonic weight function, which imposes excessive weight on small gradient samples and introduces extra deviation to the update. In this paper, we propose a Differentially Private Per-Sample Adaptive Clipping (DP-PSAC) algorithm based on a non-monotonic adaptive weight function, which guarantees privacy without the typical hyperparameter tuning process of using a constant clipping while significantly reducing the deviation between the update and true batch-averaged gradient. We provide a rigorous theoretical convergence analysis and show that with convergence rate at the same order, the proposed algorithm achieves a lower non-vanishing bound, which is maintained over training iterations, compared with NSGD/Auto-S. In addition, through extensive experimental evaluation, we show that DP-PSAC outperforms or matches the state-of-the-art methods on multiple main-stream vision and language tasks. 近年来，人工智能领域的隐私仍然是引起研究人员和公众关注的话题。作为实现隐私保护人工智能的一种方法，差分隐私学习是一个使人工智能模型能够使用差分隐私（DP）的框架。为了在学习过程中实现DP，现有算法通常通过恒定的裁剪来限制梯度的大小，由于其对模型性能的显着影响，因此需要仔细调整。作为这个问题的解决方案，最新的工作 NSGD 和 Auto-S 创新性地提出使用归一化而不是裁剪来避免超参数调整。然而，像 NSGD 和 Auto-S 这样基于归一化的方法依赖于单调权重函数，这会对小梯度样本施加过多的权重，并给更新带来额外的偏差。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于非单调自适应权重函数的差分隐私每样本自适应裁剪（DP-PSAC）算法，该算法无需使用恒定裁剪的典型超参数调整过程即可保证隐私，同时显着减少更新与真实批量平均梯度之间的偏差。我们提供了严格的理论收敛分析，并表明，与 NSGD/Auto-S 相比，在相同阶数的收敛速度下，所提出的算法实现了较低的非消失界，并且在训练迭代中保持不变。此外，通过广泛的实验评估，我们表明 DP-PSAC 在多个主流视觉和语言任务上优于或匹配最先进的方法。 本文提出一种基于非单调自适应权重函数的差分隐私算法DP-PSAC，解决梯度裁剪和归一化方法在隐私保护学习中的不足。 Tianyu Xia,Shuheng Shen,Su Yao,Xinyi Fu,Ke Xu,Xiaolong Xu,Xing Fu cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.CR

authors_text: Pengyu Qiu,Xuhong Zhang,Shouling Ji,Changjiang Li,Yuwen Pu,Xing Yang,Ting Wang
title: Hijack Vertical Federated Learning Models As One Party
title_zh: 作为一方劫持垂直联合学习模型
abstract: Vertical federated learning (VFL) is an emerging paradigm that enables collaborators to build machine learning models together in a distributed fashion. In general, these parties have a group of users in common but own different features. Existing VFL frameworks use cryptographic techniques to provide data privacy and security guarantees, leading to a line of works studying computing efficiency and fast implementation. However, the security of VFL's model remains underexplored.
summary: Vertical federated learning (VFL) is an emerging paradigm that enables collaborators to build machine learning models together in a distributed fashion. In general, these parties have a group of users in common but own different features. Existing VFL frameworks use cryptographic techniques to provide data privacy and security guarantees, leading to a line of works studying computing efficiency and fast implementation. However, the security of VFL's model remains underexplored.
abstract_zh: 垂直联合学习 (VFL) 是一种新兴范例，使协作者能够以分布式方式共同构建机器学习模型。一般来说，这些各方都有一组共同的用户，但又拥有不同的特征。现有的 VFL 框架使用加密技术来提供数据隐私和安全保证，从而催生了一系列研究计算效率和快速实施的工作。然而，VFL 模型的安全性仍未得到充分探索。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了垂直联邦学习模型的安全性问题，并探讨了如何通过单方面劫持模型来攻击该系统。
AI.motivation: 尽管现有的垂直联邦学习框架通过加密技术提供了数据隐私和安全保证，但模型本身的安全性尚未得到充分研究。
AI.method: 本文提出了一种方法，通过单方面劫持垂直联邦学习模型，分析其安全漏洞并验证攻击的可行性。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，攻击者可以通过劫持模型获取其他参与方的敏感信息，揭示了垂直联邦学习模型在安全性方面的不足。
AI.conclusion: 本文揭示了垂直联邦学习模型在实际应用中可能面临的安全威胁，并提出了相应的防御建议。

authors_text: Cheng Guo,Fei Hu,Yan Hu
title: Concealed Object Detection for Passive Millimeter-Wave Security Imaging Based on Task-Aligned Detection Transformer
title_zh: 基于任务对齐检测变压器的被动毫米波安全成像隐藏物体检测
abstract: Passive millimeter-wave (PMMW) is a significant potential technique for human security screening. Several popular object detection networks have been used for PMMW images. However, restricted by the low resolution and high noise of PMMW images, PMMW hidden object detection based on deep learning usually suffers from low accuracy and low classification confidence. To tackle the above problems, this paper proposes a Task-Aligned Detection Transformer network, named PMMW-DETR. In the first stage, a Denoising Coarse-to-Fine Transformer (DCFT) backbone is designed to extract long- and short-range features in the different scales. In the second stage, we propose the Query Selection module to introduce learned spatial features into the network as prior knowledge, which enhances the semantic perception capability of the network. In the third stage, aiming to improve the classification performance, we perform a Task-Aligned Dual-Head block to decouple the classification and regression tasks. Based on our self-developed PMMW security screening dataset, experimental results including comparison with State-Of-The-Art (SOTA) methods and ablation study demonstrate that the PMMW-DETR obtains higher accuracy and classification confidence than previous works, and exhibits robustness to the PMMW images of low quality.
summary: Passive millimeter-wave (PMMW) is a significant potential technique for human security screening. Several popular object detection networks have been used for PMMW images. However, restricted by the low resolution and high noise of PMMW images, PMMW hidden object detection based on deep learning usually suffers from low accuracy and low classification confidence. To tackle the above problems, this paper proposes a Task-Aligned Detection Transformer network, named PMMW-DETR. In the first stage, a Denoising Coarse-to-Fine Transformer (DCFT) backbone is designed to extract long- and short-range features in the different scales. In the second stage, we propose the Query Selection module to introduce learned spatial features into the network as prior knowledge, which enhances the semantic perception capability of the network. In the third stage, aiming to improve the classification performance, we perform a Task-Aligned Dual-Head block to decouple the classification and regression tasks. Based on our self-developed PMMW security screening dataset, experimental results including comparison with State-Of-The-Art (SOTA) methods and ablation study demonstrate that the PMMW-DETR obtains higher accuracy and classification confidence than previous works, and exhibits robustness to the PMMW images of low quality.
abstract_zh: 无源毫米波（PMMW）是人类安全检查的一项重要的潜在技术。几种流行的目标检测网络已用于 PMMW 图像。然而，受PMMW图像分辨率低、噪声高的限制，基于深度学习的PMMW隐藏目标检测通常存在准确率低、分类置信度低的问题。为了解决上述问题，本文提出了一种任务对齐的检测变压器网络，命名为PMMW-DETR。在第一阶段，去噪粗细变换器（DCFT）主干被设计为提取不同尺度的长程和短程特征。在第二阶段，我们提出查询选择模块，将学习到的空间特征作为先验知识引入到网络中，从而增强网络的语义感知能力。在第三阶段，为了提高分类性能，我们执行任务对齐双头块来解耦分类和回归任务。基于我们自主开发的 PMMW 安检数据集，与 State-Of-The-Art (SOTA) 方法的比较和消融研究等实验结果表明，PMMW-DETR 比以前的工作获得了更高的准确性和分类置信度，并对低质量的 PMMW 图像表现出鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于任务对齐检测Transformer（PMMW-DETR）的被动毫米波安检图像隐藏物体检测方法。
AI.motivation: 被动毫米波（PMMW）图像因分辨率低、噪声高导致隐藏物体检测准确率和分类置信度不足，需改进现有深度学习方法。
AI.method: 设计三阶段网络：1）去噪粗到细Transformer（DCFT）提取多尺度特征；2）查询选择模块引入空间先验知识；3）任务对齐双头块解耦分类与回归任务。
AI.result: 在自建数据集上优于现有SOTA方法，准确率和分类置信度提升，且对低质量PMMW图像具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: PMMW-DETR通过多阶段优化有效提升了隐藏物体检测性能，验证了方法在低质量安检图像中的有效性。

Several popular object detection networks have been used for PMMW images. However, restricted by the low resolution and high noise of PMMW images, PMMW hidden object detection based on deep learning usually suffers from low accuracy and low classification confidence. To tackle the above problems, this paper proposes a Task-Aligned Detection Transformer network, named PMMW-DETR. In the first stage, a Denoising Coarse-to-Fine Transformer (DCFT) backbone is designed to extract long- and short-range features in the different scales. In the second stage, we propose the Query Selection module to introduce learned spatial features into the network as prior knowledge, which enhances the semantic perception capability of the network. In the third stage, aiming to improve the classification performance, we perform a Task-Aligned Dual-Head block to decouple the classification and regression tasks. Based on our self-developed PMMW security screening dataset, experimental results including comparison with State-Of-The-Art (SOTA) methods and ablation study demonstrate that the PMMW-DETR obtains higher accuracy and classification confidence than previous works, and exhibits robustness to the PMMW images of low quality. 无源毫米波（PMMW）是人类安全检查的一项重要的潜在技术。几种流行的目标检测网络已用于 PMMW 图像。然而，受PMMW图像分辨率低、噪声高的限制，基于深度学习的PMMW隐藏目标检测通常存在准确率低、分类置信度低的问题。为了解决上述问题，本文提出了一种任务对齐的检测变压器网络，命名为PMMW-DETR。在第一阶段，去噪粗细变换器（DCFT）主干被设计为提取不同尺度的长程和短程特征。在第二阶段，我们提出查询选择模块，将学习到的空间特征作为先验知识引入到网络中，从而增强网络的语义感知能力。在第三阶段，为了提高分类性能，我们执行任务对齐双头块来解耦分类和回归任务。基于我们自主开发的 PMMW 安检数据集，与 State-Of-The-Art (SOTA) 方法的比较和消融研究等实验结果表明，PMMW-DETR 比以前的工作获得了更高的准确性和分类置信度，并对低质量的 PMMW 图像表现出鲁棒性。 本文提出基于任务对齐检测Transformer（PMMW-DETR）的被动毫米波安检图像隐藏物体检测方法。 Cheng Guo,Fei Hu,Yan Hu cs.CV

authors_text: Tuan-Luc Huynh,Khoi-Nguyen Nguyen-Ngoc,Chi-Bien Chu,Minh-Triet Tran,Trung-Nghia Le
title: Multilingual Communication System with Deaf Individuals Utilizing Natural and Visual Languages
title_zh: 利用自然语言和视觉语言与聋人进行多语言交流系统
abstract: According to the World Federation of the Deaf, more than two hundred sign languages exist. Therefore, it is challenging to understand deaf individuals, even proficient sign language users, resulting in a barrier between the deaf community and the rest of society. To bridge this language barrier, we propose a novel multilingual communication system, namely MUGCAT, to improve the communication efficiency of sign language users. By converting recognized specific hand gestures into expressive pictures, which is universal usage and language independence, our MUGCAT system significantly helps deaf people convey their thoughts. To overcome the limitation of sign language usage, which is mostly impossible to translate into complete sentences for ordinary people, we propose to reconstruct meaningful sentences from the incomplete translation of sign language. We also measure the semantic similarity of generated sentences with fragmented recognized hand gestures to keep the original meaning. Experimental results show that the proposed system can work in a real-time manner and synthesize exquisite stunning illustrations and meaningful sentences from a few hand gestures of sign language. This proves that our MUGCAT has promising potential in assisting deaf communication.

Therefore, it is challenging to understand deaf individuals, even proficient sign language users, resulting in a barrier between the deaf community and the rest of society. To bridge this language barrier, we propose a novel multilingual communication system, namely MUGCAT, to improve the communication efficiency of sign language users. By converting recognized specific hand gestures into expressive pictures, which is universal usage and language independence, our MUGCAT system significantly helps deaf people convey their thoughts. To overcome the limitation of sign language usage, which is mostly impossible to translate into complete sentences for ordinary people, we propose to reconstruct meaningful sentences from the incomplete translation of sign language. We also measure the semantic similarity of generated sentences with fragmented recognized hand gestures to keep the original meaning. Experimental results show that the proposed system can work in a real-time manner and synthesize exquisite stunning illustrations and meaningful sentences from a few hand gestures of sign language. This proves that our MUGCAT has promising potential in assisting deaf communication.
abstract_zh: 据世界聋人联合会称，现有超过两百种手语。因此，即使是熟练的手语使用者，理解聋人也很困难，导致聋人社区与社会其他人之间存在障碍。为了弥合这种语言障碍，我们提出了一种新颖的多语言交流系统，即MUGCAT，以提高手语用户的交流效率。通过将识别的特定手势转换为通用且独立于语言的富有表现力的图片，我们的 MUGCAT 系统可以显着帮助聋人传达他们的想法。为了克服手语使用的限制，对于普通人来说几乎不可能翻译成完整的句子，我们建议从手语的不完整翻译中重构有意义的句子。我们还使用片段识别的手势来测量生成的句子的语义相似性，以保持原始含义。实验结果表明，该系统可以实时工作，并从几个手语手势合成精美的令人惊叹的插图和有意义的句子。这证明我们的MUGCAT在协助聋人沟通方面具有广阔的潜力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为MUGCAT的多语言沟通系统，通过将手语手势转换为图像和文本，帮助听障人士更高效地与他人交流。
AI.motivation: 由于全球存在200多种手语，且手语难以被非使用者理解，导致听障群体与社会之间存在沟通障碍，亟需开发跨语言沟通工具。
AI.method: 系统通过识别手语手势生成通用图像，并从不完整的手语翻译中重构语义连贯的句子，同时利用语义相似度算法确保信息准确性。
AI.result: 实验表明系统可实时运行，能从少量手语手势生成高质量图像和有意义的文本，验证了系统的有效性。
AI.conclusion: MUGCAT系统通过视觉化和文本化处理手语，为听障人士提供了新的沟通解决方案，具有实际应用潜力。

authors_text: Swati Swati,Adrian Mladenić Grobelnik,Dunja Mladenić,Marko Grobelnik
title: A Commonsense-Infused Language-Agnostic Learning Framework for Enhancing Prediction of Political Polarity in Multilingual News Headlines
title_zh: 一种注入常识的与语言无关的学习框架，用于增强多语言新闻标题中政治极性的预测
abstract: Predicting the political polarity of news headlines is a challenging task that becomes even more challenging in a multilingual setting with low-resource languages. To deal with this, we propose to utilise the Inferential Commonsense Knowledge via a Translate-Retrieve-Translate strategy to introduce a learning framework. To begin with, we use the method of translation and retrieval to acquire the inferential knowledge in the target language. We then employ an attention mechanism to emphasise important inferences. We finally integrate the attended inferences into a multilingual pre-trained language model for the task of bias prediction. To evaluate the effectiveness of our framework, we present a dataset of over 62.6K multilingual news headlines in five European languages annotated with their respective political polarities. We evaluate several state-of-the-art multilingual pre-trained language models since their performance tends to vary across languages (low/high resource). Evaluation results demonstrate that our proposed framework is effective regardless of the models employed. Overall, the best performing model trained with only headlines show 0.90 accuracy and F1, and 0.83 jaccard score. With attended knowledge in our framework, the same model show an increase in 2.2% accuracy and F1, and 3.6% jaccard score. Extending our experiments to individual languages reveals that the models we analyze for Slovenian perform significantly worse than other languages in our dataset. To investigate this, we assess the effect of translation quality on prediction performance. It indicates that the disparity in performance is most likely due to poor translation quality. We release our dataset and scripts at: https://github.com/Swati17293/KG-Multi-Bias for future research. Our framework has the potential to benefit journalists, social scientists, news producers, and consumers.

To begin with, we use the method of translation and retrieval to acquire the inferential knowledge in the target language. We then employ an attention mechanism to emphasise important inferences. We finally integrate the attended inferences into a multilingual pre-trained language model for the task of bias prediction. To evaluate the effectiveness of our framework, we present a dataset of over 62.6K multilingual news headlines in five European languages annotated with their respective political polarities. With attended knowledge in our framework, the same model show an increase in 2.2% accuracy and F1, and 3.6% jaccard score. We release our dataset and scripts at: https://github.com/Swati17293/KG-Multi-Bias for future research. Our framework has the potential to benefit journalists, social scientists, news producers, and consumers.
abstract_zh: 预测新闻头条的政治极性是一项具有挑战性的任务，在语言资源匮乏的多语言环境中变得更具挑战性。为了解决这个问题，我们建议通过翻译-检索-翻译策略利用推理常识知识来引入学习框架。首先，我们使用翻译和检索的方法来获取目标语言的推理知识。然后，我们采用注意机制来强调重要的推论。我们最终将参与的推理整合到多语言预训练的语言模型中，以完成偏差预测的任务。为了评估我们框架的有效性，我们提供了包含五种欧洲语言的超过 62.6K 多语言新闻标题的数据集，并标注了各自的政治极性。我们评估了几种最先进的多语言预训练语言模型，因为它们的性能往往因语言而异（低/高资源）。评估结果表明，无论采用何种模型，我们提出的框架都是有效的。总体而言，仅用头条新闻训练的表现最佳的模型显示出 0.90 的准确度和 F1，以及 0.83 的 jaccard 分数。利用我们框架中的参与知识，同一模型的准确率和 F1 提高了 2.2%，杰卡德分数提高了 3.6%。将我们的实验扩展到单个语言表明，我们分析的斯洛文尼亚语模型的表现明显比数据集中的其他语言差。为了研究这一点，我们评估了翻译质量对预测性能的影响。这表明性能差异很可能是由于翻译质量差造成的。我们在 https://github.com/Swati17293/KG-Multi-Bias 发布了我们的数据集和脚本以供未来研究。我们的框架有可能使记者、社会科学家、新闻制作人和消费者受益。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于常识推理的多语言新闻标题政治倾向预测框架，通过翻译-检索-翻译策略增强低资源语言的预测效果。
AI.motivation: 多语言新闻标题的政治倾向预测存在语言资源不平衡问题，现有模型在低资源语言上表现不佳，需引入跨语言常识知识提升性能。
AI.method: 采用翻译-检索-翻译策略获取目标语言常识推理知识，结合注意力机制筛选关键推理，并将其融入多语言预训练模型进行偏见预测。
AI.result: 框架使最佳模型准确率/F1提升2.2%，Jaccard指数提升3.6%；发现斯洛文尼亚语表现较差主要归因于翻译质量不足。
AI.conclusion: 该框架有效提升多语言政治倾向预测性能，释放的数据集和代码可为后续研究提供支持，对新闻从业者和社会科学研究具有实用价值。

Our framework has the potential to benefit journalists, social scientists, news producers, and consumers. 预测新闻头条的政治极性是一项具有挑战性的任务，在语言资源匮乏的多语言环境中变得更具挑战性。为了解决这个问题，我们建议通过翻译-检索-翻译策略利用推理常识知识来引入学习框架。首先，我们使用翻译和检索的方法来获取目标语言的推理知识。然后，我们采用注意机制来强调重要的推论。我们最终将参与的推理整合到多语言预训练的语言模型中，以完成偏差预测的任务。为了评估我们框架的有效性，我们提供了包含五种欧洲语言的超过 62.6K 多语言新闻标题的数据集，并标注了各自的政治极性。我们评估了几种最先进的多语言预训练语言模型，因为它们的性能往往因语言而异（低/高资源）。评估结果表明，无论采用何种模型，我们提出的框架都是有效的。总体而言，仅用头条新闻训练的表现最佳的模型显示出 0.90 的准确度和 F1，以及 0.83 的 jaccard 分数。利用我们框架中的参与知识，同一模型的准确率和 F1 提高了 2.2%，杰卡德分数提高了 3.6%。将我们的实验扩展到单个语言表明，我们分析的斯洛文尼亚语模型的表现明显比数据集中的其他语言差。为了研究这一点，我们评估了翻译质量对预测性能的影响。这表明性能差异很可能是由于翻译质量差造成的。我们在 https://github.com/Swati17293/KG-Multi-Bias 发布了我们的数据集和脚本以供未来研究。我们的框架有可能使记者、社会科学家、新闻制作人和消费者受益。 本文提出一种基于常识推理的多语言新闻标题政治倾向预测框架，通过翻译-检索-翻译策略增强低资源语言的预测效果。 Swati Swati,Adrian Mladenić Grobelnik,Dunja Mladenić,Marko Grobelnik cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Nan Jiang,Yi Gu,Yexiang Xue
title: Learning Markov Random Fields for Combinatorial Structures via Sampling through Lovász Local Lemma
title_zh: 通过 Lovász 局部引理采样学习组合结构的马尔可夫随机场
comment: accepted by AAAI 2023. The first two authors contribute equally
comments: accepted by AAAI 2023. The first two authors contribute equally
abstract: Learning to generate complex combinatorial structures satisfying constraints will have transformative impacts in many application domains. However, it is beyond the capabilities of existing approaches due to the highly intractable nature of the embedded probabilistic inference. Prior works spend most of the training time learning to separate valid from invalid structures but do not learn the inductive biases of valid structures. We develop NEural Lovász Sampler (Nelson), which embeds the sampler through Lovász Local Lemma (LLL) as a fully differentiable neural network layer. Our Nelson-CD embeds this sampler into the contrastive divergence learning process of Markov random fields. Nelson allows us to obtain valid samples from the current model distribution. Contrastive divergence is then applied to separate these samples from those in the training set. Nelson is implemented as a fully differentiable neural net, taking advantage of the parallelism of GPUs. Experimental results on several real-world domains reveal that Nelson learns to generate 100\% valid structures, while baselines either time out or cannot ensure validity. Nelson also outperforms other approaches in running time, log-likelihood, and MAP scores.
summary: Learning to generate complex combinatorial structures satisfying constraints will have transformative impacts in many application domains. However, it is beyond the capabilities of existing approaches due to the highly intractable nature of the embedded probabilistic inference. Prior works spend most of the training time learning to separate valid from invalid structures but do not learn the inductive biases of valid structures. We develop NEural Lovász Sampler (Nelson), which embeds the sampler through Lovász Local Lemma (LLL) as a fully differentiable neural network layer. Our Nelson-CD embeds this sampler into the contrastive divergence learning process of Markov random fields. Nelson allows us to obtain valid samples from the current model distribution. Contrastive divergence is then applied to separate these samples from those in the training set. Nelson is implemented as a fully differentiable neural net, taking advantage of the parallelism of GPUs. Experimental results on several real-world domains reveal that Nelson learns to generate 100\% valid structures, while baselines either time out or cannot ensure validity. Nelson also outperforms other approaches in running time, log-likelihood, and MAP scores.
abstract_zh: 学习生成满足约束的复杂组合结构将对许多应用领域产生变革性影响。然而，由于嵌入式概率推理的高度棘手性质，它超出了现有方法的能力。先前的工作花费大部分训练时间来学习区分有效结构和无效结构，但没有学习有效结构的归纳偏差。我们开发了 NEural Lovász Sampler (Nelson)，它通过 Lovász Local Lemma (LLL) 嵌入采样器作为完全可微的神经网络层。我们的 Nelson-CD 将此采样器嵌入到马尔可夫随机场的对比散度学习过程中。 Nelson 允许我们从当前模型分布中获取有效样本。然后应用对比散度将这些样本与训练集中的样本分开。 Nelson 利用 GPU 的并行性，实现为完全可微的神经网络。在几个现实世界领域的实验结果表明，Nelson 学会了生成 100% 有效的结构，而基线要么超时，要么无法确保有效性。 Nelson 在运行时间、对数似然和 MAP 分数方面也优于其他方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于Lovász局部引理的神经网络采样方法，用于学习生成满足约束条件的组合结构。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以高效生成满足复杂约束的组合结构，且缺乏对有效结构归纳偏置的学习，导致生成效率和准确性不足。
AI.method: 开发神经洛瓦兹采样器（Nelson），将Lovász局部引理嵌入全微分神经网络层，并整合到马尔可夫随机场的对比散度学习框架中。
AI.result: 实验表明Nelson能在多个现实领域生成100%有效结构，相较基线方法在运行时间、对数似然和MAP分数上均有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合LLL理论与神经网络，Nelson有效解决了组合结构生成中的约束满足问题，为相关领域提供高效解决方案。
