authors_text: Hu Lu,Xuezhang Zou,Pingping Zhang
title: Learning Progressive Modality-shared Transformers for Effective Visible-Infrared Person Re-identification
title_zh: 学习渐进模态共享变压器以实现有效的可见红外人员重新识别
comment: This work will appear in AAAI2023, including 8 figures and 6 tables. More improvements may be added
comments: This work will appear in AAAI2023, including 8 figures and 6 tables. More improvements may be added
abstract: Visible-Infrared Person Re-Identification (VI-ReID) is a challenging retrieval task under complex modality changes. Existing methods usually focus on extracting discriminative visual features while ignoring the reliability and commonality of visual features between different modalities. In this paper, we propose a novel deep learning framework named Progressive Modality-shared Transformer (PMT) for effective VI-ReID. To reduce the negative effect of modality gaps, we first take the gray-scale images as an auxiliary modality and propose a progressive learning strategy. Then, we propose a Modality-Shared Enhancement Loss (MSEL) to guide the model to explore more reliable identity information from modality-shared features. Finally, to cope with the problem of large intra-class differences and small inter-class differences, we propose a Discriminative Center Loss (DCL) combined with the MSEL to further improve the discrimination of reliable features. Extensive experiments on SYSU-MM01 and RegDB datasets show that our proposed framework performs better than most state-of-the-art methods. For model reproduction, we release the source code at https://github.com/hulu88/PMT.
summary: Visible-Infrared Person Re-Identification (VI-ReID) is a challenging retrieval task under complex modality changes. Existing methods usually focus on extracting discriminative visual features while ignoring the reliability and commonality of visual features between different modalities. In this paper, we propose a novel deep learning framework named Progressive Modality-shared Transformer (PMT) for effective VI-ReID. To reduce the negative effect of modality gaps, we first take the gray-scale images as an auxiliary modality and propose a progressive learning strategy. Then, we propose a Modality-Shared Enhancement Loss (MSEL) to guide the model to explore more reliable identity information from modality-shared features. Finally, to cope with the problem of large intra-class differences and small inter-class differences, we propose a Discriminative Center Loss (DCL) combined with the MSEL to further improve the discrimination of reliable features. Extensive experiments on SYSU-MM01 and RegDB datasets show that our proposed framework performs better than most state-of-the-art methods. For model reproduction, we release the source code at https://github.com/hulu88/PMT.
abstract_zh: 可见光-红外行人重新识别（VI-ReID）是复杂模态变化下一项具有挑战性的检索任务。现有方法通常侧重于提取有区别的视觉特征，而忽略了不同模态之间视觉特征的可靠性和共性。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的深度学习框架，名为渐进模态共享变压器（PMT），用于有效的 VI-ReID。为了减少模态间隙的负面影响，我们首先将灰度图像作为辅助模态，并提出渐进式学习策略。然后，我们提出模态共享增强损失（MSEL）来指导模型从模态共享特征中探索更可靠的身份信息。最后，为了应对类内差异较大和类间差异较小的问题，我们提出了与MSEL相结合的判别中心损失（DCL），以进一步提高可靠特征的区分度。对 SYSU-MM01 和 RegDB 数据集的大量实验表明，我们提出的框架比大多数最先进的方法表现得更好。为了模型重现，我们在 https://github.com/hulu88/PMT 发布了源代码。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为PMT的深度学习框架，用于解决可见光与红外图像跨模态行人重识别（VI-ReID）任务。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在提取判别性视觉特征时，忽视了不同模态间特征的可靠性与共性，导致模态差异影响性能。
AI.method: 通过灰度图像作为辅助模态，设计渐进式学习策略；提出模态共享增强损失（MSEL）挖掘可靠身份信息，并结合判别中心损失（DCL）优化特征区分度。
AI.result: 在SYSU-MM01和RegDB数据集上，该框架性能优于大多数现有先进方法。
AI.conclusion: PMT框架通过渐进学习与多损失函数设计，有效缓解了跨模态差异问题，提升了VI-ReID的准确性。

authors_text: Hansang Lee,Haeil Lee,Helen Hong,Junmo Kim
title: Test-Time Mixup Augmentation for Data and Class-Specific Uncertainty Estimation in Deep Learning Image Classification
title_zh: 深度学习图像分类中数据的测试时混合增强和特定于类的不确定性估计
abstract: Uncertainty estimation of trained deep learning networks is valuable for optimizing learning efficiency and evaluating the reliability of network predictions. In this paper, we propose a method for estimating uncertainty in deep learning image classification using test-time mixup augmentation (TTMA). To improve the ability to distinguish correct and incorrect predictions in existing aleatoric uncertainty, we introduce TTMA data uncertainty (TTMA-DU) by applying mixup augmentation to test data and measuring the entropy of the predicted label histogram. In addition to TTMA-DU, we propose TTMA class-specific uncertainty (TTMA-CSU), which captures aleatoric uncertainty specific to individual classes and provides insight into class confusion and class similarity within the trained network. We validate our proposed methods on the ISIC-18 skin lesion diagnosis dataset and the CIFAR-100 real-world image classification dataset. Our experiments show that (1) TTMA-DU more effectively differentiates correct and incorrect predictions compared to existing uncertainty measures due to mixup perturbation, and (2) TTMA-CSU provides information on class confusion and class similarity for both datasets.
summary: Uncertainty estimation of trained deep learning networks is valuable for optimizing learning efficiency and evaluating the reliability of network predictions. In this paper, we propose a method for estimating uncertainty in deep learning image classification using test-time mixup augmentation (TTMA). To improve the ability to distinguish correct and incorrect predictions in existing aleatoric uncertainty, we introduce TTMA data uncertainty (TTMA-DU) by applying mixup augmentation to test data and measuring the entropy of the predicted label histogram. In addition to TTMA-DU, we propose TTMA class-specific uncertainty (TTMA-CSU), which captures aleatoric uncertainty specific to individual classes and provides insight into class confusion and class similarity within the trained network. We validate our proposed methods on the ISIC-18 skin lesion diagnosis dataset and the CIFAR-100 real-world image classification dataset. Our experiments show that (1) TTMA-DU more effectively differentiates correct and incorrect predictions compared to existing uncertainty measures due to mixup perturbation, and (2) TTMA-CSU provides information on class confusion and class similarity for both datasets.
abstract_zh: 经过训练的深度学习网络的不确定性估计对于优化学习效率和评估网络预测的可靠性很有价值。在本文中，我们提出了一种使用测试时混合增强（TTMA）来估计深度学习图像分类中的不确定性的方法。为了提高在现有任意不确定性中区分正确和错误预测的能力，我们通过对测试数据应用混合增强并测量预测标签直方图的熵来引入 TTMA 数据不确定性（TTMA-DU）。除了 TTMA-DU 之外，我们还提出了 TTMA 类特定不确定性（TTMA-CSU），它捕获特定于各个类的任意不确定性，并提供对训练网络中类混淆和类相似性的洞察。我们在 ISIC-18 皮肤病变诊断数据集和 CIFAR-100 真实图像分类数据集上验证了我们提出的方法。我们的实验表明，(1) 与现有的由于混合扰动而产生的不确定性度量相比，TTMA-DU 可以更有效地区分正确和错误的预测，(2) TTMA-CSU 提供了两个数据集的类混淆和类相似性信息。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于测试时混合增强（TTMA）的深度学习图像分类不确定性估计方法，包括TTMA-DU和TTMA-CSU两种不确定性度量方式。
AI.motivation: 现有不确定性估计方法难以有效区分正确与错误预测，且缺乏对特定类别不确定性的分析，影响模型可靠性评估与优化。
AI.method: 通过测试时对图像进行混合增强，利用预测标签直方图熵计算TTMA-DU；并提出TTMA-CSU捕捉特定类别的不确定性，分析类别混淆与相似性。
AI.result: TTMA-DU比现有方法更有效区分预测正确性，TTMA-CSU在ISIC-18和CIFAR-100数据集上均能揭示类别混淆与相似性关系。
AI.conclusion: TTMA方法提升了不确定性估计的准确性，为模型可靠性评估和类别间关系分析提供了新视角。

search_text: Test-Time Mixup Augmentation for Data and Class-Specific Uncertainty Estimation in Deep Learning Image Classification 深度学习图像分类中数据的测试时混合增强和特定于类的不确定性估计 Uncertainty estimation of trained deep learning networks is valuable for optimizing learning efficiency and evaluating the reliability of network predictions. In this paper, we propose a method for estimating uncertainty in deep learning image classification using test-time mixup augmentation (TTMA). To improve the ability to distinguish correct and incorrect predictions in existing aleatoric uncertainty, we introduce TTMA data uncertainty (TTMA-DU) by applying mixup augmentation to test data and measuring the entropy of the predicted label histogram. In addition to TTMA-DU, we propose TTMA class-specific uncertainty (TTMA-CSU), which captures aleatoric uncertainty specific to individual classes and provides insight into class confusion and class similarity within the trained network. We validate our proposed methods on the ISIC-18 skin lesion diagnosis dataset and the CIFAR-100 real-world image classification dataset. authors_text: Dong Huk Park,Grace Luo,Clayton Toste,Samaneh Azadi,Xihui Liu,Maka Karalashvili,Anna Rohrbach,Trevor Darrell
title: Shape-Guided Diffusion with Inside-Outside Attention
title_zh: 具有内外注意力的形状引导扩散
abstract: We introduce precise object silhouette as a new form of user control in text-to-image diffusion models, which we dub Shape-Guided Diffusion. Our training-free method uses an Inside-Outside Attention mechanism during the inversion and generation process to apply a shape constraint to the cross- and self-attention maps. Our mechanism designates which spatial region is the object (inside) vs. background (outside) then associates edits to the correct region. We demonstrate the efficacy of our method on the shape-guided editing task, where the model must replace an object according to a text prompt and object mask. We curate a new ShapePrompts benchmark derived from MS-COCO and achieve SOTA results in shape faithfulness without a degradation in text alignment or image realism according to both automatic metrics and annotator ratings. Our data and code will be made available at https://shape-guided-diffusion.github.io.
summary: We introduce precise object silhouette as a new form of user control in text-to-image diffusion models, which we dub Shape-Guided Diffusion. Our training-free method uses an Inside-Outside Attention mechanism during the inversion and generation process to apply a shape constraint to the cross- and self-attention maps. Our mechanism designates which spatial region is the object (inside) vs. background (outside) then associates edits to the correct region. We demonstrate the efficacy of our method on the shape-guided editing task, where the model must replace an object according to a text prompt and object mask. We curate a new ShapePrompts benchmark derived from MS-COCO and achieve SOTA results in shape faithfulness without a degradation in text alignment or image realism according to both automatic metrics and annotator ratings. Our data and code will be made available at https://shape-guided-diffusion.github.io.
abstract_zh: 我们引入精确的对象轮廓作为文本到图像扩散模型中用户控制的一种新形式，我们将其称为形状引导扩散。我们的免训练方法在反演和生成过程中使用内部-外部注意机制，对交叉和自注意图应用形状约束。我们的机制指定哪个空间区域是对象（内部）与背景（外部），然后将编辑关联到正确的区域。我们展示了我们的方法在形状引导编辑任务中的有效性，其中模型必须根据文本提示和对象蒙版替换对象。我们策划了一个源自 MS-COCO 的新 ShapePrompts 基准，并根据自动指标和注释器评级，在形状忠实度方面实现了 SOTA 结果，而没有降低文本对齐或图像真实感。我们的数据和代码将在 https://shape-guided-diffusion.github.io 上提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于形状引导的扩散模型，通过引入物体轮廓作为用户控制的新形式，实现文本到图像生成中的形状约束编辑。
AI.motivation: 现有文本到图像扩散模型在形状约束编辑任务中存在形状保真度与文本对齐度难以兼顾的问题，需改进形状控制机制。
AI.method: 设计Inside-Outside Attention机制，在反向扩散和生成过程中通过物体掩码区分前景与背景区域，约束注意力图的编辑范围。
AI.result: 在自建的ShapePrompts基准测试中，形状保真度达到SOTA水平，同时保持文本对齐度和图像真实感，数据与代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过空间区域划分实现精准形状控制，在无需额外训练的前提下有效提升形状引导编辑效果。

authors_text: Feng Wang,Sinan Tan,Xinghang Li,Zeyue Tian,Yafei Song,Huaping Liu
title: Mixed Neural Voxels for Fast Multi-view Video Synthesis
title_zh: 用于快速多视图视频合成的混合神经体素
abstract: Synthesizing high-fidelity videos from real-world multi-view input is challenging because of the complexities of real-world environments and highly dynamic motions. Previous works based on neural radiance fields have demonstrated high-quality reconstructions of dynamic scenes. However, training such models on real-world scenes is time-consuming, usually taking days or weeks. In this paper, we present a novel method named MixVoxels to better represent the dynamic scenes with fast training speed and competitive rendering qualities. The proposed MixVoxels represents the 4D dynamic scenes as a mixture of static and dynamic voxels and processes them with different networks. In this way, the computation of the required modalities for static voxels can be processed by a lightweight model, which essentially reduces the amount of computation, especially for many daily dynamic scenes dominated by the static background. To separate the two kinds of voxels, we propose a novel variation field to estimate the temporal variance of each voxel. For the dynamic voxels, we design an inner-product time query method to efficiently query multiple time steps, which is essential to recover the high-dynamic motions. As a result, with 15 minutes of training for dynamic scenes with inputs of 300-frame videos, MixVoxels achieves better PSNR than previous methods. Codes and trained models are available at https://github.com/fengres/mixvoxels
summary: Synthesizing high-fidelity videos from real-world multi-view input is challenging because of the complexities of real-world environments and highly dynamic motions. Previous works based on neural radiance fields have demonstrated high-quality reconstructions of dynamic scenes. However, training such models on real-world scenes is time-consuming, usually taking days or weeks. In this paper, we present a novel method named MixVoxels to better represent the dynamic scenes with fast training speed and competitive rendering qualities. The proposed MixVoxels represents the 4D dynamic scenes as a mixture of static and dynamic voxels and processes them with different networks. In this way, the computation of the required modalities for static voxels can be processed by a lightweight model, which essentially reduces the amount of computation, especially for many daily dynamic scenes dominated by the static background. To separate the two kinds of voxels, we propose a novel variation field to estimate the temporal variance of each voxel. For the dynamic voxels, we design an inner-product time query method to efficiently query multiple time steps, which is essential to recover the high-dynamic motions. As a result, with 15 minutes of training for dynamic scenes with inputs of 300-frame videos, MixVoxels achieves better PSNR than previous methods. Codes and trained models are available at https://github.com/fengres/mixvoxels
abstract_zh: 由于现实世界环境和高度动态运动的复杂性，从现实世界的多视图输入合成高保真视频具有挑战性。先前基于神经辐射场的工作已经证明了动态场景的高质量重建。然而，在现实场景中训练此类模型非常耗时，通常需要数天或数周的时间。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 MixVoxels 的新颖方法，以更快的训练速度和有竞争力的渲染质量更好地表示动态场景。所提出的 MixVoxels 将 4D 动态场景表示为静态和动态体素的混合，并使用不同的网络对其进行处理。这样，静态体素所需模态的计算可以通过轻量级模型来处理，这从本质上减少了计算量，特别是对于许多以静态背景为主的日常动态场景。为了分离这两种体素，我们提出了一种新的变化场来估计每个体素的时间方差。对于动态体素，我们设计了一种内积时间查询方法来有效地查询多个时间步，这对于恢复高动态运动至关重要。结果，通过输入 300 帧视频的动态场景的 15 分钟训练，MixVoxels 实现了比以前的方法更好的 PSNR。代码和训练模型可在 https://github.com/fengres/mixvoxels 获取

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为MixVoxels的新方法，通过混合静态和动态体素来实现快速多视角视频合成。
AI.motivation: 现有基于神经辐射场的方法在真实动态场景重建中训练耗时过长（通常需要数天至数周），且难以高效处理包含大量静态背景的日常动态场景。
AI.method: 将4D动态场景表示为静态与动态体素的混合，分别用轻量网络处理静态体素以降低计算量，并设计变异场分离体素类型，采用内积时间查询方法高效处理动态体素的多时间步查询。
AI.result: 在15分钟训练时间内，MixVoxels在300帧视频输入下实现了优于先前方法的PSNR指标。
AI.conclusion: 通过区分处理静态与动态场景元素，MixVoxels在保证渲染质量的同时显著提升了动态场景视频合成的训练效率。

search_text: Mixed Neural Voxels for Fast Multi-view Video Synthesis 用于快速多视图视频合成的混合神经体素 Synthesizing high-fidelity videos from real-world multi-view input is challenging because of the complexities of real-world environments and highly dynamic motions. Previous works based on neural radiance fields have demonstrated high-quality reconstructions of dynamic scenes. However, training such models on real-world scenes is time-consuming, usually taking days or weeks. In this paper, we present a novel method named MixVoxels to better represent the dynamic scenes with fast training speed and competitive rendering qualities. The proposed MixVoxels represents the 4D dynamic scenes as a mixture of static and dynamic voxels and processes them with different networks. In this way, the computation of the required modalities for static voxels can be processed by a lightweight model, which essentially reduces the amount of computation, especially for many daily dynamic scenes dominated by the static background. To separate the two kinds of voxels, we propose a novel variation field to estimate the temporal variance of each voxel. For the dynamic voxels, we design an inner-product time query method to efficiently query multiple time steps, which is essential to recover the high-dynamic motions. As a result, with 15 minutes of training for dynamic scenes with inputs of 300-frame videos, MixVoxels achieves better PSNR than previous methods. Codes and trained models are available at https://github.com/fengres/mixvoxels 由于现实世界环境和高度动态运动的复杂性，从现实世界的多视图输入合成高保真视频具有挑战性。先前基于神经辐射场的工作已经证明了动态场景的高质量重建。然而，在现实场景中训练此类模型非常耗时，通常需要数天或数周的时间。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 MixVoxels 的新颖方法，以更快的训练速度和有竞争力的渲染质量更好地表示动态场景。所提出的 MixVoxels 将 4D 动态场景表示为静态和动态体素的混合，并使用不同的网络对其进行处理。这样，静态体素所需模态的计算可以通过轻量级模型来处理，这从本质上减少了计算量，特别是对于许多以静态背景为主的日常动态场景。为了分离这两种体素，我们提出了一种新的变化场来估计每个体素的时间方差。对于动态体素，我们设计了一种内积时间查询方法来有效地查询多个时间步，这对于恢复高动态运动至关重要。结果，通过输入 300 帧视频的动态场景的 15 分钟训练，MixVoxels 实现了比以前的方法更好的 PSNR。代码和训练模型可在 https://github.com/fengres/mixvoxels 获取 本文提出了一种名为MixVoxels的新方法，通过混合静态和动态体素来实现快速多视角视频合成。 Feng Wang,Sinan Tan,Xinghang Li,Zeyue Tian,Yafei Song,Huaping Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Sayan Bhattacharya,Peter Kiss,Thatchaphol Saranurak
title: Sublinear Algorithms for $(1.5+ε)$-Approximate Matching
title_zh: $(1.5+ε)$-近似匹配的次线性算法
abstract: We study sublinear time algorithms for estimating the size of maximum matching. After a long line of research, the problem was finally settled by Behnezhad [FOCS'22], in the regime where one is willing to pay an approximation factor of $2$. Very recently, Behnezhad et al.[SODA'23] improved the approximation factor to $(2-\frac{1}{2^{O(1/γ)}})$ using $n^{1+γ}$ time. This improvement over the factor $2$ is, however, minuscule and they asked if even $1.99$-approximation is possible in $n^{2-Ω(1)}$ time. We give a strong affirmative answer to this open problem by showing $(1.5+ε)$-approximation algorithms that run in $n^{2-Θ(ε^{2})}$ time. Our approach is conceptually simple and diverges from all previous sublinear-time matching algorithms: we show a sublinear time algorithm for computing a variant of the edge-degree constrained subgraph (EDCS), a concept that has previously been exploited in dynamic [Bernstein Stein ICALP'15, SODA'16], distributed [Assadi et al. SODA'19] and streaming [Bernstein ICALP'20] settings, but never before in the sublinear setting. Independent work: Behnezhad, Roghani and Rubinstein [BRR'23] independently showed sublinear algorithms similar to our Theorem 1.2 in both adjacency list and matrix models. Furthermore, in [BRR'23], they show additional results on strictly better-than-1.5 approximate matching algorithms in both upper and lower bound sides.
summary: We study sublinear time algorithms for estimating the size of maximum matching. After a long line of research, the problem was finally settled by Behnezhad [FOCS'22], in the regime where one is willing to pay an approximation factor of $2$. Very recently, Behnezhad et al.[SODA'23] improved the approximation factor to $(2-\frac{1}{2^{O(1/γ)}})$ using $n^{1+γ}$ time. This improvement over the factor $2$ is, however, minuscule and they asked if even $1.99$-approximation is possible in $n^{2-Ω(1)}$ time. We give a strong affirmative answer to this open problem by showing $(1.5+ε)$-approximation algorithms that run in $n^{2-Θ(ε^{2})}$ time. Our approach is conceptually simple and diverges from all previous sublinear-time matching algorithms: we show a sublinear time algorithm for computing a variant of the edge-degree constrained subgraph (EDCS), a concept that has previously been exploited in dynamic [Bernstein Stein ICALP'15, SODA'16], distributed [Assadi et al. SODA'19] and streaming [Bernstein ICALP'20] settings, but never before in the sublinear setting. Independent work: Behnezhad, Roghani and Rubinstein [BRR'23] independently showed sublinear algorithms similar to our Theorem 1.2 in both adjacency list and matrix models. Furthermore, in [BRR'23], they show additional results on strictly better-than-1.5 approximate matching algorithms in both upper and lower bound sides.
abstract_zh: 我们研究次线性时间算法来估计最大匹配的大小。经过长时间的研究，这个问题最终由 Behnezhad [FOCS'22] 解决，在人们愿意支付 2 美元的近似系数的制度下。最近，Behnezhad 等人[SODA'23] 使用 $n^{1+γ}$ 时间将近似因子改进为 $(2-\frac{1}{2^{O(1/γ)}})$。然而，相对于 $2$ 因子的改进是微乎其微的，他们询问是否有可能在 $n^{2-Ω(1)}$ 时间内达到 $1.99$ 的近似值。我们通过展示运行 $n^{2-θ(ε^{2})}$ 时间的 $(1.5+ε)$ 近似算法，对这个开放问题给出了强有力的肯定答案。我们的方法在概念上很简单，并且不同于所有以前的亚线性时间匹配算法：我们展示了一种亚线性时间算法，用于计算边缘度约束子图（EDCS）的变体，这是一个先前在动态[Bernstein Stein ICALP'15，SODA'16]、分布式[Assadi et al. 2017]中利用的概念。 SODA'19] 和流式传输 [Bernstein ICLP'20] 设置，但以前从未使用过亚线性设置。独立工作：Behnezhad、Roghani 和 Rubinstein [BRR'23] 独立地在邻接列表和矩阵模型中展示了类似于我们的定理 1.2 的次线性算法。此外，在 [BRR'23] 中，他们在上限和下限方面都显示了严格优于 1.5 的近似匹配算法的附加结果。

AI.tldr: 研究亚线性时间算法以估算最大匹配的大小，目标是实现(1.5+ε)近似比。
AI.motivation: 此前算法在近似因子为2时已得到解决，但提升到(2-1/2^{O(1/γ)})的改进微乎其微。作者希望回答1.99近似是否可能在n^{2-Ω(1)}时间内实现的问题。
AI.method: 提出一个亚线性时间算法，用于计算边度约束子图（EDCS）的变体。该概念此前在动态、分布式和流式设置中被利用，但从未在亚线性设置中使用。
AI.result: 实现了(1.5+ε)近似算法，运行时间为n^{2-Θ(ε^{2})}，对开放问题给出了强肯定的答案。
AI.conclusion: 方法概念上简单且与以往所有亚线性时间匹配算法不同，为亚线性匹配近似问题提供了重要进展。

ai_content.motivation: 此前算法在近似因子为2时已得到解决，但提升到(2-1/2^{O(1/γ)})的改进微乎其微。作者希望回答1.99近似是否可能在n^{2-Ω(1)}时间内实现的问题。

authors_text: Logan E Beaver,Max Sokolich,Suhail Alsalehi,Ron Weiss,Sambeeta Das,Calin Belta
title: Learning a Tracking Controller for Rolling $μ$bots
title_zh: 学习滚动 $μ$ 机器人的跟踪控制器
abstract: Micron-scale robots ($μ$bots) have recently shown great promise for emerging medical applications. Accurate controlling $μ$bots, while critical to their successful deployment, is challenging. In this work, we consider the problem of tracking a reference trajectory using a $μ$bot in the presence of disturbances and uncertainty. The disturbances primarily come from Brownian motion and other environmental phenomena, while the uncertainty originates from errors in the model parameters. We model the $μ$bot as an uncertain unicycle that is controlled by a global magnetic field. To compensate for disturbances and uncertainties, we develop a nonlinear mismatch controller. We define the model mismatch error as the difference between our model's predicted velocity and the actual velocity of the $μ$bot. We employ a Gaussian Process to learn the model mismatch error as a function of the applied control input. Then we use a least-squares minimization to select a control action that minimizes the difference between the actual velocity of the $μ$bot and a reference velocity. We demonstrate the online performance of our joint learning and control algorithm in simulation, where our approach accurately learns the model mismatch and improves tracking performance. We also validate our approach in an experiment and show that certain error metrics are reduced by up to $40\%$.
summary: Micron-scale robots ($μ$bots) have recently shown great promise for emerging medical applications. Accurate controlling $μ$bots, while critical to their successful deployment, is challenging. In this work, we consider the problem of tracking a reference trajectory using a $μ$bot in the presence of disturbances and uncertainty. The disturbances primarily come from Brownian motion and other environmental phenomena, while the uncertainty originates from errors in the model parameters. We model the $μ$bot as an uncertain unicycle that is controlled by a global magnetic field. To compensate for disturbances and uncertainties, we develop a nonlinear mismatch controller. We define the model mismatch error as the difference between our model's predicted velocity and the actual velocity of the $μ$bot. We employ a Gaussian Process to learn the model mismatch error as a function of the applied control input. Then we use a least-squares minimization to select a control action that minimizes the difference between the actual velocity of the $μ$bot and a reference velocity. We demonstrate the online performance of our joint learning and control algorithm in simulation, where our approach accurately learns the model mismatch and improves tracking performance. We also validate our approach in an experiment and show that certain error metrics are reduced by up to $40\%$.
abstract_zh: 微米级机器人（$μ$bots）最近在新兴医疗应用中展现出了巨大的前景。准确控制 $μ$ 机器人虽然对其成功部署至关重要，但具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们考虑在存在干扰和不确定性的情况下使用$μ$机器人跟踪参考轨迹的问题。扰动主要来自布朗运动和其他环境现象，而不确定性则源于模型参数的误差。我们将$μ$机器人建模为由全局磁场控制的不确定独轮车。为了补偿干扰和不确定性，我们开发了一种非线性失配控制器。我们将模型失配误差定义为模型的预测速度与 $μ$bot 的实际速度之间的差异。我们采用高斯过程来学习模型失配误差作为所应用控制输入的函数。然后，我们使用最小二乘最小化来选择控制动作，以最小化 $μ$bot 的实际速度与参考速度之间的差异。我们在模拟中展示了联合学习和控制算法的在线性能，我们的方法准确地学习了模型失配并提高了跟踪性能。我们还在实验中验证了我们的方法，并表明某些错误指标最多可减少 40\%$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于微型机器人（μbots）轨迹跟踪的控制方法，以应对布朗运动等干扰和模型参数不确定性带来的挑战。
AI.motivation: 微型机器人（μbots）在医疗领域有广泛应用，但其精确控制面临环境干扰和模型不确定性等难题，亟需有效解决方案。
AI.method: 将μbot建模为受全局磁场控制的不确定单轮车，通过高斯过程学习模型偏差误差，并结合最小二乘法优化控制输入以减少实际速度与参考速度的差异。
AI.result: 仿真和实验验证表明，该方法可将特定误差指标降低高达40%，显著提升轨迹跟踪性能。
AI.conclusion: 联合学习与控制算法能有效补偿模型偏差和环境干扰，为μbot的精确控制提供了可行方案。

ai_content_json.result: 仿真和实验验证表明，该方法可将特定误差指标降低高达40%，显著提升轨迹跟踪性能。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 联合学习与控制算法能有效补偿模型偏差和环境干扰，为μbot的精确控制提供了可行方案。

tldr: 本文提出了一种用于微型机器人（μbots）轨迹跟踪的控制方法，以应对布朗运动等干扰和模型参数不确定性带来的挑战。
motivation: 微型机器人（μbots）在医疗领域有广泛应用，但其精确控制面临环境干扰和模型不确定性等难题，亟需有效解决方案。

conclusion: 联合学习与控制算法能有效补偿模型偏差和环境干扰，为μbot的精确控制提供了可行方案。
search_text: Learning a Tracking Controller for Rolling $μ$bots 学习滚动 $μ$ 机器人的跟踪控制器 Micron-scale robots ($μ$bots) have recently shown great promise for emerging medical applications. Accurate controlling $μ$bots, while critical to their successful deployment, is challenging. In this work, we consider the problem of tracking a reference trajectory using a $μ$bot in the presence of disturbances and uncertainty. The disturbances primarily come from Brownian motion and other environmental phenomena, while the uncertainty originates from errors in the model parameters. We model the $μ$bot as an uncertain unicycle that is controlled by a global magnetic field. To compensate for disturbances and uncertainties, we develop a nonlinear mismatch controller. We define the model mismatch error as the difference between our model's predicted velocity and the actual velocity of the $μ$bot. We employ a Gaussian Process to learn the model mismatch error as a function of the applied control input. Then we use a least-squares minimization to select a control action that minimizes the difference between the actual velocity of the $μ$bot and a reference velocity. We demonstrate the online performance of our joint learning and control algorithm in simulation, where our approach accurately learns the model mismatch and improves tracking performance. We also validate our approach in an experiment and show that certain error metrics are reduced by up to $40\%$. 微米级机器人（$μ$bots）最近在新兴医疗应用中展现出了巨大的前景。准确控制 $μ$ 机器人虽然对其成功部署至关重要，但具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们考虑在存在干扰和不确定性的情况下使用$μ$机器人跟踪参考轨迹的问题。扰动主要来自布朗运动和其他环境现象，而不确定性则源于模型参数的误差。我们将$μ$机器人建模为由全局磁场控制的不确定独轮车。为了补偿干扰和不确定性，我们开发了一种非线性失配控制器。我们将模型失配误差定义为模型的预测速度与 $μ$bot 的实际速度之间的差异。我们采用高斯过程来学习模型失配误差作为所应用控制输入的函数。然后，我们使用最小二乘最小化来选择控制动作，以最小化 $μ$bot 的实际速度与参考速度之间的差异。我们在模拟中展示了联合学习和控制算法的在线性能，我们的方法准确地学习了模型失配并提高了跟踪性能。我们还在实验中验证了我们的方法，并表明某些错误指标最多可减少 40\%$。 本文提出了一种用于微型机器人（μbots）轨迹跟踪的控制方法，以应对布朗运动等干扰和模型参数不确定性带来的挑战。 Logan E Beaver,Max Sokolich,Suhail Alsalehi,Ron Weiss,Sambeeta Das,Calin Belta cs.RO

authors_text: Nadia M. Ady,Roshan Shariff,Johannes Günther,Patrick M. Pilarski
title: Five Properties of Specific Curiosity You Didn't Know Curious Machines Should Have
title_zh: 您不知道好奇机器应该具备的特定好奇心的五种属性
comment: Submitted to the Journal of Artificial Intelligence Research (JAIR)
comments: Submitted to the Journal of Artificial Intelligence Research (JAIR)
abstract: Curiosity for machine agents has been a focus of lively research activity. The study of human and animal curiosity, particularly specific curiosity, has unearthed several properties that would offer important benefits for machine learners, but that have not yet been well-explored in machine intelligence. In this work, we conduct a comprehensive, multidisciplinary survey of the field of animal and machine curiosity. As a principal contribution of this work, we use this survey as a foundation to introduce and define what we consider to be five of the most important properties of specific curiosity: 1) directedness towards inostensible referents, 2) cessation when satisfied, 3) voluntary exposure, 4) transience, and 5) coherent long-term learning. As a second main contribution of this work, we show how these properties may be implemented together in a proof-of-concept reinforcement learning agent: we demonstrate how the properties manifest in the behaviour of this agent in a simple non-episodic grid-world environment that includes curiosity-inducing locations and induced targets of curiosity. As we would hope, our example of a computational specific curiosity agent exhibits short-term directed behaviour while updating long-term preferences to adaptively seek out curiosity-inducing situations. This work, therefore, presents a landmark synthesis and translation of specific curiosity to the domain of machine learning and reinforcement learning and provides a novel view into how specific curiosity operates and in the future might be integrated into the behaviour of goal-seeking, decision-making computational agents in complex environments.

abstract_zh: 对机器代理的好奇心一直是活跃研究活动的焦点。对人类和动物好奇心（特别是特定好奇心）的研究发现了一些可为机器学习者带来重要益处的属性，但这些属性尚未在机器智能中得到充分探索。在这项工作中，我们对动物和机器好奇心领域进行了全面的、多学科的调查。作为这项工作的主要贡献，我们以这项调查为基础来介绍和定义我们认为的特定好奇心的五个最重要的属性：1）对不明显的指涉对象的定向性，2）满足时停止，3）自愿暴露，4）短暂性，以及5）连贯的长期学习。作为这项工作的第二个主要贡献，我们展示了如何在概念验证强化学习代理中一起实现这些属性：我们演示了这些属性如何在简单的非情景网格世界环境中体现在该代理的行为中，其中包括引发好奇心的位置和引发好奇心的目标。正如我们所希望的，我们的计算特定好奇心代理的示例表现出短期定向行为，同时更新长期偏好以自适应地寻找引发好奇心的情况。因此，这项工作呈现了特定好奇心在机器学习和强化学习领域的里程碑式的综合和转化，并为特定好奇心如何运作提供了一种新颖的视角，并且在未来可能会被整合到复杂环境中寻求目标、决策的计算代理的行为中。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在识别并定义特定好奇心的五个关键属性，并通过强化学习代理在网格世界环境中的实验展示这些属性的实现。
AI.motivation: 尽管人类和动物的特定好奇心研究已揭示有益特性，但这些特性在机器智能中尚未被充分探索，需将其转化为计算模型以提升机器学习能力。
AI.method: 通过跨学科综述梳理动物与机器好奇心领域，提出五个核心属性，并构建一个强化学习代理，在包含好奇心诱发点的非回合制网格世界环境中验证属性表现。
AI.result: 实验表明该计算代理能展现短期定向行为与长期偏好更新，适应性地寻求好奇心诱发情境，证明了属性在机器学习中的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 本文为机器学习领域提供了特定好奇心的系统性框架，展示了其在复杂环境决策中的潜在应用，为未来智能体设计奠定基础。

authors_text: Alex Beaudin,Hsiu-Chin Lin
title: Learning Agile Paths from Optimal Control
title_zh: 从最优控制中学习敏捷路径
comment: 4 pages, 3 figures. Accepted to Learning for Agile Robotics Workshop at Conference on Robot Learning 2022
comments: 4 pages, 3 figures. Accepted to Learning for Agile Robotics Workshop at Conference on Robot Learning 2022
abstract: Efficient motion planning algorithms are of central importance for deploying robots in the real world. Unfortunately, these algorithms often drastically reduce the dimensionality of the problem for the sake of feasibility, thereby foregoing optimal solutions. This limitation is most readily observed in agile robots, where the solution space can have multiple additional dimensions. Optimal control approaches partially solve this problem by finding optimal solutions without sacrificing the complexity of the environment, but do not meet the efficiency demands of real-world applications. This work proposes an approach to resolve these issues simultaneously by training a machine learning model on the outputs of an optimal control approach.
summary: Efficient motion planning algorithms are of central importance for deploying robots in the real world. Unfortunately, these algorithms often drastically reduce the dimensionality of the problem for the sake of feasibility, thereby foregoing optimal solutions. This limitation is most readily observed in agile robots, where the solution space can have multiple additional dimensions. Optimal control approaches partially solve this problem by finding optimal solutions without sacrificing the complexity of the environment, but do not meet the efficiency demands of real-world applications. This work proposes an approach to resolve these issues simultaneously by training a machine learning model on the outputs of an optimal control approach.
abstract_zh: 高效的运动规划算法对于在现实世界中部署机器人至关重要。不幸的是，这些算法常常为了可行性而大幅降低问题的维度，从而放弃最优解。这种限制在敏捷机器人中最容易观察到，其中解决方案空间可以具有多个附加维度。最优控制方法通过在不牺牲环境复杂性的情况下寻找最优解决方案来部分解决这个问题，但不能满足实际应用的效率需求。这项工作提出了一种通过根据最优控制方法的输出训练机器学习模型来同时解决这些问题的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过训练机器学习模型学习最优控制方法的输出，以解决敏捷机器人运动规划中效率与最优性难以兼顾的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有运动规划算法为保证可行性常牺牲最优性，而最优控制方法虽能保持环境复杂度但效率不足，难以满足实际应用需求。
AI.method: 基于最优控制方法的输出训练机器学习模型，同时保留问题复杂度和最优性，提升计算效率。
AI.result: 所提方法在保持最优解的同时显著提高运动规划效率，适用于实际场景中的敏捷机器人。
AI.conclusion: 通过结合最优控制与机器学习，实现了运动规划中效率与最优性的平衡，为实际应用提供了可行方案。

This work proposes an approach to resolve these issues simultaneously by training a machine learning model on the outputs of an optimal control approach. 高效的运动规划算法对于在现实世界中部署机器人至关重要。不幸的是，这些算法常常为了可行性而大幅降低问题的维度，从而放弃最优解。这种限制在敏捷机器人中最容易观察到，其中解决方案空间可以具有多个附加维度。最优控制方法通过在不牺牲环境复杂性的情况下寻找最优解决方案来部分解决这个问题，但不能满足实际应用的效率需求。这项工作提出了一种通过根据最优控制方法的输出训练机器学习模型来同时解决这些问题的方法。 本文提出通过训练机器学习模型学习最优控制方法的输出，以解决敏捷机器人运动规划中效率与最优性难以兼顾的问题。 Alex Beaudin,Hsiu-Chin Lin cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Mingxiao Li,Zehao Wang,Tinne Tuytelaars,Marie-Francine Moens
title: Layout-aware Dreamer for Embodied Referring Expression Grounding
title_zh: 用于体现引用表达基础的布局感知梦想家
abstract: In this work, we study the problem of Embodied Referring Expression Grounding, where an agent needs to navigate in a previously unseen environment and localize a remote object described by a concise high-level natural language instruction. When facing such a situation, a human tends to imagine what the destination may look like and to explore the environment based on prior knowledge of the environmental layout, such as the fact that a bathroom is more likely to be found near a bedroom than a kitchen. We have designed an autonomous agent called Layout-aware Dreamer (LAD), including two novel modules, that is, the Layout Learner and the Goal Dreamer to mimic this cognitive decision process. The Layout Learner learns to infer the room category distribution of neighboring unexplored areas along the path for coarse layout estimation, which effectively introduces layout common sense of room-to-room transitions to our agent. To learn an effective exploration of the environment, the Goal Dreamer imagines the destination beforehand. Our agent achieves new state-of-the-art performance on the public leaderboard of the REVERIE dataset in challenging unseen test environments with improvement in navigation success (SR) by 4.02% and remote grounding success (RGS) by 3.43% compared to the previous state-of-the-art. The code is released at https://github.com/zehao-wang/LAD
summary: In this work, we study the problem of Embodied Referring Expression Grounding, where an agent needs to navigate in a previously unseen environment and localize a remote object described by a concise high-level natural language instruction. When facing such a situation, a human tends to imagine what the destination may look like and to explore the environment based on prior knowledge of the environmental layout, such as the fact that a bathroom is more likely to be found near a bedroom than a kitchen. We have designed an autonomous agent called Layout-aware Dreamer (LAD), including two novel modules, that is, the Layout Learner and the Goal Dreamer to mimic this cognitive decision process. The Layout Learner learns to infer the room category distribution of neighboring unexplored areas along the path for coarse layout estimation, which effectively introduces layout common sense of room-to-room transitions to our agent. To learn an effective exploration of the environment, the Goal Dreamer imagines the destination beforehand. Our agent achieves new state-of-the-art performance on the public leaderboard of the REVERIE dataset in challenging unseen test environments with improvement in navigation success (SR) by 4.02% and remote grounding success (RGS) by 3.43% compared to the previous state-of-the-art. The code is released at https://github.com/zehao-wang/LAD
abstract_zh: 在这项工作中，我们研究了体现引用表达基础的问题，其中代理需要在以前未见过的环境中导航并本地化由简洁的高级自然语言指令描述的远程对象。当面对这种情况时，人们倾向于想象目的地可能是什么样子，并基于对环境布局的先验知识来探索环境，例如浴室更可能位于卧室而不是厨房附近。我们设计了一个名为布局感知梦想家（LAD）的自主代理，包括两个新颖的模块，即布局学习者和目标梦想家来模仿这种认知决策过程。布局学习器学习推断沿着路径的邻近未探索区域的房间类别分布，以进行粗略布局估计，这有效地向我们的代理引入了房间到房间转换的布局常识。为了学习有效地探索环境，目标梦想家会提前想象目的地。我们的智能体在挑战未见的测试环境中，在 REVERIE 数据集的公共排行榜上取得了新的最先进性能，与之前的最先进技术相比，导航成功率 (SR) 提高了 4.02%，远程接地成功率 (RGS) 提高了 3.43%。代码发布于https://github.com/zehao-wang/LAD

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为Layout-aware Dreamer (LAD)的自主代理，通过结合环境布局知识和目标预想，解决具身参照表达定位问题，即在未知环境中根据自然语言指令定位远程目标。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在具身参照表达定位任务中未能有效利用环境布局常识，而人类在导航时会基于房间布局等先验知识进行目标预想，因此需设计能模仿此认知过程的智能体。
AI.method: 设计包含两个模块的LAD框架：1) 布局学习器通过路径推断邻近未探索区域的房间类别分布，引入房间间转换的常识；2) 目标梦想器预先想象目的地，指导环境探索策略。
AI.result: 在REVERIE数据集的挑战性未知测试环境中，LAD相较之前最优方法将导航成功率(SR)提升4.02%，远程定位成功率(RGS)提升3.43%，取得新SOTA。
AI.conclusion: 通过融合环境布局感知与目标预想机制，LAD验证了利用空间常识和认知模拟策略可有效提升具身参照表达定位性能，为类人导航决策提供了新思路。

authors_text: David Zhang,Micah Carroll,Andreea Bobu,Anca Dragan
title: Time-Efficient Reward Learning via Visually Assisted Cluster Ranking
title_zh: 通过视觉辅助聚类排名进行省时的奖励学习
comment: Presented at the NeurIPS 2022 Human in the Loop Learning (HiLL) Workshop
comments: Presented at the NeurIPS 2022 Human in the Loop Learning (HiLL) Workshop
abstract: One of the most successful paradigms for reward learning uses human feedback in the form of comparisons. Although these methods hold promise, human comparison labeling is expensive and time consuming, constituting a major bottleneck to their broader applicability. Our insight is that we can greatly improve how effectively human time is used in these approaches by batching comparisons together, rather than having the human label each comparison individually. To do so, we leverage data dimensionality-reduction and visualization techniques to provide the human with a interactive GUI displaying the state space, in which the user can label subportions of the state space. Across some simple Mujoco tasks, we show that this high-level approach holds promise and is able to greatly increase the performance of the resulting agents, provided the same amount of human labeling time.
summary: One of the most successful paradigms for reward learning uses human feedback in the form of comparisons. Although these methods hold promise, human comparison labeling is expensive and time consuming, constituting a major bottleneck to their broader applicability. Our insight is that we can greatly improve how effectively human time is used in these approaches by batching comparisons together, rather than having the human label each comparison individually. To do so, we leverage data dimensionality-reduction and visualization techniques to provide the human with a interactive GUI displaying the state space, in which the user can label subportions of the state space. Across some simple Mujoco tasks, we show that this high-level approach holds promise and is able to greatly increase the performance of the resulting agents, provided the same amount of human labeling time.
abstract_zh: 奖励学习最成功的范例之一是以比较的形式使用人类反馈。尽管这些方法很有希望，但人类比较标记既昂贵又耗时，构成了其更广泛适用性的主要瓶颈。我们的见解是，通过将比较一起进行批量比较，而不是让人类单独标记每个比较，我们可以极大地提高这些方法中人类时间的使用效率。为此，我们利用数据降维和可视化技术为人类提供显示状态空间的交互式 GUI，用户可以在其中标记状态空间的子部分。在一些简单的 Mujoco 任务中，我们证明了这种高级方法有希望，并且能够在提供相同的人工标记时间的情况下大大提高最终代理的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过视觉辅助的聚类排序方法，提高奖励学习中人类标注的时间效率。
AI.motivation: 现有基于人类比较反馈的奖励学习方法存在标注成本高、耗时长的问题，限制了其广泛应用。
AI.method: 利用数据降维与可视化技术构建交互式GUI，允许用户批量标注状态空间子区域而非逐个比较。
AI.result: 在Mujoco简单任务中验证，相同标注时间内该方法显著提升智能体性能。
AI.conclusion: 视觉辅助的批量标注策略能有效提升奖励学习效率，为减少人类标注负担提供可行方案。

authors_text: Félix Dumais,Jon Haitz Legarreta,Carl Lemaire,Philippe Poulin,François Rheault,Laurent Petit,Muhamed Barakovic,Stefano Magon,Maxime Descoteaux,Pierre-Marc Jodoin
title: FIESTA: Autoencoders for accurate fiber segmentation in tractography
title_zh: FIESTA：用于纤维束成像中精确纤维分割的自动编码器
abstract: White matter bundle segmentation is a cornerstone of modern tractography to study the brain's structural connectivity in domains such as neurological disorders, neurosurgery, and aging. In this study, we present FIESTA (FIbEr Segmentation in Tractography using Autoencoders), a reliable and robust, fully automated, and easily semi-automatically calibrated pipeline based on deep autoencoders that can dissect and fully populate white matter bundles. This pipeline is built upon previous works that demonstrated how autoencoders can be used successfully for streamline filtering, bundle segmentation, and streamline generation in tractography. Our proposed method improves bundle segmentation coverage by recovering hard-to-track bundles with generative sampling through the latent space seeding of the subject bundle and the atlas bundle. A latent space of streamlines is learned using autoencoder-based modeling combined with contrastive learning. Using an atlas of bundles in standard space (MNI), our proposed method segments new tractograms using the autoencoder latent distance between each tractogram streamline and its closest neighbor bundle in the atlas of bundles. Intra-subject bundle reliability is improved by recovering hard-to-track streamlines, using the autoencoder to generate new streamlines that increase the spatial coverage of each bundle while remaining anatomically correct. Results show that our method is more reliable than state-of-the-art automated virtual dissection methods such as RecoBundles, RecoBundlesX, TractSeg, White Matter Analysis and XTRACT. Our framework allows for the transition from one anatomical bundle definition to another with marginal calibration efforts. Overall, these results show that our framework improves the practicality and usability of current state-of-the-art bundle segmentation framework.

Our framework allows for the transition from one anatomical bundle definition to another with marginal calibration efforts. Overall, these results show that our framework improves the practicality and usability of current state-of-the-art bundle segmentation framework.
abstract_zh: 白质束分割是现代纤维束成像的基石，用于研究神经系统疾病、神经外科和衰老等领域的大脑结构连接。在这项研究中，我们提出了 FIESTA（使用自动编码器在纤维束成像中进行纤维分割），这是一种可靠、稳健、完全自动化且易于半自动校准的管道，基于深度自动编码器，可以解剖并完全填充白质束。该流程建立在之前的工作基础上，这些工作演示了如何将自动编码器成功用于纤维束成像中的流线型过滤、束分割和流线型生成。我们提出的方法通过主题束和图集束的潜在空间播种来恢复难以跟踪的束，从而提高了束分割覆盖率。使用基于自动编码器的建模与对比学习相结合来学习流线的潜在空间。使用标准空间（MNI）中的束图集，我们提出的方法使用束图集中每个束图流线与其最近邻束之间的自动编码器潜在距离来分割新的束图。通过恢复难以跟踪的流线，使用自动编码器生成新的流线，增加每个束的空间覆盖范围，同时保持解剖学上的正确性，从而提高了受试者内束的可靠性。结果表明，我们的方法比 RecoBundles、RecoBundlesX、TractSeg、White Matter Analysis 和 XTRACT 等最先进的自动化虚拟解剖方法更可靠。我们的框架允许通过边际校准工作从一种解剖束定义过渡到另一种解剖束定义。总的来说，这些结果表明我们的框架提高了当前最先进的束分割框架的实用性和可用性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FIESTA方法，利用自编码器实现精准的白质束分割，提升纤维追踪的自动化和可靠性。
AI.motivation: 现有白质束分割方法在准确性和自动化程度上存在不足，难以处理复杂或难以追踪的纤维束，需改进分割覆盖范围与鲁棒性。
AI.method: 基于自编码器与对比学习构建流线潜在空间，结合标准空间（MNI）的束状图谱，通过潜在空间种子采样和生成对抗网络恢复难追踪纤维，实现自动分割与半自动校准。
AI.result: 实验表明FIESTA在可靠性上优于RecoBundles、TractSeg等先进方法，显著提升硬质纤维的覆盖范围与解剖准确性。
AI.conclusion: FIESTA框架通过自编码器与图谱结合，有效解决了白质束分割的自动化难题，提高了现有分割方法的实用性与可扩展性。

search_text: FIESTA: Autoencoders for accurate fiber segmentation in tractography FIESTA：用于纤维束成像中精确纤维分割的自动编码器 White matter bundle segmentation is a cornerstone of modern tractography to study the brain's structural connectivity in domains such as neurological disorders, neurosurgery, and aging. In this study, we present FIESTA (FIbEr Segmentation in Tractography using Autoencoders), a reliable and robust, fully automated, and easily semi-automatically calibrated pipeline based on deep autoencoders that can dissect and fully populate white matter bundles. This pipeline is built upon previous works that demonstrated how autoencoders can be used successfully for streamline filtering, bundle segmentation, and streamline generation in tractography. Our proposed method improves bundle segmentation coverage by recovering hard-to-track bundles with generative sampling through the latent space seeding of the subject bundle and the atlas bundle. A latent space of streamlines is learned using autoencoder-based modeling combined with contrastive learning. Using an atlas of bundles in standard space (MNI), our proposed method segments new tractograms using the autoencoder latent distance between each tractogram streamline and its closest neighbor bundle in the atlas of bundles. Intra-subject bundle reliability is improved by recovering hard-to-track streamlines, using the autoencoder to generate new streamlines that increase the spatial coverage of each bundle while remaining anatomically correct. Results show that our method is more reliable than state-of-the-art automated virtual dissection methods such as RecoBundles, RecoBundlesX, TractSeg, White Matter Analysis and XTRACT. Our framework allows for the transition from one anatomical bundle definition to another with marginal calibration efforts. Overall, these results show that our framework improves the practicality and usability of current state-of-the-art bundle segmentation framework. 白质束分割是现代纤维束成像的基石，用于研究神经系统疾病、神经外科和衰老等领域的大脑结构连接。在这项研究中，我们提出了 FIESTA（使用自动编码器在纤维束成像中进行纤维分割），这是一种可靠、稳健、完全自动化且易于半自动校准的管道，基于深度自动编码器，可以解剖并完全填充白质束。该流程建立在之前的工作基础上，这些工作演示了如何将自动编码器成功用于纤维束成像中的流线型过滤、束分割和流线型生成。我们提出的方法通过主题束和图集束的潜在空间播种来恢复难以跟踪的束，从而提高了束分割覆盖率。使用基于自动编码器的建模与对比学习相结合来学习流线的潜在空间。使用标准空间（MNI）中的束图集，我们提出的方法使用束图集中每个束图流线与其最近邻束之间的自动编码器潜在距离来分割新的束图。通过恢复难以跟踪的流线，使用自动编码器生成新的流线，增加每个束的空间覆盖范围，同时保持解剖学上的正确性，从而提高了受试者内束的可靠性。结果表明，我们的方法比 RecoBundles、RecoBundlesX、TractSeg、White Matter Analysis 和 XTRACT 等最先进的自动化虚拟解剖方法更可靠。我们的框架允许通过边际校准工作从一种解剖束定义过渡到另一种解剖束定义。总的来说，这些结果表明我们的框架提高了当前最先进的束分割框架的实用性和可用性。 本文提出FIESTA方法，利用自编码器实现精准的白质束分割，提升纤维追踪的自动化和可靠性。 Félix Dumais,Jon Haitz Legarreta,Carl Lemaire,Philippe Poulin,François Rheault,Laurent Petit,Muhamed Barakovic,Stefano Magon,Maxime Descoteaux,Pierre-Marc Jodoin cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.IV,q-bio.NC,q-bio.QM

authors_text: Deep Shankar Pandey,Qi Yu
title: Evidential Conditional Neural Processes
title_zh: 证据条件神经过程
abstract: The Conditional Neural Process (CNP) family of models offer a promising direction to tackle few-shot problems by achieving better scalability and competitive predictive performance. However, the current CNP models only capture the overall uncertainty for the prediction made on a target data point. They lack a systematic fine-grained quantification on the distinct sources of uncertainty that are essential for model training and decision-making under the few-shot setting. We propose Evidential Conditional Neural Processes (ECNP), which replace the standard Gaussian distribution used by CNP with a much richer hierarchical Bayesian structure through evidential learning to achieve epistemic-aleatoric uncertainty decomposition. The evidential hierarchical structure also leads to a theoretically justified robustness over noisy training tasks. Theoretical analysis on the proposed ECNP establishes the relationship with CNP while offering deeper insights on the roles of the evidential parameters. Extensive experiments conducted on both synthetic and real-world data demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed model in various few-shot settings.
summary: The Conditional Neural Process (CNP) family of models offer a promising direction to tackle few-shot problems by achieving better scalability and competitive predictive performance. However, the current CNP models only capture the overall uncertainty for the prediction made on a target data point. They lack a systematic fine-grained quantification on the distinct sources of uncertainty that are essential for model training and decision-making under the few-shot setting. We propose Evidential Conditional Neural Processes (ECNP), which replace the standard Gaussian distribution used by CNP with a much richer hierarchical Bayesian structure through evidential learning to achieve epistemic-aleatoric uncertainty decomposition. The evidential hierarchical structure also leads to a theoretically justified robustness over noisy training tasks. Theoretical analysis on the proposed ECNP establishes the relationship with CNP while offering deeper insights on the roles of the evidential parameters. Extensive experiments conducted on both synthetic and real-world data demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed model in various few-shot settings.
abstract_zh: 条件神经过程 (CNP) 模型系列通过实现更好的可扩展性和有竞争力的预测性能，为解决小样本问题提供了一个有前途的方向。然而，当前的 CNP 模型仅捕获对目标数据点进行的预测的总体不确定性。他们缺乏对不同不确定性来源的系统性细粒度量化，而这些不确定性来源对于少样本设置下的模型训练和决策至关重要。我们提出证据条件神经过程（ECNP），它通过证据学习用更丰富的分层贝叶斯结构取代 CNP 使用的标准高斯分布，以实现认知任意不确定性分解。证据层次结构还导致了对噪声训练任务的理论上合理的鲁棒性。对所提出的 ECNP 的理论分析建立了与 CNP 的关系，同时对证据参数的作用提供了更深入的见解。对合成数据和真实数据进行的大量实验证明了我们提出的模型在各种少样本设置中的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于证据学习的条件神经过程模型（ECNP），以改进现有条件神经过程（CNP）在少量样本学习中的不确定性量化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有CNP模型仅能捕捉整体预测不确定性，无法对关键的先验（epistemic）和数据噪声（aleatoric）不确定性进行细粒度区分，这限制了其在小样本场景下的训练与决策鲁棒性。
AI.method: 通过引入证据学习框架，将标准高斯分布替换为分层贝叶斯结构，实现不确定性分解，并建立理论分析证明其对噪声任务的鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在合成数据和真实数据集上的实验表明，ECNP在多种小样本设置中均优于基线模型，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: ECNP通过证据驱动的不确定性分解提升了小样本学习的性能与鲁棒性，为贝叶斯深度学习提供了新的理论视角和实践方法。

authors_text: Yuxuan Chen,Timothy D. Barfoot
title: Self-Supervised Feature Learning for Long-Term Metric Visual Localization
title_zh: 用于长期度量视觉定位的自监督特征学习
abstract: Visual localization is the task of estimating camera pose in a known scene, which is an essential problem in robotics and computer vision. However, long-term visual localization is still a challenge due to the environmental appearance changes caused by lighting and seasons. While techniques exist to address appearance changes using neural networks, these methods typically require ground-truth pose information to generate accurate image correspondences or act as a supervisory signal during training. In this paper, we present a novel self-supervised feature learning framework for metric visual localization. We use a sequence-based image matching algorithm across different sequences of images (i.e., experiences) to generate image correspondences without ground-truth labels. We can then sample image pairs to train a deep neural network that learns sparse features with associated descriptors and scores without ground-truth pose supervision. The learned features can be used together with a classical pose estimator for visual stereo localization. We validate the learned features by integrating with an existing Visual Teach & Repeat pipeline to perform closed-loop localization experiments under different lighting conditions for a total of 22.4 km.
summary: Visual localization is the task of estimating camera pose in a known scene, which is an essential problem in robotics and computer vision. However, long-term visual localization is still a challenge due to the environmental appearance changes caused by lighting and seasons. While techniques exist to address appearance changes using neural networks, these methods typically require ground-truth pose information to generate accurate image correspondences or act as a supervisory signal during training. In this paper, we present a novel self-supervised feature learning framework for metric visual localization. We use a sequence-based image matching algorithm across different sequences of images (i.e., experiences) to generate image correspondences without ground-truth labels. We can then sample image pairs to train a deep neural network that learns sparse features with associated descriptors and scores without ground-truth pose supervision. The learned features can be used together with a classical pose estimator for visual stereo localization. We validate the learned features by integrating with an existing Visual Teach & Repeat pipeline to perform closed-loop localization experiments under different lighting conditions for a total of 22.4 km.
abstract_zh: 视觉定位是估计已知场景中相机姿态的任务，这是机器人和计算机视觉中的一个基本问题。然而，由于光照和季节引起的环境外观变化，长期视觉定位仍然是一个挑战。虽然存在使用神经网络解决外观变化的技术，但这些方法通常需要地面实况姿势信息来生成准确的图像对应或在训练期间充当监督信号。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于度量视觉定位的新颖的自监督特征学习框架。我们在不同的图像序列（即经验）上使用基于序列的图像匹配算法来生成没有真实标签的图像对应关系。然后，我们可以对图像对进行采样来训练深度神经网络，该网络可以在没有地面真实姿势监督的情况下学习具有相关描述符和分数的稀疏特征。学习到的特征可以与经典的姿态估计器一起使用以进行视觉立体定位。我们通过与现有的 Visual Teach & Repeat 管道集成来验证学习到的功能，以在不同照明条件下执行总共 22.4 公里的闭环定位实验。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种无需地面真实姿态监督的自监督特征学习框架，用于解决长期环境变化下的视觉定位问题。
AI.motivation: 现有视觉定位方法依赖地面真实姿态数据生成图像对应关系或作为训练监督信号，难以适应光照和季节变化导致的长期环境外观变化。
AI.method: 通过跨不同图像序列的序列化图像匹配算法生成无标签图像对应关系，采样图像对训练深度网络学习稀疏特征与描述符，并结合经典姿态估计器实现视觉定位。
AI.result: 在22.4公里的闭环定位实验中，集成至Visual Teach & Repeat框架后，方法在不同光照条件下实现了鲁棒的长期视觉定位。
AI.conclusion: 自监督特征学习框架有效降低了对地面真实数据的依赖，提升了复杂环境下的长期视觉定位性能。

search_text: Self-Supervised Feature Learning for Long-Term Metric Visual Localization 用于长期度量视觉定位的自监督特征学习 Visual localization is the task of estimating camera pose in a known scene, which is an essential problem in robotics and computer vision. However, long-term visual localization is still a challenge due to the environmental appearance changes caused by lighting and seasons. While techniques exist to address appearance changes using neural networks, these methods typically require ground-truth pose information to generate accurate image correspondences or act as a supervisory signal during training. In this paper, we present a novel self-supervised feature learning framework for metric visual localization. We use a sequence-based image matching algorithm across different sequences of images (i.e., experiences) to generate image correspondences without ground-truth labels. We can then sample image pairs to train a deep neural network that learns sparse features with associated descriptors and scores without ground-truth pose supervision. The learned features can be used together with a classical pose estimator for visual stereo localization. We validate the learned features by integrating with an existing Visual Teach & Repeat pipeline to perform closed-loop localization experiments under different lighting conditions for a total of 22.4 km. 视觉定位是估计已知场景中相机姿态的任务，这是机器人和计算机视觉中的一个基本问题。然而，由于光照和季节引起的环境外观变化，长期视觉定位仍然是一个挑战。虽然存在使用神经网络解决外观变化的技术，但这些方法通常需要地面实况姿势信息来生成准确的图像对应或在训练期间充当监督信号。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于度量视觉定位的新颖的自监督特征学习框架。我们在不同的图像序列（即经验）上使用基于序列的图像匹配算法来生成没有真实标签的图像对应关系。然后，我们可以对图像对进行采样来训练深度神经网络，该网络可以在没有地面真实姿势监督的情况下学习具有相关描述符和分数的稀疏特征。学习到的特征可以与经典的姿态估计器一起使用以进行视觉立体定位。我们通过与现有的 Visual Teach & Repeat 管道集成来验证学习到的功能，以在不同照明条件下执行总共 22.4 公里的闭环定位实验。 本文提出了一种无需地面真实姿态监督的自监督特征学习框架，用于解决长期环境变化下的视觉定位问题。 Yuxuan Chen,Timothy D. Barfoot cs.RO,cs.CV

authors_text: Karlis Freivalds,Sergejs Kozlovics
title: Denoising Diffusion for Sampling SAT Solutions
title_zh: SAT 采样解决方案的去噪扩散
abstract: Generating diverse solutions to the Boolean Satisfiability Problem (SAT) is a hard computational problem with practical applications for testing and functional verification of software and hardware designs. We explore the way to generate such solutions using Denoising Diffusion coupled with a Graph Neural Network to implement the denoising function. We find that the obtained accuracy is similar to the currently best purely neural method and the produced SAT solutions are highly diverse, even if the system is trained with non-random solutions from a standard solver.
summary: Generating diverse solutions to the Boolean Satisfiability Problem (SAT) is a hard computational problem with practical applications for testing and functional verification of software and hardware designs. We explore the way to generate such solutions using Denoising Diffusion coupled with a Graph Neural Network to implement the denoising function. We find that the obtained accuracy is similar to the currently best purely neural method and the produced SAT solutions are highly diverse, even if the system is trained with non-random solutions from a standard solver.
abstract_zh: 生成布尔可满足性问题 (SAT) 的多种解决方案是一个硬计算问题，可实际应用于软件和硬件设计的测试和功能验证。我们探索使用去噪扩散结合图神经网络来生成此类解决方案的方法来实现去噪功能。我们发现所获得的精度与当前最好的纯神经方法相似，并且生成的 SAT 解决方案高度多样化，即​​使系统是使用标准求解器的非随机解决方案进行训练的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用去噪扩散模型结合图神经网络生成布尔可满足性问题（SAT）的多样化解。
AI.motivation: SAT求解在软硬件验证中具有重要应用，但传统方法难以高效生成多样化解，需探索新型生成方法。
AI.method: 将去噪扩散模型与图神经网络结合，利用图网络实现去噪函数，通过训练生成SAT解。
AI.result: 生成解的准确性与当前最佳纯神经方法相当，且解的多样性高，即使训练数据来自标准求解器的非随机解。
AI.conclusion: 该方法有效实现了SAT解的多样化生成，为验证场景提供了新思路。

authors_text: Jory Schossau,Bamshad Shirmohammadi,Arend Hintze
title: Incentivising cooperation by rewarding the weakest member
title_zh: 通过奖励最弱的成员来激励合作
abstract: Autonomous agents that act with each other on behalf of humans are becoming more common in many social domains, such as customer service, transportation, and health care. In such social situations greedy strategies can reduce the positive outcome for all agents, such as leading to stop-and-go traffic on highways, or causing a denial of service on a communications channel. Instead, we desire autonomous decision-making for efficient performance while also considering equitability of the group to avoid these pitfalls. Unfortunately, in complex situations it is far easier to design machine learning objectives for selfish strategies than for equitable behaviors. Here we present a simple way to reward groups of agents in both evolution and reinforcement learning domains by the performance of their weakest member. We show how this yields ``fairer'' more equitable behavior, while also maximizing individual outcomes, and we show the relationship to biological selection mechanisms of group-level selection and inclusive fitness theory.
summary: Autonomous agents that act with each other on behalf of humans are becoming more common in many social domains, such as customer service, transportation, and health care. In such social situations greedy strategies can reduce the positive outcome for all agents, such as leading to stop-and-go traffic on highways, or causing a denial of service on a communications channel. Instead, we desire autonomous decision-making for efficient performance while also considering equitability of the group to avoid these pitfalls. Unfortunately, in complex situations it is far easier to design machine learning objectives for selfish strategies than for equitable behaviors. Here we present a simple way to reward groups of agents in both evolution and reinforcement learning domains by the performance of their weakest member. We show how this yields ``fairer'' more equitable behavior, while also maximizing individual outcomes, and we show the relationship to biological selection mechanisms of group-level selection and inclusive fitness theory.
abstract_zh: 代表人类相互行动的自主代理在许多社会领域变得越来越普遍，例如客户服务、交通和医疗保健。在这种社会情况下，贪婪策略可能会减少所有代理的积极结果，例如导致高速公路上走走停停的交通，或导致通信通道上的拒绝服务。相反，我们希望自主决策以实现高效绩效，同时也考虑团队的公平性以避免这些陷阱。不幸的是，在复杂的情况下，为自私策略设计机器学习目标比为公平行为设计机器学习目标要容易得多。在这里，我们提出了一种简单的方法，通过最弱成员的表现来奖励进化和强化学习领域的代理组。我们展示了这如何产生“更公平”的更公平的行为，同时也最大化个人结果，并且我们展示了与群体水平选择和包容性适应理论的生物选择机制的关系。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过奖励群体中最弱成员的绩效来激励自主代理间的合作，以解决自私策略导致的负面社会问题。
AI.motivation: 现有机器学习难以设计公平行为机制，而自私策略会导致交通拥堵、通信阻塞等群体性负面结果，需寻找兼顾效率与公平的解决方案。
AI.method: 在进化算法和强化学习中设计奖励机制，以群体中最弱成员的绩效作为奖励依据，结合群体选择理论与亲缘适应度模型进行验证。
AI.result: 该方法有效促进群体公平合作行为，同时提升个体收益，并揭示了其与生物群体选择机制的理论关联性。
AI.conclusion: 基于最弱成员奖励的机制可平衡群体公平性与个体利益，在自主代理协作场景中具有重要应用价值。

authors_text: Zohreh Shaghaghian,Heather Burte,Dezhen Song,Wei Yan
title: An Augmented Reality Application and User Study for Understanding and Learning Spatial Transformation Matrices
title_zh: 用于理解和学习空间变换矩阵的增强现实应用和用户研究
abstract: Understanding spatial transformations and their mathematical representations are essential in computer-aided design, robotics, etc. This research has developed and tested an Augmented Reality (AR) application (BRICKxAR/T) to enhance students' learning of spatial transformation matrices. BRICKxAR/T leverages AR features, including information augmentation, physical-virtual object interplay, and embodied learning, to create a novel and effective visualization experience for learning. BRICKxAR T has been evaluated as a learning intervention using LEGO models as example physical and virtual manipulatives in a user study to assess students' learning gains. The study compared AR (N=29) vs. non-AR (N=30) learning workshops with pre- and post-tests on Purdue Visualization of Rotations Test and math questions. Students' math scores significantly improved after participating in both workshops with the AR workshop tending to show greater improvements. The post-workshop survey showed students were inclined to think BRICKxAR/T an interesting and useful application, and they spent more time learning in AR than non-AR.
summary: Understanding spatial transformations and their mathematical representations are essential in computer-aided design, robotics, etc. This research has developed and tested an Augmented Reality (AR) application (BRICKxAR/T) to enhance students' learning of spatial transformation matrices. BRICKxAR/T leverages AR features, including information augmentation, physical-virtual object interplay, and embodied learning, to create a novel and effective visualization experience for learning. BRICKxAR T has been evaluated as a learning intervention using LEGO models as example physical and virtual manipulatives in a user study to assess students' learning gains. The study compared AR (N=29) vs. non-AR (N=30) learning workshops with pre- and post-tests on Purdue Visualization of Rotations Test and math questions. Students' math scores significantly improved after participating in both workshops with the AR workshop tending to show greater improvements. The post-workshop survey showed students were inclined to think BRICKxAR/T an interesting and useful application, and they spent more time learning in AR than non-AR.
abstract_zh: 了解空间变换及其数学表示对于计算机辅助设计、机器人技术等至关重要。本研究开发并测试了增强现实 (AR) 应用程序 (BRICKxAR/T)，以增强学生对空间变换矩阵的学习。 BRICKxAR/T 利用 AR 功能（包括信息增强、物理-虚拟对象交互和体现学习）来创建新颖且有效的可视化学习体验。 BRICKxAR T 已被评估为一种学习干预措施，在用户研究中使用乐高模型作为物理和虚拟操作的示例来评估学生的学习成果。该研究将 AR (N=29) 与非 AR (N=30) 学习研讨会与普渡大学旋转可视化测试和数学问题的前后测试进行了比较。参加两次研讨会后，学生的数学成绩都有显着提高，其中 AR 研讨会的进步往往更大。研讨会后的调查显示，学生们倾向于认为 BRICKxAR/T 是一个有趣且有用的应用程序，并且他们在 AR 上学习的时间比在非 AR 上花费的时间更多。

AI.tldr: 开发并测试增强现实（AR）应用BRICKxAR/T，以帮助学生更有效地学习空间变换矩阵，并通过用户研究验证其效果。
AI.motivation: 空间变换矩阵的理解在工程和计算机领域至关重要，但传统教学方法难以直观展示其三维特性，AR技术可提供沉浸式可视化学习体验。
AI.method: 设计AR应用BRICKxAR/T，结合LEGO模型作为物理和虚拟教具，开展对比实验（AR组29人 vs 非AR组30人），通过前后测和问卷评估学习效果。
AI.result: AR组学生的数学成绩显著提升且优于非AR组，学生反馈AR应用更有趣且学习时间更长。
AI.conclusion: AR技术能有效增强空间变换矩阵的学习效果，具有作为教育工具的潜力。

search_text: An Augmented Reality Application and User Study for Understanding and Learning Spatial Transformation Matrices 用于理解和学习空间变换矩阵的增强现实应用和用户研究 Understanding spatial transformations and their mathematical representations are essential in computer-aided design, robotics, etc. This research has developed and tested an Augmented Reality (AR) application (BRICKxAR/T) to enhance students' learning of spatial transformation matrices. BRICKxAR/T leverages AR features, including information augmentation, physical-virtual object interplay, and embodied learning, to create a novel and effective visualization experience for learning. BRICKxAR T has been evaluated as a learning intervention using LEGO models as example physical and virtual manipulatives in a user study to assess students' learning gains. The study compared AR (N=29) vs. non-AR (N=30) learning workshops with pre- and post-tests on Purdue Visualization of Rotations Test and math questions. Students' math scores significantly improved after participating in both workshops with the AR workshop tending to show greater improvements. The post-workshop survey showed students were inclined to think BRICKxAR/T an interesting and useful application, and they spent more time learning in AR than non-AR. 了解空间变换及其数学表示对于计算机辅助设计、机器人技术等至关重要。本研究开发并测试了增强现实 (AR) 应用程序 (BRICKxAR/T)，以增强学生对空间变换矩阵的学习。 BRICKxAR/T 利用 AR 功能（包括信息增强、物理-虚拟对象交互和体现学习）来创建新颖且有效的可视化学习体验。 BRICKxAR T 已被评估为一种学习干预措施，在用户研究中使用乐高模型作为物理和虚拟操作的示例来评估学生的学习成果。该研究将 AR (N=29) 与非 AR (N=30) 学习研讨会与普渡大学旋转可视化测试和数学问题的前后测试进行了比较。参加两次研讨会后，学生的数学成绩都有显着提高，其中 AR 研讨会的进步往往更大。研讨会后的调查显示，学生们倾向于认为 BRICKxAR/T 是一个有趣且有用的应用程序，并且他们在 AR 上学习的时间比在非 AR 上花费的时间更多。 开发并测试增强现实（AR）应用BRICKxAR/T，以帮助学生更有效地学习空间变换矩阵，并通过用户研究验证其效果。 Zohreh Shaghaghian,Heather Burte,Dezhen Song,Wei Yan cs.HC

authors_text: Dimitrios Boucharas,Christos Androutsos,George Gkois,Vassilis Tsakanikas,Vasileios Pezoulas,Dimitrios Manousos,Vasileios Skaramagkas,Chariklia Chatzaki,Stathis Kontogiannis,Christos Spandonidis,Alexandros Pantazis,Nikolaos Tachos,Manolis Tsiknakis,Dimitrios Fotiadis
title: Smart Insole: A Gait Analysis Monitoring Platform Targeting Parkinson Disease Patients Based on Insoles
title_zh: 智能鞋垫：基于鞋垫的针对帕金森病患者的步态分析监测平台
abstract: During the preceding decades, human gait analysis has been the center of attention for the scientific community, while the association between gait analysis and overall health monitoring has been extensively reported. Technological advances further assisted in this alignment, resulting in access to inexpensive and remote healthcare services. Various assessment tools, such as software platforms and mobile applications, have been proposed by the scientific community and the market that employ sensors to monitor human gait for various purposes ranging from biomechanics to the progression of functional recovery. The framework presented herein offers a valuable digital biomarker for diagnosing and monitoring Parkinson's disease that can help clinical experts in the decision-making process leading to corrective planning or patient-specific treatment. More accurate and reliable decisions can be provided through a wide variety of integrated Artificial Intelligence algorithms and straightforward visualization techniques, including, but not limited to, heatmaps and bar plots. The framework consists of three core components: the insole pair, the mobile application, and the cloud-based platform. The insole pair deploys 16 plantar pressure sensors, an accelerometer, and a gyroscope to acquire gait data. The mobile application formulates the data for the cloud platform, which orchestrates the component interaction through the web application. Utilizing open communication protocols enables the straightforward replacement of one of the core components with a relative one (e.g., a different model of insoles), transparently from the end user, without affecting the overall architecture, resulting in a framework with the flexibility to adjust its modularity.

abstract_zh: 在过去的几十年中，人类步态分析一直是科学界关注的焦点，而步态分析与整体健康监测之间的关联也已被广泛报道。技术进步进一步促进了这种协调，从而使人们能够获得廉价的远程医疗服务。科学界和市场已经提出了各种评估工具，例如软件平台和移动应用程序，利用传感器来监测人类步态，用于从生物力学到功能恢复进展等各种目的。本文提出的框架为诊断和监测帕金森病提供了有价值的数字生物标志物，可以帮助临床专家制定纠正计划或针对患者的特定治疗的决策过程。通过各种集成人工智能算法和简单的可视化技术（包括但不限于热图和条形图）可以提供更准确和可靠的决策。该框架由三个核心组件组成：鞋垫对、移动应用程序和基于云的平台。该鞋垫配备了 16 个足底压力传感器、一个加速度计和一个陀螺仪来获取步态数据。移动应用程序为云平台制定数据，云平台通过 Web 应用程序协调组件交互。利用开放式通信协议，可以对最终用户透明地用相对的核心组件（例如不同型号的鞋垫）直接替换其中一个核心组件，而不影响整体架构，从而形成一个可以灵活调整其模块化的框架。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于智能鞋垫的步态分析平台，用于帕金森病患者的健康监测，结合传感器、移动应用和云平台实现数据采集与分析。
AI.motivation: 帕金森病患者的步态异常与病情进展密切相关，传统评估方法成本高且难以远程监测，需开发经济、便捷的智能穿戴设备辅助诊断与治疗。
AI.method: 设计包含16个足底压力传感器、加速度计和陀螺仪的鞋垫采集步态数据，通过移动应用传输至云端平台，结合人工智能算法与可视化技术（如热力图）分析数据，并采用开放协议实现模块化替换。
AI.result: 构建的框架可提供准确的步态分析结果，支持临床决策，具备模块化灵活性，且通过AI算法提升诊断可靠性。
AI.conclusion: 该智能鞋垫平台为帕金森病患者提供了可扩展、低成本的远程健康监测方案，有助于个性化治疗与病情跟踪。

authors_text: Aaron Paul M. Dela Rosa,Luigi Miguel M. Villanueva,John Mardy R. San Miguel,John Emmanuel B. Quinto
title: Web-based Database Courses E-Learning Application
title_zh: 基于网络的数据库课程电子学习应用程序
comment: ef:International Journal of Computing Sciences Research (ISSN print: 2546-0552; ISSN online: 2546-115X) Vol. 6, August 20, 2022
comments: ef:International Journal of Computing Sciences Research (ISSN print: 2546-0552; ISSN online: 2546-115X) Vol. 6, August 20, 2022
abstract: This study was focused on the development of a web e-learning application for the database courses taken by Information Technology (IT) students at the College of Information and Communications Technology (CICT) of Bulacan State University (BulSU). The research methodology used in this project was the cross-sectional developmental approach. The Agile Software Development methodology was followed phase by phase, up to the development phase, to develop the system. It was used to produce the desired output rapidly while allowing users to go back through phases without finishing the whole cycle. The goal of this study was to create a web application that teaches Structured Query Language (SQL) in both the MySQL and SQL Server approaches. The application contains quizzes and examinations to allow self-assessment of learning. Additionally, an Entity Relationship Diagram (ERD) simulation was included to provide ERD creations in a drag-and-drop fashion. This study was evaluated using ISO/IEC 25010 software quality evaluation criteria. The study's overall mean was 4.24, 4.41, and 4.33, all with the descriptive meaning of "Very Good," which showed that the system performed its necessary functions as perceived by students, faculty members, and experts, respectively. In summary, the e-learning web application for database courses was fully developed. Moreover, the entity-relationship diagram was integrated well within the system and is accessible to the users. Lastly, respondents evaluated the developed web application using the ISO/IEC 25010 with an overall descriptive interpretation of "Very Good." For future developments of the study, an administrator panel may be developed to manage users and do other administrative tasks. Lastly, higher-order thinking skills questions on assessments and quizzes may be included.

In summary, the e-learning web application for database courses was fully developed. Moreover, the entity-relationship diagram was integrated well within the system and is accessible to the users. Lastly, respondents evaluated the developed web application using the ISO/IEC 25010 with an overall descriptive interpretation of "Very Good." For future developments of the study, an administrator panel may be developed to manage users and do other administrative tasks. Lastly, higher-order thinking skills questions on assessments and quizzes may be included.
abstract_zh: 本研究的重点是为布拉干州立大学 (BulSU) 信息技术 (IT) 学生所修读的数据库课程开发网络电子学习应用程序。该项目使用的研究方法是横截面发展方法。逐步遵循敏捷软件开发方法，直至开发阶段，以开发系统。它用于快速产生所需的输出，同时允许用户在不完成整个周期的情况下返回各个阶段。本研究的目标是创建一个 Web 应用程序，以 MySQL 和 SQL Server 方法教授结构化查询语言 (SQL)。该应用程序包含测验和考试，以便对学习进行自我评估。此外，还包含实体关系图 (ERD) 模拟，以拖放方式提供 ERD 创建。本研究使用 ISO/IEC 25010 软件质量评估标准进行评估。该研究的总体平均值为 4.24、4.41 和 4.33，均具有“非常好”的描述性含义，这表明该系统分别发挥了学生、教师和专家认为的必要功能。综上所述，数据库课程的电子学习网络应用程序已经完全开发完成。此外，实体关系图在系统中集成得很好并且可供用户访问。最后，受访者使用 ISO/IEC 25010 评估了开发的 Web 应用程序，总体描述性解释为“非常好”。为了研究的未来发展，可能会开发一个管理员面板来管理用户并执行其他管理任务。最后，可能包括有关评估和测验的高阶思维技能问题。

AI.method: 采用跨截面开发方法，结合敏捷软件开发流程，分阶段开发系统，并通过ISO/IEC 25010标准进行质量评估。
AI.result: 系统获得学生、教师和专家的‘非常好’评价，ERD拖拽功能成功集成，整体功能满足需求。
AI.conclusion: 电子学习应用开发成功且符合质量标准，未来可增加管理员面板和高阶思维技能题型。

search_text: Web-based Database Courses E-Learning Application 基于网络的数据库课程电子学习应用程序 This study was focused on the development of a web e-learning application for the database courses taken by Information Technology (IT) students at the College of Information and Communications Technology (CICT) of Bulacan State University (BulSU). The research methodology used in this project was the cross-sectional developmental approach. The Agile Software Development methodology was followed phase by phase, up to the development phase, to develop the system. It was used to produce the desired output rapidly while allowing users to go back through phases without finishing the whole cycle. The goal of this study was to create a web application that teaches Structured Query Language (SQL) in both the MySQL and SQL Server approaches. The application contains quizzes and examinations to allow self-assessment of learning. Additionally, an Entity Relationship Diagram (ERD) simulation was included to provide ERD creations in a drag-and-drop fashion. This study was evaluated using ISO/IEC 25010 software quality evaluation criteria. The study's overall mean was 4.24, 4.41, and 4.33, all with the descriptive meaning of "Very Good," which showed that the system performed its necessary functions as perceived by students, faculty members, and experts, respectively. In summary, the e-learning web application for database courses was fully developed. Moreover, the entity-relationship diagram was integrated well within the system and is accessible to the users. Lastly, respondents evaluated the developed web application using the ISO/IEC 25010 with an overall descriptive interpretation of "Very Good." For future developments of the study, an administrator panel may be developed to manage users and do other administrative tasks. Lastly, higher-order thinking skills questions on assessments and quizzes may be included. 本研究的重点是为布拉干州立大学 (BulSU) 信息技术 (IT) 学生所修读的数据库课程开发网络电子学习应用程序。该项目使用的研究方法是横截面发展方法。逐步遵循敏捷软件开发方法，直至开发阶段，以开发系统。它用于快速产生所需的输出，同时允许用户在不完成整个周期的情况下返回各个阶段。本研究的目标是创建一个 Web 应用程序，以 MySQL 和 SQL Server 方法教授结构化查询语言 (SQL)。该应用程序包含测验和考试，以便对学习进行自我评估。此外，还包含实体关系图 (ERD) 模拟，以拖放方式提供 ERD 创建。本研究使用 ISO/IEC 25010 软件质量评估标准进行评估。该研究的总体平均值为 4.24、4.41 和 4.33，均具有“非常好”的描述性含义，这表明该系统分别发挥了学生、教师和专家认为的必要功能。综上所述，数据库课程的电子学习网络应用程序已经完全开发完成。此外，实体关系图在系统中集成得很好并且可供用户访问。最后，受访者使用 ISO/IEC 25010 评估了开发的 Web 应用程序，总体描述性解释为“非常好”。为了研究的未来发展，可能会开发一个管理员面板来管理用户并执行其他管理任务。最后，可能包括有关评估和测验的高阶思维技能问题。 开发一个基于网络的数据库课程电子学习应用，用于教授SQL和实体关系图（ERD）。 Aaron Paul M. authors_text: Simon Apers,Stacey Jeffery,Galina Pass,Michael Walter
title: (No) Quantum space-time tradeoff for USTCON
title_zh: （否）USTCON 的量子时空权衡
abstract: Undirected $st$-connectivity is important both for its applications in network problems, and for its theoretical connections with logspace complexity. Classically, a long line of work led to a time-space tradeoff of $T=\tilde{O}(n^2/S)$ for any $S$ such that $S=Ω(\log (n))$ and $S=O(n^2/m)$. Surprisingly, we show that quantumly there is no nontrivial time-space tradeoff: there is a quantum algorithm that achieves both optimal time $\tilde{O}(n)$ and space $O(\log (n))$ simultaneously. This improves on previous results, which required either $O(\log (n))$ space and $\tilde{O}(n^{1.5})$ time, or $\tilde{O}(n)$ space and time. To complement this, we show that there is a nontrivial time-space tradeoff when given a lower bound on the spectral gap of a corresponding random walk.
summary: Undirected $st$-connectivity is important both for its applications in network problems, and for its theoretical connections with logspace complexity. Classically, a long line of work led to a time-space tradeoff of $T=\tilde{O}(n^2/S)$ for any $S$ such that $S=Ω(\log (n))$ and $S=O(n^2/m)$. Surprisingly, we show that quantumly there is no nontrivial time-space tradeoff: there is a quantum algorithm that achieves both optimal time $\tilde{O}(n)$ and space $O(\log (n))$ simultaneously. This improves on previous results, which required either $O(\log (n))$ space and $\tilde{O}(n^{1.5})$ time, or $\tilde{O}(n)$ space and time. To complement this, we show that there is a nontrivial time-space tradeoff when given a lower bound on the spectral gap of a corresponding random walk.
abstract_zh: 无向 $st$-连通性对于其在网络问题中的应用以及其与日志空间复杂性的理论联系都很重要。传统上，一长串工作导致对任何 $S$ 进行 $T=\tilde{O}(n^2/S)$ 的时空权衡，使得 $S=Ω(\log (n))$ 和 $S=O(n^2/m)$。令人惊讶的是，我们表明量子上不存在非平凡的时空权衡：有一种量子算法可以同时实现最佳时间 $\tilde{O}(n)$ 和空间 $O(\log (n))$。这改进了之前的结果，之前的结果需要 $O(\log (n))$ 空间和 $\tilde{O}(n^{1.5})$ 时间，或者 $\tilde{O}(n)$ 空间和时间。为了补充这一点，我们证明，当给定相应随机游走的谱间隙的下限时，存在不平凡的时空权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了无向图中st连通性问题（USTCON）的量子计算时间-空间权衡，证明量子算法不存在非平凡的权衡关系。
AI.motivation: 经典计算中存在时间-空间权衡关系，但量子计算是否能突破这一限制尚不明确，需探索量子算法在USTCON问题中的潜力。
AI.method: 设计了一种量子算法，通过优化时间复杂度和空间复杂度，同时达到近线性时间与对数空间的最优表现。
AI.result: 提出量子算法实现$\	ilde{O}(n)$时间与$O(\\log n)$空间的同步优化，优于经典及先前量子结果；并证明在随机游走谱隙下界条件下存在非平凡权衡。
AI.conclusion: 量子计算可消除USTCON问题的时间-空间权衡，但谱隙约束下仍存在权衡，揭示了量子算法与经典算法在复杂度分析中的本质差异。
